Fellow Conservative,

It’s former Navy SEAL and current Republican Senate candidate Tim Sheehy. I've been trying to reach you for a while now, but so far, **I haven't had any luck.**

**[I have a few things I need to talk about to engaged voters like you.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e812e53879b8438f85bb1fd56e1be3b1&_e=KnpNsy8S8sAM2Vp7FdNFWB086-rBkHLo6R8sKIXU8-rMqmVW8EO_BfdPaMxxSspb8Pau28GyjxFoeAGDoVIfCXWMcqK4dqqVAmbb5UTrEHqDgpN-U6NIWuFKA74aG4eg-Jd25kTC1eDVy1skdXlicEa6drl4WaSGHORQARRH3vArFq9dbZiUwt9kyMnN_eeKFGUc6SR3YzNQbs6uMb7-EZ-ysr9206yzHEjFVd1fj-M0IaczPHMmlLikKkRps7lXC2bXHzgH1cpl-2PrggGYYUDP6dLDPB5bmwUxSDc-TkIBzjZ35EXS_7UpCFdRF16SGjiAsLFfpymqsc-Afk_RrkvqzLlx9LKIqxrKUkPFpEf3jiE6xZyw2t0rHTaK9tyYCIpU8o5-ltJ7hd1JYVuOdLffEhnfHxklEQS-hgagzAA%3D)**

I didn’t receive enough feedback on my end-of-year survey, so I'm reaching out to you once more.

I've written them down for you to **[view here](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e812e53879b8438f85bb1fd56e1be3b1&_e=KnpNsy8S8sAM2Vp7FdNFWB086-rBkHLo6R8sKIXU8-rMqmVW8EO_BfdPaMxxSspb8Pau28GyjxFoeAGDoVIfCXWMcqK4dqqVAmbb5UTrEHqDgpN-U6NIWuFKA74aG4eg-Jd25kTC1eDVy1skdXlicEa6drl4WaSGHORQARRH3vArFq9dbZiUwt9kyMnN_eeKFGUc6SR3YzNQbs6uMb7-EZ-ysr9206yzHEjFVd1fj-M0IaczPHMmlLikKkRps7lXh3yNuVrAObqDJVFIBwlAc_BtR3RrV5_JMdsj3y8u56p1_j9sBQa-j4YvslnnlZwM0KN05U9seWzyyhabzbOawikm9LqSnISeJR4lSZ5G0X2FNUngiQSPuaWLn42UcAHCaWnhEoXkfoEuHER4mWcaW82MU4k52JtbqHVyollwc9k%3D)**.

[**Let's Talk ->** ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e812e53879b8438f85bb1fd56e1be3b1&_e=KnpNsy8S8sAM2Vp7FdNFWB086-rBkHLo6R8sKIXU8-rMqmVW8EO_BfdPaMxxSspb8Pau28GyjxFoeAGDoVIfCXWMcqK4dqqVAmbb5UTrEHqDgpN-U6NIWuFKA74aG4eg-Jd25kTC1eDVy1skdXlicEa6drl4WaSGHORQARRH3vArFq9dbZiUwt9kyMnN_eeKFGUc6SR3YzNQbs6uMb7-EZ-ysr9206yzHEjFVd1fj-M0IaczPHMmlLikKkRps7lXMytaBGDW1b0HCFs62lW120rYUUsDmwHYHw8FEM9Jj88iQDluxGQXlAx3DzO5vP46c4NIBNTxBIRiw203JIC60lxQcQu7KJEgMlL9pfCLkt91ceaMPJ8ZUmj8N1vI-PJoTaxGA4T2RHob-UDVm4-5aMDGYY9TR_2rPVlQ8ebkx94%3D)

For America's Future,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

|
* * *

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Because of your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
We faced more attacks than anyone going into Iowa, and still, our team showed up to fight for our Great American Comeback.
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=bf70a24b283c4d9898d1a64d0c659bcb&_e=3k0b7GXBWwWKekIxHboVSSiGoxJlsFwtx705AD3ab1METLwGVa8UZ5l7nh3lBX-ablbm12avuOZ1LVTznkD6IY1k5QoGDR_UtaQtfn34zRPfANP6qmX4DUqYXVJk1qNXRWW0Uiq4j_ff-NFO37ICdmSGhXKcLXLQM92_CG9GkbpSWDAQUWif-NSfHulE-c9diG3-_u7v8h7c0o6mSYZCL-2nKw0gyVeWC8nexlS5kwzzNKjOCJdL1kgADTsNn_lX34Uy3FGPSRxmevTbZjJ_upLu1UQEqFUEh2EvnuY5EhShcX-ZpYeHmN3-6mgo2SwATzaJt8618FI4JSbSeWovzESdlYJDvslvTqrTxXS-MeFIom_q2RboQFxIuSS0Ykzsy7y590LktoROv7IcJ6EHncY14EzkxxD_r0q8Fdsn7p_0nPL5ooeZTflyqKYtIZrE)
---
Fellow American, If you saw what happened at the Iowa caucuses this week, you saw an egregious act of election interference. **They've been writing our obituary for months, and this week, they called the election before even 2% of the votes were in. Despite what they've tried to tell you, this election is YOUR CHOICE, not the media's.** Members of our team filed out when reports went out from media sources because they were told their voices and their votes would not matter. That is not the foundation of a democracy we were built on, Fellow American. Even though the media has continued to throw everything but the kitchen sink at us, and our opponents spent almost $50 million attacking us, **we shattered expectations and got our ticket punched out of Iowa.** All we have been able to achieve is thanks to your support. And now is the time for us to continue looking forward and keep working hard. **[Help my team get ready for the New Hampshire and South Carolina primaries by chipping in $15 today!](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=bf70a24b283c4d9898d1a64d0c659bcb&_e=3k0b7GXBWwWKekIxHboVSSiGoxJlsFwtx705AD3ab1METLwGVa8UZ5l7nh3lBX-ablbm12avuOZ1LVTznkD6IY1k5QoGDR_UtaQtfn34zRPfANP6qmX4DUqYXVJk1qNXRWW0Uiq4j_ff-NFO37ICdmSGhXKcLXLQM92_CG9GkbpSWDAQUWif-NSfHulE-c9diG3-_u7v8h7c0o6mSYZCL-2nKw0gyVeWC8nexlS5kwzzNKjOCJdL1kgADTsNn_lX34Uy3FGPSRxmevTbZjJ_umdIvO-ZGKdYJA9PQfu-VGHDBFVJC50Ly6vph-e8uXBBGj2w52D4kMxkDNlDj4Qnwa3cJuJmxzaTyuYtqPksHyqyXeDfPVBbPiETmK366-NASLc71z_ga5aAO9cYtY6mMFOpteIiuBIaEcFWZ76qgeYAoAH6yTjBeLU8EAXBrZ1z)** I KNOW that this team is made up of hardworking, God-fearing, patriotic people. Our supporters are the ones showing up to FIGHT to reverse the madness that's spread across our country. Those are our marching orders. If we continue to work hard and keep the faith we have in restoring America's future, we will reverse this decline that the Left has rained down and bring back the sanity that our kids deserve. _But we are counting on our team to continue to drive us forward._ **_We have a lot of work to do, but I can tell you this: as the next President of the United States, I am going to get the job done for this country. I will not let you down._**
---

We thank you for your support thus far, and know we have a long battle ahead. We are going to get this done. God bless you,

Ron DeSantis

_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_

---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=bf70a24b283c4d9898d1a64d0c659bcb&_e=3k0b7GXBWwWKekIxHboVSSiGoxJlsFwtx705AD3ab1METLwGVa8UZ5l7nh3lBX-ablbm12avuOZ1LVTznkD6IY1k5QoGDR_UtaQtfn34zRPfANP6qmX4DUqYXVJk1qNXRWW0Uiq4j_ff-NFO37ICdmSGhXKcLXLQM92_CG9GkbpSWDAQUWif-NSfHulE-c9diG3-_u7v8h7c0o6mSYZCL-2nKw0gyVeWC8nexlS5kwzzNKjOCJdL1kgADTsNn_lX34Uy3FGPSRxmevTbZjJ_umgZe9F_nwohExvpfA0HKnRgggoePn-y2Uu9E1lq-o-y07iQuhDB37Pn9nXrPsm0Zf4MUpQuif-Tkn48kk77BzU2ywH3RtWXYT2AFeGvEcD4PRXfQPaoyzIvxBwaVgw4OW_d9rQFzpQzXV9VQwy8a53rSf-ThP1YzBIKmAs-gb-C)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

But we are counting on our team to continue to drive us forward. We have a lot of work to do, but I can tell you this: as the next President of the United States, I am going to get the job done for this country. I will not let you down. | | We thank you for your support thus far, and know we have a long battle ahead. We are going to get this done. God bless you, | - Ron DeSantis | | | Get to Know Ron DeSantis | | | Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. | On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. | Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President | This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President PO Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315

name: Zach Shrewsbury
subject: It's all about electability
body:
To win people’s votes, we know we must win their hearts.

| | | [ ](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzs2u921EReiR88ARqrt5HWpbBPunnEofCMh9dr_AFzKQYXwXY5CeX55CFF4KvfQbIcZWqmoeiN-utIwnKdk1a_o&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=011724_electability&n=1)
---
Dear Friend, Since last February, we have been crisscrossing West Virginia, meeting voters and getting to know the communities, serving meals, providing training on how to save those who overdose on opioids, and distributing winter weather gear to prevent people from dying on the streets. **To win people’s votes, we know we must win their hearts and show them that action, not empty promises, will define my service in the Senate.** Some pundits are writing off West Virginia as inevitably lost for Democrats in their quest for the Senate seat. Our analysis is different. And our strategy is different. I know why many working-class people in West Virginia gravitate to Trump’s hateful rhetoric: in the absence of a tangible transformative economic security agenda (and actual policy implementation), it’s easy to get behind the Republicans’ game of blaming immigrants, gender-nonconforming and queer folks, and people of color for the precarious living conditions they must navigate daily to survive. Today, another Democratic candidate joined me in the primary race to replace retiring Joe Manchin. I welcome the competition because it energizes voters and creates a more robust democratic process. It also makes it easier to explain why our campaign is uniquely competitive in general elections with so many working-class Trump voters. Before I declared my official candidacy for the Senate with the Federal Election Commission last year, I visited with voters who did not have me on speed dial. I went to communities where nobody goes. I wanted to make sure that I genuinely understand the bread-and-butter issues of everyday people who have not been backing West Virginia’s Democratic candidates. Our political agenda includes expanding social security by taxing the ultra-rich and clamping down on corporate greed because our seniors are living in poverty and the younger generations have no pensions and no savings. We will work tirelessly for a universal, better Medicare-for-all-type healthcare program that serves everyone without exception because less than 15 percent of West Virginians say they can afford medical care and only 20 percent have a primary physician. **This race is about electability in November against a MAGA Republican who is going to lean into culture war rhetoric. The only way to prevail is to have an ambitious economic security and revival agenda that outlines the path to transform lives (not only) in West Virginia. We are the only campaign that can win against hate in November.** I need your help to bring transformative people-first economic revival policies to DC by first securing the Democratic Party nomination in just five months. **Can you contribute $10 or $25, or go all out with $250 today and help us expand our campaign capacity to win?** Thank you, Zach Shrewsbury (D-WV), Candidate for the U.S. Senate
---
| [](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzs2u921EReiR88ARqrt5HWpbBPunnEofCMh9dr_AFzKQYXwXY5CeX55CFF4KvfQbIcZWqmoeiN-utIwnKdk1a_o&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=011724_electability&n=2 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzs2u921EReiR88ARqrt5HWpbBPunnEofCMh9dr_AFzKQYXwXY5CeX55CFF4KvfQbIcZWqmoeiN-utIwnKdk1a_o&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=011724_electability&n=2)
---
| [ ](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzs2u921EReiR88ARqrt5HWpbBPunnEofCMh9dr_AFzKQYXwXY5CeX55CFF4KvfQbIcZWqmoeiN-utIwnKdk1a_o&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=011724_electability&n=3)
---
| Zach Shrewsbury (D-WV) is running for the U.S. Senate seat as the most electable Democrat in the race. A native West Virginian, a Marine Corps veteran, and a grandson of a coal miner, Zach has a passion for making a difference in his community. He has seen firsthand the struggles faced by working families who are just trying to get by. Zach's military service experiences and his work as a community and climate justice organizer shaped his commitment to fighting for social and economic justice, and he's dedicated his career to making a difference in people's lives. **[For Democrats to keep the Senate, Zach has to win. Support the campaign today.](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzs2u921EReiR88ARqrt5HWpbBPunnEofCMh9dr_AFzKQYXwXY5CeX55CFF4KvfQbIcZWqmoeiN-utIwnKdk1a_o&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=011724_electability&n=4)**
---
| [ ](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6rbkmDOYI5NuQZ-HzmdwgCk4MjN2zZsbl6vgY21K1Bc_MPkg-CdKbV2oT7G6wbyRSA&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=011724_electability&n=5) | [ ](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Tqbsxy1Qz5pw0jJ64A6B69Q&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=011724_electability&n=6) | [ ](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=6s7q0gdldD05tmHEdEfK0JmSdivGVArpG5xu0_dNF9dsMR78UncVjbzZ3epUAZlj&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=011724_electability&n=7)
---|---|---

Shrewsbury for Senate · PO Box 82, Fayetteville, WV 25840, United States
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com We're sad to see you go, but if you believe you received this email in error, or you no longer wish to receive our emails you can unsubscribe using the link below: [Unsubscribe](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/unsubscribe?e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=011724_electability&n=8)

name: Byron Donalds [Chairman]
subject: RE: Republican Ballot Harvesting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 - here's the gist:

| |

---
| | | Hey - I'm Byron Donalds.

The Republican National Committee named me the Co-Chairman of their most important initiative for the next election.

_**[I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024- here's the gist:](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=31082d3261ce4cff93b7d531be2e56d7&_e=rw0e7-lkxqP4bUHXm1-EZto_Np5A4tCz5ToSDg7nWFaA1uo6AajBS8BBzStiCKdEc5nRXq_L5tB7otAQyrSaTLHpHIpy836VAlAzFhT8CyX9i_D_Uzew56HwHBAkQ9am1Jm9tLJNjrdkkymUdV1azB9pFv8QIAno_L2bDetTQ5Ju02OWI8_2k42G6zHKdzkanPHAJx3hjCdjeslxi1W6Mj779dnXr3nCNxj_XVne7LD44gdJc030kZG82lrfR7-6aUB9iFq_1VepL8AAy_pib8Dms7fCVcx6XFPLFX650BZmx0EZNwklvCbesWpDlRy5v1QPDPetBe3AlWo8GaDKxgcOwO3_hCZwo42JcKswBvZ7VhvFPiW9DLbV8ojnvSAyV9Jkk-T1w9QqfyPZcwzOrAMXIHYjRNy6MhvCuO33fBg%3D "I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist:")**_
* If the Democrats vote early, we should push early voting too
* If they can ballot harvest, we should ballot harvest even better
* Invest in an 80,000-person team to ensure your vote is protected
* Mobilize GOP voters through neighbor-to-neighbor contact
* Expand voter contact efforts to connect with young Conservatives
* **Fight BAD ballot harvesting laws - let's make it easy to vote but hard to cheat**

I am proud to lead these efforts and help Conservatives WIN BIG up and down the ballot. These efforts will not only allow us to confront bad actors and stop cheating but will help our Party appeal to younger voters and swing-state independents.

There's just one problem: campaign operations like these are EXPENSIVE. It's not cheap running ads, printing flyers, recruiting volunteers, and expanding voter contact efforts.

_**[That's why I'm coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=31082d3261ce4cff93b7d531be2e56d7&_e=rw0e7-lkxqP4bUHXm1-EZto_Np5A4tCz5ToSDg7nWFaA1uo6AajBS8BBzStiCKdEc5nRXq_L5tB7otAQyrSaTLHpHIpy836VAlAzFhT8CyX9i_D_Uzew56HwHBAkQ9am1Jm9tLJNjrdkkymUdV1azB9pFv8QIAno_L2bDetTQ5Ju02OWI8_2k42G6zHKdzkanPHAJx3hjCdjeslxi1W6Mj779dnXr3nCNxj_XVne7LD44gdJc030kZG82lrfR7-6aUB9iFq_1VepL8AAy_pib_cAOZ9hR57Tchcej2RFr2JZgP3RqYfyF2KptlUZ6DEMbjJG--G22M-E7Bg81pk2manLytewP2huZrqL5LnroMRFfMxTh5lkkRu-0lJlLY2ReoG30tShiTgsm7dBrKbf8vcQ6zz-qqt3wtd6LYMJT6M%3D "That’s why I’m coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?")**_ I know it's a lot to ask but I can promise you this: it'll be worth it when we have **1)** a Conservative House Majority, **2)** a Conservative Senate, and **3)** a Conservative in the White House.

_If that doesn 't convince you to want to help, I don't know what will! Are you in?_

Democrats are early voting in record numbers. Democrats have a sophisticated ballot harvesting operation in deep blue cities. And Democrats are all over social media platforms getting young Liberal voters to register.

**If we don 't do it too, we will lose.**

clean_body: I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 - here's the gist: | | | | | Hey - I'm Byron Donalds. The Republican National Committee named me the Co-Chairman of their most important initiative for the next election. "I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist:" If the Democrats vote early, we should push early voting too If they can ballot harvest, we should ballot harvest even better Invest in an 80,000-person team to ensure your vote is protected Mobilize GOP voters through neighbor-to-neighbor contact Expand voter contact efforts to connect with young Conservatives Fight BAD ballot harvesting laws - let's make it easy to vote but hard to cheat I am proud to lead these efforts and help Conservatives WIN BIG up and down the ballot. These efforts will not only allow us to confront bad actors and stop cheating but will help our Party appeal to younger voters and swing-state independents. There's just one problem: campaign operations like these are EXPENSIVE. It's not cheap running ads, printing flyers, recruiting volunteers, and expanding voter contact efforts. "That’s why I’m coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?" I know it's a lot to ask but I can promise you this: it'll be worth it when we have 1) a Conservative House Majority, 2) a Conservative Senate, and 3) a Conservative in the White House. If that doesn 't convince you to want to help, I don't know what will! Are you in? | | | "PITCH IN TEN BUCKS" | | | "PITCH IN TWENTY BUCKS" | | | "PITCH IN FIFTY BUCKS" | | | "PITCH IN ANY AMOUNT" This is a non-negotiable if we want to win. Democrats are early voting in record numbers. Democrats have a sophisticated ballot harvesting operation in deep blue cities. And Democrats are all over social media platforms getting young Liberal voters to register. If we don 't do it too, we will lose. But make no mistake: We will ONLY be successful with the support of our grassroots team. No matter where you live in the country, this is your chance to directly impact whether Conservative WIN or LOSE the next election. Will you do your part? I look forward to seeing your name. Thank you, Byron Donalds Co-Chairman of "Bank Your Vote" | "Byron Donalds" | | | "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!" This is Steve Scalise. **About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

name: Cory Booker
subject: Kirsten is the real deal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
I’m not usually one to brag [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_fr_defend-senate-2023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_fr_defend-senate-2023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Friend,
I’m not usually one to brag, but I’ll talk all day about just how lucky I am to count Kirsten Gillibrand as one of my closest friends in the Senate.
Kirsten is 100% the real deal.
She’s fighting for progress on the issues that matter to families. She’s running an authentically grassroots campaign. She refuses to accept money from corporate PACs. She’ll outwork just about anybody. And she’s one of the most kind and caring people in Washington. (Trust me on this one — she even learned to cook vegan for me!)
With so much extremism in Washington, we need people like Kirsten, who lead with love, approach problems with compassion, and hold a deep respect for public service.
But Kirsten is up against some powerful forces this year. New York Republicans are riding a red wave from 2022 — and they’ve got their sights set on Kirsten’s seat. I’m going to do everything I can to make sure that Kirsten wins another term in the Senate so she can keep fighting for families like yours. That’s why I’m personally asking: Please, will you donate $5 or more before midnight tonight to help my friend hit her critical $50,000 mid-month goal so she can compete with GOP megadonors and defend our Senate majority? [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_fr_defend-senate-2023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5]
With gratitude and love,
Cory
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs_footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs_footer] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
A note from Kirsten:
Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever.
While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority.
As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs_footer] And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, text JOIN to 60708. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs_footer]
Thank you,
Kirsten Gillibrand
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
Click here to unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/46LjluwB30OIUfgIWihL4Q2?unsubscribedata=vuiZG4DpFJGrvxUEqcy94mqws1wIb%2FqOiUcHxFfF4NFtSoVMkITh0DH1k7PlvHbiF%2F6O4AGKznxk8qn6Xm3uWZEpGGDNlO%2BVT0bZcHJpB4JLFLjWxVTE%2F3Pt7Xodd%2FHcAWVxZhjjqkBjy268jvNbz8IfjFj3LRiJnNBI4oymygxUd1uBzhi7o9MCG2CNgWEWPMSIuDlVx58wbMQeUeLVA3mVkhdrdCGWtyOeI4na6AFTkfbaCOSWB0F0qCeOQF8e6mssHN19omH7QRL4ME1iwC9jgtKe9pqVaLECeFvjhcVqi8al6A9ArmwhKEvpD0Cpz%2BHn66pxV7uJ17hRugTkl7NSZqH42IbMLQ8Ym%2BuwRptzYFDYCMMFrHaUd7xJ2A2%2F%2FCxcWKeKjJA4qb9V6w1%2FS7aBuh00dHV7ZN1kEO65vN8%3D .
By providing your cell phone number you consent to receive periodic text message updates from Gillibrand for Senate, including by automated text messages. Txt HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg&Data rates apply.

I’m going to do everything I can to make sure that Kirsten wins another term in the Senate so she can keep fighting for families like yours. That’s why I’m personally asking: Please, will you donate $5 or more before midnight tonight to help my friend hit her critical $50,000 mid-month goal so she can compete with GOP megadonors and defend our Senate majority? [] With gratitude and love, Cory [] [] [] A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority. [] And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, text JOIN to 60708. [] Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Rick Larsen
subject: The next frontier for Washington state
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
High-speed rail: why it matters to Northwest Washington
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77259585/449887479/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjUzOTdmZS05N2I1LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8zNpcXWw-J59eBTVow5znfj9qNBdzd-xscXOpxkoHn4=&emci=920000ba-7db5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=0f5397fe-97b5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=9494239)
---

| | **Today, I want to share an exciting prospect for Washingtonians and people across the country: high-speed rail.** As our friends across the world can verify, high-speed rail is the next frontier for mid-range transit. I share this view. Better connecting our major manufacturing hubs, as well as major urban centers, is one of the next steps America must take to remain competitive on a world scale. That is why Democrats in Washington state's congressional delegation are taking the next step. Together, we are asking our federal government to begin consideration of high-speed rail — both here at home in Washington, and across America. **Investments like these are a critical long-term investment for our towns, states, and country as a whole. The opportunity is there, and must be unlocked.** While Washington is already committed to our _Cascades_ route linking Portland, Seattle, Vancouver, B.C., and nearby towns, taking the next step with high-speed rail is an investment in our country for the long-term, to connect its communities and grow its economy. **While I have already reached out to the Federal Railroad Administration making our position clear, our advocacy does not stop there. As the Ranking Member of the House's Transportation & Infrastructure Committee, I will fight for this effort every step of the way. ** Because stitching this state and nation together with high-speed rail, as we once did with our national highway systems, is truly one of our most important future frontiers. _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: High-speed rail: why it matters to Northwest Washington | | | | Today, I want to share an exciting prospect for Washingtonians and people across the country: high-speed rail. As our friends across the world can verify, high-speed rail is the next frontier for mid-range transit. I share this view. Better connecting our major manufacturing hubs, as well as major urban centers, is one of the next steps America must take to remain competitive on a world scale. That is why Democrats in Washington state's congressional delegation are taking the next step. Together, we are asking our federal government to begin consideration of high-speed rail — both here at home in Washington, and across America. Investments like these are a critical long-term investment for our towns, states, and country as a whole. The opportunity is there, and must be unlocked. While Washington is already committed to our Cascades route linking Portland, Seattle, Vancouver, B.C., and nearby towns, taking the next step with high-speed rail is an investment in our country for the long-term, to connect its communities and grow its economy. While I have already reached out to the Federal Railroad Administration making our position clear, our advocacy does not stop there. As the Ranking Member of the House's Transportation & Infrastructure Committee, I will fight for this effort every step of the way. Because stitching this state and nation together with high-speed rail, as we once did with our national highway systems, is truly one of our most important future frontiers. subject: Helping hungry families or GOP donors

body:
[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240117-3402-footer&t=1001&akid=3402%2E420207%2EoUCSW2 ]Pramila Jayapal

Peter, history is
on the verge of repeating itself – and millions of hungry, needy people
need our help.

The federal government is on the brink of yet another government shutdown.
And – once again – House Republicans are pushing cuts to food assistance,
Head Start, and Medicaid in this week’s government funding vote.

But Pramila is leading the fight to stop these cuts. This month, she
visited a food bank in Seattle. They told her that their needs now match
what they saw at the height of the pandemic.

But what do Republicans focus on when lines stretch around the block at
food pantries? Tax cuts for the rich, draconian border policies, and a
crock impeachment.

Pramila won’t stand by while Republicans cut aid to needy families while
cutting taxes for the wealthy. She won’t let them jack up spending on
defense contractors while cutting education and health care.

We know that poverty and hunger are not someone’s personal failings – they
are policy failures. And we must stop Congress from making this same
mistake again.

Pramila is determined to fight for working families and ensure that these
cruel cuts never see the light of day — but we need to amplify these
efforts with grassroots support. [ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240117.MR6L6f&refcode=em20240117-3402&t=1002&akid=3402%2E420207%2EoUCSW2 ]Can we count on you to rush a donation

name: Joe Kent
subject: You could win a signed copy of my book.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Joe Kent Victory Fund
body:
Dear Peter,
My book, "Send Me: The True Story of A Mother at War," launches on May 7th of this year.
It is the story of my late wife Shannon Kent and the bravery she demonstrated while serving our nation in the US Special Forces:
_The extraordinary story of American special operator and trailblazer Shannon Kent, who hunted high value targets on classified missions in the most dangerous locales on earth while trying to balance her life as a wife and mother. _
_Of the 1.3 million active-duty service members in the US military, only a tiny fraction are selected as "operators." Shannon Kent was one of the first women to serve at this level and was widely recognized as one of the best._
If you donate to my campaign this January, you will be entered to win a signed copy of my book. You can donate here at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/8N4QbxlXzsYQMVzgMo8v7A/xERVKjb7638v8928oIVheiFIQg).
I only have ten autographed copies available, and I need to raise funds to defeat my incumbent Democrat opponent.
Please donate to ensure I defeat my radical opponent at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/8N4QbxlXzsYQMVzgMo8v7A/xERVKjb7638v8928oIVheiFIQg). You can also opt to make it a recurring contribution by clicking the "Make this Monthly" button.
My book does not go on sale until May 7th, but you could have the chance to win a signed copy. "Send Me" tells the true story of Shannon Kent, a mother who served in one of the most elite forces in the world.
You can be entered into the contest by donating before Midnight on January 31st at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/8N4QbxlXzsYQMVzgMo8v7A/xERVKjb7638v8928oIVheiFIQg).
Will you please help me meet our goal so I can defeat my radical opponent?
Respectfully,
Joe Kent
PS - Enter for a chance to win an autographed copy of my book by donating at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/8N4QbxlXzsYQMVzgMo8v7A/xERVKjb7638v8928oIVheiFIQg).
Paid for by the Joe Kent Victory Fund
---

Did you see my team’s message?

Team,

I’m reaching out to make sure you saw my team’s message. We’re gearing up for a tough election once again, and I need your support to start 2024 off strong.

I’ve won ultra-competitive races before so believe me when I say: **Our 2024 Founding Donors are critical to building the infrastructure we need to win this year.**

In a district this competitive, we can’t afford to take our foot off the gas. That’s why **it would mean the world to me if you join our movement by becoming a Founding Donor today.**

[**We still need 176 additional Founding Donors to step up. Can I count on you to pitch in $5, $25, or whatever makes sense for you to help ensure we have the resources we need to keep OR-06 blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77261017/449907505/1032217744?refcode=em_fr_2024.01.17_b1_as_all-nd&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Yzg4MzZiYy05ZGI1LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0PLmNQMkkGUQsnOt5Np58JS8Df-iIyZ37ibxe0_mdWs=)

_Andrea_

subject: Can we talk for a minute? →

body:
The upcoming special elections over the next two months will make-or-break our state Democratic majorities, and we risk jeopardizing our hard-earned progress if extreme Republicans take back control. | | |

subject: Election Integrity & Petitions Kick-Off Event

body:
| | | | | [](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=95ff071cc0&e=5ccada9200)
---
# _THE MACKENZIE MINUTE_
|
---
Fellow American,
Another week goes by and we continue to build momentum and work hard for victory.
I'm happy to announce another endorsement and that our preparations for the petition period to gather signatures is going strong, with new volunteers joining our team every day.
If you would like to join the team and help us collect the signatures we need to start the process of beating Susan Wild, I hope you will check out the information included below and sign up today. The best way to get started is to attend our Petition Circulator Kick-off event on Monday, January, 22nd (more information below.)
I can’t tell you how humbling it has been to watch our campaign grow since we first launched. The support of local leaders, important conservative groups, and countless donors has been overwhelming. I can’t thank them all enough for their support. Here is just some of what’s been happening with the campaign over the past week:
• Endorsed! Former PA State Representative Julie Harhart• REMINDER: IF YOU HAVEN'T ALREADY, JOIN OUR PETITION TEAM• Our Election Integrity Efforts Continue!
As always, if you need to get in contact with our campaign, please feel free to reach out at (484) 347-8777.
|
---
**NEWS**
|
---
**Endorsed! Former PA State Representative Julie Harhart**
I am pleased to get the endorsement of the Hon. Julie Harhart this week. Julie stated, “I served with Ryan Mackenzie in the PA House of Representatives and I am happy to endorse him for Congress. I know that, now more than ever, Ryan is the right choice to take our values to Washington and fight for what America really needs.”

|
---
**REMINDER, IF YOU HAVEN'T ALREADY, JOIN OUR PETITION TEAM**
Please join the team and help me get on the ballot so we can defeat radical Susan Wild and turn PA-7 RED! The petition period for candidates to get on the ballot is less than a week away! Please join us in circulating petitions and attend our FREE Petition Circulator Kick-off Event. If you have questions about how to collect petition signatures and want to get involved, this will be a great event to attend and learn about the petition process.
**PETITION KICK-OFF EVENT:** Monday, January 22nd 6:00 P.M. to 7:30 P.M. Big Woody's Emmaus Location3941 Chestnut St. Emmaus PA 18049
**RSVP FOR THE EVENT OR SIGN UP HERE TO HELP YOU CAN’T ATTEND...**[https://forms.gle/yF7qMoXLPAdXPUuc6](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=48a35e9a24&e=5ccada9200)
Petition circulation STARTS Tuesday, January 23rd and ENDS Tuesday, February 13th. Ryan needs 1,000 Republican signatures to get on the ballot.
|
---
**Our Election Integrity Efforts Continue!**
Last week, I joined the Republican Women of Northampton County to listen to Northampton County Councilman Tom Giovanni (Thanks for the endorsement, Tom!) as he gave an update on changes they are making to ensure election integrity and proper oversight of the election process in Northampton County.
The election in Northampton this past November was a total mess with voters literally being turned away from the polls. This failure is the fault of Democratic County Executive Lamont McLure and his administration since they run the elections in the county. Tom and the other Republicans on Council are working to make sure this doesn’t happen again.
Now, more than ever, we need to fight for safe and secure elections. We saw the problems that occurred with in-person voting in Northampton. I have been a big advocate for voter ID and making other changes that would add more security to the election process. Fraud in elections cannot stand which is why I have a proven record of protecting the right to vote -- while making it harder to cheat!
This is why I started an Election Integrity Team last year. We have recruited a great group of dedicated volunteers that will help make it easy to vote and hard to cheat in PA-7 this year. If you would like to join this effort, please let us know!
|
---
If you would like to be part of our team, please reach out at [info@mackenzieforcongress.com](mailto:info@mackenzieforcongress.com) or call my campaign at (484) 347-8777.
|
---
**Please donate today and help me defeat Susan Wild !**
| [DONATE TODAY](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=61fabdc6eb&e=5ccada9200)

clean_body: | | | | | THE MACKENZIE MINUTE | Fellow American, Another week goes by and we continue to build momentum and work hard for victory. I'm happy to announce another endorsement and that our preparations for the petition period to gather signatures is going strong, with new volunteers joining our team every day. If you would like to join the team and help us collect the signatures we need to start the process of beating Susan Wild, I hope you will check out the information included below and sign up today. The best way to get started is to attend our Petition Circulator Kick-off event on Monday, January, 22nd (more information below.) I can’t tell you how humbling it has been to watch our campaign grow since we first launched. The support of local leaders, important conservative groups, and countless donors has been overwhelming. I can’t thank them all enough for their support. Here is just some of what’s been happening with the campaign over the past week: • Endorsed! Former PA State Representative Julie Harhart• REMINDER: IF YOU HAVEN'T ALREADY, JOIN OUR PETITION TEAM• Our Election Integrity Efforts Continue! As always, if you need to get in contact with our campaign, please feel free to reach out at (484) 347-8777. | NEWS | Endorsed! Former PA State Representative Julie Harhart I am pleased to get the endorsement of the Hon. Julie Harhart this week. Julie stated, “I served with Ryan Mackenzie in the PA House of Representatives and I am happy to endorse him for Congress. I know that, now more than ever, Ryan is the right choice to take our values to Washington and fight for what America really needs.” | REMINDER, IF YOU HAVEN'T ALREADY, JOIN OUR PETITION TEAM Please join the team and help me get on the ballot so we can defeat radical Susan Wild and turn PA-7 RED! The petition period for candidates to get on the ballot is less than a week away! Please join us in circulating petitions and attend our FREE Petition Circulator Kick-off Event. If you have questions about how to collect petition signatures and want to get involved, this will be a great event to attend and learn about the petition process. PETITION KICK-OFF EVENT: Monday, January 22nd 6:00 P.M. to 7:30 P.M. Big Woody's Emmaus Location3941 Chestnut St. Emmaus PA 18049 RSVP FOR THE EVENT OR SIGN UP HERE TO HELP YOU CAN’T ATTEND... Petition circulation STARTS Tuesday, January 23rd and ENDS Tuesday, February 13th. Ryan needs 1,000 Republican signatures to get on the ballot. | Our Election Integrity Efforts Continue! Last week, I joined the Republican Women of Northampton County to listen to Northampton County Councilman Tom Giovanni (Thanks for the endorsement, Tom!) as he gave an update on changes they are making to ensure election integrity and proper oversight of the election process in Northampton County. The election in Northampton this past November was a total mess with voters literally being turned away from the polls. This failure is the fault of Democratic County Executive Lamont McLure and his administration since they run the elections in the county. Tom and the other Republicans on Council are working to make sure this doesn’t happen again. Now, more than ever, we need to fight for safe and secure elections. We saw the problems that occurred with in-person voting in Northampton. I have been a big advocate for voter ID and making other changes that would add more security to the election process. Fraud in elections cannot stand which is why I have a proven record of protecting the right to vote -- while making it harder to cheat! This is why I started an Election Integrity Team last year. We have recruited a great group of dedicated volunteers that will help make it easy to vote and hard to cheat in PA-7 this year. If you would like to join this effort, please let us know! | If you would like to be part of our team, please reach out at mailto:info@mackenzieforcongress.com or call my campaign at (484) 347-8777. | Please donate today and help me defeat Susan Wild ! | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | CHECKS CAN BE MAILED P.O. Box 747 Emmaus, PA 18049 484-347-8777 | | [Paid For By Mackenzie For Congress]() | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com MackenzieForCongress PO Box 747 Emmaus, PA 18049-0747 * USA

Peter, I need to share some alarming facts that underscore the urgency of our situation:
* Former President Donald Trump secured a decisive victory in the Iowa caucuses, winning 51% of the vote.
* Almost half of Republican voters identify with the MAGA movement.
* Despite overwhelming evidence, two-thirds of Republican voters doubt the legitimacy of President Joe Biden's 2020 victory.
* Nearly two-thirds of caucus-goers believe that a criminal conviction would not disqualify Trump from holding office.

These statistics, Peter, are _deeply_ troubling. Contrary to the majority of Americans, Trump’s supporters in the Iowa caucuses overwhelmingly support restricting abortion rights nationwide. Starting with our fundamental right to choose, our rights are under threat, and we must act **NOW** to prevent another crisis in the upcoming presidential election. The first crucial step you can take is to contribute to my reelection campaign through this [link](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77261484/449914082/610551456?refcode=AU_VAH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240117_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjBjZmViMS1hMmI1LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sGaqPuuq-_djXibbaxEpWfx61Y94pDb5g12P7yg5ckA=). **About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

Fellow Conservative,

It’s former Navy SEAL and current Republican Senate candidate Tim Sheehy. I've been trying to reach you for a while now, but so far, **I haven't had any luck.**

**[I have a few things I need to talk about to engaged voters like you.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=8babf38d63ec46709999d861a95715a1&_e=WRiUn6T4j3H5MUkjyUEZJ57lw1lN0HmfdKSZqPaXGqzcMzqZnCu94iqSOsQo9ashEvDbgDLFotCpzYoZyEOBmGddZ8qFziZrHdTMYt1XJoQ9jeDm127qttvLW1SgMgwN-sp40bt4JInNmy7QHTePoejzdm4ji4NqGLkfSaxrTCVXjSYChd0UgpsinFN7OAhxseyZA-YM6WUZsmrIF6bbmTwz6OyKBDDuX1R_ku4x7_Cn6HJkw1wuIQCydz9zUT20ogljnKDgtxAf0__q5nA8ix6nBbuMqKecX8Wr-s3LZCrqo_Koj7v48dziLIV0jJ3oSN5dsfaezZkxwh2CqNgnb-AHo08ASapTJnH2G-MiiaAmxLQriESWINDEquT2tLZes0vFb_QyPp02ql5i-OaFu2kV-ciaLeSOn5nEYeBVV8s%3D)**

I didn’t receive enough feedback on my end-of-year survey, so I'm reaching out to you once more.

I've written them down for you to **[view here](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=8babf38d63ec46709999d861a95715a1&_e=WRiUn6T4j3H5MUkjyUEZJ57lw1lN0HmfdKSZqPaXGqzcMzqZnCu94iqSOsQo9ashEvDbgDLFotCpzYoZyEOBmGddZ8qFziZrHdTMYt1XJoQ9jeDm127qttvLW1SgMgwN-sp40bt4JInNmy7QHTePoejzdm4ji4NqGLkfSaxrTCVXjSYChd0UgpsinFN7OAhxseyZA-YM6WUZsmrIF6bbmTwz6OyKBDDuX1R_ku4x7_Cn6HJkw1wuIQCydz9zUT20ogljnKDgtxAf0__q5nA8ixLR3Ek2IDIx4ud8XxUe6UpPpoSIMoePgSDip2q-lkHiChlPEyDq76e05mU1nBtOeyjnVrOHVBbHyRJcKwSVDxviRoGdJdqC5pFtVvXHbDBJHWkp8XCidhQ_jQ_8sBndDSaI7LX1V4495v7KQJB9YFg%3D)**.

name: Elissa Slotkin for Michigan
subject: NEW POLL: Trump up by 8 in Michigan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Team,

With just 10 months to go before the election, Donald Trump is leading Joe Biden by 8 points in the state of Michigan, according to a new poll from The Detroit News and WDIV-TV. Take a look: **Joe Biden: 39%
Donald Trump: 47%** Polls this far out from the election should, of course, be taken with a healthy grain of salt. They are, at best, a snapshot in time. But at this point, we’ve seen a few public polls released on the presidential race here in Michigan, and there are some big takeaways:

1\. The road to the White House—and ultimately, control of the Senate—WILL run through Michigan. As Michigan goes, so goes the nation.

2\. It’s going to be close. That’s just a fact about presidential elections in Michigan. In 2016, Donald Trump won the state by 10,704 votes and then in 2020, Joe Biden won by 154,188 (less than 3%).

3\. We have A LOT of work to do to talk to voters over the next 10 months.

There’s a reason we call states like Michigan “swing states.” After all of our success in recent elections, Republicans believe it’s due for a swing in their direction, and they're planning to spend the money to prove it. After all, what happens when you’re in a swing state? You swing.

That’s why we’re so focused on ensuring our campaign has the resources to introduce Elissa to the ten million people in Michigan and talk to voters as early as possible—the folks who will decide our race, and potentially control of the White House. 2024 is here, and we’re ramping up our operation right now – which means your support at this moment is more important than ever.

[_The very best time to donate was yesterday, but the second best time is right now. Will you split a contribution between Elissa Slotkin’s Senate campaign and the Voter Protection Project to ensure we have the resources to keep Michigan blue?_](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59853?t=6&akid=12484%2E878179%2EbHpSzt) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Elissa Slotkin and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59854?t=7&akid=12484%2E878179%2EbHpSzt)

Thank you,

Team Slotkin

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=12484%2E878179%2EbHpSzt). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=12484%2E878179%2EbHpSzt).**

name: Adam Schiff
subject: I could use a boost
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=5111%2E5257348%2Etg-cDv ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek —

With Election Day in California less than 7 weeks away and early voting
even closer, my focus is on building our grassroots efforts to reach
undecided voters in California. [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240117_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=5111%2E5257348%2Etg-cDv ]If you can, will you chip in any amount
to our campaign to help boost our voter outreach efforts?

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240117_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=5111%2E5257348%2Etg-cDv ]DONATE

On March 5, the primary election will be open to all 22 million eligible
voters in California. That means all parties are competing to advance to
the general election. And it’s not just that. I will be running for two
elections on the same ballot – the primary, and the U.S. Senate’s special
election primary, to fill the remainder of the late Senator Dianne
Feinstein’s term.

That means we have less than 7 weeks to reach these voters before they
head out to the polls.

And the truth is, we'll have to connect with a significant number of these
voters even sooner since many will be voting by mail.

Your contributions help maximize our get-out-the-vote efforts that help us
reach voters all across the state.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240117_PM2_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1006&akid=5111%2E5257348%2Etg-cDv ]So please,
Derek, if you want to make a
direct and positive impact on my campaign, please chip in
$10 to
mobilize voters before Election Day.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: [ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Derek — With Election Day in California less than 7 weeks away and early voting even closer, my focus is on building our grassroots efforts to reach undecided voters in California. [ ]If you can, will you chip in any amount to our campaign to help boost our voter outreach efforts? [ ]DONATE On March 5, the primary election will be open to all 22 million eligible voters in California. That means all parties are competing to advance to the general election. And it’s not just that. I will be running for two elections on the same ballot – the primary, and the U.S. Senate’s special election primary, to fill the remainder of the late Senator Dianne Feinstein’s term. That means we have less than 7 weeks to reach these voters before they head out to the polls. And the truth is, we'll have to connect with a significant number of these voters even sooner since many will be voting by mail. Your contributions help maximize our get-out-the-vote efforts that help us reach voters all across the state. [ ]So please, Derek, if you want to make a direct and positive impact on my campaign, please chip in $10 to mobilize voters before Election Day. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $10 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $25 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $50 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $100 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $250 [ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT Thank you for your ongoing support, Adam [ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner [ ]DONATE WEEKLY 135 E. Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

name: EVENT ALERT @ Our Revolution
subject: Invitation: Join Bernie Sanders for a Zoom conversation on money in politics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13454?source=email-20240117&t=1011&akid=5203%2E5885482%2Ew8z0nx ]RSVP

Peter Willis, you’re
invited!

Tomorrow, join us for a movement call with Senator Bernie Sanders to
discuss the critical need to overturn Citizens United and get big money
out of politics.

This month marks 14 years since the Supreme Court’s Citizens United ruling
that unleashed a flood of Big Money in politics. Be part of the
conversation on Zoom this Thursday, January 18 at 7pm ET (4pm PT).

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13454?source=email-20240117&t=1012&akid=5203%2E5885482%2Ew8z0nx ]RSVP now and we’ll send you a Zoom link to join.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13454?source=email-20240117&t=1013&akid=5203%2E5885482%2Ew8z0nx ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13454?source=email-20240117&t=1014&akid=5203%2E5885482%2Ew8z0nx ]RSVP

Billionaires and Big Business have been free to spend unlimited amounts of
money to support tax breaks for the wealthy and weaker consumer
protections, while preventing progress on issues like gun violence
prevention, health care, and climate change.

We must end Citizens United and give power back to the people.

But while the movement to overturn Citizens United is growing, we still
have a lot of work to do to break the grip of Big Money.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13454?source=email-20240117&t=1015&akid=5203%2E5885482%2Ew8z0nx ]Join Sen. Bernie Sanders and leaders from Public Citizen, Our
Revolution, and End Citizens United to discuss how together, we can combat
Big Money in politics.

We hope to see you there!

When we organize, we win,

Our Revolution

name: Tim Sheehy
subject: We made promises
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
I’m under no illusion this will be easy, but as we say in the SEALS, “the only easy day was yesterday.” | [Unsubscribe](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_s=0e45782060b74f5f95afe1cadd6742b9&_t=sLNa9PrssHQKh1jqNM1H5gTGZt2XYfZhTTIoaX3bIGBjclOigsXpAsaX1IMDtXMr6HyB_IXWk2i9LBQ5-e9VYa1_bApMcGoivspEyj1XeIQ%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_s=0e45782060b74f5f95afe1cadd6742b9&_t=sLNa9PrssHQKh1jqNM1H5gTGZt2XYfZhTTIoaX3bIGBjclOigsXpAsaX1IMDtXMr6HyB_IXWk2i9LBQ5-e9VYa1_bApMcGoivspEyj1XeIQ%3D)

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=0e45782060b74f5f95afe1cadd6742b9&_e=_odGZyKnOiIDkllFbsJZ3k4k_tOwo2xtQDSKDUphw8-IgRV6WZXvfLR8aNzqYXgCWHy5RabfN17QeSY4f1rkbbdQZSB7qX2runS6e-ZPEkv1cBBWlsc-UJN8Pk0PqOgpElf85Cvb5Mh0qVuQbt6e9p-UUIm48D_Z6k-6dd3w2v-ZXwyPJNGy1mOpsTJhGGJ8rbsdYgpEAjfxBxhZl1YKfjHT-YQyC1oP8OIh7AEdrsBrwdXH8ds5o1CVjDR4ACMDynGj2Kk8C3aNblVrj6oduZ4IEnTRSarwLHw38PLZGvQZJQIVdhRb2NJTmej-SgG4RWHAthSHWDg0AGrmxrWbaI-iK5PphqBsxVzEMAmAbesnYDCBFdftZUhtdqtWKBc6mxlM0hCPcSquxIwwkI0sFUXlE2PmbGJXk9NG31uOnWI%3D)

Peter,

We made promises we didn’t keep.

Every day, it got worse.

Every day, it was a disaster.

The adult in the room never materialized.

On August 26th, 2021, Joe Biden carelessly washed away the sacrifices made by my wife, me, our families, our closest friends, and countless others.

name: Representative Vikki Breese Iverson
subject: Representing real Oregonians
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Vikki 20022
body:
| Representing Rural Oregonians, every day.
---
[View online version](https://026s4.mjt.lu/nl3/w8UrO4qYhwMArF7FYuuSuA?m=AVgAADL-le8AAAAOtBoAAC7a4LMAAAAATF0AAUT4ABvaFABlqKFvmuMfFI4WQF-24fAOpZgx7AAasDI&b=c7262323&e=ef7de023&x=tfLWWkgYyQnikGdJV5PgPO7Do1p91l8ijm7Oi_gXjrQ)
---
| |
---
|
# **Housing in Oregon is not that complicated! Let's fix it**
---
It was an interesting week during Legislative Days in Salem. We were able to preview bills coming from Legislators and committees destined for the short session this February. That 35-day session will hopefully stay focused on budget fixes and emergencies as originally intended by the voters. One of those emergencies is housing. The Governor declared an emergency a year ago on housing and she declared it again this year. I think we all know how important housing is, not just for the homeless housing but ALL housing. I am laser focused on housing and childcare for the short session emergency fixes. In response to the emergency declaration last year, I was appointed by Governor Kotek to her Housing Production Advisory Committee (HPAC). We spent all last year listening to ideas and ways to increase housing production in Oregon. The reality-we need 36,000 new homes per year for 10 years to just hold water. Last year, we built only 19,000. This is a problem. The HPAC group came out with 59 different ideas to increase housing production in Oregon. I agreed with some of them. I do want to be clear about some of the news stories - I DID NOT AND DO NOT SUPPORT THE TAX INCREASE IN THE HPAC REPORT. I hate to use capitals, but it is important to note my strong opposition to these taxes. That is the last thing we need. There are some good ideas in the report and to that end, Senator Dick Anderson and I wrote a memo to the Governor, Presiding Officers of the Legislature, and members of our housing committees. Senator Anderson is my counterpart as Vice Chair of the Housing Committee in the Senate and serves on the HPAC as well. I have put the entire memo below so you can read it. We met with and have had many discussions with builders, developers, Realtors, cities and more to really boil down the key issues stopping new housing from coming out of the ground. We believe the 6 points in our memo will move the needle today on housing. I welcome your feedback and look forward to hearing other ideas that will actually get us on a roll towards a higher level of production.In gratitude,
| **Vikki Breese-Iverson **
_**House Republicans**_
**Oregon State Representative for HD 59 **P.S. _Help us stop the over-taxing, over-spending, over-regulating and over-mandating of our lives. When we take back the Legislature, we will move quickly to advance an agenda to roll back mandates and taxes while putting our police back to work cleaning up our streets. _
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
|
### **Rural - Urban Divide in Oregon**
---
The Other issue I am laser focused this year will be rural property in Oregon being left behind in ALL of the legislation and money coming out of Salem. For years now, there is a running acronym in Salem called "PGE" otherwise known as Portland Gets Everything. This is true when it comes to money and projects focused on the Portland Metro area versus other parts of the state. ODOT stating they can't plow mountain passes due to a $19 million budget shortfall... ODOT has a $5 billion dollar budget overall, why screw rural Oregonians? Because we are not in Portland. I know this is the crux behind Greater Idaho, State of Jefferson and internally with all the hard working folks of rural Oregon on the frustration with Portland. Of course, the folks living in Rural Oregon who like the left wing agenda will be fine with Portland, but that is a very small percentage of folks and also I constantly remind them why they moved to rural Oregon - to get away from Portland! We have some ideas and potential opportunities we are working on so stay tuned on this front. In the meantime, get out there and check on those babies being born soon with your herd. Couple of fun photos from the winter that finally hit our ranch and me with my herd mama, Blackberry.
| |
---
Heading down the lane to feed the cows this weekend. What an amazing snow storm we had this weekend in Prineville and I am sure everywhere around Oregon.
|
---
This is the view out our kitchen window with the feed lot across the way there.
|
---
| | [**DONATE TODAY**](https://026s4.mjt.lu/lnk/AVgAADL-le8AAAAOtBoAAC7a4LMAAAAATF0AAUT4ABvaFABlqKFvmuMfFI4WQF-24fAOpZgx7AAasDI/1/UrLpj7PR5pTekLZkR1vtHw/aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9mcmllbmRzLW9mLXZpa2tp)

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: I need you to help us stop this tragedy
body:
Did you know the United States has a human rights issue in common with countries like China and North Korea?

| [ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38263%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xbuEWYeajPIdsEinfid3zA&sysid=1)
---
Fellow American,

Did you know the United States has a human rights issue in common with countries like China and North Korea?

**Becuase of the Biden Administration's commitment to the abortion industry, the United States is 1 of 7 countries in the world that allows abortion-on-demand.

**Abortion-on-demand is the ending of an unborn child's life and _ANY_ point of a woman's pregnancy. A baby, fully developed at 38-40 weeks, an be aborted should its mother detemine she does not want her child.

**This is an appalling tragedy happening in our country today and there are many abortionists willing to carry out this barbaric practice celebrated by Big Abortion.

**My heart breaks for the complete devastation and the utter devaluing of human life our own president and his administration is sworn to protect.

These abortion extremists have yet to name a single protection they would grant any unborn child and put it into law. In fact, they want to make abortion-on-demand the law of the land and write it into our own Constitution!

Babies in the womb are screaming in pain because they are being tortured to death and no one can hear them. They have no voice to cry out when they are viciously murdered.

**[We must cry out for them _now_.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38264%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZuuiYgJQfjxyRuzvhZPzUA&sysid=1) **

Stand with SBA Pro-Life America on the front lines in the fight for life and let the Biden Administration know you stand with the majority of Americans and do not support this deadly agenda. Join 72% of Americans who want pro-life protections for babies who can feel pain at 15 weeks in the womb.

Submit your name at the link below and put an end to abortion-on-demand in our country _today._
[SIGN YOUR NAME](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38275%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rqkYl6niGF6hvvBzi4I1Og&sysid=1)
| We must be the voice for the unborn because our president and his administration have proven they will not protect these innocent children.
---
For LIFE,

Marjorie Dannenfelser

name: ICYMI News
subject: Big Pharma and the federal government
body:
In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5ee5ibqdujcgrv86m3p0n79k8u717qajp7bicfg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cljmaor0s9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

The pharmaceutical industry is one of the most notable and most troubling.

Last year alone, “Big Pharma” spent over $373 million on lobbying--much more than any other industry.

While the Constitution certainly protects the rights to free speech and to petition the government, it was never intended to grant the special privileges that are characteristic of today’s bureaucratic, administrative state.

In addition, Big Pharma’s reputation has come under attack in the wake of America’s opioid epidemic--since 1999, more than 600,000 people have died from opioid overdoses in the U.S. and Canada alone--and the COVID pandemic.

Given these current controversies, we decided to host a conference to consider the rise of Big Pharma, its role in the declining state of American health, and ideas for reform.

**The result is a free online video series that reveals the truth about Big Pharma.**

When you watch this free video series, you’ll learn about the collaboration between the federal government and pharmaceutical companies, the content of the “Pfizer documents,” and the origins of Big Pharma and the opioid epidemic.

You’ll also gain valuable insights into Anthony Fauci and the public health establishment from Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/big-pharma-cca/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4shv2ilm86kujd3f8a1vf6bj09viej4pvdtialg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cljmaor0s9h2bs)**

We filmed the series at a recent Center for Constructive Alternatives conference on the Hillsdale campus. You will not have to watch for long to discover why it was one of our most popular and well-attended events.
