name: Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: FBI arrests Babylon Bee actor, terrifies his pregnant wife
body:
Just a short time ago, four FBI agents arrested my friend and client, Siaka Massaquoi, at the airport.

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcs0huq09kla9flt1ltcmepo0895uf5l443mltgg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cljmaor0s9h2bs)
---
| |
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsk6bt0e99usq1akqjvmfkb92mohljd4pu74s398_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cljmaor0s9h2bs)Dear Patriot,

**[Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100 or more right now to help Babylon Bee actor and patriot, Siaka Massaquoi, fight back against Joe Biden's FBI.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9l2su0uj3p1l8nma36kog7h65ljb6dskuo9ql38_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cljmaor0s9h2bs)**

Just a short time ago, four FBI agents arrested my friend and client, Siaka Massaquoi, at the airport.

He was traveling home with his wife, Charlotte, and their unborn baby, after they attended an event hosted by the conservative news site, Daily Wire.

The FBI refused to show Charlotte the arrest warrant.

**Siaka was arrested because he 's a black patriot who can persuade many Democrat voters to vote against Joe Biden on Election Day. **

You see, not only is Siaka a gifted actor (he's starred in Babylon Bee's funny series, "Californians Adjust to New Life In Texas") ...

... He's also the Vice Chair of the Los Angeles County GOP and a peaceful patriot who briefly appeared at the peaceful protest the stolen presidential election at the U.S. Capitol on January 6, 2021.

Siaka is also bold as a lion about his faith in Jesus Christ, his love for his family, and his deep concern for our country.

Of course, all that makes him an enemy of Joe Biden's lawless administration.

**So the FBI arrested Siaka for spending 76 seconds inside the U.S. Capitol. And charged him with four misdemeanors! That 's right, MISDEMEANORS!**

What's more, this isn't the first time the FBI has stomped on Siaka's rights, either.

**Over twenty FBI agents raided Siaka 's home with drawn guns on June 10, 2021 at 5:45 AM, and handcuffed him, his best friend, and two other roommates. **

As you can imagine, his best friend's two little children, just three and seven years old, were _terrified._

And here's what happened next:

* The FBI agents refused to let Siaka speak to his lawyer
* The FBI agents refused to show him the arrest warrant
* The FBI agents grilled him and his friends for FIVE HOURS with no lawyers present!
* The FBI confiscated his cell phone, computer and his MAGA hat and has refused ever since to give them back!
* And we have reason to believe that Siaka and the other peaceful J-6 protesters were illegally and unconstitutionally surveilled!

**And because the FBI didn 't arrest or charge Siaka, he had no legal grounds to find out why they raided his home...terrorized him, his friends, his friend's little children... abused his Constitutionally protected rights...and stole his property.**

Can you imagine being abused like this... _as an American citizen in your own country?_

What the FBI did to my peaceful, innocent client in 2021 and just a short time ago is a CRIME.

**That 's why I've filed a crucial lawsuit that PROVES the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. That means their criminal convictions can be THROWN OUT. And their criminal trials MUST STOP.**

I'm Larry Klayman, founder and general counsel for Freedom Watch.

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 46 years.

You've seen me on Fox News, and other cable news outlets.

I'm proud to say I won a court ruling that President Bill Clinton committed a crime when he illegally the White House files of Kathleen Willey. (I'm the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime)

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers during the impeachment of criminal Bill Clinton.

And I successfully represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and win.****And with this critically important case, I can PROVE IN COURT that Attorney General Merrick Garland, FBI Director Christopher Wray, their departments and agencies at the U.S. Department of Justice ordered and carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE OF LAW-ABIDING AMERICAN CITIZENS!**

Siaka wants to use this critically important lawsuit to speak up for other patriots, too, because he's alarmed at what Joe Biden and his friends are doing to our country.

He's deeply concerned that our country is going down a very dark road...and I agree.

I want to fix this horrifying situation peacefully and legally in the courts...before it's too late.

**[Patriot, I beg you to help me fight back for Siaka and ALL other January 6 peaceful protesters with your very best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right now.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj0mpfcotd49rjsjr5dvoaqttuqb10dcfh3ejq90_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cljmaor0s9h2bs)**

**If Joe Biden 's FBI and DOJ get away with crushing the rights and freedoms of Siaka and all the other peaceful patriots of January 6, they WILL come for you, me, our families, and our friends.**

**[So please don't delay - give your crucial gift of $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9t0ej03o1bfdnmbufn6o25qnaugrvo9ijtet3vo_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cljmaor0s9h2bs)**

Thank you so much!

In Justice,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, the FBI arrested my friend and client, Siaka Massaquoi, because he 's a political threat to Joe Biden's reelection. **They shamelessly arrested him in front of his pregnant wife, Charlotte. They terrified her and refused to show her the arrest warrant.

If the FBI gets away with this, they WILL be turned on you and me our families next.

**[Please support this critical lawsuit with your best gift of $25, $50, $100 or more immediately.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvk7s50uo90onlumcq5niujlom082p3nc9e85l48_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cljmaor0s9h2bs)**

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: Why are Americans not alarmed by this?
body:
%%previewtext%%

| [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681626%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aZHjlLv1lJf5GIwv7eS5GQ&sysid=1)
---
Fellow American,

It’s nearly election season. We hear promises from both sides of the aisle and commitments made to causes the American people rarely agree on.

Surprisingly, however, 7 in 10 Americans agree on this one thing:

**Across our nation, unborn babies should be protected by at least the point when they can feel pain. The latest science proves that unborn babies can feel pain by as early as 15 weeks.**

72% of voters agree on this issue but the American people are still being bombarded with lies and misinformation from Big Abortion and its allies. These "pro-choice" organizations are committed to using misleading information to manipulate women and destroy innocent children for their own gain in this billion-dollar industry.

In their own materials, Planned Parenthood states abortion is “one of the safest medical procedures performed in the United States” and “abortion has over a 99 percent safety record.”

But how can this be true when a child’s life is snatched from its mother’s womb because it’s purposefully put to death? Who is telling the American people the truth here?

_**What do you think about this?**_

[My team and I would love to know your opinion about abortion in America.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681627%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0L8FrKAD3w1XHiPTcXVWHg&sysid=1) We want to know your answers to questions like these:

Do you believe life begins at conception?

Do you believe abortion is harmful to women?

Do you believe that unborn babies have a right to life?

We want to hear what the American people think and invite you to take our [**Abortion in America Survey**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681628%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Md5bhDPNsDz42GDEYhWC8Q&sysid=1) so we know where you stand.

Take the survey today and let us know if the majority of Americans are being lied to by a deadly industry. Help us find the truth by taking the survey today at the link below. We really want to get 10,000 responses from people just like you!

[https://action.sbaprolife.org/abortion-in-america](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681629%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qP0ZeslmT5Obb1swQN%2batw&sysid=1)

For _LIFE,
_Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, SBA Pro-Life America
Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr.
PO Box 803
Arlington, VA, 22206

American Update
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c2267%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=viuT%2fvrdaOs8XIAvYbdTiA&sysid=1)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681620%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6rTQLdJOlL7vrobPzyTenw&sysid=1)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681621%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jJ5EMINkqcLYDJo9XpRLng&sysid=1)_
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c2267%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=viuT%2fvrdaOs8XIAvYbdTiA&sysid=1)

name: John Pierce
subject: Big Pharma and the federal government
body:
In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38271%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=A6tc5c0jwnQ%2bGZa9yMvbRg&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Friend,

In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

The pharmaceutical industry is one of the most notable and most troubling.

Last year alone, “Big Pharma” spent over $373 million on lobbying--much more than any other industry.

While the Constitution certainly protects the rights to free speech and to petition the government, it was never intended to grant the special privileges that are characteristic of today’s bureaucratic, administrative state.

In addition, Big Pharma’s reputation has come under attack in the wake of America’s opioid epidemic--since 1999, more than 600,000 people have died from opioid overdoses in the U.S. and Canada alone--and the COVID pandemic.

Given these current controversies, we decided to host a conference to consider the rise of Big Pharma, its role in the declining state of American health, and ideas for reform.

**The result is a free online video series that reveals the truth about Big Pharma.**

When you watch this free video series, you’ll learn about the collaboration between the federal government and pharmaceutical companies, the content of the “Pfizer documents,” and the origins of Big Pharma and the opioid epidemic.

You’ll also gain valuable insights into Anthony Fauci and the public health establishment from Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/big-pharma-cca/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38272%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gD5N1iDC2brZHOFCAtb27w&sysid=1)**

We filmed the series at a recent Center for Constructive Alternatives conference on the Hillsdale campus. You will not have to watch for long to discover why it was one of our most popular and well-attended events.

**Please use the secure link above to receive your Big Pharma video series. When you complete the form, we will email you the series so you can watch it immediately.**

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College

clean_body: In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators. This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Friend, In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators. The pharmaceutical industry is one of the most notable and most troubling. Last year alone, “Big Pharma” spent over $373 million on lobbying--much more than any other industry. While the Constitution certainly protects the rights to free speech and to petition the government, it was never intended to grant the special privileges that are characteristic of today’s bureaucratic, administrative state. In addition, Big Pharma’s reputation has come under attack in the wake of America’s opioid epidemic--since 1999, more than 600,000 people have died from opioid overdoses in the U.S. and Canada alone--and the COVID pandemic. Given these current controversies, we decided to host a conference to consider the rise of Big Pharma, its role in the declining state of American health, and ideas for reform. The result is a free online video series that reveals the truth about Big Pharma. When you watch this free video series, you’ll learn about the collaboration between the federal government and pharmaceutical companies, the content of the “Pfizer documents,” and the origins of Big Pharma and the opioid epidemic. You’ll also gain valuable insights into Anthony Fauci and the public health establishment from Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link: We filmed the series at a recent Center for Constructive Alternatives conference on the Hillsdale campus. You will not have to watch for long to discover why it was one of our most popular and well-attended events. Please use the secure link above to receive your Big Pharma video series. When you complete the form, we will email you the series so you can watch it immediately. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Your America News Your America News • PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Ever wonder how transgender children’s books get into schools?
body:
Please forgive me for sending you these images, but you must know what we’re up against.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0f4t448r1u0ugkiet9arnfdajt79n5frvf0jl8o_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cljm9oj5c5h2bs "SkyTree Book Fairs")

Friend,

Please forgive me for sending you these images, but you must know what we're up against.

Here's how all those morally disgusting books get into our children's schools - Scholastic Book Fairs.

Like me, you probably have fond memories of Scholastic Book Fairs. They were always a day I looked forward to as a child. It was something fun and new and different at school. And even better, I could find a new book.

**But please realize radical leftists have hijacked Scholastic.**

Here are images from the Scholastic book called _Welcome to St. Hell_ , which promotes trans ideology to kids.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zckefav0o37o5177eprlm44pccjii664l08n9c4o_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cljm9oj5c5h2bs)[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlfbbjcuigth0213521bb6v0hgimi0eai4149c48_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cljm9oj5c5h2bs)

I have a solution. Let's get rid of Scholastic and start a new book fair organization.

SkyTree Book Fairs offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda.

Here's how you can help.

[Please help us promote new book fairs in schools to replace Scholastic. Can you donate $35, $50, or even $100 today toward SkyTree? I am hoping to raise $50,000. Click here to donate any amount today >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlg7u2vhvfaermpaimka9hv553t7pvq5k9tjt1bg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cljm9oj5c5h2bs)

[Donate](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbkqp83qhg37qgvhv1gak390s1qepurru5pvlbeg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cljm9oj5c5h2bs)

Here's the GOOD news!

We've already started hosting book fairs with SkyTree. We hosted a recent one at a Virginia public school, and it was a huge success! There's no reason our schools need to choose Scholastic when there's a wholesome alternative like SkyTree.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoj246q8bfuvfcen82a94os8bh22lhjg3qhn4vro_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cljm9oj5c5h2bs)

Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs. Like many of our cultural institutions in the last decade, Scholastic has fallen prey to the woke mob and radical LGBT political agenda.

SkyTree will bring back wholesome content to kids, like what we had growing up. Kids should remain innocent and have content to encourage their moral character while fostering their imagination.

It's not complicated!

It's what we grew up with.

Please help us host more book fairs this semester. My goal is to raise $50,000 this month to bring school fairs to more public schools across the country. It costs roughly $4,500 for SkyTree to host a book fair.

[Donate $10 >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfuqn2ijbf21tf88kr4v8iqeq76i7b3bd7iinj60_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cljm9oj5c5h2bs)

[Donate $35 >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc7uhnuug7jn260l96r1sgo558k4k6j0vop6lb2o_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cljm9oj5c5h2bs)

[Donate $50 >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zalanmc3k8kimh1pqua53u9mbjkna28h2fs2fmf0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cljm9oj5c5h2bs)

[Donate $100 >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcauvch3oj7aq031u5al90cr3d3o4d673fu7nm3o_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cljm9oj5c5h2bs)

[Donate $250 >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z41uvpp1116dkcqqj1lol6tiubc1160n4r12sp08_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cljm9oj5c5h2bs)

[Donate $500 >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmlsb5bmo6d6rqrbvfpu2iqgu7qvcgdmjqbhu09o_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cljm9oj5c5h2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdulosqoncigpcitck2t1bh6rn2ben4g081ahk5o_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cljm9oj5c5h2bs)

[Donate Any Amount >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znnmrk4r9r223g7a8tdoik5ihlrkt6a0eta1v3r8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cljm9oj5c5h2bs)

God bless you,

Kirk Cameron

name: John Pierce
subject: J6: “Thousands more” to be arrested . . .
body:
So far, more than 1,200 Americans have been arrested. Through my organization, the National Constitutional Law Union (NCLU), I’m currently representing 30 of these defendants.

| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681636%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9aYxvmuBSX9AvoMHtum9pA&sysid=1)
Dear Patriot,

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681637%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sFLFrdbG7nspjJmz9WFq5A&sysid=1) The U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia recently stood behind a podium and announced the DOJ planned to charge “thousands” more Americans who were present during the January 6th protests.

So far, more than 1,200 Americans have been arrested. Through my organization, the National Constitutional Law Union (NCLU), **I’m currently representing 30 of these defendants.**

My trial schedule is PACKED, and **[I need your continued support](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681638%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=V%2fMGpzP6cuUsne41MlQygA&sysid=1).**

My name is John Pierce. After my tour in the United States Army, I pursued a law degree at Harvard University. I was also one of the few conservative editors of the _Harvard Law Review_ (after Obama served in that role).

We need TOUGH and relentless warriors who defend the Constitution, and that's why I gave up my lucrative law practice to pursue Constitutional Law. I never expected this to happen.

In my wildest dreams, I could not have imagined our government rounding up and arresting Americans who attended a political protest.

**During the BLM riots, federal buildings were BURNED, police were assaulted _en masse,_ and God knows how many Americans were hurt. And what happened? The Department of Justice dropped all charges against anyone involved. **

But for the January 6th protesters, our government wants to send a clear message: **Stand up to your masters and pay the price!**

I just returned to D.C. for a hearing, and my funds are running low. The cost of airfare and hotels alone for myself, the defendants, and their families are burning through funds.

Criminal litigation is EXPENSIVE, and I’m pushing the limits of my Harvard Law degree to represent these Americans who need our help.

**[Will you help keep us going?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681639%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VWJ3MJj%2f6BpjQCFuxDK5HQ&sysid=1)**

I have spent countless hours with these defendants and their families. Jobs and homes have been lost. Families have been destroyed. **The DOJ's goal is to terrorize these people to set an example for us all.**

What we see today are the same tactics King George III used before the Revolutionary War started. The British Crown used "writs of assistance" to carry out wide-ranging searches and arrests of anyone for anything. The tactic inspired James Madison to write the Fourth Amendment to our Constitution to protect our privacy.

Today, our government uses high-tech methods to do the same, tracking down anyone who stepped foot on Capitol grounds on January 6th and then using "anonymous" tips to determine their crimes.

Just as King George III abused his power to quell a rebellion among the colonists, our government is abusing its power to do the same.

It's 1776 all over again, and the defendants I represent are the last, best hope that our nation can continue to trust in our Constitution to keep our government in check.

My fight for these men and women isn't just about keeping them out of jail; it's about preserving the framework of our Republic. **[Please help me keep fighting](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681630%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AykCU%2f6i3rB0SPNFQCoFSA&sysid=1).**

Over the next three weeks, I must raise $58,000 to cover our expenses. Travel, hotels, paralegals, researchers, and assisting attorneys all need to be paid. My credit cards are MAXED out, and I'm relying on you and a handful of other patriots to help. **[Will you chip in today?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681631%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=miWNwy0dI81KiEol7XYjlA&sysid=1)**

Every dollar helps and is greatly appreciated.

Thank you for your time, support, and prayers.

In Vigilance,

John M. Pierce
Chairman and Founder
National Constitutional Law Union

DONATIONS TO THE NCLU ARE NOT TAX-DEDUCTIBLE
THE NCLU IS A NON-PROFIT SOCIAL WELFARE ORGANIZATION THAT IS IN THE PROCESS OF APPLYING FOR 501(C)(4) TAX-EXEMPT STATUS. IT IS ANTICIPATED THAT A SUBSTANTIAL AMOUNT OF FUNDS RAISED BY THE NCLU WILL BE PAID TO A LAW FIRM OWNED AND/OR CONTROLLED BY THE FOUNDER, CHAIRMAN OF THE BOARD AND CEO OF THE NCLU FOR LEGAL SERVICES AND COSTS INCURRED BY CLIENTS OF THE FIRM IN CONNECTION WITH LITIGATIONS WITHIN THE FULL MISSION STATEMENT AS DETERMINED IN THE SOLE DISCRETION OF THE NCLU BOARD OF DIRECTORS AND AS APPROVED FOR PAYMENT BY THOSE CLIENTS.

---
| |

Fredericksburg, VA 22408

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: 5 things to know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
I am out on the trail earning the support of the American people because we're getting to know each other face-to-face. Before I get the chance to meet you, I want you to know these 5 things about me.
---
| | | | | | | | | | [ ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8392cd00402ea2013769c550fcbb0b9c43c2104ecd6a1a55efa9211461296091c8326382e81e84bd1e13e5714ddf208cbdda92d61eb7a0c6)
---
Friend, My name is Ron DeSantis, and I'm sure you've heard a lot about me by now. But friend, it is my mission in this race to _earn_ your trust, _earn_ your support, and _earn_ your vote. So I'd like to tell you just 5 reasons today why you can count on me to be the President this country needs.
---
| | [READ MY TOP 5](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8392cd00402ea2013769c550fcbb0b9c43c2104ecd6a1a55efa9211461296091c8326382e81e84bd1e13e5714ddf208cbdda92d61eb7a0c6)
---
I believe this country is worth fighting for, and I will take up arms against every threat to your freedom. As we charge into the next phase of this race, I want to make sure you know exactly why you can count on me. **___[_Visit my site here to read my message._](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8392cd00402ea2013769c550fcbb0b9c43c2104ecd6a1a55efa9211461296091c8326382e81e84bd1e13e5714ddf208cbdda92d61eb7a0c6)___** Yours in Freedom,
---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8392cd00402ea2013769c550fcbb0b9c43c2104ecd6a1a55efa9211461296091c8326382e81e84bd1e13e5714ddf208cbdda92d61eb7a0c6)
---
Ron DeSantis

---
| | | | [ ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8392cd00402ea2013769c550fcbb0b9c43c2104ecd6a1a55efa9211461296091c8326382e81e84bd1e13e5714ddf208cbdda92d61eb7a0c6)
---
| |
**🚨 ATTENTION 🚨** Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click **[here.](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8392cd00402ea201d120b0ec651450226451cc36ad275e2546cd1fa37ec8cc935485745212c6a2806b6d760050dbd893f7cf88131f1f63b3 "here.")**

---

**Volunteer!**
We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!
---
| | [Sign up here!](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8392cd00402ea201e068a22c45fd1d7477a11a4e68883dfcc2787d478fc549acb719625f4c6428b7cfb4c148d691781b97b3cf64f7f7174d)
---
| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [ ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8392cd00402ea2013769c550fcbb0b9c43c2104ecd6a1a55efa9211461296091c8326382e81e84bd1e13e5714ddf208cbdda92d61eb7a0c6)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8392cd00402ea2013769c550fcbb0b9c43c2104ecd6a1a55efa9211461296091c8326382e81e84bd1e13e5714ddf208cbdda92d61eb7a0c6)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
---

Tallahassee, FL 32315

Keeping You Posted on Mark's Campaign for U.S. Congress
| | | |
---
VOLUNTEER NEWSLETTER

Dear Peter,
Just a reminder about an important date: June 11 is the Nevada Primary, which is only 145 days away. Less than five months. We are hard at work getting Mark's name and what he stands for to as many voters as we can.
As we approach the primary on June 11, we will be doing "lit drops" around CD-1. As you can imagine, we need some help with this big job of delivering Mark's campaign materials to the doorsteps of voters in your neighborhood and all around CD-1. Is this something you might be able to help Mark with? Just click on the reply button and send us your name and phone or email, whichever you prefer, and someone from Mark's campaign will be in touch.
If you have any questions or suggestions or would like to become more active in Mark's campaign in some other way, please feel free to call me, Beth Weddle, Communications Director, 702-526-5934, or just reply to this message. You can also schedule a time to speak with Mark by clicking the link below.
Thanks for reading!
We need your help to beat Dina Titus and make Mark our Congressman from District 1 in 2024.

---

subject: Reminder: Mark Has Strong Community Ties!

body:
He Knows The People of the First Congressional District of Nevada!
| | | |
---
# Strong Community Ties
By Mark Robertson, Candidate for Nevada's First Congressional District
---
Members of the House of Representatives represent THE PEOPLE of their respective districts. Therefore, they must have deep ties to the people of their district to know how to represent them best.
Currently, four Republican candidates are running for Nevada's First Congressional District. If you want to know who politicians will be loyal to, FOLLOW THE MONEY. Over 95% of contributions to my Primary campaign come from Nevadans. One of my competitors, who moved here from California and still operates steak restaurants there, received most of his contributions from people in California. Compare each candidate's ties to the community. Here are mine:
---
| | Local small business owner
---
| | Located in Henderson, we helped individuals, families, and small business owners set and reach financial goals. Serving widows, blue-collar workers, school teachers, hotel service workers, and anyone else who needed financial planning. For more than two decades, I got to know thousands of Nevadans on a very personal level.
---
| | Treasurer for the Salvation Army
---
| | Helped with the finances of the local branch of the Salvation Army, serving poor and needy families in the Community.
---
| | Assistant Professor at UNLV
---
| | Taught senior-level finance courses to students in the Hospitality College. Also taught leadership and military science to ROTC cadets.
---
| | Director of Supply Chain Management at Nevada Power
---
| | Led a department of more than 100 people, including purchasing, contracting, warehouse, and small business development. Won national recognition for our efforts to support local small businesses.
---
| | Member of Chambers of Commerce
---
| | Participated in the Las Vegas, Henderson, and Latin Chambers of Commerce, working with other small business owners to strengthen our local economy.
---
| | Youth sports coach
---
| | Coached Little League, soccer, and basketball through Henderson Recreation.
---
| | Scout Master
---
| | Taught boys and young men to become good citizens in the family, community, and nation.
---
| | Vice Chair, Senior Citizen Commission
---
| | Provided a voice for senior citizens living in Henderson. The Commission met regularly with city leaders and officials to help them understand the needs and desires of our senior community.
---
| | Church leader
---
| | Served as a youth pastor, Sunday School teacher, and Bishop for The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints.
---
| | Board member of Opportunity Village
---
| | Provided vocational training and employment opportunities for mentally challenged adults and children.
---
| | Substitute teacher
---
| | As a licensed teacher, taught elementary and high school students in CCSD and charter schools.
---
| | Vice Chair, Vietnamese American Association
---
| | Worked with the Vietnamese and other Asian communities in Southern Nevada to bring awareness of their rich cultural heritage and contributions to our communities.
---
| | Member of veteran organizations
---
| | Meet with fellow military Veterans in local chapters of The Veterans of Foreign Wars (VFW), the American Legion, and the Military Officers Association of America.
---
| Compare my community ties with any other candidate in the race. I know the people of my district because I have worked, worshipped, lived, played, and served with them for over 32 years. I am loyal to you because you are my family, friends, and neighbors.
Mark Robertson
---
| *******

Your Questions--Mark's Answers
Mark Robertson answers your questions with direct and honest answers. Here are two questions Mark was asked recently:
Q: We are a faith-based, Christ-centered organization that believes in our Constitution and family values, so our driving force is our faith and service to God. What is your driving force in regards to how you intend to serve in the capacity for which you are seeking election? -J.S. A. My driving force in running for Congress is a deep desire to serve and represent the people of Nevada's First Congressional District. The President represents the entire country, and U.S. Senators represent their States. It is the House of Representatives that represents the people. I want to do all I can to make a smaller government work for the people in my community. I want to free people from overburdening regulations. That being said, God is first in my life. I follow the admonition of Jesus Christ when he said: "Seek ye first the kingdom of God and his righteousness, and all these things shall be added unto you." (Matt. 6:33) I have "put my hand to the plow and will not look back." (Luke 9:62)
Q. What is your position on "School Choice"? -K.H. A. Parents should have the right to choose which education option is best for their children, and education dollars should follow the child. There is nothing in the U.S. Constitution that says that the Federal government should have any role in schools. Education decisions should be made as close to the child as possible (preferably by the parents), not by bureaucrats in Washington, D.C. I will support eliminating the U.S. Department of Education and block granting the $86 billion they spend each year back to the States in the form of vouchers that parents can use to choose the best school for their children.
Please share this message with friends and neighbors. Have questions for me? Simply reply to this email to ask me a question.
---

The Commission met regularly with city leaders and officials to help them understand the needs and desires of our senior community. | | Church leader | | Served as a youth pastor, Sunday School teacher, and Bishop for The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints. | | Board member of Opportunity Village | | Provided vocational training and employment opportunities for mentally challenged adults and children. | | Substitute teacher | | As a licensed teacher, taught elementary and high school students in CCSD and charter schools. | | Vice Chair, Vietnamese American Association | | Worked with the Vietnamese and other Asian communities in Southern Nevada to bring awareness of their rich cultural heritage and contributions to our communities. | | Member of veteran organizations | | Meet with fellow military Veterans in local chapters of The Veterans of Foreign Wars (VFW), the American Legion, and the Military Officers Association of America. | Compare my community ties with any other candidate in the race. I know the people of my district because I have worked, worshipped, lived, played, and served with them for over 32 years. I am loyal to you because you are my family, friends, and neighbors. Mark Robertson | ***** Your Questions--Mark's Answers Mark Robertson answers your questions with direct and honest answers. Here are two questions Mark was asked recently: Q: We are a faith-based, Christ-centered organization that believes in our Constitution and family values, so our driving force is our faith and service to God. What is your driving force in regards to how you intend to serve in the capacity for which you are seeking election? -J.S. A. My driving force in running for Congress is a deep desire to serve and represent the people of Nevada's First Congressional District. The President represents the entire country, and U.S. Senators represent their States. It is the House of Representatives that represents the people. I want to do all I can to make a smaller government work for the people in my community. I want to free people from overburdening regulations. That being said, God is first in my life. I follow the admonition of Jesus Christ when he said: "Seek ye first the kingdom of God and his righteousness, and all these things shall be added unto you." (Matt. 6:33) I have "put my hand to the plow and will not look back." (Luke 9:62) Q. What is your position on "School Choice"? -K.H. A. Parents should have the right to choose which education option is best for their children, and education dollars should follow the child. There is nothing in the U.S. Constitution that says that the Federal government should have any role in schools. Education decisions should be made as close to the child as possible (preferably by the parents), not by bureaucrats in Washington, D.C. I will support eliminating the U.S. Department of Education and block granting the $86 billion they spend each year back to the States in the form of vouchers that parents can use to choose the best school for their children. Please share this message with friends and neighbors. Have questions for me? Simply reply to this email to ask me a question. | | == | | == | | == | Mark Robertson retired from the Army. Use of his rank does not imply endorsement by the U.S. Military.* | | | | | | | Robertson For Congress | PO Box 750433, Las Vegas, NV 89136 | | Sent by mailto:mark@robertsonforcongress.com

name: Scott Parkinson
subject: ICYMI: Scott Parkinson Publishes Op-Ed Calling to Abolish Federal Income and Payroll Taxes for Active-Duty Military and Veterans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Parkinson for Senate
body:
| | |
---
**For Immediate Release** January 18, 2024 **Contact** : info@scottparkinson.com **ICYMI: Scott Parkinson Publishes Op-Ed Calling to Abolish Federal Income and Payroll Taxes for Active-Duty Military and Veterans** **Arlington, VA-** Yesterday, the Daily Caller published an op-ed written by Republican US Senate candidate Scott Parkinson calling for the removal of federal income and payroll taxes for active-duty military and veterans. Over the next 3 months, Parkinson will release ten policy proposals as part of a ‘Policies from Parkinson’ series where new ideas will be presented to the American People, serving as a dramatic contrast to the radical, Leftist policies supported by Tim Kaine. In the op-ed, Parkinson writes: _"Public policy often creates bogus[disincentives](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/638ea676cdd05cb5dc9f99905c540ea9/42903/e30184e5e84bba7a3947229f28c3afba/7004a3400281f69ec3d6b838967d376c/42903) for the military. From school choice to occupational licensing reform, the military often receives the short end of the stick. Tax policy is no different. The current tax regime at the Internal Revenue Service [treats](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/638ea676cdd05cb5dc9f99905c540ea9/42903/e30184e5e84bba7a3947229f28c3afba/e6badab95d9d43ffc3d6b838967d376c/42903) the military the same as an analyst at the IRS. But there is no comparison between the public service of the staff at the IRS with the brave and courageous men and women serving in the military. _ _As a U.S. Senator my first bill will be to abolish federal income taxes (including the taxation of military pension benefits) and payroll taxes for active-duty members of the military and for veterans who received an honorable discharge and whose taxable income does not exceed $2 million."_ Read full op-ed here: [PARKINSON: Remove The Tax Burden On Active-Duty Military And Vets](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/638ea676cdd05cb5dc9f99905c540ea9/42903/e30184e5e84bba7a3947229f28c3afba/8a724b973465c795c3d6b838967d376c/42903)
---

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: I need you to help us stop this tragedy
body:
Did you know the United States has a human rights issue in common with countries like China and North Korea?

| [ ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d5ea6479db7c48a19fac0958ed5f8175&_e=yCn5VO2SswV7jqQz7knMHnnHgRL1wfOxXM8MPQWcLWYmt1SgfnOsES3dMR-gu24fv7sMww_UDZfGer57p26GoWxnMvYk7Wr6ET8sEHIS9GvKvOhy0LZc0FoawRRUOKOGgPrTIutGMFotmFkh7oggkkJon4ki4vXJGypMgEpPbmMh4XnzIunxAaiHcncmV3f5RdCaPmC98bVXJFwrWz6iN-aDxHF8sNNemRz0KA_hPcjT_gEGuel9liGN4ulv8osTG_B877n6AVjqGueadFSQWnm1y6hGSgUqiN5FDtiDSS-KtaeduWtRVJwOWR66rroygEzKfKFPx-CQLltzgVSUYP0vx0CmGE85TViN0OQSj_RBMwlM8-RjtyaOpBubKudyA4QhATgtKYrk512SZ0laSEaxQXf5sWj9Jrh0yhhyOzU%3D)
---
Fellow American,

Did you know the United States has a human rights issue in common with countries like China and North Korea?

**Becuase of the Biden Administration's commitment to the abortion industry, the United States is 1 of 7 countries in the world that allows abortion-on-demand.

** Abortion-on-demand is the ending of an unborn child's life and _ANY_ point of a woman's pregnancy. A baby, fully developed at 38-40 weeks, an be aborted should its mother detemine she does not want her child.

**This is an appalling tragedy happening in our country today and there are many abortionists willing to carry out this barbaric practice celebrated by Big Abortion.

** My heart breaks for the complete devastation and the utter devaluing of human life our own president and his administration is sworn to protect.

These abortion extremists have yet to name a single protection they would grant any unborn child and put it into law. In fact, they want to make abortion-on-demand the law of the land and write it into our own Constitution!

Babies in the womb are screaming in pain because they are being tortured to death and no one can hear them. They have no voice to cry out when they are viciously murdered.

**[We must cry out for them _now_.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d5ea6479db7c48a19fac0958ed5f8175&_e=yCn5VO2SswV7jqQz7knMHnnHgRL1wfOxXM8MPQWcLWYmt1SgfnOsES3dMR-gu24fv7sMww_UDZfGer57p26GoWxnMvYk7Wr6ET8sEHIS9GvKvOhy0LZc0FoawRRUOKOGgPrTIutGMFotmFkh7oggkkJon4ki4vXJGypMgEpPbmMh4XnzIunxAaiHcncmV3f5RdCaPmC98bVXJFwrWz6iN-aDxHF8sNNemRz0KA_hPcjT_gEGuel9liGN4ulv8osTG_B877n6AVjqGueadFSQWhMeeeUvGxM-tnvrRc0gpQDseeAnJuaaZnixq8kknUUBsfkI6i2b0fYxLUDvvCwHFlWAZ9HLqQOTzSqroqAkg908fU-DMJHALR35fAVlszV78URkOVG7XrOUjHg1eODFdnoT5ri_MmlqvoEkbh60O_M%3D) **

Stand with SBA Pro-Life America on the front lines in the fight for life and let the Biden Administration know you stand with the majority of Americans and do not support this deadly agenda. Join 72% of Americans who want pro-life protections for babies who can feel pain at 15 weeks in the womb.

Submit your name at the link below and put an end to abortion-on-demand in our country _today._

[SIGN YOUR NAME](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d5ea6479db7c48a19fac0958ed5f8175&_e=yCn5VO2SswV7jqQz7knMHnnHgRL1wfOxXM8MPQWcLWYmt1SgfnOsES3dMR-gu24fv7sMww_UDZfGer57p26GoWxnMvYk7Wr6ET8sEHIS9GvKvOhy0LZc0FoawRRUOKOGgPrTIutGMFotmFkh7oggkkJon4ki4vXJGypMgEpPbmMh4XnzIunxAaiHcncmV3f5RdCaPmC98bVXJFwrWz6iN-aDxHF8sNNemRz0KA_hPcjT_gEGuel9liGN4ulv8osTG_B877n6AVjqGueadFSQWuB2VujaD0hBhE6XupUtIyafA9tVqCK-ixW_2_WX25I749z7mv9elbiFuI_6bazDp2jwbCTudhyP4YNrM3dv-XBiQbSRFffJnjw_WIjI0BRIECIqhhuFWjTafIfwb2F-6RH09rNhH4wJK1XTMut1bok%3D)
| We must be the voice for the unborn because our president and his administration have proven they will not protect these innocent children.
---
For LIFE,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, SBA Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr.
PO Box 803
Arlington, VA, 22206

body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ To unsubscribe from the Kiggans for Congress, click here Do you ever find yourself yelling at the television, Peter? I certainly have. It was actually one night sitting on my couch that I finally had enough. I was sick and tired of watching the politicians just talk and talk but never deliver results. I was done hearing all the political bickering and watching all the silly games. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=5bf3aac960487fdf0530a9447b77d5cb7a6e8b23a0305de7b490c6870d04ff12eca9b2c290d3402f66fcbe535fc2ec69f53b8d0b45bbc021ba378ccf01c2d28e So I decided to take the political establishment head on, and I ran for office. I had no idea what I was getting into….. I flew helicopters in the Navy for years. Then I used my GI Benefits to become a Geriatric Nurse Practitioner where I helped care for the Greatest Generation. I’m also a mom of four and wife of a fellow Navy veteran. So the whole politics thing was brand new to me, but I knew I couldn’t just sit on my couch any longer and yell at the TV. I wanted to do something about it. And last year I pulled off a shocking upset and defeated one of Nancy Pelosi’s most loyal supporters and helped Republicans retake control of Congress. Now, I’m the Democrats' #1 target and they're out for revenge. They are already spending BIG on TV ads and billboards lying about me. It’s exactly what the Political Machine does. Lie and deceive in order to hang onto power. That’s why I’m personally asking for your help. If you want to see more regular, everyday citizens in office instead of career politicians, then I need your urgent help. Can you spare anything - even just $8 - to help me defeat the Democrats in this #1 Battleground race? https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=5bf3aac960487fdfd92ddd97b518507b99b961a5f86947f6169aa5907aa183877c2c7be8c35db4dd461f58b5dd75807ee5197c1c6e4df7ee2119df082fbfba30 STAND WITH JEN I can’t stand sending messages like this. Sometimes I wonder what would have happened if I never got off the couch and ran for office…but then I remember that America is always worth protecting…no matter what! Thanks for reading my message. I hope I was able to earn your support. -Jen Kiggans https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=5bf3aac960487fdf9aede223423ffa3a963fc63a898cb7bc9c26679c5152dbb40b7c23a390fb6ff3423340ee330b9c59d04cb95b974fb5a02c75152c5c167c15 JEN KIGGANS is running for Congress in the most competitive House race in the entire country, and she needs our urgent support. Can you spare just $5 or $10 today to protect her vulnerable seat? If we are going to defeat the Democrats and keep the Republican Majority, then we MUST support tough conservatives like Jen Kiggans right now. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=5bf3aac960487fdf1f4a26c6462f1cb3e0ce143f62cf7a043781f66353311e9161c0c08e3aa38a6b56eea93c19c7aae6da7f77e87ab133d2aa74911225c1bf72 >">Give your endorsement to this Navy Pilot, Nurse Practitioner, and Mom >> To ensure you are receiving emails from Kiggans for Congress with minimum to no interruption, please add mailto:info@contact.jenforcongress.com info@contact.jenforcongress.com to your safe sender list, for instructions on how to add a contact, please click https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=5bf3aac960487fdf1fd508633d94fac4c9fa858bc27446d6e422b8e996fde4b1e63c894b6c28f22df48fda78c823d2ca8bd760e748882c92929f460cdd3ec8b8 here . name: John Pierce
subject: J6: “Thousands more” to be arrested . . .
body:
So far, more than 1,200 Americans have been arrested. Through my organization, the National Constitutional Law Union (NCLU), I'm currently representing 30 of these defendants.

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0f27d1659d9949438538746460a64c7e&_e=MYnsybSeHqzqv4r69n_t7wiXb79hOWR8L6lrn9xIKq-oXmxMZLHcif1fXfYYsJiE2lwftYDy1R5VEIkslXYnGfaPIyFQvV9kYiNohJCkR7zNUYsgbXZx9kk9jCfwd3W0JkqhILP22XpoDJq_AjuZ91Lrq9Rxe93kAn1UhI0R1KE4yQGtZybwLcHOLqvU5nOLBQZQ81V26lYOUdRE2DBN27EEb8j9IHbAh4kTqEhEcBuHKnRb7hAd0ZwxnJdV7U9wCRP8sT3M-6tL2U75snNN7oNLFSdYv4V9ddb4ECCyk-LlT1CdW6LP3mVRHkzaGsAO33C2o3PHhYnBVdS1k6phwfcROrPwFKjvcvevWQBrs-D716QMQN5IseeDrA1IbzIZs7FYRz29e5alpkBTRsLWdQ%3D%3D)
Dear Patriot,

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0f27d1659d9949438538746460a64c7e&_e=MYnsybSeHqzqv4r69n_t7wiXb79hOWR8L6lrn9xIKq-oXmxMZLHcif1fXfYYsJiE2lwftYDy1R5VEIkslXYnGfaPIyFQvV9kYiNohJCkR7zNUYsgbXZx9kk9jCfwd3W0JkqhILP22XpoDJq_AjuZ91Lrq9Rxe93kAn1UhI0R1KE4yQGtZybwLcHOLqvU5nOLBQZQ81V26lYOUdRE2DBN27EEb8j9IHbAh4kTqEhEcBuHKnRb7hAd0ZwxnJdV7U9w6O__XEhGdNYnBdZCS5wagAs8H91TIrtViaFuULpNNcx6qoKZZK2MIlzreOoGvm2nMoSsjXIqkqYvdT4YNwDGNREcvt51J68D9bO1oFyfy6TiHY91gSg07K7CpYKsRVOoVUfs5tUVuhi3MwiwvGPTpg%3D%3D) The U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia recently stood behind a podium and announced the DOJ planned to charge "thousands" more Americans who were present during the January 6th protests.

So far, more than 1,200 Americans have been arrested. Through my organization, the National Constitutional Law Union (NCLU), **I 'm currently representing 30 of these defendants.**

My trial schedule is PACKED, and **[I need your continued support](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0f27d1659d9949438538746460a64c7e&_e=MYnsybSeHqzqv4r69n_t7wiXb79hOWR8L6lrn9xIKq-oXmxMZLHcif1fXfYYsJiE2lwftYDy1R5VEIkslXYnGfaPIyFQvV9kYiNohJCkR7zNUYsgbXZx9kk9jCfwd3W0JkqhILP22XpoDJq_AjuZ91Lrq9Rxe93kAn1UhI0R1KE4yQGtZybwLcHOLqvU5nOLBQZQ81V26lYOUdRE2DBN27EEb8j9IHbAh4kTqEhEcBuHKnRb7hAd0ZwxnJdV7U9wNkU6PcoJ3IrUlshzH8tFvtIVj44gy73fkKNkrXv5pi2c3G0HLcpuR4X3mge7u3XyEdKhf1VNOfOWI420kXCrcNH6Hfb05m09Cz_zUkBQIOuCYN8r5-Datuk8xMOUXesuPtAHT2fbh72DlnVq4DMrzw%3D%3D).**

My name is John Pierce. After my tour in the United States Army, I pursued a law degree at Harvard University. I was also one of the few conservative editors of the _Harvard Law Review_ (after Obama served in that role).

We need TOUGH and relentless warriors who defend the Constitution, and that's why I gave up my lucrative law practice to pursue Constitutional Law. I never expected this to happen.

In my wildest dreams, I could not have imagined our government rounding up and arresting Americans who attended a political protest.

**During the BLM riots, federal buildings were BURNED, police were assaulted _en masse,_ and God knows how many Americans were hurt. And what happened? The Department of Justice dropped all charges against anyone involved. **

But for the January 6th protesters, our government wants to send a clear message: **Stand up to your masters and pay the price!**

I just returned to D.C. for a hearing, and my funds are running low. The cost of airfare and hotels alone for myself, the defendants, and their families are burning through funds.

Criminal litigation is EXPENSIVE, and I'm pushing the limits of my Harvard Law degree to represent these Americans who need our help.

**[Will you help keep us going?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0f27d1659d9949438538746460a64c7e&_e=MYnsybSeHqzqv4r69n_t7wiXb79hOWR8L6lrn9xIKq-oXmxMZLHcif1fXfYYsJiE2lwftYDy1R5VEIkslXYnGfaPIyFQvV9kYiNohJCkR7zNUYsgbXZx9kk9jCfwd3W0JkqhILP22XpoDJq_AjuZ91Lrq9Rxe93kAn1UhI0R1KE4yQGtZybwLcHOLqvU5nOLBQZQ81V26lYOUdRE2DBN27EEb8j9IHbAh4kTqEhEcBuHKnRb7hAd0ZwxnJdV7U9wZtVrQYRYNazykjoHRf3hofYL9mMUOeeHKDKf2sVKQXwvZHUNYvXW_L1a8UyADV0_L1hRjJSRvoCi7AQmEiz11rY_MGmHP0PjKeAX2SXpBdN7vrQaPWi0FTxn9ARpFJXebEfBm7qz4RQ6VG6Qmgp8tw%3D%3D)**

I have spent countless hours with these defendants and their families. Jobs and homes have been lost. Families have been destroyed. **The DOJ's goal is to terrorize these people to set an example for us all.**

What we see today are the same tactics King George III used before the Revolutionary War started. The British Crown used "writs of assistance" to carry out wide-ranging searches and arrests of anyone for anything. The tactic inspired James Madison to write the Fourth Amendment to our Constitution to protect our privacy.

Today, our government uses high-tech methods to do the same, tracking down anyone who stepped foot on Capitol grounds on January 6th and then using "anonymous" tips to determine their crimes.

Just as King George III abused his power to quell a rebellion among the colonists, our government is abusing its power to do the same.

It's 1776 all over again, and the defendants I represent are the last, best hope that our nation can continue to trust in our Constitution to keep our government in check.

My fight for these men and women isn't just about keeping them out of jail; it's about preserving the framework of our Republic. **[Please help me keep fighting](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0f27d1659d9949438538746460a64c7e&_e=MYnsybSeHqzqv4r69n_t7wiXb79hOWR8L6lrn9xIKq-oXmxMZLHcif1fXfYYsJiE2lwftYDy1R5VEIkslXYnGfaPIyFQvV9kYiNohJCkR7zNUYsgbXZx9kk9jCfwd3W0JkqhILP22XpoDJq_AjuZ91Lrq9Rxe93kAn1UhI0R1KE4yQGtZybwLcHOLqvU5nOLBQZQ81V26lYOUdRE2DBN27EEb8j9IHbAh4kTqEhEcBuHKnRb7hAd0ZwxnJdV7U9wrZHWClzmo4LQ-GAxcapku35106eFL8zxMEab3PzkPeUsjX7nVBpx2IU3yFClBq43diNF9VHgG3lzlQSFssMlkgz7NIIl7eSWSX3g1NYaHdhoeldg6SM9gKQ8LMhH5w7q8bO5JHuQejXJKBNHx5x_9g%3D%3D).**

Over the next three weeks, I must raise $58,000 to cover our expenses. Travel, hotels, paralegals, researchers, and assisting attorneys all need to be paid. My credit cards are MAXED out, and I'm relying on you and a handful of other patriots to help. **[Will you chip in today?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0f27d1659d9949438538746460a64c7e&_e=MYnsybSeHqzqv4r69n_t7wiXb79hOWR8L6lrn9xIKq-oXmxMZLHcif1fXfYYsJiE2lwftYDy1R5VEIkslXYnGfaPIyFQvV9kYiNohJCkR7zNUYsgbXZx9kk9jCfwd3W0JkqhILP22XpoDJq_AjuZ91Lrq9Rxe93kAn1UhI0R1KE4yQGtZybwLcHOLqvU5nOLBQZQ81V26lYOUdRE2DBN27EEb8j9IHbAh4kTqEhEcBuHKnRb7hAd0ZwxnJdV7U9wVZDF4kbDUkzeqYc_IHIz0b4E1Cn0nAA_OTIdVm4HwG1F-gTOdxj5zNUGduowIGwv1-wriVP4paRSGwpT2MtREK5hwM-XEo106Xls71qM7zNFnx1jiMzpLlywlLve6RBGSPeXj4F4nHNU3duPey_GKg%3D%3D)**

Every dollar helps and is greatly appreciated.

Thank you for your time, support, and prayers.

In Vigilance,

John M. Pierce
Chairman and Founder
National Constitutional Law Union

DONATIONS TO THE NCLU ARE NOT TAX-DEDUCTIBLE

clean_body: So far, more than 1,200 Americans have been arrested. Through my organization, the National Constitutional Law Union (NCLU), I'm currently representing 30 of these defendants. | | | Dear Patriot, The U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia recently stood behind a podium and announced the DOJ planned to charge "thousands" more Americans who were present during the January 6th protests. So far, more than 1,200 Americans have been arrested. Through my organization, the National Constitutional Law Union (NCLU), I 'm currently representing 30 of these defendants. My trial schedule is PACKED, and . My name is John Pierce. After my tour in the United States Army, I pursued a law degree at Harvard University. I was also one of the few conservative editors of the Harvard Law Review (after Obama served in that role). We need TOUGH and relentless warriors who defend the Constitution, and that's why I gave up my lucrative law practice to pursue Constitutional Law. I never expected this to happen. In my wildest dreams, I could not have imagined our government rounding up and arresting Americans who attended a political protest. During the BLM riots, federal buildings were BURNED, police were assaulted en masse, and God knows how many Americans were hurt. And what happened? The Department of Justice dropped all charges against anyone involved. But for the January 6th protesters, our government wants to send a clear message: Stand up to your masters and pay the price! I just returned to D.C. for a hearing, and my funds are running low. The cost of airfare and hotels alone for myself, the defendants, and their families are burning through funds. Criminal litigation is EXPENSIVE, and I'm pushing the limits of my Harvard Law degree to represent these Americans who need our help. I have spent countless hours with these defendants and their families. Jobs and homes have been lost. Families have been destroyed. The DOJ's goal is to terrorize these people to set an example for us all. What we see today are the same tactics King George III used before the Revolutionary War started. The British Crown used "writs of assistance" to carry out wide-ranging searches and arrests of anyone for anything. The tactic inspired James Madison to write the Fourth Amendment to our Constitution to protect our privacy. Today, our government uses high-tech methods to do the same, tracking down anyone who stepped foot on Capitol grounds on January 6th and then using "anonymous" tips to determine their crimes. Just as King George III abused his power to quell a rebellion among the colonists, our government is abusing its power to do the same. It's 1776 all over again, and the defendants I represent are the last, best hope that our nation can continue to trust in our Constitution to keep our government in check. My fight for these men and women isn't just about keeping them out of jail; it's about preserving the framework of our Republic. . Over the next three weeks, I must raise $58,000 to cover our expenses. Travel, hotels, paralegals, researchers, and assisting attorneys all need to be paid. My credit cards are MAXED out, and I'm relying on you and a handful of other patriots to help. Every dollar helps and is greatly appreciated. Thank you for your time, support, and prayers. In Vigilance, John M. Pierce Chairman and Founder National Constitutional Law Union DONATIONS TO THE NCLU ARE NOT TAX-DEDUCTIBLE THE NCLU IS A NON-PROFIT SOCIAL WELFARE ORGANIZATION THAT IS IN THE PROCESS OF APPLYING FOR 501(C)(4) TAX-EXEMPT STATUS. IT IS ANTICIPATED THAT A SUBSTANTIAL AMOUNT OF FUNDS RAISED BY THE NCLU WILL BE PAID TO A LAW FIRM OWNED AND/OR CONTROLLED BY THE FOUNDER, CHAIRMAN OF THE BOARD AND CEO OF THE NCLU FOR LEGAL SERVICES AND COSTS INCURRED BY CLIENTS OF THE FIRM IN CONNECTION WITH LITIGATIONS WITHIN THE FULL MISSION STATEMENT AS DETERMINED IN THE SOLE DISCRETION OF THE NCLU BOARD OF DIRECTORS AND AS APPROVED FOR PAYMENT BY THOSE CLIENTS. | | * | (C) 2024 NCLU 10908 Courthouse Road, Suite 102164 Fredericksburg, VA 22408 To opt-out of marketing emails like these, please unsubscribe below. Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

## Supreme Court Reviews Regulatory Powers
The Supreme Court heard arguments Wednesday on a case that could [sharply curtail federal regulatory powers.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L1uwyAUxfGngc0RXL7sgaGLt3TtaBFyMVTYRPg6Vd--Srt2_h3pSP-P63INpZZ9fQ8bekptCZHKExc5yHEAvWh-9wkRUHH00gljRifsxLO3OiqMNiE6dzNOmMmmCZRMyqUoQ-DFgwAtpBylFAKmyxgxSqsUmmhMdJppgfdCrV8-W9kpY6rf7Yn9EtvGq89Ej4OpNwYzg5ky5lLryxjMHdezBiptZzDHdnYaboGo4sFg1lpqAXY4zkfHDYc_jxmfve1D6Ou54U6vJe_-_vgqtZbDOqbFuoXye8Hp3xg_AQAA__8BrmE9) The case involves fishing regulations, but the justices appeared inclined toward a broad review of federal power. The core issue is a 40-year-old legal doctrine referred to as "Chevron deference," which calls for courts to [defer to agency expertise](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FyhCAQQL8GO53dFQULijR0lzalQ3A9ySDcIKfJ32cudeo38968j9t8cyGGdH93O5u65tn5Gk6esUXdkpxls5iVmbhv2KCCYdAKxqnZjFqAYIJR9tKhJEJap2H5XBUiai91EwwBSUDUiAA0ddqzx7HvefDD4JUUEngJNZfuK4dUN17jTz65dD7vTTRbrY9D9G-CrCB7XVfnvkM-XlSQfbkFWUBBFpUgezwfhXdufX6W2vqNz5JTy-kMJaedU22KWR5XiDEcoxIS7rsL8a9V_z3_DQAA__9j_lgr) when regulations are expanded without input from Congress. During questioning Wednesday on fishing regulations, several of the more conservative justices indicated they would prefer agencies to have explicit Congressional approval before unilaterally expanding their oversight.
## SpaceX Plans Manned Launch Today
SpaceX plans to launch a four-person crew to the International Space Station today, after a one-day delay. If launch preparations go as scheduled, the blast-off should be available to [watch live at 4:15 p.m. ET here.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsjz1vwyAUAH-N2bDg8WEyMHTJlq4drSd4iYmwiYDE8b-vmrnbSTec7ucyXzDltN2-cSXfr2XG0NOLZsml46BnzaK_EgEpRl5Owhg3CXtiiw9GTiSsNhGURAEWFJoQQCl7AgWOJQ8CtJDSSSkEnEYXKEirFJlgTJj0oAXF1Esd7yVtfaFrPsqL6hjKyrJfen-0QX0NcB7gvO_72B4Y6M8OcP7wm-ObK46t17Lhs_M1tZbKxiNlPHhfnrVFPPgdtyfWg0vHqo-PPeWcmp0GLW4rpvwJ9n_3fwMAAP__CMRcBg) Today's mission is SpaceX's third manned launch, a private-industry flight for Axiom Space, dubbed the Ax-3 mission. The crew will spend two weeks aboard the space stations conducting more than 30 experiments. The crew is the first [all-European crew](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGOtCAUBeCnwe4auKhoQTGN3fzNX2xpEK8jGwQDzDjz9hu33uoUX3Jycr7u090478Ljn9lJlzVOxhb3okmA6AGbqakWvRIhyYq0ULxte8W7odq0Wjpr53mQvRC9wLmTOMvBzus6NKpDrJxGjg2_VHCOQ91bsqKTklrbtlY1rOG0uBJT_R1dKBut_hNflGob98rrrZQjM3ljODIcz_Os9xwuYzhSgGdmOAY6ryhktxB9fHwYjvkwlt6wkDefDObt4g4SvHkGu0FcwXgP9EzxIBPgSO5lCoFNdEKJ4PLVZxLcbiKo_7JUSS_H6bx3uVOs4Y_dOP-7sPz5108AAAD__-ucbRI) to go to the space station. NASA hopes the private missions will free up federal funding for its government-backed manned moon missions later this decade.
## Predictions Chart Offers Forecast for 2024
A predictions database for things to come in 2024, compiled from 700 interviews, reports, podcasts and articles, breaks down the 25 most common forecasts into a single visual chart. The ["Prediction Consensus" chart](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFyhCAQQL9GOxxYEbGgSGN3aVM6BNZzMwiO7J3J32cudfo38968j9ty85Qo39_9jo7XsvjA9MRFCWUF6EW30a2IgH2LTo1yGOwozdRurtdxUhasNBAn66OZDJhB6dXq8NlraMmBBC2VskpJCVNnAwZl-h6HMAxh1I2WGInL2X0Vyrzhmn7KE88ulL1NbmM-atO_NTA3MF_X1T2pPnwK_iD2iSq_wAbm48RIgalkEUqumOujimvzLHhDgd8HnlxFRRSh7JTvgrJ4pTUwt6eLx0UpUTVjo-V995T-_Pzvjd8AAAD__wnbYY0) is color-coded by topic area, including the economy, technology, markets, and geopolitics, along with an analysis of the predictions. The predictions are fairly conservative. The experts see few startling new developments, instead forecasting a continuation of many of the trends we see today.

On this day in 1957, three Air Force Boeing B-52 Stratofortresses became the first jets to circle the world non-stop, proving the U.S. could drop a hydrogen bomb anywhere. The flights took 45 hours and 19 minutes. () Speaking of the military, yesterday's subject line incorrectly identified the service affiliation of the new Miss America. Madison Marsh is an Air Force second lieutenant. Here's . Have you signed up for The Flyover yet? If not, you can fix that . Today's edition is sponsored by . | Supreme Court Reviews Regulatory Powers The Supreme Court heard arguments Wednesday on a case that could The case involves fishing regulations, but the justices appeared inclined toward a broad review of federal power. The core issue is a 40-year-old legal doctrine referred to as "Chevron deference," which calls for courts to when regulations are expanded without input from Congress. During questioning Wednesday on fishing regulations, several of the more conservative justices indicated they would prefer agencies to have explicit Congressional approval before unilaterally expanding their oversight. SpaceX Plans Manned Launch Today SpaceX plans to launch a four-person crew to the International Space Station today, after a one-day delay. If launch preparations go as scheduled, the blast-off should be available to Today's mission is SpaceX's third manned launch, a private-industry flight for Axiom Space, dubbed the Ax-3 mission. The crew will spend two weeks aboard the space stations conducting more than 30 experiments. The crew is the first to go to the space station. NASA hopes the private missions will free up federal funding for its government-backed manned moon missions later this decade. Predictions Chart Offers Forecast for 2024 A predictions database for things to come in 2024, compiled from 700 interviews, reports, podcasts and articles, breaks down the 25 most common forecasts into a single visual chart. The experts see few startling new developments, instead forecasting a continuation of many of the trends we see today. name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Big Pharma and the federal government
body:
In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ad8ff3bde9754ae481fd7422d9b07ce3&_e=FwxpF_Hzn1qF7B36LRWbKmHe_OYd5JrYaReisVqT2W8NxadFQDW9Hw3mVIEBdgmZiARrDSIso0yAaDlQj1r221Zt_EWCXsde20XvYx0VYH3Ew2loj43IgajVCa0M0C1MtFUxPT-644SdWtXnUuSOeNDQrGdpuWBp4dU_Q6zXH6hhMjJ4V-Nwl8HgtXPmguVVoh9aXoSIWhTUmS9aPERDxcWtYske5JCNVQvas5IE_2tQpsh1kq-ejdh6DAUEuS8AF8SxEdDTVRdW3j2Gq48R9d3-PWLXZnZ4hQeNS12RSX6m2RJbNFM1YR3s8iv6k-5JeYzfM2gDq94tbkx7aN1LRuvQhGzfiVo3ZW2_J-9swp_69aEwatE8HGpf3Z13bzRj)
---
| | Dear Friend,

In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

The pharmaceutical industry is one of the most notable and most troubling.

Last year alone, "Big Pharma" spent over $373 million on lobbying--much more than any other industry.

While the Constitution certainly protects the rights to free speech and to petition the government, it was never intended to grant the special privileges that are characteristic of today's bureaucratic, administrative state.

In addition, Big Pharma's reputation has come under attack in the wake of America's opioid epidemic--since 1999, more than 600,000 people have died from opioid overdoses in the U.S. and Canada alone--and the COVID pandemic.

Given these current controversies, we decided to host a conference to consider the rise of Big Pharma, its role in the declining state of American health, and ideas for reform.

**The result is a free online video series that reveals the truth about Big Pharma.**

When you watch this free video series, you'll learn about the collaboration between the federal government and pharmaceutical companies, the content of the "Pfizer documents," and the origins of Big Pharma and the opioid epidemic.

You'll also gain valuable insights into Anthony Fauci and the public health establishment from Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/big-pharma-cca/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ad8ff3bde9754ae481fd7422d9b07ce3&_e=FwxpF_Hzn1qF7B36LRWbKmHe_OYd5JrYaReisVqT2W8NxadFQDW9Hw3mVIEBdgmZiARrDSIso0yAaDlQj1r221Zt_EWCXsde20XvYx0VYH3Ew2loj43IgajVCa0M0C1MtFUxPT-644SdWtXnUuSOeNDQrGdpuWBp4dU_Q6zXH6hhMjJ4V-Nwl8HgtXPmguVVoh9aXoSIWhTUmS9aPERDxcWtYske5JCNVQvas5IE_2usJn08FAtpxosF--MsrT9UZtcDXzR7A8o5QPf7-UVlB4LqPeHLWWp-6TCmlCVvCRdvQDBARZd9aYkr6tDAzZMl2cE4S4rWr7nH0u6MJjddcJj-lLyMgRvptG746fFWBMO7NilvzoseGbzkmfAvz7KF)**

We filmed the series at a recent Center for Constructive Alternatives conference on the Hillsdale campus. You will not have to watch for long to discover why it was one of our most popular and well-attended events.

**Please use the secure link above to receive your Big Pharma video series. When you complete the form, we will email you the series so you can watch it immediately.**

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844**

name: Costello for Senate Newsletter
subject: Costello for Senate Campaign Update
body:
Dear Friend,

Just a brief update to share with you a recent article from David published in the Portland Press Herald: <https://www.pressherald.com/2024/01/17/opinion-its-time-to-fix-washington/>.

Also, with the Maine Democratic Party Caucuses quickly approaching, we ask if you would be willing to attend your local caucus in hopes of collecting ballot placement signatures. The caucuses are being held during the weekend of February 3rd and 4th. While we have made a strong start in collecting our goal of 2000 signatures from registered Maine democrats, your help, in any capacity, would be greatly appreciated by ensuring that our reach extends all across Maine. For more information about signature collection or the DEM caucuses in general, feel free to email [campaign@costelloforsenate.com](mailto:campaign@costelloforsenate.com) with any questions or concerns.

Thank you,
Grace

subject: *Team Survey*
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=5ec663e294978cd8b141dc5d37ea7aa7e0c97edc633301cdfa9c05103972ec162a1dd01ab2d240209f1e804c0328b6f893ac8b6c79eda461644a00604273e5d1f90b3c9d300037640e4fb1369bdeb5db

Friend,

We've just shattered expectations at the Iowa caucuses, we're approaching the first-in-the-nation New Hampshire primary, and we're headed straight to South Carolina soon to show the nation that Americans are ready for a CHANGE.

We want to chat before you go out and fight for Ron DeSantis on your state's ballot.

Your voice is the most important at the polls, and it's the most important to our team.
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=107be6ab10f8dfe714e70937d5fc7e9722d43598fb9e4b19fd87bb88c2c1a3c1423ba08ffc21c6cdaee8e8a548b9da093294da7c80b367d436f98eabe316f08e
Will you take our quick survey so we know your thoughts on the upcoming election?

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=107be6ab10f8dfe714e70937d5fc7e9722d43598fb9e4b19fd87bb88c2c1a3c1423ba08ffc21c6cdaee8e8a548b9da093294da7c80b367d436f98eabe316f08e

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=107be6ab10f8dfe714e70937d5fc7e9722d43598fb9e4b19fd87bb88c2c1a3c1423ba08ffc21c6cdaee8e8a548b9da093294da7c80b367d436f98eabe316f08e
Share your opinion!

Governor Ron DeSantis has always believed that the first step in making real change is listening. Before you head to the polls for your Republican presidential primary election, let's talk!

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=107be6ab10f8dfe714e70937d5fc7e9722d43598fb9e4b19fd87bb88c2c1a3c1423ba08ffc21c6cdaee8e8a548b9da093294da7c80b367d436f98eabe316f08e

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=107be6ab10f8dfe79082db34357163c595bf7f287f1eb260e8737514a9012beb92310d702db1e7141733ab37f681fa8d2bedaeef26967db0c9abfa05541db740
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=107be6ab10f8dfe7739dcc94ec170fa200501295e8c54b24e6e8d9742eb18ede4a1e7650566c21ffda7c8adbb3ed82910fd3f707b606084ff2de199029e89911
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=107be6ab10f8dfe714e70937d5fc7e9722d43598fb9e4b19fd87bb88c2c1a3c1423ba08ffc21c6cdaee8e8a548b9da093294da7c80b367d436f98eabe316f08e

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=107be6ab10f8dfe714e70937d5fc7e9722d43598fb9e4b19fd87bb88c2c1a3c1423ba08ffc21c6cdaee8e8a548b9da093294da7c80b367d436f98eabe316f08e

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
