name: Roger Marshall
subject: “A for effort”... Really?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KANSANS FOR MARSHALL
body:
| | | [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/c4e283e9016bb56a3947229f28c3afba/3eb769625eb007cec3d6b838967d376c/37973)
---
Hey Friend, **The delusions of Joe Biden and Alejandro Mayorkas should worry every American. ** They’d have you believe our border is secure and they’re doing a great job. Mayorkas himself just said he’d give himself an “A for effort.” **Give us all a break. Biden and Mayorkas are only doing a good job on the border if an open border is the goal. ** In the Senate, I’ve led multiple votes of no confidence in Mayorkas, I’m pushing the House to IMPEACH him, and no Republican Senator is doing more to expose the invasion at our border. **[I’m asking YOU to stand with me here or below by signing your name.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/c4e283e9016bb56a3947229f28c3afba/b8948e06e9088be7c3d6b838967d376c/37973)**

---
**The border is an issue that’s at the top of Kansans and Americans’ minds, and for good reason.** It’s an economic, public health, and national security crisis. Worst of all, it was entirely preventable. But this invasion is because of Biden and Mayorkas’ policies. **We need to impeach and remove Mayorkas now, and we must fire Biden in November. ** [**That means we must call out their lies every single day. And I hope to have you join********me in doing so.**** **](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/c4e283e9016bb56a3947229f28c3afba/930232cf8b2b2e82c3d6b838967d376c/37973)

subject: This is time sensitive...
body:
(open now)

| | | |
---
Peter,
There are _two important things_ I want to share _really_ quick.
**First** , a press release was sent out this morning titled, _[Jameson Ellis Throws Down Gauntlet to Dan Crenshaw: Accept Debate Challenge or Admit Cowardice](https://jamesonellis.lt.acemlna.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cuZWlucHJlc3N3aXJlLmNvbSUyRmFydGljbGUlMkY2ODE5NDE1MDYlMkZqYW1lc29uLWVsbGlzLXRocm93cy1kb3duLWdhdW50bGV0LXRvLWRhbi1jcmVuc2hhdy1hY2NlcHQtZGViYXRlLWNoYWxsZW5nZS1vci1hZG1pdC1jb3dhcmRpY2U=&sig=EeFxymXfKAxzvnyEgPZAUFAgU8E6Jvb4Y7F9NZUTzqiT&iat=1705599035&a=%7C%7C611311006%7C%7C&account=jamesonellis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=d1BFvxLoE%2B2SjecRPowrfMU29zycvIw7IbwQ3u83Jakj%2F09p%3AjfJXiK%2FdKHRg8tdoZHQ4546P%2FMU8eSbD&s=cabcbe31a720242486b887158a77876f&i=226A255A1A2026)_. Please read and share with everyone you know after you get through with this email.
**Second** , there is an _epidemic_ in Colony Ridge of grossly abused, neglected, and abandoned pets. We've also recently learned that some have been using these poor animals as target practice.
And so **tomorrow and Saturday** , Bianca Gracia and I have teamed up with several others to rescue and provide medical help and shelter for the grossly abused and neglected dogs in Colony ridge.
We need your help - volunteers are needed.
Please see the flyer below and email [bianca@biancafortexas.com](mailto:bianca@biancafortexas.com?subject=Colony%20Ridge%20Dog%20Rescue) for more info.
_For Liberty,_

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Big Pharma and the federal government
body:
In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=42cbcf75d4304739be82f561f8a273f6&_e=qx-ylCbADbgoRdLHxrjb-3jFY0E0Zsy-klFOXgHat-YNQd9PYIT5gLuV0Vp0fv1PjLDK95ROudje050K7v_EIkksyZK5CEeFQj0nLSECZuAdumjoyrWawCAlk5iOHbr8NXMhjYXigkCeIuVu78ivJMuo2oAztREGwumJq-S22VUDiVYZD0S82esfR6K3FYSuoIXa3rbpdP3S0enuYuW35KV6mdNAj1m6aOkTYwv9oaXhzTOd_-7viBiPi3bf7W_FNpTMP5PQo_38SfneY4_jmA5K3CycD9UPnlh6cI-uOfS2enNvoPYZYhHLoPpBgNbxQdD9NFlrqKvGhLIYgxTTexhC5s6igho8LVIi7ld7_pNziBhAC3YWElZ2V0KhQlek)
---
| | Dear Friend,

In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

The pharmaceutical industry is one of the most notable and most troubling.

Last year alone, "Big Pharma" spent over $373 million on lobbying--much more than any other industry.

While the Constitution certainly protects the rights to free speech and to petition the government, it was never intended to grant the special privileges that are characteristic of today's bureaucratic, administrative state.

In addition, Big Pharma's reputation has come under attack in the wake of America's opioid epidemic--since 1999, more than 600,000 people have died from opioid overdoses in the U.S. and Canada alone--and the COVID pandemic.

Given these current controversies, we decided to host a conference to consider the rise of Big Pharma, its role in the declining state of American health, and ideas for reform.

**The result is a free online video series that reveals the truth about Big Pharma.**

When you watch this free video series, you'll learn about the collaboration between the federal government and pharmaceutical companies, the content of the "Pfizer documents," and the origins of Big Pharma and the opioid epidemic.

You'll also gain valuable insights into Anthony Fauci and the public health establishment from Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/big-pharma-cca/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=42cbcf75d4304739be82f561f8a273f6&_e=qx-ylCbADbgoRdLHxrjb-3jFY0E0Zsy-klFOXgHat-YNQd9PYIT5gLuV0Vp0fv1PjLDK95ROudje050K7v_EIkksyZK5CEeFQj0nLSECZuAdumjoyrWawCAlk5iOHbr8NXMhjYXigkCeIuVu78ivJMuo2oAztREGwumJq-S22VUDiVYZD0S82esfR6K3FYSuoIXa3rbpdP3S0enuYuW35KV6mdNAj1m6aOkTYwv9oaV3d-02OLF6H5vRotDopxOOnaokVwPXz9pKhfzw2o0S01rkQrFZmPoVyxyC-PUiVOqqy7PVpBYTlypAL2FpBG63j4AXSgJ9MJmJNjzNQr_G-EGbeoa4zWSQ9KnVHbUuEGiEHWevBOMWE1KJBSUJ5rMy)**

We filmed the series at a recent Center for Constructive Alternatives conference on the Hillsdale campus. You will not have to watch for long to discover why it was one of our most popular and well-attended events.

**Please use the secure link above to receive your Big Pharma video series. When you complete the form, we will email you the series so you can watch it immediately.**

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844**
**

subject: Sign: No more special treatment for Trump. Charge him with contempt, and put him in jail
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign: Punish Trump for Contempt of Court!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf9d4b222-c343-421a-93a4-cc4ca2a5a054/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4520a066-ef89-4879-b2d4-248a6450db89/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | **Once again, Trump is being allowed to get away with behavior that would put anyone else in jail.** In his trial for defamation stemming from his sexual assault against E. Jean Carroll, [Trump repeatedly interrupted Carroll's testimony with snide comments](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4986b7d7-53ad-4a29-b503-e4345445737d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). And when the judge, after repeated warnings, threatened to kick Trump out of the room, Trump sneered, "I would love it." **This is contempt of court. People go to jail for this. And Trump should be punished as well, to the maximum extent possible. It's time to stop giving him special treatment.** [**Add your name, and demand that Trump be punished for contempt of court.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T71fe5d36-09db-4899-bb0d-bac8a65a6534/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tacbd347e-ae5b-4b58-8aba-26991298dfe4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action
---
|
---

Given these current controversies, we decided to host a conference to consider the rise of Big Pharma, its role in the declining state of American health, and ideas for reform. The result is a free online video series that reveals the truth about Big Pharma. When you watch this free video series, you'll learn about the collaboration between the federal government and pharmaceutical companies, the content of the "Pfizer documents," and the origins of Big Pharma and the opioid epidemic. You'll also gain valuable insights into Anthony Fauci and the public health establishment from Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link: We filmed the series at a recent Center for Constructive Alternatives conference on the Hillsdale campus. You will not have to watch for long to discover why it was one of our most popular and well-attended events. Please use the secure link above to receive your Big Pharma video series. When you complete the form, we will email you the series so you can watch it immediately. Warm regards, Larry P. name: Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: FBI arrests Babylon Bee actor, terrifies his pregnant wife
body:
Just a short time ago, four FBI agents arrested my friend and client, Siaka Massaquoi, at the airport.

| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2ccpng2hofur1820a0cci9ailt0mtp7rsdi7tpo_rp22sh2s8i6eo35clie9o36chh2bs)
---
| |
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjs9dogptaat3o23192uk5sv7fi60alv0djub9co_rp22sh2s8i6eo35clie9o36chh2bs)Dear Patriot,

**[Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100 or more right now to help Babylon Bee actor and patriot, Siaka Massaquoi, fight back against Joe Biden's FBI.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z841keudkkltge5aen74ij70arou11googq3e1ho_rp22sh2s8i6eo35clie9o36chh2bs)**

Just a short time ago, four FBI agents arrested my friend and client, Siaka Massaquoi, at the airport.

He was traveling home with his wife, Charlotte, and their unborn baby, after they attended an event hosted by the conservative news site, Daily Wire.

The FBI refused to show Charlotte the arrest warrant.

**Siaka was arrested because he 's a black patriot who can persuade many Democrat voters to vote against Joe Biden on Election Day. **

You see, not only is Siaka a gifted actor (he's starred in Babylon Bee's funny series, "Californians Adjust to New Life In Texas") ...

... He's also the Vice Chair of the Los Angeles County GOP and a peaceful patriot who briefly appeared at the peaceful protest the stolen presidential election at the U.S. Capitol on January 6, 2021.

Siaka is also bold as a lion about his faith in Jesus Christ, his love for his family, and his deep concern for our country.

Of course, all that makes him an enemy of Joe Biden's lawless administration.

**So the FBI arrested Siaka for spending 76 seconds inside the U.S. Capitol. And charged him with four misdemeanors! That 's right, MISDEMEANORS!**

What's more, this isn't the first time the FBI has stomped on Siaka's rights, either.

**Over twenty FBI agents raided Siaka 's home with drawn guns on June 10, 2021 at 5:45 AM, and handcuffed him, his best friend, and two other roommates. **

As you can imagine, his best friend's two little children, just three and seven years old, were _terrified._

And here's what happened next:

* The FBI agents refused to let Siaka speak to his lawyer
* The FBI agents refused to show him the arrest warrant
* The FBI agents grilled him and his friends for FIVE HOURS with no lawyers present!
* The FBI confiscated his cell phone, computer and his MAGA hat and has refused ever since to give them back!
* And we have reason to believe that Siaka and the other peaceful J-6 protesters were illegally and unconstitutionally surveilled!

**And because the FBI didn 't arrest or charge Siaka, he had no legal grounds to find out why they raided his home...terrorized him, his friends, his friend's little children... abused his Constitutionally protected rights...and stole his property.**

Can you imagine being abused like this... _as an American citizen in your own country?_

What the FBI did to my peaceful, innocent client in 2021 and just a short time ago is a CRIME.

**That 's why I've filed a crucial lawsuit that PROVES the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. That means their criminal convictions can be THROWN OUT. And their criminal trials MUST STOP.**

I'm Larry Klayman, founder and general counsel for Freedom Watch.

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 46 years.

You've seen me on Fox News, and other cable news outlets.

I'm proud to say I won a court ruling that President Bill Clinton committed a crime when he illegally the White House files of Kathleen Willey. (I'm the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime)

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers during the impeachment of criminal Bill Clinton.

And I successfully represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and win.****And with this critically important case, I can PROVE IN COURT that Attorney General Merrick Garland, FBI Director Christopher Wray, their departments and agencies at the U.S. Department of Justice ordered and carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE OF LAW-ABIDING AMERICAN CITIZENS!**

Siaka wants to use this critically important lawsuit to speak up for other patriots, too, because he's alarmed at what Joe Biden and his friends are doing to our country.

He's deeply concerned that our country is going down a very dark road...and I agree.

I want to fix this horrifying situation peacefully and legally in the courts...before it's too late.

**[Patriot, I beg you to help me fight back for Siaka and ALL other January 6 peaceful protesters with your very best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right now.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zednejdpk0p72v8l0i1pph7pqcqsrhcpa72qp480_rp22sh2s8i6eo35clie9o36chh2bs)**

**If Joe Biden 's FBI and DOJ get away with crushing the rights and freedoms of Siaka and all the other peaceful patriots of January 6, they WILL come for you, me, our families, and our friends.**

**[So please don't delay - give your crucial gift of $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlfljatoc7j47t4presado5g4ibemsn81m93q7n0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35clie9o36chh2bs)**

Thank you so much!

In Justice,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, the FBI arrested my friend and client, Siaka Massaquoi, because he 's a political threat to Joe Biden's reelection. **They shamelessly arrested him in front of his pregnant wife, Charlotte. They terrified her and refused to show her the arrest warrant.

If the FBI gets away with this, they WILL be turned on you and me our families next.

**[Please support this critical lawsuit with your best gift of $25, $50, $100 or more immediately.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4tregmpg64pmtk2arav89oiav85lh175he8otqo_rp22sh2s8i6eo35clie9o36chh2bs)**

1600 Daily

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 46 years. You've seen me on Fox News, and other cable news outlets. I'm proud to say I won a court ruling that President Bill Clinton committed a crime when he illegally the White House files of Kathleen Willey. (I'm the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime) I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers during the impeachment of criminal Bill Clinton. And I successfully represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others. I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and win.**And with this critically important case, I can PROVE IN COURT that Attorney General Merrick Garland, FBI Director Christopher Wray, their departments and agencies at the U.S. Department of Justice ordered and carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE OF LAW-ABIDING AMERICAN CITIZENS! Siaka wants to use this critically important lawsuit to speak up for other patriots, too, because he's alarmed at what Joe Biden and his friends are doing to our country. He's deeply concerned that our country is going down a very dark road...and I agree. I want to fix this horrifying situation peacefully and legally in the courts...before it's too late. If Joe Biden 's FBI and DOJ get away with crushing the rights and freedoms of Siaka and all the other peaceful patriots of January 6, they WILL come for you, me, our families, and our friends. Thank you so much! In Justice, Larry Klayman Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc. P.S. Patriot, the FBI arrested my friend and client, Siaka Massaquoi, because he 's a political threat to Joe Biden's reelection. They shamelessly arrested him in front of his pregnant wife, Charlotte. They terrified her and refused to show her the arrest warrant. If the FBI gets away with this, they WILL be turned on you and me our families next. name: American Briefing
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z50ho63kve85aivpoe2r6n941pls24mhv3452cng_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cdg60o72cjh2bs) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z416dmu14dv2fhdb6ho8e4omlqpgp2q8r2sguou0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cdg60o72cjh2bs)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9ou8ofbkngd84h9o4as1j7qinh5squau09iavsg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cdg60o72cjh2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| American Briefing
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
subject: The Real Anthony Fauci
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Dr. Fauci's testimony is validating everything I said, every word I wrote.

|
---
| | | **Dr. Fauci's testimony is validating everything I said, every word I wrote.
**
---
|

[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fauci_1_18_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=1)

---
|
---
Dear Peter,
Ever since I wrote _The Real Anthony Fauci_ , I have had a target on my back.
In that book, I dared speak the truth about who Dr. Fauci really is, and what Dr. Fauci is responsible for.
Now, nearly a year later and thanks to Congressional Hearings, everything I wrote about Dr. Fauci is spilling out into the open for the whole world to see — and the news networks, social media platforms, politicians, and world leaders now know I was right.
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fauci_1_18_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=4)
Dr. Fauci's testimony is validating everything I said, _every word I wrote_.
I refused to recant in the face of unprecedented censorship.
I refused to recant as I withered blistering personal attacks on my integrity.
I refused to recant as Social Media Giants deplatformed and throttled me down.
I refused to recant as my free speech rights were violated time and time and time again.
My book _The Real Anthony Fauci_ faced a total blackout from every major book reviewer in the country. No one dared review the book.
But millions of Americans did.
_And their reviews made it the #1 Bestseller for months_.
Today Anthony Fauci's lack of transparency, his deceit, his complete and utter failure to "trust the science" were on full display.
Dr. Fauci's duplicity speaks directly to the urgent need to clean up and clean out the corrupt health agencies in Washington. We must hold the Anthony Fauci's of the world accountable for what they did, and for what they did not do.
But accomplishing this is up to the citizens of this country, it is up to us.
**We can bow down and comply, take the jabs, wear face coverings, etc.,_or we can say No_.**
We have a choice, it is not too late. We can hold Anthony Fauci accountable. We can course correct.
**But I need your help today to do so.**
[**Please chip in today to help us restore honesty and integrity in our institutions and in Washington today.**](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fauci_1_18_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=5)

EXCLUSIVE: GOP Rep Urges Biden Admin To Review Chinese Communist Party
Member’s US Land Purchase

Rep. Lori Chavez-DeRemer of Oregon asked the Biden administration to
investigate a Chinese Communist Party (CCP) member’s multimillion

name: Jared Lovelace
subject: Volunteer Update
body:
Hi everyone!

The campaign is building momentum every day! People are taking signs, donating, and inviting me to events all over the district!

This Saturday, we will be canvassing in Brenham, TX from 10am - 1pm. If you can make it, please sign up on our facebook event so I know about how many people to plan on. We will be meeting in the parking lot of the Academy Sports and Outdoors.

[https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61552188285159&sk=events](https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61552188285159&sk=events)

No worries if you can't make this one. You can see all the upcoming events on facebook and sign up for any other dates that work for you. Other things you can do:
1. Post about my campaign on your social media and share my website.
2. Ask business owners or property owners across the District if they would be willing to put up a sign or banner. They can sign up or you can sign up for them [here](https://forms.gle/DZhLCdV9SauX86NbA).

Thanks everyone!

Jared

We will be meeting in the parking lot of the Academy Sports and Outdoors. No worries if you can't make this one. You can see all the upcoming events on facebook and sign up for any other dates that work for you. Other things you can do: 1. Post about my campaign on your social media and share my website. 2. Ask business owners or property owners across the District if they would be willing to put up a sign or banner. They can sign up or you can sign up for them . Thanks everyone! Jared

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Justice, weaponized
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zlc9kjqvrge8j8om64q5oluomq3dukui39ejpfdg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cdg60o76c1h2bs) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zv874nech2kfd6mvmfdvo1rfomcifdssen2dp8h0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cdg60o76c1h2bs)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zs6cs5enns2ibfbdvq31hkjfic1inj18sm9clb6o_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cdg60o76c1h2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Pro Life Update
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

Tom puts People Over Politics to get big things done for the people he represents. Tom works with both sides of the aisle to deliver common-sense solutions for Long Island and Queens. That's who he is. While extreme Republicans bring nothing but crisis, chaos and confusion to Congress, Tom will bring integrity, commitment and experience back to NY-03. It’s imperative that we help Tom win. We can’t do that without your help, Peter. Our path to victory in 2024 includes retaking New York's Third Congressional District. I know this is the team to help us defeat the odds and bring Tom Suozzi back to Congress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and automatically split between Shontel Brown and Tom Suozzi: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Right now, Team Extreme is gearing up to flood the airwaves with attacks. That’s why I’m counting on your support to make sure Tom can fight back and retake NY-03. Keep the faith, Hakeem Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress Shontel Brown for Congress 545 E Town Street Columbus, OH 43215 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zidnn4dn9ggk8h0ditft770opfpre4kgikv50k60_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cdg64or0cjh2bs) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zca4vj49t01t7mqsjh33ui8d2r0d4m40p30rt240_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cdg64or0cjh2bs)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z80k6op04tuddlg5hihtkatombt79ljticsvqgp8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cdg64or0cjh2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| 1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu5cj46t8i7ifrkbho2btgaann5u3icc97p52eko_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkhhm0o316gqb3d7jkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8oj6c1i6ap3246h22sh2s8i6eo35cdg64or0cjh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6c6c4ipjq5ii43i12sve8s8mbn542u29j1aoftg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cdg64or0cjh2bs)_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfamiumta775r9j054he3cslilr3m3ou9ojcfs9o_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr0clhm0oj3c1ie49fg)

**This race in MN-02 could be our most competitive yet with House Republicans desperate to flip my district to hold on to their narrow majority.**
Already, National Republicans have named me a top target and have started launching bad-faith attacks against me.
I’m not surprised. House Republicans’ agenda is too extreme for the American people, so they’ve resorted to distorting my record to distract from their unpopular policies.
**In the meantime, I’m putting in the work to make the lives of folks in Minnesota’s 2nd District and across the country better.**
When a woman in my district, Allie Krueger, shared that a flaw in the _Affordable Care Act_ known as the “family glitch” made healthcare outrageously expensive for her and more than 5 million American families, I worked with the Biden administration to fix it.
When my constituents reported issues with slow and lost mail, I successfully demanded an investigation from the USPS inspector general. I won’t stop putting the pressure on Trump mega-donor and USPS Postmaster Louis DeJoy to fix our deliverability issues.
With the skyrocketing costs of insulin forcing more than 1 million Americans to ration insulin, I helped cap the cost of insulin at $35 a month for seniors on Medicare and am fighting to make the same change for all Americans with diabetes. One of my constituents told me personally that my legislation cut his insulin costs.
I am delivering real change that improves lives and livelihoods, and I am counting on your support to continue this critical work.
As the election year ramps up, we’re onboarding new staff, putting together voter outreach plans and more. All of this takes resources, which is why I’m reaching out ahead of our fundraising deadline.
**[Please, help power our work to keep MN-02 blue by splitting a donation between Fight Like Hell PAC and my campaign ahead of our first fundraising deadline of the election year>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77272406/449930231/1568426412?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240118_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjE5MmIzZGMtMDliNi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GflMJWkZRQsGgqlDrVW0a9U61ByftdaKv3dZCBK1K8s=)**
Thanks in advance for your support,
Angie Craig
Fight Like Hell PAC

Lansing, MI 48901

body:
Now, he wants you to take a new survey

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3tvci8mfbvnfi42j6kf3ifkob79jjl65gd5n0g0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cdg62ob6cph2bs)
Mike Pompeo reviewed your response to the **[Voter Verification Questionnaire,](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ze2tscsqbsjmja7u7bbptlic1sfgesrq268i9fcg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cdg62ob6cph2bs)** and he was impressed.
Now, he wants to send you a **[special message](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zr2oarvgc8vgdk5b5ku2f5qafrcij7qsk0hv4kg0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cdg62ob6cph2bs)** to personally request that you complete the **[Survey to Secure America.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmohdmc80nshk80bm1h0u8ufi98eqmoc8e5auouo_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cdg62ob6cph2bs)**
As President Trump's former Secretary of State and CIA Director, Mike Pompeo is one of the foremost experts on America First foreign policy in the entire country. You should be honored that he's selected you to participate in this survey, friend.

**[Read Mike Pompeo's special message in the next ten minutes, and then complete the Survey to Secure America to give your thoughts on our nation's foreign policy. >>](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqba0ra1a62774e2sii30qa783hj4krnj3h7mvt0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cdg62ob6cph2bs)**
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdmh78vogd800lf2rj3i8iq7khfrg2invpbruu00_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cdg62ob6cph2bs)
Thank you,

subject: Happy New Year From Communist China!
body:
| | | **__Everyone__ who cares about the stability of the world should be concerned.

Xi Jinping, the “President” of Communist China and the world’s biggest dictator, just announced that their “reunification” with Taiwan is “inevitable.” **
**
The Chinese Communist Party’s goal is clear: they won’t stop attacking free democracies until every last inch of the world is covered in their tyrannical communism.

There’s only one power that can save the world from communism: the United States of America.

_But under Joe Biden, we’ve rolled out the red carpet for Xi and his corrupt crew of thugs to commit genocide and silence millions of people._

[We need leaders who will STAND UP to Communist China. Please, pitch in NOW to elect Republicans who have a spine against communism!](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=be9973a7a7c347c3aefc6f0edb57b945&_e=a7t9ynchqE_S9UUaymSGEHal8Y2b5o8Z_xytN8_HtXtYelCVXR5S-H11xPAP8NmTFIeS-6w_XpfPdLLMxAvaavC2B5SQ_vOSxkV1z9fxSDVRj7W2TzuXc97L4sr-6UjDIDPeWTuv19SKU6SkJYCth7OyM7JmU-AXF1VuOxewAOvl8jPS-oDsp-zFoWPIXEiyX5ah0Og5fgTKMqMywotAcI9aqHU7m1Ko9_dLl6WqlC6yE20rbTGtXWmxYvJ1ucLQms5_VF6tuuz-XFYPfrsOaNSv8N7JWgwVT5K4aoEpGB5env7eJSzl1nhyr2SyueBLwQJJa61TYS0JSvvbhprtIJ4LBfvvjnlYHRKmeiQh_e9ixTyjwqvjIbzuI1G1sfxi)
**
---
[_**STEP UP NOW**_](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=be9973a7a7c347c3aefc6f0edb57b945&_e=a7t9ynchqE_S9UUaymSGEHal8Y2b5o8Z_xytN8_HtXtYelCVXR5S-H11xPAP8NmTFIeS-6w_XpfPdLLMxAvaavC2B5SQ_vOSxkV1z9fxSDVRj7W2TzuXc97L4sr-6UjDIDPeWTuv19SKU6SkJYCth7OyM7JmU-AXF1VuOxewAOvl8jPS-oDsp-zFoWPIXEiyX5ah0Og5fgTKMqMywotAcI9aqHU7m1Ko9_dLl6WqlC4Dz4ZUdzTNujyNRaPbLwT16YG_e68UImGOXeC79jKfWQVXS0udKMLZVdCCblbPA_Ei-VcKlz9G0Kv1nX40SNkOXSyKmFYqP88L2YJJtHoXLucJYfJ5kuONcmLuc63N2KSX8Zysa3_fIhy6gfisBAGJ)

name: Tom Barrett for Congress
subject: Our race ranked #1 nationally
body:
The battle for Congress goes through Michigan’s 7th District | | | [](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65a92f6f2e618b6e3bd6343e&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftombarrettforcongress.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D65a7d89be0be146d7409e93d%26ss_email_id%3D65a92f6f2e618b6e3bd6343e%26ss_campaign_name%3DOur%2Brace%2Branked%2B%25231%2Bnationally%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2024-01-18T14%253A05%253A42Z&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_65a7d89be0be146d7409e93d&l=en-US&s=lVlzDnFscxDkYm_L-snThwOVZ38%3D)
---
| Peter Willis, another national publication has identified Michigan’s 7th Congressional District as the [#1 race in the country](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65a92f6f2e618b6e3bd6343e&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.theepochtimes.com%2Farticle%2Fthe-house-races-to-pay-attention-to-this-year-5554722%3Fest%3DCJTH8Hc%252BTl91EKQkm4o9kd0DZSt99v5tfdD4Wf2YrpP3N4zQcLZhrxKyU7k%253D%26src_cmp%3Dmb-2024-01-15%26src_src%3DMorningbrief%26utm_campaign%3Dmb-2024-01-15%26utm_medium%3Demail%26utm_source%3DMorningbrief&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_65a7d89be0be146d7409e93d&l=en-US&s=eYBsouhCzaCT752nRdzLKlzFypk%3D) in the battle for control of Congress.
---
|
---
| [](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65a92f6f2e618b6e3bd6343e&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.theepochtimes.com%2Farticle%2Fthe-house-races-to-pay-attention-to-this-year-5554722%3Fest%3DCJTH8Hc%252BTl91EKQkm4o9kd0DZSt99v5tfdD4Wf2YrpP3N4zQcLZhrxKyU7k%253D%26src_cmp%3Dmb-2024-01-15%26src_src%3DMorningbrief%26utm_campaign%3Dmb-2024-01-15%26utm_medium%3Demail%26utm_source%3DMorningbrief&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_65a7d89be0be146d7409e93d&l=en-US&s=eYBsouhCzaCT752nRdzLKlzFypk%3D)
---
|
---
National Democrats and Governor Whitmer are taking nothing for granted, however, and Whitmer’s hand-picked candidate, 22-year career politician Curtis Hertel, Jr., has already raised $1.1 million.**This race will be a battle for the future of our country and Democrats are pulling out all the stops.**
---
[_ _ Support Tom _ _](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65a92f6f2e618b6e3bd6343e&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Ftop-race&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_65a7d89be0be146d7409e93d&l=en-US&s=WPujPlXrdptVfaCHuFdDUEAhRG8%3D)
---
There’s no path to holding our majority without winning the 7th District and I need you to do everything you can to make sure we win and **put a stop to the Biden agenda** which has resulted in 8 million people entering the country illegally, record inflation, and a $34 trillion national debt.
---
[_ _ Stop the Democrats _ _](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65a92f6f2e618b6e3bd6343e&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Ftop-race&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_65a7d89be0be146d7409e93d&l=en-US&s=WPujPlXrdptVfaCHuFdDUEAhRG8%3D)
---
I’ve been endorsed by Speaker of the House Mike Johnson and National Republican Congressional Committee Chairman Richard Hudson, who has identified this race as his top priority in 2024.[Please consider a donation today of $25, $50, $100, $250, or even $500.](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65a92f6f2e618b6e3bd6343e&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Ftop-race&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_65a7d89be0be146d7409e93d&l=en-US&s=WPujPlXrdptVfaCHuFdDUEAhRG8%3D)We can do this but it takes every patriot doing the maximum they can if we are going to win.Thank you and God bless!
---
| | |
---
Tom Barrett, U.S. Army (Ret.)Candidate for CongressMichigan’s 7th District

clean_body: The battle for Congress goes through Michigan’s 7th District | | | | Peter Willis, another national publication has identified Michigan’s 7th Congressional District as the in the battle for control of Congress. | | | National Democrats and Governor Whitmer are taking nothing for granted, however, and Whitmer’s hand-picked candidate, 22-year career politician Curtis Hertel, Jr., has already raised $1.1 million.This race will be a battle for the future of our country and Democrats are pulling out all the stops. There’s no path to holding our majority without winning the 7th District and I need you to do everything you can to make sure we win and put a stop to the Biden agenda which has resulted in 8 million people entering the country illegally, record inflation, and a $34 trillion national debt. I’ve been endorsed by Speaker of the House Mike Johnson and National Republican Congressional Committee Chairman Richard Hudson, who has identified this race as his top priority in 2024. can do this but it takes every patriot doing the maximum they can if we are going to win.Thank you and God bless! | | | Tom Barrett, U.S. Army (Ret.)Candidate for CongressMichigan’s 7th District P.S. - If you want to volunteer on the campaign, or host a fundraiser, email me at mailto:campaign@tombarrettforcongress.com. | | | | | | | | | mailto:campaign@tombarrettforcongress.com | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- PO Box 15221, Lansing MI 48901, USA

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Big Pharma and the federal government
body:
In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b9e7bb85897b4756959f7030ffe8f4e2&_e=BnWstZ1tjH3cRMyF-xbknktMm-DhC9ZvClYjQ1YdbkH-aUXLXBbVI1SUQqN87XB_M4T8zuVXS1joV4Praph2UsNFMYgOvoZ4nwtuxt5JlMqMCVPa2v6gVVRYEbyZLzntVqACYjvqOLPzY3dA3Y0A6RtfuH0mE4jzKCxYUCekFRXIcYIEJdJxVo5H4zORg0Z-_MeZKE_t-HHTntpT0scbRCl5pe545Hoidv4j-moPe4QIW0hFmiFpH373YLRaC30UZqP-mVyXmB-CxDSSUUXfKXkiP3RbwJ0rNm8Pu5-KCCRRnDQFoCIRkiOPL98qybX5DCHLWuYNOS00KgTSQYlwDRv68F35anwqfyHBw6i4SVF--hkBdGWGLF1xvvd8481N)
---
| | Dear Friend,

In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

The pharmaceutical industry is one of the most notable and most troubling.

Last year alone, "Big Pharma" spent over $373 million on lobbying--much more than any other industry.

While the Constitution certainly protects the rights to free speech and to petition the government, it was never intended to grant the special privileges that are characteristic of today's bureaucratic, administrative state.

In addition, Big Pharma's reputation has come under attack in the wake of America's opioid epidemic--since 1999, more than 600,000 people have died from opioid overdoses in the U.S. and Canada alone--and the COVID pandemic.

Given these current controversies, we decided to host a conference to consider the rise of Big Pharma, its role in the declining state of American health, and ideas for reform.

**The result is a free online video series that reveals the truth about Big Pharma.**

When you watch this free video series, you'll learn about the collaboration between the federal government and pharmaceutical companies, the content of the "Pfizer documents," and the origins of Big Pharma and the opioid epidemic.

You'll also gain valuable insights into Anthony Fauci and the public health establishment from Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/big-pharma-cca/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b9e7bb85897b4756959f7030ffe8f4e2&_e=BnWstZ1tjH3cRMyF-xbknktMm-DhC9ZvClYjQ1YdbkH-aUXLXBbVI1SUQqN87XB_M4T8zuVXS1joV4Praph2UsNFMYgOvoZ4nwtuxt5JlMqMCVPa2v6gVVRYEbyZLzntVqACYjvqOLPzY3dA3Y0A6RtfuH0mE4jzKCxYUCekFRXIcYIEJdJxVo5H4zORg0Z-_MeZKE_t-HHTntpT0scbRCl5pe545Hoidv4j-moPe4Q0Ye_BcoIuW87w-qPdYPmzuC7zY0ic_IOhdMhHpjvZhqiEjF1R0smhafswgb0FIqLQ5WnKAsoxVeMIPkPguN8PTmsYFkZOQpcoyehmWtZUJbW3coC0m4J61oAXq0HV4YV_0bPZVZFX8uo1F4I8dnlP)**

We filmed the series at a recent Center for Constructive Alternatives conference on the Hillsdale campus. You will not have to watch for long to discover why it was one of our most popular and well-attended events.

**Please use the secure link above to receive your Big Pharma video series. When you complete the form, we will email you the series so you can watch it immediately.**

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844**
**
---
| |
---

Defend the Constitution

_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Jason Crow
subject: What makes America great
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
This is important, team: On Monday, Donald Trump won the Iowa Caucuses.

To be honest, this wasn’t surprising. The twice-impeached president has led GOP primary polls for months. Monday night’s result confirmed many things, and here are a few facts I need you to know:

The former president hasn’t changed.

Donald Trump and his loyal MAGA base are continuing to spread falsehoods about the election.

And they’ve promised to use the presidency to exact revenge on their enemies.

We cannot risk another four years of Donald Trump in office.

Coincidentally, this week bears significance for another reason: Four years ago, I was chosen to be an impeachment manager for Donald Trump’s Senate trial. I said this during my closing remarks:

“Now before I conclude, I think you all deserve an explanation from me as to why I am standing here. There's been a lot of conversation the last few years about what makes America great. And I have some ideas about that.

“I happen to think that what makes America great is that generation after generation, there have been Americans that have been willing to stand up and put aside their self-interest to make great sacrifices for the public good, for our country.

“I know because I have seen people do that. Like some of the people in this chamber, I have seen people give everything for this country so we could sit here today.

"Now this isn't politically expedient, it certainly isn't for me. It's hard, it requires sacrifice, it's uncomfortable — but that is the very definition of public service. That we are here to give of ourselves for the country, for others, at sacrifice to ourselves.”

Extremism is a disease, and it continues to plague our nation today. Don’t give in to it.

Change doesn’t come easily. It comes because Americans are willing to stand up for what they believe in — and fight like hell to make it happen.

Martin Luther King Jr. once said that “the arc of the moral universe is long, but it bends toward justice .” We must work together to bring back the true meaning of public service.

We all have the responsibility to cast extremism to the dustbins of history and work together to achieve a more perfect union. Will you donate $10 right now to help protect our democracy and move our country forward? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-january-2024?amount=10]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

DONATE $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-january-2024?amount=10&express_lane=true]
DONATE $25 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-january-2024?amount=25&express_lane=true]

DONATE $50 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-january-2024?amount=50&express_lane=true]
DONATE $100 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-january-2024?amount=100&express_lane=true]

DONATE $250 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-january-2024?amount=250&express_lane=true]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-january-2024]

Thank you for your support.

— Jason Crow

Now more than ever, we need strong leaders like Jason working for us in Congress. Jason is fighting for you, your family, and the American people in Congress — and he's not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. Will you pitch in now to help him continue working for us?
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-january-2024]
Jason Crow for Congress
8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543
Greenwood Village, CO 80112
United States
www.jasoncrowforcongress.com [https://www.jasoncrowforcongress.com/] | info@jasoncrowforcongress.com [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com]

name: NRCC Chairman Richard Hudson
subject: Why I took on this role
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hudson for Congress
body:
| | | Fellow American,
---
When I was asked to become the NRCC Chairman, I was extremely honored.

But I'm not going to lie, I was also worried.

It would mean extra time away from my family, and with a young son, I don't want to miss out on any of his firsts.

_But I talked it over with my wife, and we decided that the BEST way to protect my son 's future was to defend our House majority. _

You see, the radical Left is taking away the American Dream for the next generation.

They're burying our children in debt, destroying their schools in the name of woke propaganda, and leaving a wave of crime for them to clean up.

**As a father, it 's absolutely terrifying. **

Whether you're a parent or even a grandparent, I know you want the best for your family, and that's why I'm reaching out to you today.

**[**Will you join my team today to fight for a Republican majority that will DEFEND the American Dream for the next generation?**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7dbe61f6dbf84c95bc60f175388ce379&_e=84XpZviCDSbSfrjyLaz0842qwijbnglkenLyguh_r8YHqLxOk3Z4VtXzYZAYFT_SUMuKIcMy6DCGQCzDn-7MR7e89hZu-r7S0CtvlMWz5hd70PvSLZCgX6Xo_ZnOU8GI_C2c5kZi761hwaLD747DC93qOkJWMflTttLTomn8VoUjbWp6h4LInr8VNB2DbC8XKkB0k90ZV2LA7u0_H4XPKRsgVlpWzQEHXtoo8cR0yBOJR05QdtEVpSKIHnI0XNrWop96GYryxfCt0JSnl0Va-LhQ5YOLC1rrvd6Kbm80H54TYz5Ct3uNlzla5EH1KVB2moPNy7pGhcUOur2ma-mGIGUyzcagU536088rHl2z_GQkzorshfCMHIBxXa6C_tOdxTaN3CJpmgepStDgLwaKYEy9XR9AffTYYAzNfrVh5sM%3D)**

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: A New Era in Colorado Media: THE ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE 📢
body:
A new conservative news media platform for Coloradans to be the VOICE of your VALUES.
Heidi Ganahl introduces the Rocky Mountain Voice, a new conservative news media platform for Coloradans to be the VOICE of your VALUES.
| |
---
| **A MESSAGE FROM OUR FOUNDER, HEIDI GANAHL**
---
| We’re facing the most important battle most of us have ever been a part of, the one to save our country. To save the American dream for the next generation, our children.

As I traveled every every hill, every mountain and valley in Colorado during the Governor’s race, I saw it all – and now my mission is to take what I learned and use those lessons to help Colorado liberty lovers win again. We can’t govern if we don’t win elections. So we’re going to get busy building something new – every day, on the ground, with folks who get it.

As you know, Colorado is at a pivotal moment in time. We can keep doing what we’ve been doing for decades, losing, and hope for a different result. Hope is not a plan. I want my kids to stay here, I want to stay here, I want you to stay here. It’s not an option – we stay and fight. Fight for the Colorado we grew up in. The Colorado we believe in. The Colorado we love.

The question is how? Well, when you want to do something big, you seek out others that have done what you’re trying to do. That’s what we did, and why we are following a plan that is tested, that has worked to turn a bluish state red.

We have built a platform that will offer a voice to those not usually heard in Colorado.
---
[**Introducing the Rocky Mountain Voice.**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) One of the most monumental challenges that Coloradans face is that it's hard to find the truth. Not only is the mainstream media biased and controlled by the Left, but the right has few effective outlets for distributing the truth - lots of great individual journalists, and some regional resources - but not one platform that is the go-to for freedom lovers across the state. The Rocky Mountain Voice will share news from other reliable freedom loving voices in Colorado, as well as our own original content. We will provide citizens the information and knowledge they need to be educated and informed regarding policy and government, without the ridiculous liberal bias we haven’t been able to escape. The Rocky Mountain Voice will report **REAL NEWS** to allow Coloradans to have the knowledge to make better decisions - in government and culture.

**THE ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE IS:** · Building Trust through Truth · Inspiring the Next Generation of Colorado · Always Pro-Citizen, Pro-Liberty and Pro-Colorado · Honoring our Heritage of Rugged Individualism
As a 501(c)(3) organization, the Rocky Mountain Voice will not participate in partisan politics. As a result, the outlet will remain nimble and call “balls and strikes” no matter the offender, R or D. The Rocky Mountain Voice will create and aggregate content (we’re not competing with other conservative news outlets, we're supporting them). We won’t be run on advertising dollars, subscriptions or paywalls.
**It’s free – all the content, all the time.** Rocky Mountain Voice will consist of a robust, constantly updated, online news center, [RockyMountainVoice.com](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice. "Home"), with active social media engagement, podcasts, documentaries, and newsletters. And it’s not just about news, it’s about community, it’s about having fun again as conservatives. We’ll also host fun, engaging events across the state! Our Mountain Minute newsletter will be a quick 5 minute read on the news of the day. Our weekly RMV newsletter will be a deeper dive and a compilation of the news from that week as it’s critical to keep all of you informed as often as the news changes. Our goal with RMV is to provide reliable, quality news, build community and empower you as citizens! You ready to get our state back? Let’s do this, sign up for Rocky Mountain Voice at [RockyMountainVoice.com](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) to get in the loop and get ready for a fun, hard charging, game changing year ahead where WINNING Is the name of the game!
| [ SUBSCRIBE FOR FREE ](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)

One of my favorite RMV features I know you'll **LOVE ❤️**
One of my favorite parts about [rockymountainvoice.com ](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)is that it aggregates every conservative radio show and podcast into **ONE PLACE**. My hope is that RMV amplifies the voices of strong patriots and conservatives all around our great state, but especially the voices of those who have been the backbone of this movement all along, fighting to keep our message alive on the airwaves. Thank you to all the conservative radio and podcast hosts in Colorado for staying in the fight!
| [ ](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice. "Listen")

Subscribe **(for FREE)** to get EXCLUSIVE content like the articles below right to your inbox ⬇️
**[Christie withdraws, Trump out to insurmountable lead in Iowa primary polling](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice. "Christie withdraws, Trump out to insurmountable lead in Iowa primary polling")** _Chris Christie, formerly the governor of New Jersey, has become the latest to withdraw from the Republican primary race for President._ **BY BRIAN PORTER | NATIONAL, ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE | JAN 10** [**Why are there RINOs but no DINOs?**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice. "Why are there RINOs but no DINOs?") _Democrats don’t trash their own party members for being “insufficiently” woke, a Socialist or a leftist, while Republicans routinely dismember their own party members for being “insufficiently” Conservative, anti-tax, anti-abortion and so on._ **BY JOY OVERBECK | COMMENTARY, ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE | JAN 10** [**State Rep. Lynch steps up fight on fentanyl**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice. "State Rep. Lynch steps up fight on fentanyl") _State Rep. Mike Lynch, R-Wellington, the Minority Leader in the Colorado House, is hoping to expand his influence on fentanyl policy beyond the State of Colorado._ **BY BRIAN PORTER | STATE, ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE | JAN 10** [**Don’t mark your calendar for March 7**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice. "Don’t mark your calendar for March 7") _Make sure you have all your excuses lined up as to why you can’t participate in the Colorado Caucus._ **BY BRADLEY BECK | COMMENTARY, ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE | JAN 10**
| [ SUBSCRIBE FOR FREE ](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)

Democrats don’t trash their own party members for being “insufficiently” woke, a Socialist or a leftist, while Republicans routinely dismember their own party members for being “insufficiently” Conservative, anti-tax, anti-abortion and so on. BY JOY OVERBECK | COMMENTARY, ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE | JAN 10 "State Rep. Lynch steps up fight on fentanyl" State Rep. Mike Lynch, R-Wellington, the Minority Leader in the Colorado House, is hoping to expand his influence on fentanyl policy beyond the State of Colorado. BY BRIAN PORTER | STATE, ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE | JAN 10 "Don’t mark your calendar for March 7" Make sure you have all your excuses lined up as to why you can’t participate in the Colorado Caucus. BY BRADLEY BECK | COMMENTARY, ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE | JAN 10 | A product of Rocky Mountain Voice, Inc. 8200 S Quebec St, STE A3601 Centennial, CO 80112 This message was originally sent to: %recipient.full% Be sure to put “RockyMountainVoice.com” on your safe-senders whitelist. If you ever stop receiving our emails, it might be because someone to whom you forwarded the email unintentionally removed you from the list. No worries; it is easy enough to reactivate your subscription immediately by visiting: Before you click the link below... If someone forwarded this email to you, please don’t! Clicking the link will end the subscription of dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Team DeSantis
subject: Campaigns don't work without generosity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=376b40c207e10e078d7e286c7b1ad6358b43b54e6464f91e70105ce3688c2447e3ca3d5fbbf21f7381703fb94c45340a87f0238f75b6acbac553fe6e223055633f409b7aa9bf21349050d5fb6bd7c3c3

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=118498ad6167a62261b75511bbac5f943cacd49d8f304a51953e45d8c3b2bf551c54be44d7c3bfe43c5cd7e239f116f2d86f08894103d0acd9ce37f17c72ed26

Friend,

You may not have heard what happened in Iowa this week. Volunteers and supporters traveled to Iowa from across the country in subzero, icy conditions to help our team get out the vote and finish out our caucus campaign in the Hawkeye State.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=118498ad6167a62261b75511bbac5f943cacd49d8f304a51953e45d8c3b2bf551c54be44d7c3bfe43c5cd7e239f116f2d86f08894103d0acd9ce37f17c72ed26

Whether it's our supporters who have chipped in just $5 to help our campaign out when we've needed it most, or the volunteers who trudged through snow to show up for Ron DeSantis, we are full of gratitude and overwhelmed by the generosity we've seen pour in. From knocking on doors, to making calls, to driving around in the snow, there was no end to the support that came in for Ron DeSantis.

We've always run our campaign by the principle that our supporters are a true part of our campaign. Your input has shaped our strategy and your contributions have driven us forward at an unbeatable pace. We know we'd be nowhere without our team, so we want your help to say thank you to everyone who is showing up and fighting with us.

We know not everyone can be out on the campaign trail with us, but you could make just as great of a difference by chipping in to help keep our team moving.

As we head into the next few states (New Hampshire and South Carolina) to campaign as hard as we can before their early primaries, we know we'll be leaning on our volunteers and grassroots efforts to help us achieve big victories.
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=118498ad6167a62261b75511bbac5f943cacd49d8f304a51953e45d8c3b2bf551c54be44d7c3bfe43c5cd7e239f116f2d86f08894103d0acd9ce37f17c72ed26
As our team steps up, will you help us thank them by covering a few pieces of campaign gear or a slice of pizza through a small donation?

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=118498ad6167a62261b75511bbac5f943cacd49d8f304a51953e45d8c3b2bf551c54be44d7c3bfe43c5cd7e239f116f2d86f08894103d0acd9ce37f17c72ed26
CHIP IN $10 🍕

We couldn't do this without every single member of our team being as generous and full of fight as all of us here. We want your help to make sure every member of our team knows they're not fighting alone! Let's keep this momentum going.

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=118498ad6167a62261b75511bbac5f943cacd49d8f304a51953e45d8c3b2bf551c54be44d7c3bfe43c5cd7e239f116f2d86f08894103d0acd9ce37f17c72ed26

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=118498ad6167a6220159b706d64e4266e6ee102ead0d2901130e24223e4ab2efb3dc5b217e0feda9884b71ee5fec0ec1671b70ffd2e2d2bd33899c968ad6e81a
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=118498ad6167a622e2e81adbf1f0d8eb29eafce17f81a1bc0a0b54e09fd0cf876129a902fe6fc924f2ca25cdff364283594643014ec47b56c2ef0483ba32c479
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=118498ad6167a62261b75511bbac5f943cacd49d8f304a51953e45d8c3b2bf551c54be44d7c3bfe43c5cd7e239f116f2d86f08894103d0acd9ce37f17c72ed26

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=118498ad6167a62261b75511bbac5f943cacd49d8f304a51953e45d8c3b2bf551c54be44d7c3bfe43c5cd7e239f116f2d86f08894103d0acd9ce37f17c72ed26

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

name: Bill Spadea
subject: Unite for Common Sense
body:
Peter, In a powerful display of strength and unity, conservatives across Iowa rallied in overwhelming support of President Tr
|
---
| Peter, In a powerful display of strength and unity, conservatives across Iowa rallied in overwhelming support of President Trump, leading to a decisive victory of the caucus. **_This is not just a win; it's a clear signal._** It's a demonstration of what we, as grassroots conservatives, can achieve when we stand together, united in our cause to drain the swamp and restore common sense.
Now, we can't afford to let up. The battle has just begun. As we bask in the triumph of this victory, it's crucial that we keep the momentum surging forward. **_This is where you come in._** **Join our Common Sense Club and be a part of this unstoppable movement. We’re not just supporting candidates; we're amplifying a message – a message of patriotism and common sense American values.**
---
| | [LEARN MORE AND CLAIM YOUR MEMBERSHIP HERE](https://xtz223.keap-link001.com/v2/click/4477930d58b5e39ab9f5c3684ed286eb/eJyNkMsOgkAMRf-laxQZ8BF2hBBDQBdG12YCVUZhmAxVfIR_d1DjShO3vaenub0DoeSS4hx8uNCNMRcs0JgJJVBSWEvi2TNlY89xHQtKIY9zXZ8U-Pevyx-gHzszd2IBXRUaZL0KwiRezrdpvEwMqbg2N_7zTKbexxMtgjiFrvspxkpQdDbuBnzSJ-wb5cK0oo0uDV8Qqca37bZth4daSCpwJ_YFsRHzhlld2VhxUQ76yNi4Uijz9ysSvL6c3QMoFWb8)

| As a member, you'll be at the forefront of our efforts:
* Engaging with influential community leaders and fellow conservatives.
* Participating in exclusive events and strategic discussions.
* Accessing member-only content and updates from key political figures, including insights from me, Bill Spadea.

**This is more than membership; it's a commitment to the values we hold dear. Your support helps us advocate for policies that embody true American spirit, support candidates who stand for our ideals, and ensure our voice remains powerful and heard.** Don't miss this chance to be part of a movement that's transforming New Jersey and America. Spots are limited, so act now. [Claim your membership](https://xtz223.keap-link001.com/v2/click/1323c6c20f92904f7505b7dc574de01d/eJyNkE0LgkAQhv_LnC1ztQ-8iYSI1SHqHItOuaXrsk2Zif-9taJTQdd5n3mGd1oglFxSnIEPN7oz5oIFGlOhBEoKK0k8faZs7DmuY0Eh5CnS1UWB335d_gD92Jl5zAJqFBpksw7CJF5Fu0W8SgypuDY3_vNMpt7HM18G8QK67qcYS0Hzq3GfwSd9wb5RJkwr2urC8DmROvu2Xdf18FgJSTnuxSEnNmLeMK1KG0suikEfGRtXCmX2fkWCzcvZPQAljmb5) and stand with us as we continue our journey of common sense and patriotism. Together, we are unstoppable. **_Let's harness the momentum from Iowa and turn it into a lasting impact._** Looking forward to having you on board, Bill Spadea
