name: James Carville
subject: I’m F*%$ING TERRIFIED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
Re-electing Bob Casey is mission-critical. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77283284/449964601/751461270?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240118_1_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRmOTkyNDU3LTE0YjYtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zCGUdSsp2-Hn6gy3hW7-knS785rJ03bVEiuzCSsmQvg=)

Excuse my language, Peter, but I’m F*%$ING TERRIFIED.

The news of Joe Manchin’s retirement is a HUGE BLOW to Democrats’ chances of holding their Senate majority.

With an open seat in West Virginia, Mitch McConnell only needs to flip ONE more to retake the Senate, and you can bet that national Republicans will turn their full attention (and resources) to Bob Casey in Pennsylvania.

This race was already gearing up to be one of the most expensive Senate races of the year, but now GOP spending is going to skyrocket. If we’re going to re-elect Bob and stop Mitch McConnell from taking back the gavel, we need all the grassroots support we can get.

[That’s why I’m asking: Can you split a donation between Bob’s re-election campaign and Defeat Republicans to stop national Republicans from buying this seat? Your action TODAY could make or break our Senate majority. ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77283286/449964603/751461270?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240118_1_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRmOTkyNDU3LTE0YjYtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zCGUdSsp2-Hn6gy3hW7-knS785rJ03bVEiuzCSsmQvg=)
| **[CHIP IN NOW »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77283288/449964605/751461270?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240118_1_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRmOTkyNDU3LTE0YjYtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zCGUdSsp2-Hn6gy3hW7-knS785rJ03bVEiuzCSsmQvg=)**
---

**The stakes couldn’t be more clear: If we lose Pennsylvania, it’s game over.** Democrats could lose the Senate majority AND the White House.

There’s no way in HELL I'm going to stand on the sidelines and let that happen. So I’m asking one more time: [Will you rush $15 to Bob Casey and Defeat Republicans today to help his team raise the resources necessary to prepare for the tough fight ahead of us?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77283291/449964608/751461270?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240118_1_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRmOTkyNDU3LTE0YjYtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zCGUdSsp2-Hn6gy3hW7-knS785rJ03bVEiuzCSsmQvg=)

Thank you for stepping up.

James Carville

Defeat Republicans

name: Thomas Fitton
subject: Honest Elections Are Under Attack!
body:
Do you believe that Judicial Watch’s full range of election integrity work...lawsuits, research and investigations...should be our top priority for 2024?

| | |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

I have a very important question for you:
**_Do you believe that Judicial Watch 's full range of election integrity work...lawsuits, research and investigations... _should be our top priority for 2024_?_**
This is a critical question facing us at this time, and I want to know your opinion!
If you think our election integrity work _should_ be our top priority, [I urge you to let me know and make a contribution today to help us take on all the election challenges confronting us!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66631&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66631&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

Since 2012, we've fought successfully to protect honest election safeguards...like going to bat for states defending their voter ID laws; and forcing states to make reasonable efforts to keep their voter rolls accurate...work the Justice Department should actually be doing..._but_ _isn 't_.

Our lawsuits and settlements have resulted in the removal of more than **4 MILLION** deceased, non-citizen, moved or otherwise ineligible voters from voter lists in more than a dozen red states _and_ blue states across the country.

That's not all...

* We've provided expert testimony on a number of occasions before **Congress** in opposition to leftist power grabs (led by Biden administration officials and a network of Soros groups) to "federalize" our elections and put the corrupt Justice Department in control of administering elections.

* We successfully sued **Maryland** and overturned the Democratic legislature's hyper-partisan, election-rigging "gerrymander" scheme.

* And today we're in **Illinois** fighting in federal court to block the state's efforts to open the floodgates to voter fraud by allowing mail-in ballots to arrive and be counted up to 14 days after Election Day!

We find that the American legal system, though slow at times, works best in helping protect fair and honest elections from the Left's attempts to corrupt them.

**But the Left is now pulling out all the stops across the country to overturn election safeguards,_and make it easier for non-citizens and other ineligible people to vote_.**

[That's why I want to know](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66631&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2) if you believe that our full range of election integrity work...lawsuits, research and investigations... should be our _top_ _priority_ for 2024.

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66631&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

The question is particularly timely today because we are reviewing more data to determine if additional "clean voter registration rolls" lawsuits are needed to protect safeguards against votes being cast by non-citizens and other ineligible individuals.

Personally, I believe that Judicial Watch should continue to take up every challenge related to keeping our elections honest...because if we don't, who will?

[What do you think?](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66631&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)

**I want to know that you share our commitment to the absolute necessity of our election integrity work and are willing to support our work[with a special tax-deductible contribution today](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66631&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2), because we need to be sure we have the resources to add more investigations and lawsuits with jeopardizing any current litigation.**

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66631&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

Thanks to the unfailing commitment of our supporters, Judicial Watch is the largest and most effective government watchdog group in the nation. We're always fighting...and often winning...

We work hard every day. We dig in for the long haul. And we often win key battles in the election integrity war, and also come away with key information about what our government is up to!

I urge you to help us perform this essential work. Thank you very much!

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66631&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)

name: United Rural Democrats
subject: We Need to Do Better
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS
body:
If we're going to defeat extremism...

| |
---
## **"[Trump] will start mass deportations on day 1...and I can’t wait to see it happen.” - Marjorie Taylor Greene**
Peter, Pundits are rightfully saying that **Democrats are struggling to connect with everyday folks **about the issues that matter. We have to do better because the alternative is so much worse. We need to meet folks where they are, and we need to do it now. We're less than a year away from the election, where Trump and Biden will likely go head to head, and we can't let Donald Trump have another four years. Even if Democrats hold both the House and Senate, **a Trump Presidency can weaponize the executive branch to deport millions of immigrants, take away access to reproductive healthcare for millions of women, and chip away at what little protections trans folks have at the federal level.** Folks don't feel listened to, and our grassroots organization is working to help elect everyday people who feel a calling to serve their community. That's how we bridge that gap, and that's how we stop radical Republicans like Marjorie Taylor Greene and Donald Trump from controlling the levers of power in this country.
### **[We can't do this by ourselves, so I need to ask you: Will you support our mission to elect leaders from small-town America to fight for human dignity and our democracy by chipping in $50?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77285778/449971811/1646350971?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=urd-em-240118-better&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU3MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDc3MDE3NGMtMTdiNi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GB2CoWx2bxeHDGO7rtUzaguJxt6B17oy5SD49Tggd5w=)**

clean_body: If we're going to defeat extremism... | | "[Trump] will start mass deportations on day 1...and I can’t wait to see it happen.” - Marjorie Taylor Greene Peter, Pundits are rightfully saying that Democrats are struggling to connect with everyday folks about the issues that matter. We have to do better because the alternative is so much worse. We need to meet folks where they are, and we need to do it now. We're less than a year away from the election, where Trump and Biden will likely go head to head, and we can't let Donald Trump have another four years. Even if Democrats hold both the House and Senate, a Trump Presidency can weaponize the executive branch to deport millions of immigrants, take away access to reproductive healthcare for millions of women, and chip away at what little protections trans folks have at the federal level. Folks don't feel listened to, and our grassroots organization is working to help elect everyday people who feel a calling to serve their community. Fellow Conservative,

Republicans are the only thing stopping President Biden and Chuck Schumer from bankrupting our country.

This isn’t just political hyperbole. It’s as real as it gets!

It’s our Republican majority that allows us to hold them accountable. Without it, we would effectively be relegated to “sitting on the sidelines” and watching as:
* The Biden Administration does nothing to address the growing border crisis,

* **Crime continues to rise, and dangerous drugs pour into our country,**

* The Washington swamp holds critical funds hostage in order to send more untracked American tax dollars to Ukraine, and

* Liberals try to protect their political power by brazenly opposing election integrity measures ... _**even going as far as trying to keep President Trump off the ballot!**_****

But thankfully, our majority acts as a backstop against Democrats running roughshod over our values, our wallets, our country, and our constitution.
**_
But Fellow Conservative,...all that goes away if we lose our majority in November’s election...and I would be lying to you if I told you that wasn’t a real possibility._**

As we head into the most important election in recent memory, our majority has recently shrunk from four to TWO.

**How did this happen?** Over the past couple of months there have been several Republican members of Congress who resigned or retired. Having such a slim majority puts us in a very precarious position going into an election year –and to be honest, we’re in real trouble right now, which is why I’m reaching out today.

It’s anyone’s guess right now as to how things will play out, but if I can tell you one thing it’s this: **if we lose control of the House and fail to retake the Senate, Republicans won’t be able to block Democrats from crushing our economy, diverting taxpayer money to their pet projects or stop them from prosecuting political opponents who dare to speak the truth!**

I’m certain Democrats will have all the money they’ll need in the fight to flip the House. But will Republicans? Democrats will turn in big numbers. That’s why we’re beginning the long, arduous process of identifying conservatives to help us hold onto our slim majority now.

Time is of the essence, and **[we need to know whether you’re on our team.](http://links.teamjimjordan.com/u/click?_t=1b0bebbf1097419382210464ab5da85c&_m=843ddb1b42334330b3057919546d662a&_e=qjjqyxczIa2-lnxHbPMjeryps1iOY8Kwr7AXupnWY7YjgKYb2PGB1wBlY8KMYwE6k43FmZSWbpyDgFonte4aRcIWgQRuYDHIVErLaEU1TVjqpQ1kMUjYl2iZnHzKb72GzMfZp-ndb0AkXLS27FnrPLqhXpy5N1OafE97OSzqnMWbLxm8QV5pwzaCE9grY3phmj0kEb28UgMTK9gPFbhbR-yWGhWGxNdSIwHYn6sJ1Gm29sGdr404fA9TbbLr3jYdgyc6sq5KA866m4ibOiNaGuC9aokJoaL1W9R37SF9NYYtwdoQdBqxQXO5Ff5PWhCv-OpP1TtcU5WzqNmjr42IYarnmVqM1zlT29pZ1vxZgE3M-kjdA5TgHAudHSHx8lqT63eDTHgpQqTyPeJL9hoGI-4UC1vLMdmmjX8Tdmx28k70mgy72xzz42oNOi8kdy_WGCkXOjaVbvmnNZLDUER5TSCSCUZHhNW62w-i2gtK5MB9roN0UYqVZjwaRjbhv9etHZmb_BAqkc7nhGotdtltNUo6AGMYZxfrRntpTMXSxag%3D)**

clean_body: This isn’t just political hyperbole. It’s as real as it gets! We're looking for 100,000 conservatives to join our efforts in support of flipping the House before Biden's first State of the Union on February 23rd. Don't want to receive our emails? | HOLD THE HOUSE PETITION: With recent retirements and resignations, our Republican House majority has shrunk from four to two. The only way that we’re going to defy expectations and defend our House majority is if we have the right people in place leading up to November. We’re laying the groundwork now, and that’s why I’m asking for you to sign up to be a member of my 2024 House Majority Taskforce. . Fellow Conservative, Republicans are the only thing stopping President Biden and Chuck Schumer from bankrupting our country. This isn’t just political hyperbole. It’s as real as it gets! It’s our Republican majority that allows us to hold them accountable. Without it, we would effectively be relegated to “sitting on the sidelines” and watching as: The Biden Administration does nothing to address the growing border crisis, Crime continues to rise, and dangerous drugs pour into our country, The Washington swamp holds critical funds hostage in order to send more untracked American tax dollars to Ukraine, and Liberals try to protect their political power by brazenly opposing election integrity measures ... even going as far as trying to keep President Trump off the ballot!** But thankfully, our majority acts as a backstop against Democrats running roughshod over our values, our wallets, our country, and our constitution. But Fellow Conservative,...all that goes away if we lose our majority in November’s election...and I would be lying to you if I told you that wasn’t a real possibility. As we head into the most important election in recent memory, our majority has recently shrunk from four to TWO. How did this happen? Over the past couple of months there have been several Republican members of Congress who resigned or retired. Having such a slim majority puts us in a very precarious position going into an election year –and to be honest, we’re in real trouble right now, which is why I’m reaching out today. It’s anyone’s guess right now as to how things will play out, but if I can tell you one thing it’s this: if we lose control of the House and fail to retake the Senate, Republicans won’t be able to block Democrats from crushing our economy, diverting taxpayer money to their pet projects or stop them from prosecuting political opponents who dare to speak the truth! I’m certain Democrats will have all the money they’ll need in the fight to flip the House. But will Republicans? Democrats will turn in big numbers. That’s why we’re beginning the long, arduous process of identifying conservatives to help us hold onto our slim majority now. Time is of the essence, and We hope you will be among the first to ** to holding onto our Republican majority in the House. For Liberty, Jim Jordan | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015

subject: The most pressing issues facing our country in 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Voter Reference Foundation |
body:
We MUST address these problems before Election Day| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=2103eefa8ac542cc949e7142d93c0f22&_e=1vJZXSGAfPuFb9lK07OwQ7Pm8wKCe32yEB9eVXM4PZvqsrXSVQkQzj8Udk7p15iNUetLsZw1WLjqHTETczz8StUkPa9JYFiSV0fVxNuXJeGrLU32T2C9w4qxOX59J-WC8gLXKrCWeA6bK1cIiDZRnYeRegb9f2k3-G130FcbL4aXFYRzuThXNkPNCksKwGGiLHw4fqvjacZAWxUOsOEUCbZ1Qm60sfyy6IjQ7qUn-KNy_tLsSpulPDk3L3tD5iGPVMNqdDvJce1KayNwd71ewBvLg2o38yeIhbG7J1eNH-NLFi6Sbgk2sGn_MJpiU-ejpVeXMuTn6qcXp4HutjgRso6KbHVN53mnkSXzAu1VA7g4eQjM34_7tXom3Wkx2lst)
---
Peter, this election season is like no other, and we must address some of the most pressing issues facing our electoral system...

⭕️ **Outdated Voter Lists:** Outdated voter rolls are a ticking time bomb for our elections. We must ensure that voter lists are accurate and up-to-date to prevent potential issues.

⭕️ **Lack of Voter ID Laws:** Voter identification laws play a crucial role in ensuring the legitimacy of our elections. Without these safeguards, the door is open to potential abuse.

⭕️**The Spread of Ranked-Choice Voting:** Ranked-choice voting may sound appealing on the surface to some, but it can lead to unintended outcomes, potentially eroding the principles of secure and accurate elections.

⭕️ **Political Attacks on our Elections:** Radical activists continue trying to disenfranchise voters. We must counter these efforts and ensure every eligible voter can cast their ballot without obstruction.

---
[SECURE AMERICA'S ELECTIONS](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=2103eefa8ac542cc949e7142d93c0f22&_e=1vJZXSGAfPuFb9lK07OwQ7Pm8wKCe32yEB9eVXM4PZvqsrXSVQkQzj8Udk7p15iNUetLsZw1WLjqHTETczz8StUkPa9JYFiSV0fVxNuXJeGrLU32T2C9w4qxOX59J-WC8gLXKrCWeA6bK1cIiDZRnYeRegb9f2k3-G130FcbL4aXFYRzuThXNkPNCksKwGGiLHw4fqvjacZAWxUOsOEUCbZ1Qm60sfyy6IjQ7qUn-KOMt5dKjmnwPNVzJ0huwNi_RyMEdjqRjcmdbNVR_Yphq32xsbFY7qEiRpWdDKwOMpBHh6-VXgzEwzLme91NMgWXxqNKvod6L8RgQ4xL4xMUhjA7e4kt9Ow6MJ5qQfzHBV930XmeuYz9QqtS4IX-ltUZ)
---
**We cannot afford to be complacent. No matter where you are, your active involvement is essential in addressing these challenges and preserving the integrity of our elections.**

**Donate Today to Protect Our Elections:_[https://voter-reference-foundation.revv.co/action](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=2103eefa8ac542cc949e7142d93c0f22&_e=1vJZXSGAfPuFb9lK07OwQ7Pm8wKCe32yEB9eVXM4PZvqsrXSVQkQzj8Udk7p15iNUetLsZw1WLjqHTETczz8StUkPa9JYFiSV0fVxNuXJeGrLU32T2C9w4qxOX59J-WC8gLXKrCWeA6bK1cIiDZRnYeRegb9f2k3-G130FcbL4aXFYRzuThXNkPNCksKwGGiLHw4fqvjacZAWxUOsOEUCbZ1Qm60sfyy6IjQ7qUn-KOccNiF1pJEqncDb4R3g7UC-K6_KFZFSgDFStKKT6RzxjIDdoASAgh_YKmHjWuab70TMLoi6Q4oIs_p1m5dPCIZvsHEyWM--giBA9tiwV-TCy4kTdACFiRXgZUk2YRSggOeK0-E6eoMgqBn_kQZ1Psr)_**

Thank you for your unwavering commitment to our country. Together, we can overcome these challenges and ensure our elections remain compliant, transparent, and secure.

Best,

VRF Election Operations Team

\- 150,000 illegal immigrants entering the country uninhibited per month. (That's nearly the population of my hometown in Louisiana) \- Work permits for EVERY illegal alien who's been released into the country **_\- And they want YOU to pay for their legal fees._** My answer is NO. Absolutely NOT. Friend, Democrats have become the Party of open borders lawlessness and I need your help to stop them. **[This is the hill I'll die on. ](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3628f383986d4c948e3e346e114f7540&_e=KknpR6AbapXroWtDeqIJ9gA_bfKjJhUPsPkg7gzfPzDnjJNpklsGl71MLM_pjBwQYfDFHq_nmFj1rhZgzRNiVMYXYCbJ0SEbCb9ydtTKbRzX4yyBV33NVKC5VcXBAa6VEqAUZX4DivqwQSz5pIGKIm0WnAN_Cfg8Sb82SGpQM3jo7DX6Tmm89B1_UTNJX0O9rRBRSe188htZeGzGg78ZUoE4iY3NpFZxQt466z4sFH3QuexoHF2scH6sHSKewZazWY5V93FVGoUO_nj-ghOrUVNpSMSc7_FrgMq6E_LTRmN96JjEmiU7tyQ0FwM2YKBVyTOaXAMRUEN7pFuTKye6_I7PuidQfpCCh-WTyVGi8ZtMR8y2eFpij8N3WKKXHEFid1IgRgQUXwZB-9nCjGVJ4j3hsv_daLojqtS-G63nlfbdbERnq1JTOTbo03KiIPwN)** **Will you step up to help me and House Republicans end the Biden Border Crisis today?** Let me put this in the clearest terms possible: Since the day Joe Biden took office, he's been blatantly ignoring federal law. _In 2006, Republicans passed a law that directed the President and the executive branch to build the border wall._ **Every Democrat President since has done everything in their power to IGNORE the law. ** I've said it before and I'll say it again. If Joe Biden would just get out of our way, we could end the Biden Border Crisis tomorrow. **_My promise to you is that I 'll do everything in my power to ensure that Democrats respect the rule of law and fight to ensure that our border is strong._** But I need your help to ensure that after this election REPUBLICANS are in the driver's seat. **[**Would you chip in $15, $20, or $25 today to take back control of our border?**](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3628f383986d4c948e3e346e114f7540&_e=KknpR6AbapXroWtDeqIJ9gA_bfKjJhUPsPkg7gzfPzDnjJNpklsGl71MLM_pjBwQYfDFHq_nmFj1rhZgzRNiVMYXYCbJ0SEbCb9ydtTKbRzX4yyBV33NVKC5VcXBAa6VEqAUZX4DivqwQSz5pIGKIm0WnAN_Cfg8Sb82SGpQM3jo7DX6Tmm89B1_UTNJX0O9rRBRSe188htZeGzGg78ZUoE4iY3NpFZxQt466z4sFH3QuexoHF2scH6sHSKewZazWY5V93FVGoUO_nj-ghOrUVNpSMSc7_FrgMq6E_LTRmMjZykkpG8zR3rs1-u5GvDEDTiuJbf5192_V118-zwsu7xQ2mLm9qcJqAhkkqO5F-nB8MBHTI3I9jBWAZYHKm_DBEQDsDCUG7Pmc1NoUiaUrFSv5auz79WZ9F7iH_pp20I7kbiD_gs1WwjCtGy1v2MJ)**

body:
| [](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=3975ed00abc745a687f301afb9850a29&_e=RWkSrFy3SYpOryLNmU1ikquIGqrReyi4g8vAXmkm4KqCN3IAPAHhHccIScuKHvz7QY3BCnLw3_RCWLfI1rrd0Tdi0HDjpIPs0WYShg3kWdLG8TwSIYGmWXJpLA62sOQSUL78MLtdQu5GdAPj6zCUuBXKFgqiSuajcvZDdwEoZYt1a96Q70_TTSki70CPlpFCoGKezY2RmI8R_XGESNqRrWb9GIiJLh5xR8HgVifqfYAc_hjREBn52oGHHrPIVYkpwb1x6GYmEyHk6n-RIkYTl_LJ1L3G_1jbdVvhc87fnK5BgmwbAyUKwCgxBz0ymXWJYRDxkTRlBQqOW5ls8YrjvpRskuxb7XG9fPo0dTil42SiBa2zicr345AAPAtYFEDxDjlB3NIF_2oMrinziOeh3K1BLkxlsejUmvU0EnsqPCk%3D)

Fellow American

This is our LAST CHANCE to fix this country.

As we inch closer to the election, everyone must do their part. That all starts with holding onto the progress we've already made. WE MUST HOLD THE HOUSE IN 2024

To do that, I desperately need your help. The Democrats have marked me as one of their top targets in the upcoming election. They've always been after me, but this year is different. With the fate of the country on the line, the Left is going to mobilize an almost INFINITE pool of resources. **[I need your help to fight back...](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=3975ed00abc745a687f301afb9850a29&_e=RWkSrFy3SYpOryLNmU1ikquIGqrReyi4g8vAXmkm4KqCN3IAPAHhHccIScuKHvz7QY3BCnLw3_RCWLfI1rrd0Tdi0HDjpIPs0WYShg3kWdLG8TwSIYGmWXJpLA62sOQSUL78MLtdQu5GdAPj6zCUuBXKFgqiSuajcvZDdwEoZYt1a96Q70_TTSki70CPlpFCoGKezY2RmI8R_XGESNqRrWb9GIiJLh5xR8HgVifqfYAc_hjREBn52oGHHrPIVYkpOv8nHZKR8c48SX4G4AbYb0ZrRpICc5MP5VhQqE8sDqGb8G6Pyt1csVGoNaD-BYZbTglxR1lQKH8lJGUbqlZ8ltgyHGVEL7OhBe2noDdOIi80EjhnmTi9IKAXCTHZ3YIuXxNQF7xHMVZlV8BQhXNJ6d8JsRTILW4wvIqUN5Y_O_c%3D)**

Grassroots donations have always been the backbone of my campaign.

In 2020, when I won my election despite almost ALL of the polling saying I'd lose, the people of Iowa stood up and let their voices be heard. We let the country know that Iowa isn't done fighting yet. Thanks to every dollar and penny donated to this campaign, we got the job DONE and stayed competitive with our opponents.

In 2022, we pulled it off again. Thanks to EVERYONE who supported my campaign, we widened the margins and won a HUGE victory. Helping the GOP FINALLY take control of the House of Representatives.

**NONE OF THIS would have been possible without the grassroots support of Iowans and Americans hoping for change.**

clean_body: | Fellow American This is our LAST CHANCE to fix this country. As we inch closer to the election, everyone must do their part. That all starts with holding onto the progress we've already made. WE MUST HOLD THE HOUSE IN 2024 To do that, I desperately need your help. The Democrats have marked me as one of their top targets in the upcoming election. They've always been after me, but this year is different. With the fate of the country on the line, the Left is going to mobilize an almost INFINITE pool of resources. Grassroots donations have always been the backbone of my campaign. In 2020, when I won my election despite almost ALL of the polling saying I'd lose, the people of Iowa stood up and let their voices be heard. We let the country know that Iowa isn't done fighting yet. Thanks to every dollar and penny donated to this campaign, we got the job DONE and stayed competitive with our opponents. In 2022, we pulled it off again. Thanks to EVERYONE who supported my campaign, we widened the margins and won a HUGE victory. Helping the GOP FINALLY take control of the House of Representatives. NONE OF THIS would have been possible without the grassroots support of Iowans and Americans hoping for change. CAN I COUNT ON YOU AGAIN - WILL YOU HELP ME WIN IN 2024? | Best, Congresswoman Mariannette Miller-Meeks Paid for by Miller-Meeks for Congress Miller-Meeks for Congress P.O. Box 33 Ottumwa, IA 52501 If you would like to send donation by mail,

name: Team DLCC
subject: 2024 is the year of the states...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DLCC PAC
body:
To ensure that we’re meeting our goals and spotlighting key objectives through 2024 – the year of the states – we developed a detailed roadmap, and we want to share it with our top supporters, like you. | | |
---
| |
---|---
2024 is the _most_ consequential year for state politics and state legislatures in history. With so many important battles being fought at the state level – including issues like reproductive rights, voting rights, and gun laws, **the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee has been leading the fight to hold and flip state legislatures for Democrats across the country.** After winning over 30 special elections in 2023 and overperforming in specials by an average of six points, our top priority is to keep our momentum going in 2024. That’s why we’ve announced our first wave of initial investments in six key battleground states: | **DLCC Initial Battleground Investments**
---
**Michigan** | **$82,000**
**Arizona**
| ****$70,000** **
**New Hampshire**
| ****$50,000** **
**Pennsylvania**
| **$30,000**
**Wisconsin**
| **$24,000**
**North Carolina**
| **$15,000**
That money doesn’t grow on trees. It comes from hardworking grassroots donors who chip in $7 and $25 at a time. Those donations added together help power Democrats to victory – [and you can click here to add a donation today to fund our work for 2024 and beyond.](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xuG0DIvBkTCI0Lr6bZYKgpl2gOxhUzXPMSwByOSES6PhP10AqBprG6cMBHKnhrvgJfBVrrxP8HWmnLXy6kpW1-XKHDsVtaZcyk8VapgNVgxBBDVaY2PmW7Da5KIec9QUN59h3T5WaPK18qkSLU3rZMT4h21CTEBaeyNWQC0SFGCHaP1vEOxpOR1fg9a8bm4LImlubIJt_TIwxEWmK5axMOBiIvzMpvcr5xq532URtF5oCDJKCGf1_wYZ2_LHMemEV8kIEwCw4vNLv2jdWz7MHjHRR1ljb8qeG868NtL_9uyfyrMibsiF94_kt_oUsrH_nQUsUueDnPthUb2bWUV947-K8rr6AxMpaIbJTDQE5f1Dxe1q6d_ieknA_fZc3-6CwLprJzNLoMI349bRMKgO6r/433/ZVu2bwp0RaOeAE2qD0vSeg/h0/y8dfrZ96nH8ufo89mxQ2qAQUEDQSpHGjq627ghPke4s)
To ensure that we’re meeting our goals, we’ve developed a roadmap for 2024 – because we can’t leave anything up to chance when our fundamental freedoms are being fought for and defended at the state level.
**Here’s our plan to ensure victory in 2024:**
* **Compete and win** in key special elections _this month_ in New Hampshire
* **Support our caucuses** as legislative sessions start in January and early February
* **Defend our majorities** in tie-breaking special elections in Pennsylvania next month and in Michigan in April
* **Highlight the differences** between Democrats fighting for our fundamental rights and Republicans’ MAGA agenda
* **Recruit talented candidates** to win in November and beyond
* **Illustrate the importance** of state-level elections around August’s Democratic National Convention
* **Launch ads, spread our message, mobilize voters, and set the stage for a successful final sprint ahead of polls closing on November 5th**

**We don't have to tell you, the clock is already ticking and the first month of 2024 is almost halfway over. We're up against the most extreme Republican Party in history, and they’re determined to continue fighting to strip away our fundamental freedoms.**
[Knowing that we have a year of hard work ahead, will you commit to owning a piece of this fight with an early donation of just $7 or whatever makes sense to you? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xuG0DIvBkTCI0Lr6bZYKgpl2gOxhUzXPMSwByOSES6PhP10AqBprG6cMBHKnhrvgJfBVrrxP8HWmnLXy6kpW1-XKHDsVtaZcyk8VapgNVgxBBDVaY2PmW7Da5KIec9QUN59h3T5WaPK18qkSLU3rZMT4h21CTEBaeyNWQC0SFGCHaP1vEOxpOR1fg9a8bm4LIHDrXItwoIZi17HyvRsom7e3JH5kCjhsFlVp_EsXHAO-VAPiU1SyxOr4T0UYr2NcKho2cOFPUZNAGmqar7lyIA1mYvxlFFHYT_keHhyk-L1abMsQv5-7HTrnaV4x0Q9cPU0puK-fo6gKVUMm26KeyiMqbtnqSzaa7sE1ecftVjwG4c67K9Ha2diARZF7wnFRbBBvp76U-yNbomhDNGoma9/433/ZVu2bwp0RaOeAE2qD0vSeg/h1/IIUP5BAZBUX1toxxFV466P8xS7No905iI7lRGjKcagw)
If you’re still curious, we invite you to take a look at our roadmap. And buckle up for the year of the states because, with your support, we can make our vision a reality.
[Check out our 2024 roadmap »](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0uX8dsPRccdgrQRhaQEmkSHXX0EwyfNZzx1Y1No3OTgS_ktQgHabJIKRNRhGnegkqsYXjN6diSW0n7tZrTs5ybGPaz_Nwgv05JLdsni_geD5Mmtt0jNj65i685xWWGRA86K6_TCRYy-eGN1QUa7qTEAKYqLgnqwwtKl6rIFPNhmdw4K7RonMvXzuASnstxY4JBf-im3sTc_RJR-wvk0XUsB1UjI9Smdf9LAVxIBi9XycG1szjE9RL4kTP_-ZWVN4nkr7VH_GokZ6kh8I0bXc5btEKn_h1z_nEfZC8XiHe-61bbmcWmZc_XdxnCXuG3Rj_fx6n7fsW-rEV7Rp7FvoM9u0XtZR7oCpVlpBzi9gdmaMYFzKJ9GGyCCo_I99UsLYJuVw_nLwgYZ-EY3o8-FNaFA/433/ZVu2bwp0RaOeAE2qD0vSeg/h2/k4r-lKwqwnAIfIdq0ObOZ3GQe1SYy6bkQRycjMkmwjM) [Donate to help elect state dems »](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xuG0DIvBkTCI0Lr6bZYKgpl2gOxhUzXPMSwByOSES6PhP10AqBprG6cMBHKnhrvgJfBVrrxP8HWmnLXy6kpW1-XKHDsVtaZcyk8VapgNVgxBBDVaY2PmW7Da5KIec9QUN59h3T5WaPK18qkSLU3rZMT4h21CTEBaeyNWQC0SFGCHaP1vEOxpOR1fg9a8bm4LKBUnVxSjrom3tALuDpxBJVKX1sRVi4z0_210RiHuIAIn3wnylk79k28mNZJjnXPEMn_IHBhpQgexeLuSa1ygULfm2kgP6-wp_xQDko8jvcWpvcKHx-drfX7P3xHyEcOSpFRBBDZVrcPH7WWtdDX80wDuv_rabiDhnq4CqXUrwxC_fLRuiL5ecx6RDQDx7hr16HneXZscCtAeGMIMSMB3nH/433/ZVu2bwp0RaOeAE2qD0vSeg/h3/NqwlkmhSHesqeQ05bHtfJQCWSu-kwCIJw18HgnRk2D4)

body:
This is a serious situation with potentially dire consequences for millions of Americans.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77291303/449984359/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTdiYTQwNS0xY2I2LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ynmT3tAs45VJvYfb5P5xZSG6sZ-Ce_79VcbEF4NZaKY=&emci=6c119b76-05b6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=ca7ba405-1cb6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=26261389)

| | **While Democrats have been working hard to avoid a government shutdown, Mike Johnson's MAGA caucus is focused on impeaching President Biden and bending to the demands of the most radical Republicans in Congress.** Each day, their inability to lead brings us closer to another catastrophic self-inflicted wound. **This is a serious situation with potentially dire consequences for millions of Americans**. These extremist Republicans have lost sight of our sacred duty. For them, this is just another partisan game. Some even seem excited at the prospect of a government shutdown. **It's time to stop toying with people's livelihoods.** We, as members of Congress, are here to improve the lives of the people who elected us and to safeguard our democracy. It's up to us to be caretakers for our democracy. That's why I'm running for Senate. clean_body: This is a serious situation with potentially dire consequences for millions of Americans. | | | | While Democrats have been working hard to avoid a government shutdown, Mike Johnson's MAGA caucus is focused on impeaching President Biden and bending to the demands of the most radical Republicans in Congress. Each day, their inability to lead brings us closer to another catastrophic self-inflicted wound. This is a serious situation with potentially dire consequences for millions of Americans. These extremist Republicans have lost sight of our sacred duty. For them, this is just another partisan game. Some even seem excited at the prospect of a government shutdown. It's time to stop toying with people's livelihoods. We, as members of Congress, are here to improve the lives of the people who elected us and to safeguard our democracy. It's up to us to be caretakers for our democracy. subject: The hill I’ll die on

body:
Chuck Schumer wants me to sign off on his open borders wishlist. I REFUSE.| | |

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8ac5d697d2d7483d8a01b40e538bfca0&_e=w5cPGEZzj_9V4i76sHz2NQYEK527yo_fZnpREzWj20w4M3yqfl3AlelyHCtAYovO9JZPeFHcgJdrvBVPLQoX5frj5N-WYZ4KBYw9F9NGki9n8tsY3kqfVSgoAia2ZkfO7GCiiCKRDLikVhOk3DDrrcMFJyVKkPiTC51CoQUS9KJFfvEI_rTb8tb-FX9eBq8mpuPMBl4aSBQWOKRCKAnjGlBDJ3GHLHkcu2-_tmgppvYJlrYxv6iYNt6TRyV_IAYImu4y6AEEu6BiKxAx4H-ROW5W0ZHFVabkGXYIId_JwuZuezza_Ukwtd-hKHMNna2Dc8p4jTGUgIJNY9sxg0PbjV0Ve9OgXmlh9Zkno7fMADHjADO82TjTRQ7AtAhkHEZD4X4_A6qL3Svcdaybedasi8QveDDEXVmo7wZmWH07fRY%3D)
---
Peter, the Democrats have a bridge to sell you. They want you to believe that the deal they’re offering to the American people is a “compromise.” **_[Schumer wants you to sign off on:](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8ac5d697d2d7483d8a01b40e538bfca0&_e=w5cPGEZzj_9V4i76sHz2NQYEK527yo_fZnpREzWj20w4M3yqfl3AlelyHCtAYovO9JZPeFHcgJdrvBVPLQoX5frj5N-WYZ4KBYw9F9NGki9n8tsY3kqfVSgoAia2ZkfO7GCiiCKRDLikVhOk3DDrrcMFJyVKkPiTC51CoQUS9KJFfvEI_rTb8tb-FX9eBq8mpuPMBl4aSBQWOKRCKAnjGlBDJ3GHLHkcu2-_tmgppvYJlrYxv6iYNt6TRyV_IAYIiecKtIxZ5yV7B43nMEKSbUZAbCs7Zt-FRgyqgBaJk5sAZB5YIXIt3wG7izJ0Nn9Q46ObfWUpQYIkB4Kk6XtUc27uGXijLT_aV2M8hmO04K1splzgUKq6dUUR5Yz9ExyuzqvOiFu6xe-g35KspsOAjjou4RfSF3ctcBO80PsrptU%3D)_**

\- 150,000 illegal immigrants entering the country uninhibited per month. (That’s nearly the population of my hometown in Louisiana) \- Work permits for EVERY illegal alien who’s been released into the country **_\- And they want YOU to pay for their legal fees._** My answer is NO. Absolutely NOT. Peter, Democrats have become the Party of open borders lawlessness and I need your help to stop them. **[This is the hill I’ll die on. ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8ac5d697d2d7483d8a01b40e538bfca0&_e=w5cPGEZzj_9V4i76sHz2NQYEK527yo_fZnpREzWj20w4M3yqfl3AlelyHCtAYovO9JZPeFHcgJdrvBVPLQoX5frj5N-WYZ4KBYw9F9NGki9n8tsY3kqfVSgoAia2ZkfO7GCiiCKRDLikVhOk3DDrrcMFJyVKkPiTC51CoQUS9KJFfvEI_rTb8tb-FX9eBq8mpuPMBl4aSBQWOKRCKAnjGlBDJ3GHLHkcu2-_tmgppvYJlrYxv6iYNt6TRyV_IAYIj9RFQnQszCr4CtkOzwOV06QUQIrqI5xvKil2dDBIdfeRDoTgr_U2QNXJD4OErbfgVh8mecubv8UyM5xMq0uj8goSDOOaLtjPENKA0cDJKuq-PIqbXWpEM-0M2CWwABehoiv4KVNxxCEUaDphgnkpwq1iK5qixXhDCNhg4KXrUVg%3D)** **Will you step up to help me and House Republicans end the Biden Border Crisis today?** Let me put this in the clearest terms possible: Since the day Joe Biden took office, he’s been blatantly ignoring federal law. _In 2006, Republicans passed a law that directed the President and the executive branch to build the border wall._ **Every Democrat President since has done everything in their power to IGNORE the law. ** I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again. If Joe Biden would just get out of our way, we could end the Biden Border Crisis tomorrow. **_My promise to you is that I’ll do everything in my power to ensure that Democrats respect the rule of law and fight to ensure that our border is strong._** But I need your help to ensure that after this election REPUBLICANS are in the driver’s seat. **[**Would you chip in $15, $20, or $25 today to take back control of our border?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8ac5d697d2d7483d8a01b40e538bfca0&_e=w5cPGEZzj_9V4i76sHz2NQYEK527yo_fZnpREzWj20w4M3yqfl3AlelyHCtAYovO9JZPeFHcgJdrvBVPLQoX5frj5N-WYZ4KBYw9F9NGki9n8tsY3kqfVSgoAia2ZkfO7GCiiCKRDLikVhOk3DDrrcMFJyVKkPiTC51CoQUS9KJFfvEI_rTb8tb-FX9eBq8mpuPMBl4aSBQWOKRCKAnjGlBDJ3GHLHkcu2-_tmgppvYJlrYxv6iYNt6TRyV_IAYIc917GflndjzTdx6awf2-wga0ZdXfhpD2meacGRe3Mo6zRu5v2KkI2F2vfOyJWS0DAX6TwyxXq4OBpsIa3bJ-vKJRKw9eUSVvyHjDe6IPe6uVu9U1fZj7FzB3NjjYEnijF5J03SW7-e8lSUIDW1sjBfcAiTmufacVrglAcwVgthA%3D)**
---
[**END THE BIDEN BORDER CRISIS**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8ac5d697d2d7483d8a01b40e538bfca0&_e=w5cPGEZzj_9V4i76sHz2NQYEK527yo_fZnpREzWj20w4M3yqfl3AlelyHCtAYovO9JZPeFHcgJdrvBVPLQoX5frj5N-WYZ4KBYw9F9NGki9n8tsY3kqfVSgoAia2ZkfO7GCiiCKRDLikVhOk3DDrrcMFJyVKkPiTC51CoQUS9KJFfvEI_rTb8tb-FX9eBq8mpuPMBl4aSBQWOKRCKAnjGlBDJ3GHLHkcu2-_tmgppvYJlrYxv6iYNt6TRyV_IAYIrpOvbbTz9djHlUHamCM0zX_x3fJ6WCiEiq0XkFrY7VrQPAKdpyI1qW3g91yZ8rHFaOZNNqK4Q56prw2c1od9I8UgdXf12pDPW6eTFbTcST-CGHu9FpEegZtAIpHhxqgJmhh91PyXNDqV3gcMyatcYpiwz2yPMfYXKKyLzRTSoCI%3D)
---
Thank you in advance for your support.

Sincerely,
---

First Week of Session Recap | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/repryanchamberlin/official-newsletter-12-15-12674158?e=d1c1b9864f)
---
| |
---
| | **WEEKLY UPDATE FROM REP. RYAN CHAMBERLIN**
---
| My fellow Floridians,

Last Tuesday marked the start of the 2024 Legislative Session in Tallahassee! It is exciting to be back in our Capital City, fighting hard for the issues important to the good people of District 24. As your State Representative, I promise to build a better future for our state, and I am committed to ensuring that your voice is heard. I truly appreciate your continued trust and support!

Thank you for reading this recap of some of the great things that happened in Tallahassee last week. I look forward to keeping you updated on my work in the Florida House.
---
|
---
| | **Take Stock in Children Reception at Governor’s Mansion**
---
|
---
| Soon after arriving in Tallahassee last week, I had the pleasure of attending an event supporting Florida’s students at the Governor’s Mansion. I had a wonderful time meeting with representatives from Take Stock in Children and learning more about how this great organization is making a difference in kids’ lives across our state.
---
| | **Opening Day of the 2024 Legislative Session**
---
|
---
---
| On Tuesday, I joined my fellow legislators in the Florida House to kick off the 2024 Legislative Session. It is great to be back in my office in Tallahassee, working hard for District 24. I have filed several important bills that will benefit our state in so many ways. I look forward to keeping you in the loop on their progress over the next 60 days!
---
| | **Meeting with Florida Engineering Society**
---
|
---
---
| On Wednesday, after meeting with my colleagues in the State Administration & Technology Appropriations Subcommittee, I had the privilege of discussing legislative priorities with the Florida Engineering Society. It was great to talk with them about how their jobs have been impacted by past legislation and how I can champion their needs during this year’s legislative session.
---
| | **Meeting with Ocala/Marion County Association of REALTORS**
---
|
---
---
| Following my meeting with the Florida Engineering Society, I had the pleasure of joining the Ocala/Marion County Association of REALTORS to discuss legislative priorities and projects for Marion County. Over 30 members were present at the meeting, making it my largest meeting to date. I had a wonderful time getting to know my constituents and learning more about the issues facing the real estate industry in District 24.
---
| | **Bicentennial Session at the Historic Capitol**
---
|
---
|
---
---
| On Thursday morning, I had the honor of joining my fellow legislators in the Historic Capitol building for a ceremony celebrating the bicentennial anniversary of Florida’s Capital City. It began with a traditional roll call of all 120 representatives by name, and then we passed a special resolution honoring the bicentennial history of the Florida Capitol. It was a great opportunity to give thanks for the many years of history that have taken place in Tallahassee.
---
| | **Meeting with John Labriola with Florida Family Policy Council**
---
|
---
| After the bicentennial ceremony concluded, I had a busy day of meetings ahead. I had the pleasure of discussing my bill, [HB 599](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=0ba1a90182&e=d1c1b9864f), with John Labriola with the Florida Family Policy Council (FFPC). This legislation means a great deal for Florida families. If passed, HB 599 would reinforce biological facts in government workplaces and build on the good work the Florida Legislature has done to keep woke gender ideology out of the Sunshine State. I am thankful to have FFPC’s support on this measure. Following my meeting with John, I met with the Regulatory Reform & Economic Development Subcommittee, where we heard [HB 1](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=f9208e1b79&e=d1c1b9864f) and [HB 3](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=bf8b79cc26&e=d1c1b9864f), legislation that would crack down on social media companies and protect minors from harmful online materials.
---
| | **Civil Justice Subcommittee**
---
|
---
| I ended Thursday with a productive meeting with the Civil Justice Subcommittee, where we heard another round of great legislation designed to better our state. It is a privilege to serve on this important committee.

Before wrapping up for the weekend, on Friday morning, I joined my fellow legislators on the Select Committee on Health Innovation for a final committee meeting. We had many important discussions, and it was a strong finish to our first week back in Tallahassee.
---
|
---
| | I am working hard for you and your family in Tallahassee! Thank you for electing me to serve you. It is the highest honor to represent you in the Florida Legislature.

I look forward to keeping you updated on my work during the 2024 Legislative Session. As always, if I may be of any assistance, please do not hesitate to contact my office by **[clicking here](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=9c9c6e13b7&e=d1c1b9864f "https://www.myfloridahouse.gov/Sections/Representatives/contactmember.aspx?MemberId=4901&SessionId=103&utm_source=Ryan+Chamberlin+for+State+Representative&utm_campaign=ae0a433299-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_08_05_14_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7ddd94a0de-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D")**.

Best regards,

**Ryan Chamberlin**
******State Representative**
**District 24**
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2024 State Representative Ryan Chamberlin, All rights reserved._
State Representative Ryan Chamberlin

**Our mailing address is:**
1101 The Capitol
402 South Monroe Street
Tallahassee, FL 32399-1300

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&e=d1c1b9864f&c=58f7226fbb) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&e=d1c1b9864f&c=58f7226fbb).

name: John Fetterman
subject: Andy Kim
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Bob Menendez needs to go
#
Hey Derek, I have an announcement.
**Today, I’m endorsing Rep. Andy Kim to be New Jersey’s next U.S. Senator.**
**[Andy Kim has shown again + again he’s a reliable vote on our most important Democratic priorities. He should join me in the Senate — so will you split a donation between Andy + me today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240118-1?refcode=em20240118-1-8754&refcode2=8754_434096_hkvj0_&akid=8754%2E434096%2Ehkvj0_)**
I’m appalled by the allegations that Senator Bob Menendez had potential bribes of gold bars hidden in his mattress and was potentially working with foreign governments. But despite these *damning* allegations of bribery and corruption against him, Menendez is *still* running for reelection.
_It’s unacceptable, and that’s why NJ needs to elect Andy instead._
**I’m proud to endorse Rep. Kim, who’s actually working to _earn_ this critical Senate seat.** We need a solid, committed Democrat who cares about regular folks representing our neighbors from New Jersey in the Senate. Andy has the record and the experience in the House that proves he’s ready to get to work.
This race won’t be a walk in the park. Andy is facing a competitive primary, and it’s tough to unseat a sitting Senator who refuses to go. So he needs our help.
**[If you agree that New Jersey deserves a Senator with their best interests at heart down in DC, please split a donation between our campaign + Andy Kim today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240118-1?refcode=em20240118-1-8754&refcode2=8754_434096_hkvj0_&akid=8754%2E434096%2Ehkvj0_)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240118-1?amount=5&refcode=em20240118-8754&refcode2=8754_434096_hkvj0_&akid=8754%2E434096%2Ehkvj0_)**
I need Andy Kim serving alongside me in the Senate – and I feel very secure knowing that he’s not going to be accused of being a foreign agent for Egypt, unlike his opponent. 😬
Thanks for your help + your support.
-- John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator, Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20240118-8754-footer&t=1&refcode2=8754_434096_hkvj0_&akid=8754%2E434096%2Ehkvj0_)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8754%2E434096%2Ehkvj0_)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8754%2E434096%2Ehkvj0_)

Andy has the record and the experience in the House that proves he’s ready to get to work. This race won’t be a walk in the park. Andy is facing a competitive primary, and it’s tough to unseat a sitting Senator who refuses to go. So he needs our help. I need Andy Kim serving alongside me in the Senate – and I feel very secure knowing that he’s not going to be accused of being a foreign agent for Egypt, unlike his opponent. 😬 Thanks for your help + your support. -- John John Fetterman U.S. Senator, Pennsylvania | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

clean_body: This changes everything we know about Alzheimer's! After building the most powerful atomic microscope in the world... Scientists at the Weinberg College of Chicago were able to look inside of an active, living brain... And were stunned to discover where memory cells are really stored... And how they influence our daily activities. The good news is that even if you have a severe case of Alzheimer's... You can now easily and permanently reverse memory loss... With WARNING: As you don't need to spend a dime on nauseating meds or take supplements of any kind... Big drug companies want the video banned as soon as possible.

---
Bill grew up in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, and is a proud LSU graduate. He worked in Louisiana’s charity hospital system for over 25 years, ensuring that the less fortunate in our state were able to receive quality health care. Later, Bill co-founded the Greater Baton Rouge Community Clinic, providing free dental and health care to working families without insurance. In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, Bill led a group of volunteers to convert an abandoned K-Mart building into an emergency healthcare facility.
As a conservative in the Senate, he focuses on the issues Louisiana families care about the most. Bill is working to lower the cost of health care, make flood insurance affordable, and save Social Security from a 24% cut if Washington fails to act.
Bill, and his wife, Laura, live in Baton Rouge and attend church at the Chapel on the Campus. They are blessed with three children and one grandchild.

clean_body: | | | | The outcome of this bill will send shockwaves throughout Washington... 🚨LEGISLATIVE ALERT🚨 Friend, Senator Bill Cassidy (R-LA) just introduced one of the****MOST IMPORTANT** pieces of legislation we’ve seen so far in the Biden-era... With Biden’s Border Crisis spiraling out of control, some Deep Blue Democrat-run states are now pushing to offer illegal immigrants free healthcare – at the taxpayer’s expense! Apparently, wide-open borders weren’t enticing enough, so Democrats are now laying out the red carpet... We’re releasing an**URGENT** call to action across the United States for Republicans to step up and support Senator Cassidy’s bill to**STOP** this madness before it’s too late. Friend – can we count on you to**step up and support Senator Cassidy’s efforts, so that he has the resources he needs to get this monumental legislation signed into law? Suggested Donation: | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" | "LinkedIn" ---|---|---|--- Bill grew up in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, and is a proud LSU graduate. He worked in Louisiana’s charity hospital system for over 25 years, ensuring that the less fortunate in our state were able to receive quality health care. Later, Bill co-founded the Greater Baton Rouge Community Clinic, providing free dental and health care to working families without insurance. In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, Bill led a group of volunteers to convert an abandoned K-Mart building into an emergency healthcare facility. As a conservative in the Senate, he focuses on the issues Louisiana families care about the most. Bill is working to lower the cost of health care, make flood insurance affordable, and save Social Security from a 24% cut if Washington fails to act. Bill, and his wife, Laura, live in Baton Rouge and attend church at the Chapel on the Campus. They are blessed with three children and one grandchild. | Bill is working for all of Louisiana | DONATE BY MAIL Bill Cassidy for US Senate PO BOX 80505 Baton Rouge, LA 70898 Can’t donate? Don’t worry - There are other ways you can help! | GOP Legislative Alert PO Box 80505, Baton Rouge, LA 70898 \- =

name: Evergreen Events
subject: RSVP: Gov. Gretchen Whitmer on the Clean Energy Future Plan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Get the answers to these questions
| | | | | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/339?t=15&akid=13998%2E53494%2ELMfARL)
---
| | Friend— How did Michigan, a swing state in America's industrial heartland, pass historic climate legislation and set a new standard for clean energy labor protections?

What does it mean for Michigan’s economy and the global fight for climate action?

How did the labor and climate movements work together to make it possible, and what's needed next to protect frontline communities in Michigan?

**If you find these questions intriguing, you'll love our next virtual event on January 26 at 9 a.m. ET/ 12 p.m. PT.**
---
[**RSVP NOW**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5114?t=17&akid=13998%2E53494%2ELMfARL)
---
[](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5114?t=18&akid=13998%2E53494%2ELMfARL)
---
**Next week** , we're sitting down with Michigan Governor Gretchen Whitmer and a panel of movement leaders and policy experts to talk about what this legislation means and how it came to happen that Michigan now has a 100 percent clean energy standard, programs that help low-income communities save energy and pay lower energy bills, a just transition office for workers, and more. **[Join Governor Gretchen Whitmer next week to discuss the new package and learn about what’s needed next in Michigan.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5114?t=19&akid=13998%2E53494%2ELMfARL)**
---
[RSVP](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5114?t=21&akid=13998%2E53494%2ELMfARL)
---
Hope to see you there,

Courtney Bourgoin
Senior Policy and Advocacy Manager, Midwest
Evergreen Action
---
|
---
**P.S.** Can't make it for the live event? **[RSVP anyway](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5114?t=22&akid=13998%2E53494%2ELMfARL)** , and we'll send you a recording.

clean_body: Get the answers to these questions | | | | | | | Friend— How did Michigan, a swing state in America's industrial heartland, pass historic climate legislation and set a new standard for clean energy labor protections? What does it mean for Michigan’s economy and the global fight for climate action? How did the labor and climate movements work together to make it possible, and what's needed next to protect frontline communities in Michigan? If you find these questions intriguing, you'll love our next virtual event on January 26 at 9 a.m. ET/ 12 p.m. PT. Next week , we're sitting down with Michigan Governor Gretchen Whitmer and a panel of movement leaders and policy experts to talk about what this legislation means and how it came to happen that Michigan now has a 100 percent clean energy standard, programs that help low-income communities save energy and pay lower energy bills, a just transition office for workers, and more. Hope to see you there, Courtney Bourgoin Senior Policy and Advocacy Manager, Midwest Evergreen Action | P.S. Can't make it for the live event? , and we'll send you a recording. | | | | | | ---|---|---|---

name: Gallego for Arizona
subject: Arizona Senate Match-Up: “Neck and Neck”
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
These are the results of a poll conducted by Public Policy Polling early this January.
#

These are the results of a poll conducted by Public Policy Polling early this January.
Kari Lake — 46%
Ruben Gallego — 45%
And these are the results from October, from a poll done by the same firm:
Kari Lake — 43%
Ruben Gallego — 48%.
We’ve come down 3%, while Kari Lake rises 3%. This race is neck-and-neck.
In the Election Year, with voters coming online and starting to pay attention, this is not the direction we want polls to be going.
So if you care about control of the Senate; if you care about defeating election deniers and conspiracy theorists; if you care about putting an end to MAGA-right candidates like Kari Lake and Trump... we need you to get in this fight.
[**Please, make a donation to Ruben Gallego and help us take back this Senate seat and defend it from Kari Lake.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan24.RCwesN&refcode=em240118-1-90-t2&t=1&akid=1748%2E734936%2EyN1xu2)
[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan24.RCwesN&refcode=em240118-1-90-t2&amount=3&t=2&akid=1748%2E734936%2EyN1xu2)
We really need this.
Thank you,
Team Gallego

The GOP spent the past year wasting our time, effort, and resources on their petty political games. It’s unacceptable and it’s downright dangerous. And now that Trump has won the Iowa caucus, it's more important than ever that Democrats take back the House and get back to work on the issues that really matter.

name: The GIFFORDS Team
subject: We’re thrilled to introduce you to our new Executive Director
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We are thrilled to have Emma Brown on board to lead us into the next decade of our movement for gun safety
#

Hi there, we have some exciting news to share with you today:
**We’re thrilled to announce that Emma Brown is GIFFORDS’ new Executive Director!**
[**Will you sign our card today to give Emma a warm welcome to our team?**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_welcome_emma_jan2024/?source=em240118-1-subs&refcode2=7437.3935704.JLQpn2&akid=7437%2E3935704%2EJLQpn2)
**[SIGN THE CARD →](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_welcome_emma_jan2024/?source=em240118-1-subs&refcode2=7437.3935704.JLQpn2&akid=7437%2E3935704%2EJLQpn2)**
Emma is a nationally-recognized organizational leader who brings a track-record of building expansive, diverse, and successful programs at the state and federal levels.
She most recently served as campaign manager for Senator Mark Kelly's 2022 re-election, where she oversaw his $100 million race. Emma has also managed state and federal campaigns across the country, including the Arizona Coordinated Campaign for President Biden in 2020.
We are very happy to have Emma to lead us into the next decade of our movement for gun safety. With the stakes in 2024, she’s the right person to lead our fight to build on our wins in the states, secure a gun safety majority in the House, maintain our majority in the Senate, and reelect Joe Biden to finish the job.
[**Will you please join us in welcoming Emma to the team by signing our card? It will mean a lot to show that this community stands by her as she takes on this new role.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_welcome_emma_jan2024/?source=em240118-1-subs&refcode2=7437.3935704.JLQpn2&akid=7437%2E3935704%2EJLQpn2)
**[SIGN THE CARD →](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_welcome_emma_jan2024/?source=em240118-1-subs&refcode2=7437.3935704.JLQpn2&akid=7437%2E3935704%2EJLQpn2)**
\- The team at GIFFORDS

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=7437%2E3935704%2EJLQpn2) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

body:
God's Prophetic Time-Clock Did you know that God has an End Times Prophetic Time-Clock? Last night at Sheridan.Church, we resumed our mid-week serie
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5654656.1996.1.0aefba4a9c6a7ed8e8ab38d742fe314c) |
---
## God's Prophetic Time-Clock
---
Did you know that God has an **End Times Prophetic Time-Clock**? Last night at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5654656.1997.1.20a9bd48475c6239b47684873babe655), we resumed our mid-week series over the [Book of Daniel](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5654656.1998.1.f8fddc8870d6e2bbecd3979d6ef50916) and we looked at how accurate **God's Time-Clock** has been in the past and what we can expect in the future. I believe this teaching will open your eyes as we go through [Daniel 9](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5654656.1999.1.a4ed3f8a322b86eac6f8d3a5ed486794) in great detail. Watch here: [https://www.youtube.com/live/hn16oEwcGOk?si=jhEoXgWecSu2hwYk](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5654656.2000.1.00c059812e766f725cd40effee5d0a7f) Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5654656.2001.1.2bf9321aa58e7e43ffe729cda552f947), GAB, [Facebook](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5654656.2002.1.1219ad800cacdbcaf0d140138b368b26), [Instagram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5654656.2003.1.e99a5f87080902962392b685420c2c71), [Twitter](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5654656.2004.1.72bffd3560c37b840b9863f4e9e1bb4d), [Telegram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5654656.2005.1.cf77566e93a64d4686f4f23a10b6cbc4), GETTR & [YouTube](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5654656.2006.1.4a683795d73e2b0a11028a37f078b4e5)). [www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5654656.2007.1.c8ba4aabf8a04a7038245ba52f730c53)
---
| | [ Partner w/Sheridan.Church In 2024 ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5654656.2008.1.3be09de42ddf3f2ca20cff2eede2b1a4)
---
---
## Upcoming Event Hosted At Sheridan.Church
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5654656.2009.1.041fe71e0a789055eac378dee38883be)
---
For 60 years people have asked: **WHO REALLY KILLED JFK?** _Movies_ , _books_ , _blogs_ and _government reports_ have all tried to answer the daunting question. One person who has put forth more evidence than anyone I know in answering this question is **Roger Stone** who has written a **New York Times Bestseller** answering who really killed JFK. **Roger Stone** is coming to Tulsa, OK for a _SPECIAL 2 Hour Event_ to lay out the evidence of who he believes killed JFK. There will also be a **LIVE Q &A session with Mr. Stone**. **When** : Thursday, February 1 | 6:30 pm **Where** : [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5654656.2010.1.907ae5ccfaacf951dae8f6784da2e8ec) | 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK 74145 **MUST RSVP** : [www.sheridan.church/events](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5654656.2011.1.6e998ea816e4360d341cc17c3f8441ef)
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5654656.2012.1.004c9926ed6b3cec0c6e920df8b68a51) Roger J. Stone
---
**Roger Stone** is a seasoned political operative, speaker, pundit, and New York Times Bestselling Author featured in the **Netflix documentary Get Me Roger Stone**.
**Richard Nixon** , **Ronald Reagan** , and **Donald Trump** —all of these Presidents relied on **Roger Stone** to secure their seat in the Oval Office. In a 45-year career in American politics, Stone has worked on over 700 campaigns for public office.
| | [ Click Here For Tickets To The Roger Stone Event ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5654656.2013.1.cb0bd35e4886f923461935bbde7fbcc0)
---
---
## What To Do To Be Ready For 2024
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5654656.2014.1.66dc482943d76d4333043599d673977d)
---
I am _not a prophet neither the son of the prophet_ but I am willing to bet the farm that 2024 will be **WILD**! The **Deep State Globalists** will pull out all the stops in this upcoming election year just like in 2020. The question then becomes: **what should we do to be ready for 2024?** I preached about this subject on Sunday at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5654656.2015.1.87f7083ad4e60ff7793984226e55bfc5) and I encourage you to check it out because it will help prepare you for what is coming. Watch the [sermon](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5654656.2016.1.59d295225a562c5985a60472d76a5a2e) here: [https://youtube.com/live/YG782xgZ_y8?feature=share](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5654656.2017.1.bbc119938e492c4ebb6a853474c498d4) If you are looking for a church in 2024 know that you are invited to join me at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5654656.2018.1.cd724ba1db03460dc4d1d0b4f4558423) Tulsa & OKC **Sundays @10am | 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK** **Sundays @6pm | 3100 N Meridian OKC, OK** Let's start 2024 _STRONG_! You can also partner with [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5654656.2019.1.5fc92a08de95337088edbed23cc5951c) by making a donation at [www.sheridan.church/give](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5654656.2020.1.abbf4b7a3a37cd5a51db10a7ada3d73e)
---
| | [ Read Through The Bible In 2024 ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5654656.2021.1.fd81541e366f92b6a4e6c4e1372b8dd6)
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5654656.2022.1.503d1fd6ca8ff6aa5af7eb96b0428bdc)
---
Join the [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5654656.2023.1.b98b83f6f3dda17f7366a9e6c15dd1bb) family in reading through the **ENTIRE** Bible in 2024.
Click the QR code or visit: [Sheridan's Bible Reading Plan](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5654656.2024.1.d5acbb78e0591fc54d425b2f16f12ba9)
---
## This Will Benefit You More Than You Know!
---
Right now, **Biblical ILLITERACY** is at an _all-time high_ in America. Fewer than half of all adults can name the four Gospel writers. In a recent **LifeWay Research** study, the Bible reading habits among church attendees was shocking:
\- 19% read the Bible everyday
\- 26% read the Bible a few times per week
\- 14% read the Bible once a week
\- 22% read the Bible once a month
\- 18% read the Bible rarely or never In general, American Christians have a poor foundation in the Word of God. This is a major problem and is the reason why I decided to launch [Sheridan Bible College](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5654656.2025.1.7a9b1e719e89732ebe0778d90db1af05). I want to encourage you to consider [Sheridan Bible College](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5654656.2026.1.ff2feefc3fbbfd65e3dc088ac3f7d393) as a means for you to grow in your faith and go from a convert to a true disciple. [Sheridan Bible College](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5654656.2027.1.a1ce0cf5e8c223fe4880034a3dbf6583) is a 2 year intensive program consisting of 24 courses divided between 4 semesters. Classes are offered in-person & online (you can LITERALLY watch anytime from anywhere). _"Study to show yourself approved to God, a worker who does not need to be ashamed, rightly dividing the word of truth"_ \- **2 Timothy 2:15** Enrolling in [Sheridan Bible College](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5654656.2028.1.fb1a4722c801669e52fdfb133a09780a) is not something you will regret. We have intentionally made tuition VERY inexpensive: $300 per semester. **Spring 2024 Semester Courses** :
\- Hebrews & The General Epistles
\- 5-Fold Ministry
\- 7 Churches Of Revelation
\- Pentateuch (First 5 Books of the Bible)
\- Johannine Literature (Gospel & Letters of John)
\- Helps Ministry Classes for the Spring 2024 Semester begin January 18. Enroll today at [www.sheridan.church/biblecollege](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5654656.2029.1.4c18bfffd06b84e243f916fc120b735f)

name: Matthew Diemer
subject: Dennis Kucinich has entered the race
body:
| |
---
Peter, I wanted to inform you that former Ohio Congressman & presidential candidate Dennis Kucinich has joined the race for OH-07 House as an independent candidate. Previously, Dennis was a member of the Democratic Party. However, it appears he has now chosen to run in opposition to the party, rather than contribute to its strengthening in response to far-right extremism. In my view, individuals like Dennis ought to be guiding the upcoming generation of representatives. His decision not to do so means we're missing out on invaluable experience, connections, and knowledge that could have been passed down. Our Congress is grappling with a troubling trend of leaders who hold onto power instead of nurturing new talent. Dennis, known for challenging the status quo, could have been an exception to this trend, focusing on empowering younger leaders. As a result of his entry into the race, we now face two opponents in the general election. This development intensifies our campaign's need for support. clean_body: | | Peter, I wanted to inform you that former Ohio Congressman & presidential candidate Dennis Kucinich has joined the race for OH-07 House as an independent candidate. Previously, Dennis was a member of the Democratic Party. However, it appears he has now chosen to run in opposition to the party, rather than contribute to its strengthening in response to far-right extremism. In my view, individuals like Dennis ought to be guiding the upcoming generation of representatives. His decision not to do so means we're missing out on invaluable experience, connections, and knowledge that could have been passed down. Our Congress is grappling with a troubling trend of leaders who hold onto power instead of nurturing new talent. Dennis, known for challenging the status quo, could have been an exception to this trend, focusing on empowering younger leaders. As a result of his entry into the race, we now face two opponents in the general election. This development intensifies our campaign's need for support. Sincerely, Matthew Diemer Democratic Candidate for Congress OH-7 | Diemer for Congress P.O. Box 40042 Bay Village, Ohio 44140 | | | Sent via . body:

Peter, You may be wondering why Nikki Haley is trying to pull a Donald Trump and shy away from the CNN debate ahead of the New Hampshire primary. Well, the answer is simple, and Ron DeSantis wants you to know the truth: **_" Nikki Haley is afraid to debate because she doesn't want to answer the tough questions such as how she got rich off Boeing after giving them millions in taxpayer handouts as governor of South Carolina. The reality is that she is not running for the nomination, she's running to be Trump's VP. I won't snub New Hampshire voters like both Nikki Haley and Donald Trump, and plan to honor my commitments. I look forward to debating two empty podiums in the Granite State this week." -- Ron DeSantis_** No one deserving of your vote would hide away and refuse to own up to their record on national television. Ron DeSantis is the only candidate in this race willing to _earn_ your support. He will continue to stand firm in his record and his convictions despite every other candidate shying away. If you'd like to send in your support for the one candidate who is actually fighting for you--and will do so for EIGHT YEARS STRAIGHT in the White House-- we would appreciate your support before we take on the New Hampshire and South Carolina primaries.

Team DeSantis

_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1b5c545ed65a49ffb3be2e6fa14de12c&_e=JCgSUq5aKAaomYcQlv5mgSX77O_9VVtH8fcm9XLLhJ2l-iQOMo4kcsGyxUbQwdu5gXtix1z6IbEkj3rbEaGf40kpr6aslkFnj-nHL4mmjudQKlsy8DihkYr0ue1S5nvossmNkmz8R5pQQPEqUg12GT9VvW2FfBgnVXYPlHyaDofuEFklmYnBBrJ3YCxZ8H1aO5o7YZAm3EnZ2DCpfjPU4_FxHogyaDJGJYUL9mNVF3plv1LtJ6yXHae8gZ3RIT4zSu-myqpx72ysqiCx6CD4mqobqUSZz6uhgDlczHYqgwMgveGNy52U5P35GGE73qHhncdFlibseVraWB1J6s47Vjqu7kh2RMkrTYlDw5V9VQxzYl-7ikgoY1iythgyhA0UHi_Q5QjDvzkGjUfnTyjsJgAvFcAEVMZP2r0Sw0pKP8ck79caRQLTVQAG1Fa9OCxB)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1b5c545ed65a49ffb3be2e6fa14de12c&_e=JCgSUq5aKAaomYcQlv5mgSX77O_9VVtH8fcm9XLLhJ2l-iQOMo4kcsGyxUbQwdu5gXtix1z6IbEkj3rbEaGf40kpr6aslkFnj-nHL4mmjudQKlsy8DihkYr0ue1S5nvossmNkmz8R5pQQPEqUg12GT9VvW2FfBgnVXYPlHyaDofuEFklmYnBBrJ3YCxZ8H1aO5o7YZAm3EnZ2DCpfjPU4_FxHogyaDJGJYUL9mNVF3plv1LtJ6yXHae8gZ3RIT4zSu-myqpx72ysqiCx6CD4mtznk0mQiM1WI8JlcCUswfwOaBdLdxqeY0tWTpTCGMhOYwNaUpQmT5hfumt4Uzf8OtsbFuSM9_MdIQl3TBEp2EsXIv1J85fyGh8whBNUYLF8nnmw-UNsVMjEfkZ3S6DjlPLTf5-VNoAbPz1KrZ0oblRc9z2F-vjjdjDa_gs4ok8e)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---

body:
My family instilled in me the values of hard work, determination, and persistence at a young age.
|
---
| | I know my "why." Growing up as the granddaughter of Jewish immigrants and the daughter of a World War II veteran, my family instilled in me the values of hard work, determination, and persistence at a young age. **These values have informed my "why" – why I ran to serve in the Senate in the first place and why I'm running for reelection so I can continue fighting for working families like mine.** But to be honest, as I face my toughest race yet, I can't win without your help today. Polling has already shown me 2 points down, and **a shady MAGA billionaire has donated $2 MILLION to help my GOP opponent defeat me**. If I'm going to fight back, pull ahead, and keep Nevada blue, I need your urgent grassroots support. [**So please, will you rush $15 or more right now, split between my campaign and The Blue Wave Project, to help me defend this battleground seat, protect our Democratic majority, and keep fighting to make a real difference for you and your family?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77296249/449993840/562906663?refcode=2024-01-18-rosen&recurring=&amount=15&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=11436d2f-21b6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTQzNmQyZi0yMWI2LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yxn282Sgui02LJwAL6R03ckq7Cekf-YlKQAhTGwBGps=) [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77296252/449993842/562906663?refcode=2024-01-18-rosen&recurring=&amount=15&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=11436d2f-21b6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTQzNmQyZi0yMWI2LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yxn282Sgui02LJwAL6R03ckq7Cekf-YlKQAhTGwBGps=) Thank you so much. clean_body: My family instilled in me the values of hard work, determination, and persistence at a young age. | | | I know my "why." Growing up as the granddaughter of Jewish immigrants and the daughter of a World War II veteran, my family instilled in me the values of hard work, determination, and persistence at a young age. These values have informed my "why" – why I ran to serve in the Senate in the first place and why I'm running for reelection so I can continue fighting for working families like mine. But to be honest, as I face my toughest race yet, I can't win without your help today. Polling has already shown me 2 points down, and a shady MAGA billionaire has donated $2 MILLION to help my GOP opponent defeat me. If I'm going to fight back, pull ahead, and keep Nevada blue, I need your urgent grassroots support. = = Thank you so much. I am so grateful to have your support. Jacky | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly and it will be split between The Blue Wave Project and Jacky Rosen: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon. | This email was sent by Jeff Merkley for Oregon PO Box 14172 Portland, OR 97293 United States Email is an important way for Jeff Merkley to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign.
