name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Just 16%
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1039%2E135344%2EU6kJdA)

Friends --
When you decide to run statewide for the first time, introducing yourself to new voters who you have never met or represented is essential.
We use donations to fund campaign ads, digital ads, office space and staff in every corner of the state and in critical "Get Out the Vote" efforts to make sure our supporters cast their ballots.
No campaign -- no matter how big or small -- can win in a vacuum. And that takes resources.
According to the American National Election Studies survey conducted after the 2020 election, only 16% of Americans made a donation to an individual candidate running for office.
That's a small percentage of Americans who are contributing to big outcomes that impact everyone else.
Some give to support a candidate. Others give because they oppose a candidate. Some have particular issues they’re passionate about – like abortion rights, voting rights, and combating corporate money in politics. And others say they give to "make their voice heard in our political system."
Today, I am asking you do the thing only a small number of Americans do, but will have a huge impact on our race, and by extension control of the Senate and even the White House:
[**Can you please use this link to contribute $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to my campaign for United States Senate in Michigan? It may feel like a small and simple act, but it will go a long way toward making sure we win.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-jan24.--Kpen&refcode=em240118-1-15&t=2&akid=1039%2E135344%2EU6kJdA)**

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Missouri is putting abortion rights on the ballot in 2024

body:
Missouri was the first state to enact an extreme, no-exceptions abortion ban after Roe was overturned. Now, we’ve got a plan to fight back.
#
Peter — after the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, control-obsessed politicians made Missouri the first state in the nation to enact an extreme, no-exceptions abortion ban. **Now, we’ve got a plan to fight back.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42999?refcode=em20240118-4633&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4633%2E614464%2EJQE4tI)
**Missourians for Constitutional Freedom just launched the effort to place a constitutional amendment on the 2024 ballot to enshrine abortion rights in Missouri.[Will you help us restore reproductive freedom in our state by splitting a donation of $10, $25, or whatever you can afford between Missourians for Reproductive Freedom and my grassroots campaign today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42999?refcode=em20240118-4633&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4633%2E614464%2EJQE4tI)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Split $10 →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43000?refcode=em20240118-4633&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=4633%2E614464%2EJQE4tI) [Split $25 →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43000?refcode=em20240118-4633&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=4633%2E614464%2EJQE4tI) [Split $30 →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43000?refcode=em20240118-4633&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=4633%2E614464%2EJQE4tI) [Split $50 →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43000?refcode=em20240118-4633&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=4633%2E614464%2EJQE4tI) [Split $100 →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43000?refcode=em20240118-4633&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=4633%2E614464%2EJQE4tI) [Split $250 →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43000?refcode=em20240118-4633&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=4633%2E614464%2EJQE4tI) [Split another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42999?refcode=em20240118-4633&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=4633%2E614464%2EJQE4tI)
---
In Missouri, we’re all too familiar with Big Brother politicians trying to control us. That’s why real people in this state have banded together to take back power for themselves at the ballot — in recent elections, Missourians have raised the minimum wage, legalized weed, expanded Medicaid, and repealed an anti-union 'Right-to-Work' law, all by huge margins.
Now in Josh Hawley’s first election since leading the charge to overturn Roe — making Missouri the first state in the nation to enact an extreme no-exception abortion ban — he’s going to see what voters think about Big Brother politicians. **And if recent election wins for abortion rights and pro-choice candidates in red states like Kentucky and Ohio have proven anything, it’s that Josh Hawley should be afraid.**
In 2024, we have a chance to end Missouri’s extreme abortion ban and to hold Josh Hawley accountable for making it happen. But we need your help to get this done.
**[Will you help get Missourians for Constitutional Freedom’s campaign off the ground and help us defeat Josh Hawley by splitting a donation of $10, $25, or whatever you can afford between Missourians for Constitutional Freedom and my grassroots campaign today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42999?refcode=em20240118-4633&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=4633%2E614464%2EJQE4tI)**

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | | NAME: PETER 2024 MEMBERSHIP STATUS: PENDING SUGGESTED CONTRIBUTION: $10 | We’ve entered 2024 in full swing and, Peter, we’ve already seen threats to our democracy and attacks from MAGA extremists. This is just the beginning of what’s sure to be one of the most important election years of our lifetime, and we need to be prepared. With so many extreme Republicans in the race, we can’t afford to come up short. Here at The Collective PAC, we’re dedicated to electing Black progressives up and down the ballot and across the country, but we need your help. We need to show we have loyal supporters behind us during this critical time. With dangerous Republican extremists like Trump and Ron DeSantis fighting for the Republican presidential nomination, either outcome is a threat to our democracy. Right-wing extremists are already pouring millions into 2024, and if we want to be able to support our progressive Black candidates we need to raise as much money as we can right now. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Thank you for standing with us, Stefanie Brown James Co-Founder of The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: Del. Sam Rasoul
subject: 2024 Legislation Tracker, School Principals Appreciation Week, and more!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized By Friends of Sam Rasoul for Delegate
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Email%20Logo.png] [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Sam%20Headshot.png]
ACROSS THE COMMONWEALTH
VOTE TODAY! [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Make%20A%20Plan%20To%20Vote.png]
You can vote for November's elections NOW! Vote at your Registrar's office during business hours. Saturday early voting is available October 28th and November 4th. Learn More [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
Find your local Registrar's office here: https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/VWCC.jpeg] 15 years of the Community College Access Program at VWCC
Learn More [https://www.wdbj7.com/2023/09/26/virginia-western-celebrates-15th-anniversary-ccap-program/] CCAP is a successful public/private partnership that pays the cost of tuition for three years at Virginia Western Community College if a qualified student does not have sufficient financial aid to pay tuition costs.
This program has helped over 4,200 students achieve higher education!
CANDIDATE SPOTLIGHT
https://karenforvirginia.com/ [https://karenforvirginia.com/] Karen Jenkins for HB-89
Donate Here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/karenforvirginia] Karen Jenkins is a life-long resident of the City of Suffolk. Throughout her lifetime she has passionately advocated for others and currently serves on the Suffolk School Board with a proven track record and history of accomplishments. She is running for the House of Delegates for the 89th District to continue delivering results for the people of Virginia.
She is a champion for education, public safety and mental health. As your next Delegate for the 89th District, she will continue to fight and vote for meaningful policies and legislation to support the needs of the district. At the state level, she will be positioned to write and sponsor bills and laws to benefit the schools and communities in the 89th District and throughout the commonwealth.
LOCAL CANDIDATE EVENTS
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/lily%20canvass.png]
Canvass for Lily Franklin!
On Sundays, join Team Lily at the South County Library Parking Lot from 12 - 12:30 pm for a Roanoke canvassing event!
Bring your walking shoes, a charged cell phone, and water. When you arrive to their launch location you will receive a brief training and literature before being sent out to turf. Questions? Email Beth at egunter3@gmail.com [egunter3@gmail.com] or call 540-353-3645.
South County Library Parking Lot, 6303 Merriman Rd, Roanoke, VA 24018
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/sam%20and%20trish.jpg]
Canvass for Sam and Trish!
*this is a place holder until the new facebook event is created*
Join us Sunday to canvass for Sam and Trish! Meet our Field Coordinator, Dom, on September 3rd at the Williamson Road Library, 12:00pm.
Located at 3837 Williamson Rd, Roanoke, VA 24012.
IN THE COMMUNITY
https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story [https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story] https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424 [https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424]
Roanoke River Contamination Settlement Reached Roanoke Young Democrats Canvass Tailgate
Without current regulations, the water contamination caused by these companies could have been so much worse. Come out to support Roanoke Valley Democratic candidates!
Read More [https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story] The Roanoke Young Democrats will be enjoying pizza, coffee, donuts and more before canvassing to knock for Trish White-Boyd, Sam Rasoul, Lily Franklin, Samantha Newell, Jade Harris, & Nancy Horn. Door knocking will begin about 12:30 pm!
Read More [https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424]
Roanoke EnVision Center Kids Movie Night - Sept. 28 Fall Harvest Festival
The movie is free and there will be snacks and much more! Fall into wellness at the Harvest Festival!
Read More Celebrate the end of farm season with fun experiences for the whole family. Try new activities to support your well-being. Connect with others in a beautiful outdoor space. Free meals available with registration. This event is free and open to everyone!
Read More [https://web.cvent.com/event/19422342-be4f-417d-9fc3-6a6bf883e794/summary]
https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992 [https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992] https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/ [https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/]
Carilion Clinic vs. Lewis Gale Charity Softball Game - Oct. 1 Henrietta Lacks Statue Unveiling - Oct. 4
Join us for the 6th Annual Carilion Clinic vs. Lewis Gale Charity Softball Game, being held at the Home of the Salem Red Sox - Carilion Clinic Field. A dignified sculpture will commemorate the ongoing and long unrecognized contributions of Roanoke native Henrietta Lacks, who unknowingly provided the world with the HeLa cell, fueling decades of life-saving and life changing research.
Physicians, nurses and administrators will suit up for each hospital during the nine-inning contest. Proceeds will benefit the American Heart Association. Unveiling is October 4th at 11 am at Henrietta Lacks Plaza.
Admission is $5 at the gate, kids under 10 free. Gates open at 1pm and the game starts at 2pm. 410 3rd St SW, Roanoke, VA 24011
Read More [https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992] Read More [https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/RCDC.jpeg] Join the Roanoke City Democrats!
Roanoke City Democratic Committee meetings are now in-person and open to non-members. We meet the 3rd Thursday of each month. This month we are meeting at 6 pm at the Main Library (706 S Jefferson St, Roanoke, VA 24016). Sign up for meeting reminders and other information here [https://www.roanokedemocrats.com/subscribe] .
Join us for a social hour every first Thursday of the month at Leonore Restaurant, 128 Campbell St. SW, 5-7 pm.
Join Roanoke Young Dems! [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/RYD.png]
Meetings occur on the first Monday and third Sunday of every month in person and virtually. The goal of RYD is to help improve our community and to promote the names of Democratic candidates and policies.
Contact: YoungDemocratsRoanoke@gmail.com [YoungDemocratsRoanoke@gmail.com] to get involved!
Donate Today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/samrasoul]
Thank you for your support! If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to reach out to me anytime.
My very best,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Screen%20Shot%202022-07-29%20at%203.44.06%20PM%20%281%29.png]
Del. Sam Rasoul
https://www.facebook.com/SamRasoulVA [https://www.facebook.com/SamRasoulVA] https://twitter.com/Sam_Rasoul [https://twitter.com/Sam_Rasoul] https://www.instagram.com/sam_rasoul/?hl=en [https://www.instagram.com/sam_rasoul/?hl=en]
Paid for and Authorized By Friends of Sam Rasoul for Delegate
Friends of Sam Rasoul for Delegate
P.O. Box 13842
Roanoke, VA 24037
United States

The GOP wasted our time again and again in 2023. From baseless impeachment inquiries to potential government shutdowns, House Republicans put their petty politics above the people last year.

Let’s make sure that they can’t keep doing this by putting the House back under the control of reasonable leadership. With your support, we can make sure that we get back to governing.

**[We’re going to need to hit every fundraising goal from now until Election Day. Can I count on you to help us reach our goal before the end of this week?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77297833/449997717/1045260035?source=EM_NBI_ZL_20240118_FR_MMFR_0_3MO_TeamZoe_NA_NA_MMFR2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmFjNGVmZi0yMmI2LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VDSVd7ybsmZ_t5lGbl0OXzgFwrbAECPqSv0-IAPfprk=)**

name: Katie Porter
subject: We’re being outspent nearly 5:1
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Unlike every other Democrat in this race, I have always rejected contributions from corporate PACs.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=36649%2E3422442%2ELsCXi1)
Derek, I won’t BS you, this isn’t good.
One of our opponents—who reports having $35 million in the bank—**has already reserved five times the TV ads we have.** **[Can you chip in right now so we can ramp up our own ads?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240118-1?refcode=em20240118-36649&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36649_3422442_LsCXi1&akid=36649%2E3422442%2ELsCXi1)**
I really count on supporters like you, because unlike every other Democrat in this race, I have always rejected contributions from corporate PACs. I don’t want their money. I’m committed to standing up to big corporations and fighting corruption.
But to get that message out there, we need millions of Californians to see our new TV ad and hear about our plan to shake up the Senate.
Derek, thank you for being a vital part of this campaign. It’s because of your support (and thousands of other grassroots supporters) that we’ve even been able to run this campaign.
**[Now, I’m asking if you will make your first contribution to support this campaign and help us reach the voters who will decide the upcoming primary election in just a few weeks.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240118-1?refcode=em20240118-36649&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36649_3422442_LsCXi1&akid=36649%2E3422442%2ELsCXi1)**
I want nothing more than to continue standing up to corruption and special interests in Washington. But, the reality is if I lose the upcoming primary election, my time in Congress would come to an end.
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240118-1?refcode=em20240118-36649&refcode2=36649_3422442_LsCXi1&akid=36649%2E3422442%2ELsCXi1)
Thank you for considering,
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=em20240118-36649&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=36649_3422442_LsCXi1&akid=36649%2E3422442%2ELsCXi1)**
---

name: JD Vance
subject: No stranger
disclaimer_text: Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc
body:
why I fight

| [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=cca3f8adff104302928edacfa4454704&_e=4f7jHrp87LOqe4myI4O8Xn_hBopioj0mUA-26S61hGgbzz5OgqCCWiSSmrQrdfyv6Gipol7vtPSuP3iQMk_30bSciAiqwGdnrFSXCw5HNp_NHf0NwYC7EE1uBIEz_GoT2cCwEreawQoOE_TyQrqDBIvMCjEdIMYllXIgRov-bb_P5O_2tepulg-v1htb8bX_peexyBDRSDHuM29oQqODJQCremKIOVm3bhAceqD8DzSe9DVdgEZxv2BhPdz8e7lTEXjwNeJcWNvYDArFZIpTKYw2yAkQdOLvFrCxnw4JCC7DGlYFe5Ngt7hZZMug4mSz)
---
_I 'm no stranger to a bit of hard work, Peter._

Growing up, I had to work my tail off to have a decent shot at any sort of career. I juggled my home life with my studies. Oftentimes, trouble at home got in the way of my dreams. After joining the Marines, I quickly learned that every man has to do his part.

I've kept that mentality moving through my various battles in Washington. I realized quickly that if I didn't stand up for my constituents and my values, and fight for what is right, I can't expect anyone else to do it for me. That's why I've been working so hard. Fighting for small-town American ideals, protecting Ohioans every single day, is a fulltime job. If I don't then no one will.

**[Can I count on your support to help me fight for common sense Conservative values in Washington?](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=cca3f8adff104302928edacfa4454704&_e=4f7jHrp87LOqe4myI4O8Xn_hBopioj0mUA-26S61hGgbzz5OgqCCWiSSmrQrdfyv6Gipol7vtPSuP3iQMk_30bSciAiqwGdnrFSXCw5HNp_NHf0NwYC7EE1uBIEz_GoT9rSEOk_vTWmZ3iwCfUjxwIdacRiDI0B03m1jB16i0y2OsVQK33zGC_9sb3df39LD4lu3ZvZS5mv8nhonOwufxo3yezXTgWLBnoHpUhlSI6BHx37iMa1Gf-QmbKyX5kvgBQwXCFY8nkeWObcKmuslm_oV5RvcHQNR6Za6lXx8BUZ1JLOCYEpSyV3zcXlXGzEP)**

| [**CHIP IN FOR COMMON SENSE**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=cca3f8adff104302928edacfa4454704&_e=4f7jHrp87LOqe4myI4O8Xn_hBopioj0mUA-26S61hGgbzz5OgqCCWiSSmrQrdfyv6Gipol7vtPSuP3iQMk_30bSciAiqwGdnrFSXCw5HNp_NHf0NwYC7EE1uBIEz_GoT2cCwEreawQoOE_TyQrqDBFwyPd3EciH85yki2fwdp9WOGqCk5-NpPWkrTLO6ngYG39CyAN1o2DUPCpnVZ-HzMrOVYeJVo_wT9FhrmVcCSw0rFyftB4XvHaJHxjKAXfcBDX7MaGDLzVzXn91J0XTHFt0OwgOVMvgqzKPU8Tg0s5CFUo-vNomw-UPpv-nmcrRh)
---

**[I really need to make every single fundraising goal if we want a shot at defending GOP values in this upcoming election.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=cca3f8adff104302928edacfa4454704&_e=4f7jHrp87LOqe4myI4O8Xn_hBopioj0mUA-26S61hGgbzz5OgqCCWiSSmrQrdfyv6Gipol7vtPSuP3iQMk_30bSciAiqwGdnrFSXCw5HNp_NHf0NwYC7EE1uBIEz_GoT9rSEOk_vTWmZ3iwCfUjxwFp6T7Md88k9LnbfDHSzVs7omma_DBm0COFKb08m3o6PKsNv_kHHHiq4vcsxx0Ep6jJssAh-k6aL0TzC5u1r8yacmCNEc3VpI82w_Bcba8qb2g_Zf0Mw8I-T4fuhNtn9Ws_x9YvJGr_GtCMemnfBb962gaCH9PoiTfVFx1795usi)** It used to be every man against the Establishment and Democrats, but not when you're in my corner.

[**JOIN JD VANCE**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=cca3f8adff104302928edacfa4454704&_e=4f7jHrp87LOqe4myI4O8Xn_hBopioj0mUA-26S61hGgbzz5OgqCCWiSSmrQrdfyv6Gipol7vtPSuP3iQMk_30bSciAiqwGdnrFSXCw5HNp_NHf0NwYC7EE1uBIEz_GoT2cCwEreawQoOE_TyQrqDBFwyPd3EciH85yki2fwdp9XuYIXX2JtLyGzBc7FfZddZle6xlBGBB8nMwGEP54CS0vErSNFVL_JjVYDtAATM47frTB2UY6zhEVXlKAdOqv90RuO6ZnVhM0ZSEL53cq50h9KhPNZZ-sLgFLDRy9ojuKU88sWbujRT95wD9o_wojtQ)
---

_Thanks so much for standing by me._

JD Vance

**Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author.**
Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our
economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans.
Ohio needs JD Vance. If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=cca3f8adff104302928edacfa4454704&_e=4f7jHrp87LOqe4myI4O8Xn_hBopioj0mUA-26S61hGgbzz5OgqCCWiSSmrQrdfyv6Gipol7vtPSuP3iQMk_30bSciAiqwGdnrFSXCw5HNp_NHf0NwYC7EE1uBIEz_GoT2cCwEreawQoOE_TyQrqDBBjUwqGN4Ax_xbDh2GFUC3Z_7XxDmOvuBiUsE8Q-ZocGgnaspAdUAxd4U8yRL1NLx0axZEwzqzcywV3eeoy-2J4Y3zXuxahAwV1SjJg1Mxgu4x4AVLCTRGh3CtNVwzPzPiYTgWy30jNrXcPjrWqua_nzrEThxazR0xP9nRtu7LzE) | [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=cca3f8adff104302928edacfa4454704&_e=4f7jHrp87LOqe4myI4O8Xn_hBopioj0mUA-26S61hGgbzz5OgqCCWiSSmrQrdfyv6Gipol7vtPSuP3iQMk_30bSciAiqwGdnrFSXCw5HNp_NHf0NwYC7EE1uBIEz_GoT2cCwEreawQoOE_TyQrqDBKZzecv_9S-89Ax4wl9X1yz3iicXkW7jgSH8qKut9BfAvBjcsXkJVnFWdlnY5BGXUp79zCJNy99G9UdPBGYFwcIzHc9l6zxquwgCoUS9F3e5Zz0HDhgqEWiwWnslokxoHzCcg6nM8EybBfR2dnfYCdSCUWMtE9BlpQd4DDFJHDT3) | [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=cca3f8adff104302928edacfa4454704&_e=4f7jHrp87LOqe4myI4O8Xn_hBopioj0mUA-26S61hGgbzz5OgqCCWiSSmrQrdfyv6Gipol7vtPSuP3iQMk_30bSciAiqwGdnrFSXCw5HNp_NHf0NwYC7EE1uBIEz_GoT2cCwEreawQoOE_TyQrqDBIvMCjEdIMYllXIgRov-bb8cOV6k5kgp9bpIquBuISicZlIPOlUeD9JSJ7pfAN94c3Lb4tcKormNSd0PkY0PWKW1QK1hTJZD9nxVgP8kv9nXnEDY_6HYzvNDy7jUn_5DrweFRhmx_V8MtM-giFxYbKJ6iDLivHVkxQ4kr9a09lka)

clean_body: why I fight | I 'm no stranger to a bit of hard work, Peter. Growing up, I had to work my tail off to have a decent shot at any sort of career. I juggled my home life with my studies. Oftentimes, trouble at home got in the way of my dreams. After joining the Marines, I quickly learned that every man has to do his part. I've kept that mentality moving through my various battles in Washington. I realized quickly that if I didn't stand up for my constituents and my values, and fight for what is right, I can't expect anyone else to do it for me. That's why I've been working so hard. Fighting for small-town American ideals, protecting Ohioans every single day, is a fulltime job. If I don't then no one will. | It used to be every man against the Establishment and Democrats, but not when you're in my corner. Thanks so much for standing by me. JD Vance Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. | | ---|---|--- Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc. [](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=aa851ecda977498393eb49fc6e67ba0e&_e=Kt3dDx0-C8Y9b-aKPTbg1oR8BhJPIFn8J0VWS_4AQXgIAirv-a2s4U-0qEUGF8tq2s-EcpF2apPUDFMi3F_wZOKHJvWuSFlNE4NdscnLildbujw_FJgmJ_RZ167hBzcRK3WnXXCbdFMvp5vMwhweKhOjiKMsnPJr5ERyQNfukDHSxrzbxPggdeK3LswbCVKcXXbojcsz1xPzO8M-sk7SZqgR9kaW2hHJlKNHF7lQpp9YLKOWiIuSKnWLK3G7-W4pe_HPsXkQDdvMbhSdzWfTzVq8LoTSXqXW0_TmPhh7x9MuEUXHyqQ7In-pnNeehuuYO6PmdTre2q_qB6nkYEVBikVFbZ8JKz_qZNNLBJeOnIUGog88h53J6DygkZax6XrYBSNdhPAVVBEJaUxy7yzxZw%3D%3D)

| | Hi, Friend. It’s Mike Johnson—Speaker of the House. I am reaching out because there is a lot at stake right now concerning NJ-07 and we have no time to waste. On day one as Speaker, I asked my team to put together a list of the _MOST CRITICAL_ districts to keeping— _and expanding_ —our Republican House majority, and I want you to know: **_ Rep. Tom Kean, Jr.’s district in NJ-07 ranks in the TOP 5 MOST TARGETED. _** This means that Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left are going to be pouring MILLIONS of dollars and unlimited resources into this race.
---
| | [**KEEP OUR HOUSE MAJORITY**](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=aa851ecda977498393eb49fc6e67ba0e&_e=Kt3dDx0-C8Y9b-aKPTbg1oR8BhJPIFn8J0VWS_4AQXgIAirv-a2s4U-0qEUGF8tq2s-EcpF2apPUDFMi3F_wZOKHJvWuSFlNE4NdscnLildbujw_FJgmJ_RZ167hBzcRK3WnXXCbdFMvp5vMwhweKhOjiKMsnPJr5ERyQNfukDHSxrzbxPggdeK3LswbCVKcXXbojcsz1xPzO8M-sk7SZqgR9kaW2hHJlKNHF7lQpp9YLKOWiIuSKnWLK3G7-W4pD77AiOj2fyO1OTzoPzbcqPS7wk9uBAt0vQv7YXA_e3hcPK9yP9vOrX5Ma4Qu4_ffDxYTkbY0d9F6eGMtatzQBJDDnHoXRGHfyaZxK91Umbwdq4eCyuZG07qObaBngmlgqd-Qwo9jPz9SlLs7ff-2XA%3D%3D)
---
| | Over the past seven years, my family and I have given everything to serve the extraordinary people of the great state of Louisiana—it has been the greatest honor and privilege of my life. Though my role has since expanded, my mission as Speaker remains the same: _God, family, and country._ **_I believe we need to unite as a nation._**_ __The hour is late, and the crisis is great – but I am bullish about the future of America._ **_I believe in America_** _—_ _The freest, most successful nation in the history of the world – but our days as the beacon of freedom for the world are numbered if we let the Radical Democrats force their anti-American agenda on the rest of us._ **_And I believe in the law. _** _I’m a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life to fighting for our fundamental freedoms._ **_[Friend—I need you to understand that this Pro-America, Pro-Freedom, Pro-Law& Order mission can not and will not be built upon if Congressman Tom Kean, Jr. does not secure NJ-07 in 2024. If the Radical-Left takes over, you can bet it will be the polar opposite of the priorities I’ve just laid out.](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=aa851ecda977498393eb49fc6e67ba0e&_e=Kt3dDx0-C8Y9b-aKPTbg1oR8BhJPIFn8J0VWS_4AQXgIAirv-a2s4U-0qEUGF8tq2s-EcpF2apPUDFMi3F_wZOKHJvWuSFlNE4NdscnLildbujw_FJgmJ_RZ167hBzcRK3WnXXCbdFMvp5vMwhweKhOjiKMsnPJr5ERyQNfukDHSxrzbxPggdeK3LswbCVKcXXbojcsz1xPzO8M-sk7SZqgR9kaW2hHJlKNHF7lQpp9YLKOWiIuSKnWLK3G7-W4pbqzBhDgWdSZtDt-f7YwN7MJZFQA9QrXwNA9QHX-_5Id9JNlhyjAle-_e84S_svlCDjKTgECJFdwb_nA5NAyRmsf7hu_I-jGp8bIpaCyQkbaOzMSEupSVz34TMeh3rxZCYX44eqGBMB81c_AJHV0CAg%3D%3D)_**
---
| | [**DEFEND THE HOUSE MAJORITY**](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=aa851ecda977498393eb49fc6e67ba0e&_e=Kt3dDx0-C8Y9b-aKPTbg1oR8BhJPIFn8J0VWS_4AQXgIAirv-a2s4U-0qEUGF8tq2s-EcpF2apPUDFMi3F_wZOKHJvWuSFlNE4NdscnLildbujw_FJgmJ_RZ167hBzcRK3WnXXCbdFMvp5vMwhweKhOjiKMsnPJr5ERyQNfukDHSxrzbxPggdeK3LswbCVKcXXbojcsz1xPzO8M-sk7SZqgR9kaW2hHJlKNHF7lQpp9YLKOWiIuSKnWLK3G7-W4plNQoqdXsIi9EGBw_SdELks-cxyiiLkQWOay982a5kSZ3A_msceYoEUNet7CJ4ZZyMYYy_BvqzqKkWR98vddemVTkBbXS96OJmEiiYKjLkA1XtXkEEulJCvsSHYgmocsuDaZxffTHD0EzHjbzZEpG-Q%3D%3D)
---
| | The last thing I want to say here before I sign off is what a special leader you have in Tom Kean, Jr. Tom is a man of great integrity, is willing to work across the aisle to get things done for his constituents, and he fights relentlessly for the awesome folks of NJ-07. Thank you for your time, friend. I’m honored to serve as Speaker of your House and **[**I hope I can count on you to expand our conservative Majority in 2024. Are you with me? Please rush in a contribution of any amount with just 3 clicks now. >>>**](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=aa851ecda977498393eb49fc6e67ba0e&_e=Kt3dDx0-C8Y9b-aKPTbg1oR8BhJPIFn8J0VWS_4AQXgIAirv-a2s4U-0qEUGF8tq2s-EcpF2apPUDFMi3F_wZOKHJvWuSFlNE4NdscnLildbujw_FJgmJ_RZ167hBzcRK3WnXXCbdFMvp5vMwhweKhOjiKMsnPJr5ERyQNfukDHSxrzbxPggdeK3LswbCVKcXXbojcsz1xPzO8M-sk7SZqgR9kaW2hHJlKNHF7lQpp9YLKOWiIuSKnWLK3G7-W4paMRbdyhqhDWLSicbysrtTQEEYchTOUJ8AdSuvFH3U_kJtG2n7r22p3RUOf2m6ZRcu38wzYOHEJ5ppLkZTVXG641NwqeEcxJIJepzHX3neviuQ-jRQjiGQTxp6dUlIyVZ8KG9MYFBCBVjDwGjViFUaw%3D%3D)** God bless,

clean_body: Let’s work together on this. | | | | | Hi, Friend. It’s Mike Johnson—Speaker of the House. I am reaching out because there is a lot at stake right now concerning NJ-07 and we have no time to waste. On day one as Speaker, I asked my team to put together a list of the MOST CRITICAL districts to keeping— and expanding —our Republican House majority, and I want you to know: Rep. Tom Kean, Jr.’s district in NJ-07 ranks in the TOP 5 MOST TARGETED. This means that Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left are going to be pouring MILLIONS of dollars and unlimited resources into this race. | | | | Over the past seven years, my family and I have given everything to serve the extraordinary people of the great state of Louisiana—it has been the greatest honor and privilege of my life. Though my role has since expanded, my mission as Speaker remains the same: God, family, and country. I believe we need to unite as a nation. The hour is late, and the crisis is great – but I am bullish about the future of America. I believe in America — The freest, most successful nation in the history of the world – but our days as the beacon of freedom for the world are numbered if we let the Radical Democrats force their anti-American agenda on the rest of us. And I believe in the law. I’m a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life to fighting for our fundamental freedoms. | | | | The last thing I want to say here before I sign off is what a special leader you have in Tom Kean, Jr. Tom is a man of great integrity, is willing to work across the aisle to get things done for his constituents, and he fights relentlessly for the awesome folks of NJ-07. Thank you for your time, friend. I’m honored to serve as Speaker of your House and God bless, | | | | Rep. name: Restore Our Nation
subject: Big Pharma and the federal government
body:
In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Ci0u0oygmVfp_2Am2B15nQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRni_EqP0SaaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2JpZy1waGFybWEtY2NhLz9zYz0wMDk0MU4wMjQyTDA2RE9ERUVTJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249YmlncGhhcm1hJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDI0MDExOFcDc3BjQgplocBeqWX6KUVmUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
| | Dear Friend,

In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

The pharmaceutical industry is one of the most notable and most troubling.

Last year alone, "Big Pharma" spent over $373 million on lobbying--much more than any other industry.

While the Constitution certainly protects the rights to free speech and to petition the government, it was never intended to grant the special privileges that are characteristic of today's bureaucratic, administrative state.

In addition, Big Pharma's reputation has come under attack in the wake of America's opioid epidemic--since 1999, more than 600,000 people have died from opioid overdoses in the U.S. and Canada alone--and the COVID pandemic.

Given these current controversies, we decided to host a conference to consider the rise of Big Pharma, its role in the declining state of American health, and ideas for reform.

**The result is a free online video series that reveals the truth about Big Pharma.**

When you watch this free video series, you'll learn about the collaboration between the federal government and pharmaceutical companies, the content of the "Pfizer documents," and the origins of Big Pharma and the opioid epidemic.

You'll also gain valuable insights into Anthony Fauci and the public health establishment from Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/big-pharma-cca/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Ci0u0oygmVfp_2Am2B15nQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRni_EqP0SaaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2JpZy1waGFybWEtY2NhLz9zYz0wMDk0MU4wMjQyTDA2RE9ERUVTJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249YmlncGhhcm1hJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDI0MDExOFcDc3BjQgplocBeqWX6KUVmUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

We filmed the series at a recent Center for Constructive Alternatives conference on the Hillsdale campus. You will not have to watch for long to discover why it was one of our most popular and well-attended events.

**Please use the secure link above to receive your Big Pharma video series. When you complete the form, we will email you the series so you can watch it immediately.**

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844**
**

---
| |
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cc7c8e63d77043c1b32986e9b5e40118&_e=OGNUI0MGpL8qKoKXkPrr4p4ZtMWyDHP0BKmpuarYxsXi_jm4C3bXIBoZiMdH5N-VrSF4Ezk6P8aTNLnQtaQWaRi2Wp3AS4JdKXZTBmfZD-gDnQqXY7YNAOkYx83onwq-f11MiDKdsfGummUNWlqe29ToWF080i9Vpb9Wqvmu4Fy85cVsgClSsp1jcl68Jzrgw792h5uWF0zOPfzK07hdiLNbFQO4wfhjc0OkpYVGa0T-42im-RYI4veugZQuEUmiwy0F9kw9NehMR3k3MW2LmYcfQM8kpWMR8IyjHFShhbHwzpeJKE9MTUzhBKlNj8ee1BUDga2cmkeOEVjTie_Vc1RUs0tzTGDwlv_npAIMDrntnWuj-h-gGTQFngdU5xd86TqccEIQJKZSkOpsTMje-A%3D%3D) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cc7c8e63d77043c1b32986e9b5e40118&_e=OGNUI0MGpL8qKoKXkPrr4p4ZtMWyDHP0BKmpuarYxsXi_jm4C3bXIBoZiMdH5N-VrSF4Ezk6P8aTNLnQtaQWaRi2Wp3AS4JdKXZTBmfZD-gDnQqXY7YNAOkYx83onwq-f11MiDKdsfGummUNWlqe29ToWF080i9Vpb9Wqvmu4Fy85cVsgClSsp1jcl68Jzrgw792h5uWF0zOPfzK07hdiLNbFQO4wfhjc0OkpYVGa0Tth9DfZXJODOSoTHqD_8GfdgXV8cDKXi55RtXdPYAzg5VMCFeeZJyKd7Z6ykOmEpG0qEH53iD_PGwp1e7KVRukZyh890G9EUcOZTe3fauZasXVYeIbOCAeAA_T6cOVrbnr-NZnDFOzrwnMs3xTmXUvOg9Tyj3mWMMrDEQ_UapFKQ%3D%3D)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cc7c8e63d77043c1b32986e9b5e40118&_e=OGNUI0MGpL8qKoKXkPrr4p4ZtMWyDHP0BKmpuarYxsXi_jm4C3bXIBoZiMdH5N-VrSF4Ezk6P8aTNLnQtaQWaRi2Wp3AS4JdKXZTBmfZD-gDnQqXY7YNAOkYx83onwq-f11MiDKdsfGummUNWlqe29ToWF080i9Vpb9Wqvmu4Fy85cVsgClSsp1jcl68Jzrgw792h5uWF0zOPfzK07hdiLNbFQO4wfhjc0OkpYVGa0TbVmHkgV6DjGEJpTZcMYE--rbHnc0-3kiXpOAfQX-nMZDi8heE7uZaI3t9ARWK443dOSEc-hUaD9jWIBkjJ18_QwvTnfDFFUa5B78RlVeczGA9Fz1NkWsK2acQGtJVgArfnwVYXtShsFD7ta7KHdsS1BhWrV5PH4Gu8LE2LTYV6Q%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

---

Reclaiming American Freedom
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Wes Moore
subject: One year ago
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77301965/450007559/-926250309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Yjc4ZGMyZi0yN2I2LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rTq9xvNwrxsSzJIaSaVECe8nJU_76E7BqdaoYqL7NoA=&emci=7c81f870-1fb6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=4b78dc2f-27b6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=24635485)
Friend, can you believe it’s been a year since Aruna and I were sworn in to serve the people of Maryland? It was a moment in time that will stay with me forever. It was a moment that symbolized the historic milestones we will accomplish together. Reflecting on the time that has passed since then, I am proud of the work we’ve been able to do in the last year. From protecting abortion rights to passing historic gun safety legislation to increasing opportunity, my first year in office has been eventful. As I embark on the second year, one thing is on my mind: making Maryland the best place to call home for all of us. We all share this place and it’s a place I know each one of us cares about deeply. This is a place with endless potential if we all collectively work towards that future. Aruna and I are honored to serve. We’re working hard to deliver on the promises we made and create a state that leaves no one behind. **This will be Maryland’s decade.** Thank you for your trust. Elevate, Wes
---

It was a moment that symbolized the historic milestones we will accomplish together. Reflecting on the time that has passed since then, I am proud of the work we’ve been able to do in the last year. From protecting abortion rights to passing historic gun safety legislation to increasing opportunity, my first year in office has been eventful. As I embark on the second year, one thing is on my mind: making Maryland the best place to call home for all of us. We all share this place and it’s a place I know each one of us cares about deeply. This is a place with endless potential if we all collectively work towards that future. Aruna and I are honored to serve. We’re working hard to deliver on the promises we made and create a state that leaves no one behind. This will be Maryland’s decade. Thank you for your trust. Elevate, Wes

| Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care.

For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors.

Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights.

clean_body: Can you meet our average? | Peter — let me tell you about one number: $25.65 That’s the average amount that folks like you have given to emails like this one in the past 30 days. It humbles me to know that our grassroots supporters are giving $5 and $50 there to support this movement. I don’t ask you to donate your hard-earned money lightly. I know that building an enthusiastic base from the grassroots up is the ONLY way we can defeat Marsha Blackburn and her corporate PAC donors. That’s what we’re working to do every day. Peter, according to our records, you haven’t contributed to our campaign yet — and I’m personally asking you to make your first donation now. You see, the earlier you donate, the greater an impact your gift will have. = | = = I deeply appreciate all your support, Gloria = Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address and sometimes takes up to a week to sync in our systems. If you have donated — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign. | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. Send donations via check to: Gloria for Tennessee 73 White Bridge Rd #103-353 Nashville, TN 37205

body:
Trump is sending Congressman Wesley Hunt to STX and STT

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/a5be74a62947/re-hey-9342329?e=d30db4cde8)
Hey--

Gordon here with a quick update. Former President Donald Trump is personally sending Congressman Wesley Hunt to the Virgin Islands on January 26. Hunt, a retired Army captain and West Point graduate, sits on the House committee that oversees the Virgin Islands and the other territories.

Finance Chairman April Newland will be putting together the events for him on both St. Croix and St. Thomas. So, please save the date.

Stay tuned for more.

Gordon Ackley

--

body:

Hi Peter,
We don’t want to take up too much of your time, but this is important.
David McCormick put in **$1 million****of his own money towards his campaign,** giving him a fundraising advantage that **we cannot ignore.** Pennsylvania is critical to keeping the Senate blue this year, and we need to fight back.

Hello,
We wanted to make sure you saw: **We officially drove Lauren Boebert out of Colorado’s 3rd congressional district!**
__**FIRST:**__ Adam Frisch ran against Lauren Boebert in 2022 – losing by just 546 votes in what was the closest race in the entire country.
__**THEN:**__ With help from grassroots donors like you, Adam Frisch out-raised Boebert month after month after month – and the polls showed us leading!
__**AND NOW:**__ Rather than face defeat to Adam, Lauren Boebert has run off scared and is no longer running in Colorado’s 3rd congressional district!
**We completed stage one of replacing Boebert in Congress – but we now enter an even harder stage of this campaign...**
After he drove off one of their favorites, the Super PACs are now going to come after Adam with millions of dollars in attacks to try to elect another far-right extremist to this seat.

name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e50d61f0406a49648513d657092276e5&_e=rDsAG1b1zhBpRED_8mp9HNKejDmNL15Jn0jmw_a2ikVTZql9cuzKHweGxrtNL-5zJ5hpaDJJ0ygGTOylx-ZN9CRDpNPBLFxj3MliarznNw2f0fuWIyVmJg77tTGVEaRLrIcWc10BHkSaWBF4CdRvuyHSr1zhqeZ5rFjG5F__ctsisNvd1D5xjBkpaSghfXimGdKo61YvvFLfL9hnMnVPtwbHyuPf5WuLMf_vZHtmAUf-ciyqvSkUVSoQjqbb0LMYkzvWjGx9ia968CkJoJcZWWLAeLW6x4mCc3TxOilTUlMsrMr1xNuxBe4-KW1DG2jwivJau9LHcjdBXIAHn7bSq1z8gQ0gDp3PcVs64gUzaSwA6385R1axRltxBPnea_1APuTwgJwHTruFcOQ9NKLPvw%3D%3D) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e50d61f0406a49648513d657092276e5&_e=rDsAG1b1zhBpRED_8mp9HNKejDmNL15Jn0jmw_a2ikVTZql9cuzKHweGxrtNL-5zJ5hpaDJJ0ygGTOylx-ZN9CRDpNPBLFxj3MliarznNw2f0fuWIyVmJg77tTGVEaRLrIcWc10BHkSaWBF4CdRvuyHSr1zhqeZ5rFjG5F__ctsisNvd1D5xjBkpaSghfXimGdKo61YvvFLfL9hnMnVPtwbHyuPf5WuLMf_vZHtmAUcpj31wo_RzUepThW0AM5VGrqaRyABl9W-OGg4tyDoMwtnJM5583W3HU-Dd3Mwi2-N-ouVjzl5G54pHBj465zKwCQ92dE-_XX0wyvLfogk9arOVdUkgeJd3TDnQdEvRbEfkNPvTH7f9cj_lTe5Vy3UXne8ehseurF69NPdLP_KM-A%3D%3D)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e50d61f0406a49648513d657092276e5&_e=rDsAG1b1zhBpRED_8mp9HNKejDmNL15Jn0jmw_a2ikVTZql9cuzKHweGxrtNL-5zJ5hpaDJJ0ygGTOylx-ZN9CRDpNPBLFxj3MliarznNw2f0fuWIyVmJg77tTGVEaRLrIcWc10BHkSaWBF4CdRvuyHSr1zhqeZ5rFjG5F__ctsisNvd1D5xjBkpaSghfXimGdKo61YvvFLfL9hnMnVPtwbHyuPf5WuLMf_vZHtmAUd931v8pMWkh5ORFCs9jLMK1rMj5w7V6zShNVUzwh6jGG4KeQlC-16gF7npAfzCAYlzaGzHGIA2J_pZZfw9mTmhpqxNwp85tE2Z2gU3OqY_IIqYoPtK5nhiv0jxM1D9joHTQtfYp5fnAGX5g-nL11Uo7E4-IwuaGnqXK52JZTLfvQ%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Conservatives Give

clean_body: The survey will only take a few moments of your time This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the Department of Justice. The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history. Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights Hides the corruption of the ruling class Attacks those with traditional viewpoints That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice. By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: The Declaration of Independence argues that the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights and that just government is founded on the consent of the governed. Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat. A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is reaching and teaching millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions. These efforts include: Teaching bright and principled students --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, classical liberal arts education, including a required course on the Constitution Distributing Imprimis , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon Producing and promoting free online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics Providing a classical K-12 curriculum with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our National Survey on the Department of Justice and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached National Survey on the Department of Justice , which you can access at this secure link: Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=900e2ca245d356d8b8f9f95b6b33328e92a1c13f77f47f7d607bed5c8118a4f028d7309baa003a164714c92991ec3974664eb571d5d692abcd1ca3221dfbbe6241534d0881bc2dde8c0b1945e84d95e6

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7022fbb6b5388b8dcb51276745250658d1dfd219e7c81581418819befbca0d21bcc179f70b5b23a9b34e22a8925bed525cdc83539867d6ba9a969c6d6f84e825

Friend,

Our momentum from the Iowa caucuses is propelling us into New Hampshire. Our team showed up to fight for Ron DeSantis in SUBZERO temperatures because they’re committed to helping us go all the way. We showed the nation the fighting force that is Team DeSantis!

The media tried their hardest to count us out by calling the race early and discounting the voice of thousands of Iowans, but we still shattered expectations and showed the nation the fight we’re bringing into the early primary states.

But we are relying on YOUR support to drive our momentum into New Hampshire and South Carolina. It is up to us to show the rest of the early states that while Donald Trump is running for his own issues, and Nikki Haley is running for her donors' issues, Ron DeSantis is running for the issues facing American families, and he isn’t going to let the media, the elites, or the establishment make this decision for you.

HELP US SURGE AHEAD BEFORE THE FIRST PRIMARY!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7022fbb6b5388b8dc191584bc4c161f20d9c979228955d6f0b034e6fa15d9db2a71a52f07332b0403284d03f5344e58eeacfdb6ef6dca4a4074a09524f096acc
DONATE $25 NOW

Everyone fighting for Ron DeSantis for President believes that decline is a choice, success is attainable, freedom is worth fighting for... and this is OUR time for choosing.

It’s time to raise the stakes and give everything we can before the New Hampshire and South Carolina primaries coming up in just days!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7022fbb6b5388b8dc191584bc4c161f20d9c979228955d6f0b034e6fa15d9db2a71a52f07332b0403284d03f5344e58eeacfdb6ef6dca4a4074a09524f096acc
RUSH IN $25 NOW!

Ron DeSantis is counting on us to back up the supporters that showed up to FIGHT for our team at the Iowa caucuses. We need your support right now!

Let’s get ready to shock the nation at the upcoming primaries!

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7022fbb6b5388b8dcb51276745250658d1dfd219e7c81581418819befbca0d21bcc179f70b5b23a9b34e22a8925bed525cdc83539867d6ba9a969c6d6f84e825

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7022fbb6b5388b8df9696d344f95d94970830b94834b03f87cb8d23d398a01abe41f428efbc17cf6008cca61ee395f4bcb97b58a7fd30d271a8d79767aae7f27
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7022fbb6b5388b8d38700a2b8178a57b82d589d658fe0dc468c6ba79aaf5c8db5954936a5b90db0db4e22c26c58e64914ae9e3385499b5add93ea5b50b3831ac
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7022fbb6b5388b8dcb51276745250658d1dfd219e7c81581418819befbca0d21bcc179f70b5b23a9b34e22a8925bed525cdc83539867d6ba9a969c6d6f84e825

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7022fbb6b5388b8dcb51276745250658d1dfd219e7c81581418819befbca0d21bcc179f70b5b23a9b34e22a8925bed525cdc83539867d6ba9a969c6d6f84e825

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

clean_body: To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window. Friend, Our momentum from the Iowa caucuses is propelling us into New Hampshire. Our team showed up to fight for Ron DeSantis in SUBZERO temperatures because they’re committed to helping us go all the way. We showed the nation the fighting force that is Team DeSantis! The media tried their hardest to count us out by calling the race early and discounting the voice of thousands of Iowans, but we still shattered expectations and showed the nation the fight we’re bringing into the early primary states. But we are relying on YOUR support to drive our momentum into New Hampshire and South Carolina. It is up to us to show the rest of the early states that while Donald Trump is running for his own issues, and Nikki Haley is running for her donors' issues, Ron DeSantis is running for the issues facing American families, and he isn’t going to let the media, the elites, or the establishment make this decision for you. HELP US SURGE AHEAD BEFORE THE FIRST PRIMARY! DONATE $25 NOW Everyone fighting for Ron DeSantis for President believes that decline is a choice, success is attainable, freedom is worth fighting for... and this is OUR time for choosing. It’s time to raise the stakes and give everything we can before the New Hampshire and South Carolina primaries coming up in just days! RUSH IN $25 NOW! Ron DeSantis is counting on us to back up the supporters that showed up to FIGHT for our team at the Iowa caucuses. We need your support right now! Let’s get ready to shock the nation at the upcoming primaries! In Freedom, Team DeSantis 🚨 ATTENTION 🚨 Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click here. Volunteer! We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today! Sign up here! Get to Know Ron DeSantis Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules - I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). - This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. - I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. - I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. name: Sarah Longwell
subject: They know he's dangerous
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY REPUBLICAN ACCOUNTABILITY PROJECT, A PROJECT OF DEFENDING DEMOCRACY TOGETHER
body:
We need to hear every Trump official put their country over their party and tell us why the former president is a threat to our democracy.
|
---
Friend, If you read my emails or follow any of my work, you know how I feel about Donald Trump. I’m pretty vocal about the damage he does every day to the fabric of our democracy.

But it’s time we heard from the people who worked for him and have since broken with him publicly. These officials saw the man up close, behind closed doors, and came away with the conclusion that he’s not fit for the presidency.
My team and I compiled the statements of 17 of these officials for the _New York Times_. Taken together, they represent a damning indictment of Trump and an urgent warning about what might happen if he returns to the White House.
[Read the piece in the _Times._](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VWgM8r16H0-RW5mvwx364MHLNW5LNP2558rTLlN2nfYyj3m2ndW8wLKSR6lZ3pJW8Vjgjg4sFqJyW64C3gW9jSHWkW4XWQ6Y7htXMKW4BBMQH5CBrs9N2T0DjPjv7dnW687JvG4ScDMpW9fDf_s7QNSD0W8P0Sq33Nhky1W427BRP3PSS_hW5J0wDR6jDFNpW6hvWwS8NkkjzW4f-yb-8mJHBvW9cRXmM2L_GMlW4zGQH982KFPXW684dVR4pL8l3W6WL5PC7GzbwdW6TM6752ZVJ-XW8dN32n3Gc8lBN7md9qr_ltkpW477YjQ7F6g1nW2sJgs66ZYX_zW8XX_v45d_J9nVHxvgb7gFj4cW26ch7j200B_rW1pgJ-_3z7QBPN3l0m-Dhy4GBW7JDBKt3Sd-NsW8MhPv_526cNHf4R0dDv04)
---
[ ](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VWgM8r16H0-RW5mvwx364MHLNW5LNP2558rTLlN2nfYyj3m2ndW8wLKSR6lZ3q1N6N_8pZrM5dFW7bgVL13zpvMQW12LQVl8qDGrMW33RpMj6V23LpN6RZDjgzGvYVW2tGfVn1jx42KW3gN21k5QNm2nN13r6_T8k6_XW4XC71476l-yRW8gzZyF8sKL6tW9clldw7fjCVjVWqgrc6gx3LCVJnk7c89k1mlW9l6kHs2frcG3W46fTz559MDSnVnTlTm4b0V_2W1w216j2_vN3kW7d_FyH7P0dM5W5tJPfl8cDL61W40fLrw80x4DnW1G97r02GQlLTW2M28WS6l4HZYW1h9pHD3ppCWjW4Xv1892xnpmlW5rffTd6dPhdRW8YXr3K6102yPW2qykqt5y-5wJW3Cky7P3MX00LdXGNq004)
---
Telling the truth about Trump was a start. But we need more from these former officials. We need every one of them to put their country over their party and tell us why the former president is a threat to our democracy. [It was a huge honor to participate in this project, and I think you’ll really enjoy it.](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VWgM8r16H0-RW5mvwx364MHLNW5LNP2558rTLlN2nfYyj3m2ndW8wLKSR6lZ3m1N6sG9qkQ6jXQW52ZgyH8s-GgLW1PNhq842x56-W1TrtLb6yTmZ1W6zq4X784D2XCW3-wV8D4FRKdhW2Ylv966b8PWHN4xyShKWk8BYW24m8zh9k8SCnW5jHYR099J94GW6Hf81254Yn84W2gH-5-558kZ_W9gJT4J2vGRdQW2FtckP2WPsFbW6c4hMF5pH_MyW7Nlzj6859mS3W8cBrWW10nWc3W7nykH_5g1CKxW4k52JC376gn5W4wCg8T5YxZLCN7KpCF0pY3kHVD3SMP6zL2kbW8d6WFY1KHv1_W6jvMn73f4KTZW3Xjzlj2thyCxW2PT1SP7wFfSGW1WdxDz4SVKzdW7PWsSF4YRJ3Tf2k2QF804)
If these officials are willing to stand up and speak out, we will make sure their message is heard.

clean_body: We need to hear every Trump official put their country over their party and tell us why the former president is a threat to our democracy. | Friend, If you read my emails or follow any of my work, you know how I feel about Donald Trump. I’m pretty vocal about the damage he does every day to the fabric of our democracy. But it’s time we heard from the people who worked for him and have since broken with him publicly. These officials saw the man up close, behind closed doors, and came away with the conclusion that he’s not fit for the presidency. My team and I compiled the statements of 17 of these officials for the New York Times. Taken together, they represent a damning indictment of Trump and an urgent warning about what might happen if he returns to the White House. Telling the truth about Trump was a start. But we need more from these former officials. We need every one of them to put their country over their party and tell us why the former president is a threat to our democracy. If these officials are willing to stand up and speak out, we will make sure their message is heard. Sarah Longwell Executive Director, Republican Accountability Project | | | | | | | | Republican Accountability, 1100 Vermont Ave. NW, Tenth Floor, Washington, DC 20005 PAID FOR BY REPUBLICAN ACCOUNTABILITY PROJECT, A PROJECT OF DEFENDING DEMOCRACY TOGETHER. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.
