Hi Peter, I’ve always been fascinated with how storms build. It’s not a linear process, but rather an exponential one. Water vapor in the air condenses around particles, like dust, to build a cloud. And the more water there is, the bigger the cloud grows. The toughest part is the beginning. The conditions have to be _just_ right. I have found over the past three years (wow, three years!) that building a campaign is a similar process. This started as me having an idea in my basement, and essentially, I was the first water droplet of our campaign. The next droplets were my friends and family, and their support has driven me during the long hours of work. And the next batch of droplets were supporters from across Illinois and the country, individuals passionate about bringing more science to Congress. Now here we are, just two months to our primary Election Day, and what was once a few water droplets has grown into a full-fledged storm! Peter, as we get halfway through our first filing deadline of the year, we have our biggest opportunity to publicly demonstrate our storm’s strength. Every dollar builds our storm larger, and any amount is greatly appreciated (and supplies the water droplets we need!) The Republicans think we’re just a few droplets, so let’s show them that there’s a big storm moving in, and they’re about to get caught without their umbrella! clean_body: | | Hi Peter, I’ve always been fascinated with how storms build. It’s not a linear process, but rather an exponential one. Water vapor in the air condenses around particles, like dust, to build a cloud. And the more water there is, the bigger the cloud grows. The toughest part is the beginning. The conditions have to be just right. I have found over the past three years (wow, three years!) that building a campaign is a similar process. This started as me having an idea in my basement, and essentially, I was the first water droplet of our campaign. The next droplets were my friends and family, and their support has driven me during the long hours of work. And the next batch of droplets were supporters from across Illinois and the country, individuals passionate about bringing more science to Congress. Now here we are, just two months to our primary Election Day, and what was once a few water droplets has grown into a full-fledged storm! Peter, as we get halfway through our first filing deadline of the year, we have our biggest opportunity to publicly demonstrate our storm’s strength. Every dollar builds our storm larger, and any amount is greatly appreciated (and supplies the water droplets we need!) The Republicans think we’re just a few droplets, so let’s show them that there’s a big storm moving in, and they’re about to get caught without their umbrella! You can contribute online here: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:__ | ** | ---|--- | | ** I’m grateful to have your support and am excited to see what we accomplish together. Thank you! \- Eric | | Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. If the sale of U.S. Steel to a foreign company sounds like déjà vu...

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77306591/450022040/-1807168276?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=240118_hq_steel&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NmU3YWYyMS0zMGI2LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KJu6DMmUUbgs9AuFcLUKf7d2QVTt4ggQGWB7XRxUy30=)

Hi Derek – In case you missed the news, U.S. Steel is trying to sell itself to a Japanese company, Nippon Steel. Generations of families in Western PA have worked for U.S. Steel, making the steel that built America. | **"This deal sounds an awful lot like a betrayal: of my community, of Steelworker jobs, and of American industrial leadership. Folks sent me to Washington to fight for us, and that’s exactly what I intend to do."** **– Rep. Chris Deluzio**
---
**[READ THE STORY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77306592/450022041/-1207597731?ms=240118_hq_steel&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NmU3YWYyMS0zMGI2LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KJu6DMmUUbgs9AuFcLUKf7d2QVTt4ggQGWB7XRxUy30=&emci=70dea12f-22b6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=56e7af21-30b6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=13185894)**
For far too long, Western PA workers and families have seen corporations stomp over unions, ship good-paying jobs overseas, and chase profits at the expense of Americans who built this industry from the ground up. The sale of U.S. Steel to a foreign company is something communities like Western PA are all too familiar with, and Chris refuses to let that happen without a fight.
[**Chris is committed to making sure that American workers in Western PA get a fair deal: good-paying jobs, hard-earned benefits, and fair contracts. Will you stand with Chris by signing your name to oppose the foreign sale of U.S. Steel?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77306593/450022042/2023360088?ms=240118_hq_steel&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NmU3YWYyMS0zMGI2LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KJu6DMmUUbgs9AuFcLUKf7d2QVTt4ggQGWB7XRxUy30=&emci=70dea12f-22b6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=56e7af21-30b6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=13185894)
**[SIGN YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77306594/450022043/2023360088?ms=240118_hq_steel&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NmU3YWYyMS0zMGI2LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KJu6DMmUUbgs9AuFcLUKf7d2QVTt4ggQGWB7XRxUy30=&emci=70dea12f-22b6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=56e7af21-30b6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=13185894)**

Peter,

* They fabricated accusations that Pres. Trump colluded with Russia
* They launched a fake investigation against him for political gain
* They pursued bogus efforts to impeach him
* They squashed any effort to bring forth evidence of election interference
* They conspired to spread false information about Jan. 6th
* They pushed to stack the Supreme Court with liberal justices who would vote their way
* They want to turn Washington D.C. and Puerto Rico into states to add 4 permanent Democrat Senators to the U.S. Senate in order to control the Senate forever
* They removed Pres. Trump from the ballot in multiple states
* They want to lower to the voting age to 16 to add millions more Democrat voters
* They are turning illegal immigrants into Democrat voters

This is far from an exhaustive list of the Democrats’ attacks on our freedom and democracy, _yet they have the gall to claim they’re the protectors of democracy?!_

**The reality is the Left is the greatest threat to American democracy in our nation’s history.**

The latest instance is my opponent **Adam Schiff’s** new policy push to end the Electoral College, which is enshrined in our Constitution, to guarantee that all future Presidential voting is completely controlled by big city Democrat voters.

Make no mistake – this is yet ANOTHER instance of employing corrupt abuse of power, system-rigging, and rule-changing in order to get the outcome they want.

Adam Schiff is one of the ringleaders of the Democrats’ attack on our democracy and our republic, **and he must be stopped.**

The difference, though, is that we’re going to defeat him fair and square – at the ballot box!

[**But it’s going to take far more support from you in order to make that happen.**](http://links.ericearly.com/u/click?_t=ad21af4bbba74273abaf5a1183f945ac&_m=906db808f85e4ee9b3be6e52c2f2fa87&_e=PTlTwkheUNGY_s0J2Lb5Qlls2_vxaa86mm8raa2rkA1aKd_6_eHcBISngx7A6aGvBOCX6Of8bXVw_dBz9VvfoaiL-kx1kz2mBps8zfijTo-eClkZ9FkM4q7hdkAN7I3Xy6-gjN2v9J-BOmER5_LWcb9fbNtwodZNcEkslzcL74O8m2_b5GYvpL1-RmiNBIrQvoPVzPGxjiWTsWAK6cYfVgPHCT_pLFg_hu398WrSquk2C-6Kx74lRPdY77FOcXyIaK_nolqKxLRHqSBTmdGTBaE1sEolR1wMcqpvIouxu58y2GLNSefvW4s9UmYRC2_ujvD7Xku1OqV4kpZyBpwA65LZcQYyrVv0Vs1odsE5h7iFn5MRyLZWwP0uGL0LasL_r05NwA3cvZ2N21WXwbpmVw%3D%3D)

We can’t let Schiff get the chance to run in the general election – _we must defeat him right out in the open primary._

I am the only Conservative candidate in this race. There’s another Republican running who has yet to articulate one single position on any of the major issues threatening our Republic.

[**Will you help me end Adam Schiff's perennial threat to our democracy, our constitution, and our freedoms by rushing your support to my campaign today?**](http://links.ericearly.com/u/click?_t=ad21af4bbba74273abaf5a1183f945ac&_m=906db808f85e4ee9b3be6e52c2f2fa87&_e=PTlTwkheUNGY_s0J2Lb5Qlls2_vxaa86mm8raa2rkA1aKd_6_eHcBISngx7A6aGvBOCX6Of8bXVw_dBz9VvfoaiL-kx1kz2mBps8zfijTo-eClkZ9FkM4q7hdkAN7I3Xy6-gjN2v9J-BOmER5_LWcb9fbNtwodZNcEkslzcL74O8m2_b5GYvpL1-RmiNBIrQvoPVzPGxjiWTsWAK6cYfVgPHCT_pLFg_hu398WrSqunIXyLmTbljzNlySV5jC16tmCEdcJT7wCvVnJpcJ5uM8zzUUIItQkK6XmhFPftRsi-gO-7iNCoVOP18jqIqsu9j9O0XS2Gfp-oKEzTBLbdMC9kkP7Mb-wxBVAN-1WSOSXzZSDE77IE6_SbYB47UzF4gSEwIgZOu1eDi5N3VY640Kw%3D%3D)

# ABOUT ERIC EARLY
---
Eric Early is a husband, father, attorney, businessman and son of a Marine. **Not a career politician.** Eric was raised to believe in America’s founding principles of limited government and free markets. He believes that every American should be given the opportunity to fulfill their American Dream, and his parents inspired Eric to achieve his personal goals. As the co-owner and Managing Partner of a nationally recognized law firm, Eric understands how difficult it is to start and run a successful business. As your next US Senator, Eric will work to cut overly-burdensome regulations that get in the way of entrepreneurship and job creation. Eric will stand-up to the Socialist woke interests that control Washington, DC, fight to preserve and protect our Democracy, and fight for ordinary Californians who are being left behind. name: =?utf-8?Q?Julie?=
subject: Trump Dominates Iowa Caucus
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conservatives for Julie Clark
body:
Secures victory with 51% of the vote! | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5ffb32ce88dd/trump-dominates-iowa-caucus?e=c982eb7ad4)
---

Peter,
I am writing to extend warm congratulations to President Donald Trump for his historic victory in the Iowa caucus. Securing an impressive 51% of the vote is an incredible achievement and is rightfully recognized as one of the biggest victories in the history of victories.
President Trump's resounding success in the Iowa caucus is a testament to the enduring support he enjoys from the American people. His ability to rally voters and secure such a significant majority is truly remarkable, underscoring his continued impact on the political landscape.
With everyone now rushing to hop on the bandwagon and endorse Trump, I want to be clear that I never stopped supporting Trump. He is our REAL President and I have never stopped and will never stop supporting his goal to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
I acknowledge the historic nature of this win and commend President Trump for this noteworthy achievement. As our campaign for Congress in Texas CD-23 progresses, I remain committed to engaging with the voters, addressing their concerns, and advocating for the issues that matter most to our community.

You can join me in supporting President Trump by making a contribution below!
| [DONATE HERE](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=448cb2ca42&e=c982eb7ad4)
---
Congratulations again on this impressive victory, and I look forward to a spirited and respectful campaign ahead.
For America,
Julie ClarkFormer Medina County Republican ChairCandidate for U.S. Congress, TX-23[ClarkForCongress.com](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=40ea2279c4&e=c982eb7ad4)

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: $4m raised for others … $20 avg. THANK YOU. (Even opening this email is a big deal)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
One of the coolest parts to me is that the average donation for everything we've raised for others is less than $20.

Hey. Gavin Newsom here.
I wanted to write a quick note to say thank you.
In the past year, we have raised almost $4 million for President Biden's re-election, a number of state parties and a handful of candidates for House, Senate and Governor.
And one of the coolest parts to me is that the average donation for everything we've raised for others is less than $20.
I can't tell you what that support means to folks. You're raising 50, 60, $75,000 or more at a time for state parties that are often cash-strapped. One southern state party wrote to tell us your support was "not the icing on the cake, it's the cake."
The amount you are donating to campaigns frees up candidates to spend more time talking to voters.
Just last week, we raised $350,000 for the Democratic National Committee in the 24 hours after Donald Trump won the Iowa Caucus.
All of this support gives Democrats a better chance to win the White House, the Senate and the House in 2024.
Amazing.
While you haven't donated yet, I want you to know that even opening up these emails when you get them actually means something. That's the truth. Just donate when it feels right for you.
So thank you.
Onward to great things in the year ahead.
\- Gavin Newsom
* * *
i️ Hi. Please don’t click away just yet. 🇺🇸
All across the country, rights are being rolled-back in real-time by Republicans with a zest for demonization. We are going to go on the road and on offense — in red states too — and take the fight to statehouses, local communities, and electoral battlegrounds to save our democracy.
If everyone reading this donated just $20, we could support every “Red State” party across the country and give Democrats a chance to win EVERYWHERE. If that sounds worth it and important to you, please donate $20 to the Campaign for Democracy today. Thank you.**
_If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=1780%2E4767699%2E-7VUGM).

Sacramento, CA 95815

name: Tina for Oregon
subject: On to Year Two!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
Peter, Tina officially passed her one year mark as Governor, and we want to reflect on her first year in office, taking action to tackle Oregon’s biggest challenges. On Tina’s first day as Governor, she declared a homelessness state of emergency. Since then, she’s worked with local partners around the state to:
* Create **1,032** new shelter beds, exceeding the original goal by **432** beds;
* Rehouse **1,293** households experiencing unsheltered homelessness, exceeding the original goal by **93** households; and
* Prevent **8,886** households from experiencing homelessness, exceeding the original goal by **136** households.

She’s made progress on behavioral health, working with the legislature to get hundreds of millions of dollars in investments to add capacity to substance abuse treatment facilities, require providers to give out lifesaving opioid overdose reversal medication when people discharge from facilities, and more. Tina also secured new funding for early literacy grants to improve how Oregon teaches children to read and write. Every school district across the state has applied for funding from the new program that Tina signed into law. There are many more achievements to name, from the economy to the environment to reproductive rights — but all of them were only possible because this team worked together to elect Tina as Governor just over a year ago. Now, we’re on to Year Two and we’re calling on this team once more. There’s still plenty of work to do, and that’s why we’re asking for your support today. Any contribution you can make today will fuel Tina’s work to help Oregonians and accomplish even more in her second year. [_**Can we count on you to pitch in today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77307215/450024539/25672743?refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240118_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2MzN2NjYi0zMmI2LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HTqE5fNC3YhHQGp-VdNrtaplAoLsfm5CsClA8WblR1Q=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77307216/450024540/25672743?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240118_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2MzN2NjYi0zMmI2LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HTqE5fNC3YhHQGp-VdNrtaplAoLsfm5CsClA8WblR1Q=)

clean_body: | Peter, Tina officially passed her one year mark as Governor, and we want to reflect on her first year in office, taking action to tackle Oregon’s biggest challenges. On Tina’s first day as Governor, she declared a homelessness state of emergency. Since then, she’s worked with local partners around the state to: Create 1,032 new shelter beds, exceeding the original goal by 432 beds; Rehouse 1,293 households experiencing unsheltered homelessness, exceeding the original goal by 93 households; and Prevent 8,886 households from experiencing homelessness, exceeding the original goal by 136 households. She’s made progress on behavioral health, working with the legislature to get hundreds of millions of dollars in investments to add capacity to substance abuse treatment facilities, require providers to give out lifesaving opioid overdose reversal medication when people discharge from facilities, and more. Tina also secured new funding for early literacy grants to improve how Oregon teaches children to read and write. Every school district across the state has applied for funding from the new program that Tina signed into law. There are many more achievements to name, from the economy to the environment to reproductive rights — but all of them were only possible because this team worked together to elect Tina as Governor just over a year ago. Now, we’re on to Year Two and we’re calling on this team once more. There’s still plenty of work to do, and that’s why we’re asking for your support today. Any contribution you can make today will fuel Tina’s work to help Oregonians and accomplish even more in her second year. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for being on the team! — Team Tina Tina for Oregon PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 | mailto:info@tinafororegon.com | Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek

The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. name: The New Pennsylvania Project
subject: New Pennsylvania Project celebrates the life and legacy of MLK!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project
body:
https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter [https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter]
Hello friends!
We hope this edition of the New Pennsylvania Project eBlast finds you well.
Please take a few moments to check out all the important news you can use, events happening in your neighborhood, career opportunities, and other updates.
NPP Celebrates MLK Day 2024 Across the Commonwealth
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/Ad%20Request%201.4.png]
The New Pennsylvania Project spent MLK Day 2024 at events across the Commonwealth, spending our time registering voters and engaging the electorate. To mark such an important day for our organization, we wanted to share an open letter from our CEO Kadida Kenner:
Dr. King was a radical.
Dr. King was not a cookie cutter action figure. Throughout this week, the New Pennsylvania Project and the affiliated organization, New PA Project Education Fund, honored his life and legacy by being in our communities continuing the work he was assassinated for - advancing civil rights - including voting rights. Want to get involved - please ensure your activities help to advance that cause.
Dr. King didn’t die picking up trash at a park, he died to ensure the trash workers had fair wages. Dr. King wasn’t killed because he was planting trees, he was murdered because he was fighting for liberation of Black people and planting the seeds that when we liberate ourselves, we liberate others.
Let’s ensure our words, activities and deeds are not performative but advancing the mission. Want to help? Talk to young folks and get them registered to vote.
Happy Mr. and Mrs. King Day — there was no Martin without Coretta. #MLK2024
Click here to access voter registration tools [https://vote.pa/?org=npp]
Upcoming Events
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/Vivienne%20Flyer%20Templates.png]
Harrisburg
What : Reflective Democracy Workshop
When : Tuesday, January 23rd and Tuesday, January 30th from 6:30-8PM
Where : First Church of the Brethren, 219 Hummel Street, Harrisburg, PA 17104
Details : Join affiliated organization the New PA Project Education Fund for an interactive workshop and discussion around how we achieve a more representative democracy that reflects all the people of Pennsylvania. They will discuss the current status of our democracy, and why it is important to build a reflective democracy in order to win on the issues that most matter to us -- Come have your voice heard!
**Closest Bus Stop: Mulberry St and Hummel St (20 and 8 buses)**
The event will also feature free food, free parking, and is free to attend
For additional details and to RSVP, click here [https://forms.gle/8DKtdn7ZAgJCh8EA8] .
News You Can Use
Eight Democrats looking to unseat Perry meet in first candidates’ forum [https://www.penncapital-star.com/campaigns-elections/eight-democrats-looking-to-unseat-perry-meet-in-first-candidates-forum/]
(Pennsylvania Capital-Star)
For the first time this cycle, the eight Democratic candidates seeking to unseat U.S. Rep. Scott Perry (R-York) in Pennsylvania’s 10th Congressional District met for a candidate forum. “I think I’m safe to say, we all agree that Scott Perry must go,” Dauphin County Democratic Party Chair Rogette Harris said at the beginning of the two-hour long forum on Saturday.
Biden, Casey and other elected officials mark Martin Luther King, Jr. Day at events in Philadelphia [https://www.penncapital-star.com/civil-rights-social-justice/biden-casey-and-other-elected-officials-mark-martin-luther-king-jr-day-at-events-in-philadelphia/?oref=cspa_firstread_nl]
(Pennsylvania Capital-Star)
Biden spent the morning volunteering at Philadelphia food bank Philabundance alongside Mayor Cherelle Parker, stuffing boxes of food for those in need. It’s the third time Biden has volunteered at Philabundance on the King holiday; he visited in 2021 and 2022.
Want to quote MLK? Then capture the authentic King, not the whitewashed version. [https://www.inquirer.com/opinion/commentary/martin-luther-king-quotes-religion-capitalism-20240115.html?oref=cspa_firstread_nl]
(Philadelphia Inquirer)
As another MLK Day arrives, politicians across the spectrum will post pictures with quotes by Martin Luther King Jr., using them as a veil to conceal all the ways their policies don’t align with his philosophies. Instead of, like King, advocating for voting rights, economic and environmental justice, and criminal justice, today’s legislators have contributed to the erosion of voting rights, implemented inhumane immigration policies, and funded conflicts like the wars in Ukraine and Gaza.
We're Hiring!
The New Pennsylvania Project is a voting rights organization with a primary focus of registering communities of color and the youth to vote. We are looking for passionate individuals to join our team and help defend democracy by expanding the electorate.

Thank you for taking the time to stay informed. We're excited to accomplish some big things together in 2024!
In solidarity,
#TeamNPP
2024 PA ELECTION DATES:
Primary Election: April 23, 2024
Last day to register to vote: April 8, 2024
Last day to request mail-in ballot: April 16, 2024
General Election: November 5, 2024
Last day to register to vote: October 21, 2024
Last day to request mail-in ballot: October 29, 2024
We're on a mission to register new voters in the Commonwealth and expand the electorate.
Invest in our democracy [https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?emci=94765bbc-8d5e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=1068162]

Instead of, like King, advocating for voting rights, economic and environmental justice, and criminal justice, today’s legislators have contributed to the erosion of voting rights, implemented inhumane immigration policies, and funded conflicts like the wars in Ukraine and Gaza. We're Hiring! The New Pennsylvania Project is a voting rights organization with a primary focus of registering communities of color and the youth to vote. We are looking for passionate individuals to join our team and help defend democracy by expanding the electorate. Regional Organizing Director for Chester/Delaware Counties Regional Organizing Director for Bucks County Office Manager Community Engagement Associate (Lehigh Valley and Delaware/Chester Counties) * Part-Time: Education & Engagement Associate in the Lehigh Valley and Delaware/Chester Counties ( via c3 organization New PA Project Education Fund ) [] To learn more about how to apply and review job descriptions with requirements and disclosed salary ranges, please click here [] . Thank you for taking the time to stay informed. We're excited to accomplish some big things together in 2024! body:
The story of LGBTQ+ history is one of strength and resilience.

| Peter, the LGBTQ community is at a terrifying juncture: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77307631/450026244/-866719404?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20240118_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTM5ZmRjMS0zM2I2LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_6w6QyZ7qOSX5A3lBzMXCv-MLFYE3j__khCbRanPJag=) I’ve said it before, Peter: We _must_ protect the right of everyone in our nation to be who they are and love freely.

These hateful bills all across the nation seek to rescind the right of transgender and gender non-conforming Americans to exist in public spaces and participate in society.

This is simply un-American, **and we must fight back.** | [$7,500 GOAL: CHIP IN TO SUPPORT LGBTQ CHAMPION RITCHIE TORRES »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77307632/450026247/-866719404?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20240118_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTM5ZmRjMS0zM2I2LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_6w6QyZ7qOSX5A3lBzMXCv-MLFYE3j__khCbRanPJag=)

I know this is horrifying, but here’s the truth, Peter: **We’ve been here before.**

The story of LGBTQ history is one of _strength_ and _resilience._

So as state legislatures, and even Republicans at the federal level, continue to attack the rights of the LGBTQ community, _we’re not going anywhere._

[**Can you chip in $3 to stand with gay progressives like me? Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681710%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nYKnrfkikvpD1cU0JNV%2bAA&sysid=1 ‘First Red Line’: Taiwan’s New President Could Put ‘Strain’ On Fragile US-China Relations, Experts Say

The result of Saturday’s presidential election in Taiwan could put further strain on an already fragile relationship between the U.S. and Beijing, experts told the Daily Caller News Foundation. Democratic Progressive Party (DPP) candidate Lai Ching-Te won in Taiwan’s presidential elections on Saturday, beating out Beijing-friendly candidates and earning a consecutive third term for his party. Lai’s firm stance against the Chinese Communist Party (CCP)

subject: My new role on the campaign
body:
I've been promoted!

| | **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77308159/450027864/753479076?&refcode=E6010-20240118-MartinPromoted-Image-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDZmNmU0MzctMzRiNi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=EUCtxiXxuSBluGRayHkSqeEM5ZaKkP3YdK2ooIQEJt0=)** Hi Peter, it’s Martin. Over the past year, I’ve been serving as Josh Harder’s finance director and with your help, we raised thousands of dollars to keep this seat blue. **Well I wanted to share some fun (professional) news: With the election coming up, Josh has promoted me to Deputy Campaign Manager! We’ve won elections in 2018, 2020, and 2022 because of the strength of the broad and diverse coalition we’ve built together, and it’s exciting to see it in full force. The conversations we’re having now are essential for getting the word out about the stakes in this critical election year—and why it’s so important to vote in the primary!
[_**With 46 days until the primary, we’re going to have many more Days of Action—and postcard parties, phonebanks, and other events—and they all require a strong foundation of financial support.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77308187/450027927/-2142534165?refcode=lpfe240119tx&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjFmZmQ0NC0zNGI2LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=abvxUW2jrkm_EVlTcbt8Q3Gc73oDaa6NlmQFX79kHuc=)
Your generous contributions go toward supporting our volunteers, printing literature to hand to voters, and all of the things that make for a successful get-out-the-vote operation.
[_**We’re quickly approaching the first deadline of the election year and any amount you can contribute would be greatly appreciated.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77308188/450027928/-2142534165?refcode=lpfe240119tx&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjFmZmQ0NC0zNGI2LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=abvxUW2jrkm_EVlTcbt8Q3Gc73oDaa6NlmQFX79kHuc=)

subject: Army Investigating Unreported Sexual Abuse Against Minor At On-Base Child Care Center
body:
And Dem Presidential Candidate Dean Phillips Gets Attacked By Own
Party For Removing ‘Diversity’ From Campaign Website

http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z4qe7677tf1l8152q2r372s3r83nrcqhc3viaaq8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf8jmemj72sjkm1qj791lmkp79dhk6ep34t5l6cqb7dpjkorrbdt6e5p79c3l6uh7ac9km9qjccbnsor7fl9lmgqb3df161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4or7fljhe9qb0t9km4qu8oj5cpjm2op66prtfcpj6pqj2tf0ccj3ctul6po7bpdk6ioredbjm8gq48bi4bh28pr0clhm4oj1c9i649fg

Now more than ever, we need principled leadership in our government.

Unfortunately, the House majority has been unable to deliver on the issues that matter most to Americans. Their inaction has failed to help us expand affordable housing, increase health care access and affordability, or combat the climate crisis. I know that Democrats can follow through on these crucial issues, but to do that, we need to first take back the House majority. That takes funding.

It’s clear that 2024 is shaping up to be a tough election year. With control of the House likely determined by razor-thin margins, we can’t take anything for granted. And, since I have two opponents running against me, I need to be ready for anything.

That’s why it’s so important that I maximize my fundraising records from now until Election Day. Each and every donation gets us one step closer to restoring civility to the House of Representatives and delivering for the people of California’s 19th Congressional District.

clean_body: | | | | Volunteers supercharge elections. And this is a year where we cannot take any chances. Our volunteers help us research races and filing deadlines and mobilize activists around big statewide ballot initiatives, and all of our victories large and small are won because of folks like you giving a little of your time. We're kicking off campaigns to elect hundreds of local candidates across battleground states like Michigan and Georgia and we're breaking Republican supermajorities in places like Virginia. And each one of these races and initiatives is building momentum and bringing out the voters we need to keep Trump out of the White House. We're counting on you! ‘Enemy No. 1’: Trump World Tells Republican Campaigns Who Not To Hire:
REPORT
http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhpmgo9t5gaavd1b6qqp4ve479hp0ka6e4qal8sg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t46mqj4t5m6gpr8dhheirr7ctl6tr779hnmmrq6d9k65qn4t9h6uh60oj1cug68pt4c3jqactl6mqfb8tnmmi6b8bielqr0td7eup73c9lk5qj3cdmemh7ac3le8or9dhk6eqqcd1lm1q39dpjmpqqes5nmmhrfcblk5rrb85km9qjb8jl61rr4sbnk8gq48bi4bh28pr0clhm4oj1chie49fg

Former President Donald Trump and his allies are advising other
Republican campaigns not to hire a former strategist to a political
action committee (PAC) supporting Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis’

name: Andres Weller
subject: RYAN MACKENZIE Petition Circulation Training Monday, JAN. 22nd
body:
[image: fe91ed33-a759-4e7d-9211-4bb4d0c6180b.jpg]

This is a reminder if you haven't signed up already to join our petition
team to circulate petitions to get Ryan Mackenzie on the ballot please sign
up today.

Ryan Mackenzie for U.S. Congress needs your help to get on the ballot and
defeat radical Susan Wild. The petition period for candidates to get on the
ballot is almost here! Join our team today and join us in circulating
petitions and our FREE New Year Campaign Kick-off Event on Monday, Jan.
22nd, at 6:00 P.M. at Big Woody's Emmaus.

*PETITION KICK-OFF EVENT: Monday, January 22nd at 6:00 P.M. to 7:30 P.M. at
Big Woody's Emmaus Location: 3941 Chestnut St. Emmaus PA 18049*. Come out
and join our growing team of volunteers and activists to get your petition
packet and help Ryan get on the ballot!

*SIGN UP TO HELP & RSVP TO THE EVENT HERE*:
https://forms.gle/yF7qMoXLPAdXPUuc6

* Petition circulation STARTS: Tuesday, January 23rd. and ENDS: Tuesday,
February 13th Ryan needs 1,000 Republican signatures to get on the ballot.*

*If you have questions about how to do petitions and want to get involved
this will be a great event to come and learn. *

Sincerely,

Andres Weller
Ryan Mackenzie For Congress
Campaign Manager
P: (484) 347-8777

name: Congressman Eric Swalwell
subject: A quick word on why I hope you will vote for Adam Schiff for U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-jan2024-fr-january?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-jan2024-fr-january?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25]
https://act.adamschiff.com/signup/endorse-adam-Swalwell/ [https://act.adamschiff.com/signup/endorse-adam-Swalwell/]

Friend —

I’m Congressman Eric Swalwell, representing California’s 14th district, and I’m proud to share my strong support for Adam Schiff in his campaign to represent California in the U.S. Senate.

Join me in supporting Adam’s candidacy and endorse him today. [https://act.adamschiff.com/signup/endorse-adam-Swalwell/]

ENDORSE ADAM » [https://act.adamschiff.com/signup/endorse-adam-Swalwell/]

Simply put, Adam takes on the toughest fights, and gets things done.

You might know Adam best as the guy who took on Donald Trump. But he’s been taking on bullies since the beginning of his career in public service.

As an Assistant U.S. Attorney, Adam held polluters and toxic waste dumpers accountable. His work led to the creation of the first federal environmental crimes unit in Los Angeles.

In the California State Senate, he took on health insurance companies who were denying people the medical care they needed – and it led to California’s first patient bill of rights.

And yes, when our democracy was under assault by a dangerous president, Adam investigated, impeached, and held Trump accountable for insurrection to protect our rights and freedoms – which are still under threat today.

Adam doesn’t back down. When he takes on the big fights — we know we can count on him to represent us well and stand his ground.

But here’s what I’ve found from working with Adam in Congress – he has a real record of results because he’s willing to work with people to get things done.

That’s why I’ve endorsed Adam, alongside 70% of my colleagues in California’s Democratic Congressional Delegation, over 300 other current and former elected officials, and 14 statewide labor unions .

We know Adam will continue to take on the tough fights in the Senate, and deliver for California. So we can make housing more affordable, lower costs, protect the planet, codify abortion access, and finally build an economy that works for everyone – especially working families.

So I’ll ask you this one final time:

Please, will you join me in supporting Adam Schiff’s U.S. Senate campaign? [https://act.adamschiff.com/signup/endorse-adam-Swalwell/]

I couldn’t be more grateful that there are folks as committed as you to making California and America the best it can be.

Thank you,

— Eric

clean_body: Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. [] [] Friend — I’m Congressman Eric Swalwell, representing California’s 14th district, and I’m proud to share my strong support for Adam Schiff in his campaign to represent California in the U.S. Senate. Join me in supporting Adam’s candidacy and endorse him today. [] ENDORSE ADAM » [] Simply put, Adam takes on the toughest fights, and gets things done. You might know Adam best as the guy who took on Donald Trump. But he’s been taking on bullies since the beginning of his career in public service. As an Assistant U.S. Attorney, Adam held polluters and toxic waste dumpers accountable. His work led to the creation of the first federal environmental crimes unit in Los Angeles. In the California State Senate, he took on health insurance companies who were denying people the medical care they needed – and it led to California’s first patient bill of rights. And yes, when our democracy was under assault by a dangerous president, Adam investigated, impeached, and held Trump accountable for insurrection to protect our rights and freedoms – which are still under threat today. Adam doesn’t back down. When he takes on the big fights — we know we can count on him to represent us well and stand his ground. But here’s what I’ve found from working with Adam in Congress – he has a real record of results because he’s willing to work with people to get things done. That’s why I’ve endorsed Adam, alongside 70% of my colleagues in California’s Democratic Congressional Delegation, over 300 other current and former elected officials, and 14 statewide labor unions . We know Adam will continue to take on the tough fights in the Senate, and deliver for California. So we can make housing more affordable, lower costs, protect the planet, codify abortion access, and finally build an economy that works for everyone – especially working families. So I’ll ask you this one final time: Please, will you join me in supporting Adam Schiff’s U.S. Senate campaign? [] I couldn’t be more grateful that there are folks as committed as you to making California and America the best it can be. Thank you, — Eric DONATE TO ERIC >> [] secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-jan2024-fr-january?refcode=headerfooter-footer&amount=25 [secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-jan2024-fr-january?refcode=headerfooter-footer&amount=25] Text ERIC to 43033 to get text updates! Friend, our government is at a crossroads.
Here’s the reality: this was the “most ineffective Congress in history” and we’re facing a 3rd round of threats of a government shutdown. How can we expect to focus on real issues, when Congress can’t even do something as simple as passing a budget?
I’ll take it a step further. How can we expect Stephanie Bice to be effective, when she hasn’t passed a single bill her entire time in congress when her party holds the majority?
If YOU didn’t do your job.... you would be fired!
Help me fire Stephanie Bice so we can have a working government. Is this too much to ask?
Will you make a contribution of $10, $25, $50, or even $100? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jan-gvst-24]
I am ready to be a leader for Oklahoma and ensure we have a functioning government that actually solves problems versus creating new ones. Our country is facing real challenges that Stephanie Bice either doesn’t know how to solve - or just doesn’t care to.
CLICK HERE TO CONTRIBUTE! → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jan-gvst-24]
CLICK HERE TO CONTRIBUTE! → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jan-gvst-24]
Here's the reality, Friend: There’s a significant shift happening in the 5th District - I am ready to meet, and seize, this moment and take back this seat!
Will you help me by donating today to restore a functioning government? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jan-gvst-24]
Let’s get to work,
Madison Horn

Keir will always fight for fairness, opportunity and justice. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter, Primary Election Day is quickly approaching and I need your help. If I want to be in the best position possible to take on a Republican extremist come November, I must hit every goal between now and the primary. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = If we fall short of even one goal between now and Primary Election Day, we’ll have to make some tough cuts to critical parts of this campaign, Peter. | Good Afternoon! Our first in the nation primary is right around the corner! Don't miss your chance to join Senator Chuck Morse at the NHGOP's first ever primary celebration at the Goat in Manchester! With Scott Brown and the Diplomats performing live, along with candidate guest appearances, it's going to be an unforgettable night!
If you are planning on attending this event, please use the link [HERE](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yMzk1MjIwMTAyNTM1NDUyODAzJmM9ZjhjMSZlPTAmYj0xMjcxOTY3MjQ5JmQ9eTFyNWM1eA==.SnPlgOdQ2U7qLLZQvhA0gRbbKkYjRGV4Dt_RPid3EhA) to register and make sure to let us know your are attending by sending an email to [brooks@chuckmorsefornh.com!](mailto:brooks@chuckmorsefornh.com!)
Can't wait to see you there! Brooks

name: Rick Coplen
subject: I want to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Rick Coplen
body:
|
---
First, MUCHISIMAS GRACIAS to all our donors and volunteers who made last week’s Party With a Purpose event a GREAT success! We continue to build momentum as we enter the critical next stage of this race.

Additionally, this past weekend, I participated in a Democratic candidate forum hosted by the Dauphin County Democratic Committee. It was a lively discussion of all that’s at stake in the race to replace Scott Perry – ranging from affordable health care, to reproductive rights, our economy and national security, and more.

Since I launched my campaign, I’ve made it my top priority to listen to the concerns and insights of folks across the district. This valuable input strengthens and shapes our campaign, and it is something I will carry with me through Election Day and once I’m serving YOU in Congress.

[So, I want to hear from you: Will you take our quick Priorities Survey to let me know where you stand on our most pressing challenges?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77310194/450035226/930367074?source=RC_EM_SV_WL_240118_1_1&refcode2=7c5f79a6-38b6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&contactdata=3QCshmECnIxQUenqRJEYh405L/0CRbuYMiAoV8XG3Lt5kLqQq8ONjOKcSLDHdmN6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODExOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzVmNzlhNi0zOGI2LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tajtzFaZPyrK1y1oSk0uw1gdsKnPdc_Yb1JubISd_4o=&emci=a3196dd3-2db6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=7c5f79a6-38b6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=24669367) | | **[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77310195/450035227/930367074?source=RC_EM_SV_WL_240118_1_1&refcode2=7c5f79a6-38b6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&contactdata=3QCshmECnIxQUenqRJEYh405L/0CRbuYMiAoV8XG3Lt5kLqQq8ONjOKcSLDHdmN6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODExOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzVmNzlhNi0zOGI2LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tajtzFaZPyrK1y1oSk0uw1gdsKnPdc_Yb1JubISd_4o=&emci=a3196dd3-2db6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=7c5f79a6-38b6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=24669367)**
---
As we build a coalition of grassroots supporters who believe PA-10 needs leadership that brings a wealth of public service and community service experience, I’m eager to continue listening and learning from you.

Thanks for sharing your voice!

– Rick

clean_body: | First, MUCHISIMAS GRACIAS to all our donors and volunteers who made last week’s Party With a Purpose event a GREAT success! We continue to build momentum as we enter the critical next stage of this race. Additionally, this past weekend, I participated in a Democratic candidate forum hosted by the Dauphin County Democratic Committee. It was a lively discussion of all that’s at stake in the race to replace Scott Perry – ranging from affordable health care, to reproductive rights, our economy and national security, and more. Since I launched my campaign, I’ve made it my top priority to listen to the concerns and insights of folks across the district. This valuable input strengthens and shapes our campaign, and it is something I will carry with me through Election Day and once I’m serving YOU in Congress. | | As we build a coalition of grassroots supporters who believe PA-10 needs leadership that brings a wealth of public service and community service experience, I’m eager to continue listening and learning from you. Thanks for sharing your voice! – Rick | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Friends of Rick Coplen | =

name: Adam Schiff
subject: My plan to make our economy work for everyone
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=5116%2E5257348%2EeHclnQ ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Working families in California are facing an affordability crisis,
Derek. And I’m
releasing a plan today that outlines what I’m going to do about it in the
U.S. Senate.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240118_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=5116%2E5257348%2EeHclnQ ]I’m sharing my affordability agenda, which includes dramatic steps to
drive down costs in California and across the country. Before you learn
about these plans, will you pitch in to help send me to the Senate to make
these plans a reality?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em.eamPKe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240118_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1005&akid=5116%2E5257348%2EeHclnQ ]EXPRESS DONATE
$10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em.eamPKe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240118_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=25&t=1006&akid=5116%2E5257348%2EeHclnQ ]EXPRESS DONATE
$25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em.eamPKe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240118_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=50&t=1007&akid=5116%2E5257348%2EeHclnQ ]EXPRESS DONATE
$50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em.eamPKe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240118_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=100&t=1008&akid=5116%2E5257348%2EeHclnQ ]EXPRESS DONATE
$100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em.eamPKe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240118_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=250&t=1009&akid=5116%2E5257348%2EeHclnQ ]EXPRESS DONATE
$250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240118_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=5116%2E5257348%2EeHclnQ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Derek, it’s
not that people aren’t working hard – they’re working harder than ever,
and still not making enough to get by. They’re paying more for housing,
childcare, gas, medicine, education and food. And their wages simply
aren’t increasing fast enough to keep up with the basic costs of living.
Meanwhile, corporations continue to make record profits, all while those
same corporations and the wealthiest among us don’t pay their fair share.

My plan outlines how we’re going to:

* Make childcare affordable and accessible
* Increase corporate competition, stop price gouging, and reduce gas and
grocery costs
* Enact paid family leave for all
* Create a robust care economy to provide and fund care for our elderly
and sick
* Make our tax system fairer
* Expand the social safety net for vulnerable families
* Lower the cost of education

This is a big, bold plan. And I’m going to fight like hell to make it a
reality in the Senate.

These policies will help fix systemic inequalities and make our economy
work for us all, not just the wealthy few.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/3679?t=1011&akid=5116%2E5257348%2EeHclnQ ]Derek, read
the full plan on my website here.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/3679?t=1012&akid=5116%2E5257348%2EeHclnQ ]READ MORE

Thanks for reading more about my plans for the U.S. Senate. I’m determined
to make the economy work for everyone, and I’m honored to have you by my
side in this fight.

— Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/3421?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240118_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=5116%2E5257348%2EeHclnQ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/3492?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240118_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1014&akid=5116%2E5257348%2EeHclnQ ]DONATE WEEKLY

135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1002&akid=5116%2E5257348%2EeHclnQ ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1003&akid=5116%2E5257348%2EeHclnQ ]Privacy Policy

body:
The Republican National Committee named me the Co-Chairman of their most important initiative for the next election.
I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist:
| |

| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_s=c41e13873fb546e7962c344bb589785c&_t=8vrBl-ccLdQs-lu65JuIUy7iUpdwN3_SBaB2Fl8UAxmWMGToBdcrhP7KMx3JlQ0CwiiYD9ZZZwylUM1dMk5b-d1PPFrtI5dTtY8cfxyBsMQ%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_s=c41e13873fb546e7962c344bb589785c&_t=8vrBl-ccLdQs-lu65JuIUy7iUpdwN3_SBaB2Fl8UAxmWMGToBdcrhP7KMx3JlQ0CwiiYD9ZZZwylUM1dMk5b-d1PPFrtI5dTtY8cfxyBsMQ%3D)

| Hey - I'm Byron Donalds.

The Republican National Committee named me the Co-Chairman of their most important initiative for the next election.

_**[I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024- here's the gist:](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c41e13873fb546e7962c344bb589785c&_e=iC15KV22YyU1r2o2k9oeB3BfRF8zuhfX0wUMNhAkG--sG48aRpp5t2QPwomVydFFZSK5XcLAZiTS_fsxNTWTeWJMnLrkJKtWw8XU2_SyZoPLTC9rEMO337cx5_krckSkE9Rv97TuvrJHXN-qzcODZk8ywKKINNrv7CPxSxspTBcjKSbpG6tSFMClPVXAWNIqIppbjsayzhMhnhlSZCJsQjxyLD3lXWOe9Df7FfAOc5QmoFp8Rma3Yn2-4OIc1hTkREUpoBY5AnTqr2JTu0AIY9myIQ4EtRb0pBEuyWgT0yx2Rut9h_GSPALoaQ_dQKTSGr_qO1xGXjlwXLUpbjrpJ6la8HfFUmtiyW20JCJR4BiCiYUJtkjsZD5GhoMblyuWpQoeqiS6YD2BQYyAHOw4TVG2LY5n5oOcF7TYPpSzDZ8%3D "I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist:")**_
* If the Democrats vote early, we should push early voting too
* If they can ballot harvest, we should ballot harvest even better
* Invest in an 80,000-person team to ensure your vote is protected
* Mobilize GOP voters through neighbor-to-neighbor contact
* Expand voter contact efforts to connect with young Conservatives
* **Fight BAD ballot harvesting laws - let's make it easy to vote but hard to cheat**

I am proud to lead these efforts and help Conservatives WIN BIG up and down the ballot. These efforts will not only allow us to confront bad actors and stop cheating but will help our Party appeal to younger voters and swing-state independents.

There's just one problem: campaign operations like these are EXPENSIVE. It's not cheap running ads, printing flyers, recruiting volunteers, and expanding voter contact efforts.

_**[That's why I'm coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c41e13873fb546e7962c344bb589785c&_e=iC15KV22YyU1r2o2k9oeB3BfRF8zuhfX0wUMNhAkG--sG48aRpp5t2QPwomVydFFZSK5XcLAZiTS_fsxNTWTeWJMnLrkJKtWw8XU2_SyZoPLTC9rEMO337cx5_krckSkE9Rv97TuvrJHXN-qzcODZk8ywKKINNrv7CPxSxspTBcjKSbpG6tSFMClPVXAWNIqIppbjsayzhMhnhlSZCJsQjxyLD3lXWOe9Df7FfAOc5QmoFp8Rma3Yn2-4OIc1hTkvU1lS9pYUuQRTfMHQHv0MYeQYs-JjYXbnA4MJelcD3YVyujF6EkFbcrwIIgKRLs-Cklx2mMJqU_XW5G4EuaOuAqz5meAJODKJMlEnpBhl3NH6hZf_MFoS8tAwDNjnuUvEbYO4wa_5vfkvUY_w7SwVn-98GzAR7ZSNkVvvuuaWbg%3D "That’s why I’m coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?")**_ I know it's a lot to ask but I can promise you this: it'll be worth it when we have **1)** a Conservative House Majority, **2)** a Conservative Senate, and **3)** a Conservative in the White House.

_If that doesn 't convince you to want to help, I don't know what will! Are you in?_

This is a non-negotiable if we want to win.

Democrats are early voting in record numbers. Democrats have a sophisticated ballot harvesting operation in deep blue cities. And Democrats are all over social media platforms getting young Liberal voters to register.

**If we don 't do it too, we will lose.**

But make no mistake: We will ONLY be successful with the support of our grassroots team. No matter where you live in the country, this is your chance to directly impact whether Conservative WIN or LOSE the next election.

Will you do your part?

I look forward to seeing your name.

Thank you,

Byron Donalds
Co-Chairman of "Bank Your Vote"

This is Steve Scalise.

I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist: | | | | | | Hey - I'm Byron Donalds. The Republican National Committee named me the Co-Chairman of their most important initiative for the next election. "I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist:" If the Democrats vote early, we should push early voting too If they can ballot harvest, we should ballot harvest even better Invest in an 80,000-person team to ensure your vote is protected Mobilize GOP voters through neighbor-to-neighbor contact Expand voter contact efforts to connect with young Conservatives Fight BAD ballot harvesting laws - let's make it easy to vote but hard to cheat I am proud to lead these efforts and help Conservatives WIN BIG up and down the ballot. These efforts will not only allow us to confront bad actors and stop cheating but will help our Party appeal to younger voters and swing-state independents. There's just one problem: campaign operations like these are EXPENSIVE. It's not cheap running ads, printing flyers, recruiting volunteers, and expanding voter contact efforts. "That’s why I’m coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?" I know it's a lot to ask but I can promise you this: it'll be worth it when we have 1) a Conservative House Majority, 2) a Conservative Senate, and 3) a Conservative in the White House. If that doesn 't convince you to want to help, I don't know what will! And Democrats are all over social media platforms getting young Liberal voters to register. If we don 't do it too, we will lose. But make no mistake: We will ONLY be successful with the support of our grassroots team. No matter where you live in the country, this is your chance to directly impact whether Conservative WIN or LOSE the next election. Will you do your part? I look forward to seeing your name. That’s why I’m starting January by endorsing Jason Crow, who represents Colorado’s Sixth Congressional District. = Jason has a record of getting things done for Coloradans — from keeping Space Command in our state to making major investments in real climate action and helping hardworking families get ahead.He’s running for re-election to fight for Colorado’s working families and flip the House blue.We have no time to waste in these divisive times. It’s time to re-elect Jason Crow. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Jason Crow and Michael Bennet will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = | | Thank you, friend.Michael | | Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States = | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | = | | | PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO | | = By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution. Friend,
Ohio is a purple state—nowhere near as red or as conservative as the media likes to portray. We proved that when we _overwhelmingly_ voted to protect women’s reproductive healthcare rights.
But Ohio is also home to some of the worst MAGA extremists in the country—chief among them, Jim Jordan.
Having Jim Jordan in Congress has been a total disaster for America. He consistently embarrasses us, votes against what the people want and need, and he has somehow been allowed to skate by with almost no accountability. **
****And now Jordan is meddling in Ohio’s must-win Senate race:** Jordan has endorsed GOP radical Bernie Moreno, who is running against our own Senator Sherrod Brown. **
****Ever since he failed to become Speaker of the House, Jordan has been working overtime to elect candidates who will push his extremist agenda on all Americans.**
****That’s why I am urgently asking for 500 of our BEST supporters to endorse this campaign, so I can keep winning over the voters we need to STOP Republican extremists and defeat their cherished leader: Jim Jordan.
Sherrod and I both are in the fight of our lives to help protect the America we all know and love. **[

name: Indiana Democrats
subject: We want you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, In 2023, we elected historic new leadership in cities and towns across Indiana. How did we do it? By running great people for office who had solid connections to their communities. That’s where you come in – this year there are over 1100 offices up for election in Indiana and you could be the next leader to make a difference in your area. **[If you’re passionate about the future of your community, this is the opportunity for you to jump into local politics and improve the lives of those around you. body:
Our vision is resonating — but we have to get it out to more voters | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/tTBUZwcBH_2q13Ow12s-jc-9PHkp7BkSZ-MbOY7TNqbHMZZ7e6z8fxUUbQYxgrxk6a2v4Aw9Ux80o37VicMJ_2RUROn59OUiTeeVHLXdV7VQ6UP0B003zvnUXl-_g03dLoO5pzGFgWloA1V6XnQAsEgxswnRZ6f5JEYTCL18mXwSwPLeX69751SddcsVwvqQeHjye3Vnri0dns_amftfOGIKGlpD6EFxQ_9e3OJ4Atn-e4eczDzGRGrN1vD5QBt2/433/qvkQUg7aQ_O6ukBKUbi-nw/h0/UESxRwrQPJ0lTXr9a1E9zlbw0EgbfCJKqDSdW62o_7c)

Peter, if we know one thing, it’s that voters are resonating with Michelle’s story. Immigrants, small-business owners, young folks, women, Latinos and so many others are already a part of this movement because Michelle’s background is one they can personally connect with. And that’s because Michelle’s story is authentic and similar to so many other stories here in TX-15. But if we don’t have the financial resources to get her story in front of every voter — on TV, in digital ads, on the radio, on social media — then the only story voters are going to hear is one full of lies and empty promises from Republican extremists like Monica De La Cruz. **[As a grassroots campaign that doesn’t take a dime from corporate donors, we need your help to fund our outreach efforts between now and March 5th. Can you make a donation right now of whatever you can afford to go towards getting Michelle’s story across the media and Michelle has been on the ground since the start of the campaign, hitting the pavement to talk to voters directly and share her plans to bring change to this district.
From fighting for more affordable, quality healthcare, because our moms, dads, tias, y abuelas deserve to get the health care they need right here in Texas, to making sure our economy works for everyone, to protecting women’s rights to make their own healthcare decisions, Michelle is ready to go to bat for South Texas.
But if we can’t share those plans with fellow voters, how can we expect them to show up at the polls for Michelle and this movement’s vision on March 5th?
We have to put in the work now and get Michelle, her story and the issues we are fighting in front of as many voters as possible before the primary.

clean_body: Our vision is resonating — but we have to get it out to more voters | | | Peter, if we know one thing, it’s that voters are resonating with Michelle’s story. Immigrants, small-business owners, young folks, women, Latinos and so many others are already a part of this movement because Michelle’s background is one they can personally connect with. And that’s because Michelle’s story is authentic and similar to so many other stories here in TX-15. But if we don’t have the financial resources to get her story in front of every voter — on TV, in digital ads, on the radio, on social media — then the only story voters are going to hear is one full of lies and empty promises from Republican extremists like Monica De La Cruz. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll instantly process your contribution to Michelle Vallejo: | Michelle has been on the ground since the start of the campaign, hitting the pavement to talk to voters directly and share her plans to bring change to this district. From fighting for more affordable, quality healthcare, because our moms, dads, tias, y abuelas deserve to get the health care they need right here in Texas, to making sure our economy works for everyone, to protecting women’s rights to make their own healthcare decisions, Michelle is ready to go to bat for South Texas. But if we can’t share those plans with fellow voters, how can we expect them to show up at the polls for Michelle and this movement’s vision on March 5th? We have to put in the work now and get Michelle, her story and the issues we are fighting in front of as many voters as possible before the primary. ¡Vamos Por Quince! Team Vallejo | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress Michelle Vallejo for Congress PO Box 1265 Mission, TX 78573

Peter, sorry for all the caps in this email, but I’m just SO happy to share this news: **Our organizing team just helped FLIP a Florida House seat from deep red to BRIGHT BLUE!!**
Ron DeSantis won this seat by ELEVEN points just last cycle. The odds were stacked against us, but when we organize, we win. And now, we’re sending Democrat Tom Keen to the Florida State House to represent HD-35!
THIS is why my organizing team went all-in to flip this seat: because it’s not _just_ about my campaign. Year-round organizing and building power TOGETHER as ONE Florida is how we reclaim our state’s future.
Between playing a key role in flipping HD-35 blue, and petitioning for the abortion ballot initiative, our organizing team has been working non-stop to secure a better future for Florida. **But to secure even MORE wins in 2024, I’ll need grassroots support to power our organizing work through Election Day.**
[**_I’m setting a personal goal to raise $9,500 by midnight to make sure my team is out-organizing the fascists who want to crush our momentum after this incredible win. So please, can you rush $27 to fuel my campaign’s organizing efforts across Florida? >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/JSmaAa14E_jKqBg2Bak3eQ~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnjA5oP0THaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDExOF9lbV9mcl9iMV9oZC0zNV9lbiZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yYjhyR0RYUWNZY1FobHkwamVKSHhyV2JsTjAmcmVmY29kZTI9MmI4ckdEWFFjWWNRaGx5MGplSkh4cldibE4wJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJiOHJHRFhRY1ljUWhseTBqZUpIeHJXYmxOMFcDc3BjQgplomiJqWUjsR5BUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~)
Peter – No one expected Democrats to flip a seat that DeSantis won, especially not by a double-digit margin. This win confirms what I’ve always known: **_Florida is worth fighting for._**
Don’t give up on the South. Don’t give up on Florida. We are millions of poor and working class people fighting for our home against the fascists who want to keep Florida in their grasps. And together, we’ll win.
**But right now, a lot of donors _are_ giving up and pulling out of Florida. Well, screw that. We’re going to keep fighting and keep organizing until Florida flips blue, and I’m counting on YOU to help our team make that happen. **
[**_Peter, this win wasn’t a fluke. It was a line in the sand, and we’re not going back behind it in 2024. name: Ro Khanna
subject: Everyone deserves a secure retirement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

Social Security is the most important source of retirement income for the vast majority of Americans. For nearly half of Americans, it’s their only retirement savings.

While Republicans continue to push the Fiscal Commission Act to slash Social Security and Medicare, millions of seniors and people with disabilities face poverty.

With the average Social Security benefit totaling only $1,688 per month, we need to fight for expanded benefits that keep pace with the rising cost of living.

Tell President Biden and Congress: Expand Social Security. [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-expand-social-security-4?source=2024Expand_RK&referrer=group-ro-khanna&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fdk-expand-social-security-petition-swap]

Sign the Petition [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-expand-social-security-4?source=2024Expand_RK&referrer=group-ro-khanna&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fdk-expand-social-security-petition-swap]

I’m a proud co-sponsor of the Social Security Expansion Act, which would increase benefits, strengthen cost-of-living adjustments, extend the solvency of Social Security for 75 years by requiring the wealthy to pay their fair share of taxes, and make other improvements to this vital program.

Sign if you agree: Every American deserves to retire with dignity. President Biden and Congress must expand Social Security. [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-expand-social-security-4?source=2024Expand_RK&referrer=group-ro-khanna&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fdk-expand-social-security-petition-swap]

Thank you for your activism and all that you do.

In solidarity,
Ro

clean_body: [] Friend, Social Security is the most important source of retirement income for the vast majority of Americans. For nearly half of Americans, it’s their only retirement savings. While Republicans continue to push the Fiscal Commission Act to slash Social Security and Medicare, millions of seniors and people with disabilities face poverty. With the average Social Security benefit totaling only $1,688 per month, we need to fight for expanded benefits that keep pace with the rising cost of living. Tell President Biden and Congress: Expand Social Security. [] Sign the Petition [] I’m a proud co-sponsor of the Social Security Expansion Act, which would increase benefits, strengthen cost-of-living adjustments, extend the solvency of Social Security for 75 years by requiring the wealthy to pay their fair share of taxes, and make other improvements to this vital program. Sign if you agree: Every American deserves to retire with dignity. President Biden and Congress must expand Social Security. [] Thank you for your activism and all that you do. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Only 33 members of Congress didn’t take money from the Israel lobby
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

A new report from The Guardian reveals just how pervasive the
anti-Palestinian lobby is in American politics and our government’s
foreign policy:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240118.a1IKDb&refcode=em20240118-32887&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1028&akid=32887%2E1203867%2EwibDkj ]Revealed: Congress backers of Gaza war received most from pro-Israel
donors. Guardian analysis finds top recipients of pro-Israel contributions
in last elections were centrist Democrats who defeated progressives in
primaries

The Israel lobby, including right-wing funded groups like AIPAC and
Democratic Majority for Israel, spent $58 million on campaign
contributions to members of Congress last year alone.

The lobby is so influential in Congress that only 33 current members
(including our Squad) didn’t take money from them.

It turns out that supporting the ongoing genocide and ethnic cleansing in
Gaza pays off for those in Washington: The Guardian reports, “Congress
members who were more supportive of Israel at the start of the Gaza war
received over $100,000 more on average from pro-Israel donors during their
last election than those who most supported Palestine.”

This dark money poisons our democracy, and it’s one of the main reasons
most members of Congress don't represent the majority of Americans who
want a ceasefire. The anti-Palestinian lobby is buying unconditional
support and military aid for Israel’s government as we speak.

Justice Democrats is fighting back against this dark money and going up
against groups like AIPAC, who plan to spend $100 million to unseat the
Squad this year.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240118.a1IKDb&refcode=em20240118-32887&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1031&akid=32887%2E1203867%2EwibDkj ]With Democratic primary elections getting closer each
day and our Justice Democrats incumbents keeping up the fight for a
ceasefire, will you pitch in $3 or anything you can afford
to help us re-elect them to Congress?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240118.a1IKDb&refcode=em20240118-32887&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1050&akid=32887%2E1203867%2EwibDkj ]Contribute $3

We’ve been outspent before, but with your grassroots support, we
successfully elected progressive champions like AOC and Cori Bush — with
your help, we can re-elect them and continue building the bloc this year.

Thanks for all you do to fuel our fight,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1051&akid=32887%2E1203867%2EwibDkj ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them
using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1052&akid=32887%2E1203867%2EwibDkj ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240118-32887-footer&t=1053&refcode2=32887_1203867_wibDkj&akid=32887%2E1203867%2EwibDkj

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1054&akid=32887%2E1203867%2EwibDkj

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

**ONE** : Liz Cheney bucked her party and stood against Trump’s corruption.

name: Diane Sare
subject: 01/19 Friday Symposium: Why The World Needs More CO2
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sare for Senate
body:
| | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240119_symposium&n=1)
---
Friend, This week's Symposium will be presented with Will Happer, Professor Emeritus of Physics at Princeton University. The ugly truth is that much of what passes for "scientific evidence" in the public discourse surrounding "climate change" is actually _pure_ _speculation_ projected by _computer models_ whose relation to reality is questionable at best. Unlike such purely abstract _information_ which can clearly be manipulated to suit ideologically driven motives, certain verifiable scientific facts – such as the fundamental benefit of carbon dioxide for plant life on Earth – provide a principled basis to be relied upon in the creation of sane economic policy. Mr. Happer will present (with the humility of an actually-scientific thinker) some of the basic evidence substantiating the claim that there is no "man-made climate change disaster."
**This week' symposium will be online only, at the live-stream linked below.**
* * *
### [NY Symposium, Friday, January 19, 8:00 pm – Why The World Needs More Carbon Dioxide](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=rnE9YhnYr4J_7Au8CsjhkAhyAZ3PsgxvaGMbXQQz7mcE9iycVpMaAJJBo7eWHSic7gBYdaWMGcjEIe4B-sljhQ&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240119_symposium&n=2)

name: Georgia House Democrats
subject: Peter: We want to hear from YOU
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgia Blue PAC
body:
Firstname or “Team,”

It’s here: the year when we put our shoulders to the wheel and fight to Build a Better Georgia – because 2024 may be one of the most consequential election years of our lifetimes.

As you may know, we have established an Agenda [https://gahousedems.com/agenda/] that outlines our priorities in making our state equitable for all Georgians. By sticking to it, we are also working to retake the Majority in the House. After all, the policies of the radical GOP are getting us nowhere.

But we need your help. Please take this 1-minute survey to help us understand which actions we should prioritize in 2024. [https://forms.gle/8jo13B3wFz22H56q7]

By letting us know which parts of our Agenda are most important to you, we can manage our efforts. There is much work to be done - let’s do it together.

Take the survey [https://forms.gle/8jo13B3wFz22H56q7]

And if you’d like to help out even more, DONATE TODAY. This election year is going to demand action from all of us. Help us be as effective as possible and give what you can.

Give $10 Today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gahouse-grassroots2?refcode=011824_AgendaPollA_button1&amount=10]

Let's make 2024 a winning year.

Onwards,

Georgia House Democrats

OUR AGENDA
Every day, we're fighting for a better Georgia for hard-working families like yours. To learn more, visit us here [https://gahousedems.com/agenda/?refcode=email-footer-agenda].

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

The only way that we’re going to defy expectations and defend our House majority is if we have the right people in place leading up to November. _**[For us to be successful, that means we need conservatives like YOU on our team.](http://links.teamjimjordan.com/u/click?_t=1b0bebbf1097419382210464ab5da85c&_m=ae5f79c842c34e5c88385ece74cbea00&_e=pr_Zx2qTBHmSOhUCqPL53eohvDFGwbzAzHhdAk4LQRL10jpacN0f7IU3mS4sMb6Jn5ug03GAlD0jBrvj2GAH5LdHZ5-b-XGQ9vTEkGDNRkYk6Q5Uf5kOFmFYbwijVk8q-gmJNVZMWvtsF00HOei2IgXfcMgKQQMcyM2KbneruHr6sXdJ053ZZ4yKisdo0oAP6WYwOUj74JmTdKiwp_giFUOeGEHSvlb2oVU31vzWgT5wMZXp0BWSw9eN6npZtTyN8bIkW74ljHKcI3SWV3ZC_5A-0_lJSDFOFDRbRIzHiaAsiN5lXFiwX1RsLF3MfdRfDoE5PuPlyW4NsdU-lSSCvO7Bqom42SGSqyPsCFF5vVnD27TL0OPNGVbkvylH9iPpIoZwhF4DKKdoEr9t4YQakQcginyGiVCaYN05SaciDqSAEMFKOvEXNRgfnHzwKpy4Z8Kc5ETQE44VPNDZ-2UCsU3ImgQqWSENtEnTqxwCM4eviAQcTd6HuJi0P0wfqbN2Ec-k40lq_U7m3T2eJIzZbRDBkyyKpu74JEWf9Erev38%3D)**_

We’re laying the groundwork now, and that’s why I’m asking for you to sign up to be a member of my 2024 House Majority Taskforce. _**[We’re looking to add 100,000 conservatives to this initiative by the end of the week and hoping we can count on you to sign up today](http://links.teamjimjordan.com/u/click?_t=1b0bebbf1097419382210464ab5da85c&_m=ae5f79c842c34e5c88385ece74cbea00&_e=pr_Zx2qTBHmSOhUCqPL53eohvDFGwbzAzHhdAk4LQRL10jpacN0f7IU3mS4sMb6Jn5ug03GAlD0jBrvj2GAH5LdHZ5-b-XGQ9vTEkGDNRkYk6Q5Uf5kOFmFYbwijVk8q-gmJNVZMWvtsF00HOei2IgXfcMgKQQMcyM2KbneruHr6sXdJ053ZZ4yKisdo0oAP6WYwOUj74JmTdKiwp_giFUOeGEHSvlb2oVU31vzWgT5wMZXp0BWSw9eN6npZtTyN8bIkW74ljHKcI3SWV3ZC_5A-0_lJSDFOFDRbRIzHiaAsiN5lXFiwX1RsLF3MfdRfDoE5PuPlyW4NsdU-lSSCvO7Bqom42SGSqyPsCFF5vVnD27TL0OPNGVbkvylH9iPppSZdWlKf5OJRO1oVshkAlXe5KpCzQ6gB0YKUB2zq5zMSczP_7ImlyyAL5vcQxqUxI3Y2Xg4Yq3lwMDqdel07I0agptn_PjyvwjzxXP-XkkerykOqcFliowbWuu9R80F1wPaU43ocTiU2SstzOcOxxkjPPqQAJ_ezkpoApq6kb5Q%3D)**_.
