Fellow Conservative,

Republicans are the only thing stopping President Biden and Chuck Schumer from bankrupting our country.

This isn’t just political hyperbole. It’s as real as it gets!

It’s our Republican majority that allows us to hold them accountable. Without it, we would effectively be relegated to “sitting on the sidelines” and watching as:
* The Biden Administration does nothing to address the growing border crisis,

* **Crime continues to rise, and dangerous drugs pour into our country,**

* The Washington swamp holds critical funds hostage in order to send more untracked American tax dollars to Ukraine, and

* Liberals try to protect their political power by brazenly opposing election integrity measures ... _**even going as far as trying to keep President Trump off the ballot!**_****

But thankfully, our majority acts as a backstop against Democrats running roughshod over our values, our wallets, our country, and our constitution.
**_
But Fellow Conservative,...all that goes away if we lose our majority in November’s election...and I would be lying to you if I told you that wasn’t a real possibility._**

As we head into the most important election in recent memory, our majority has recently shrunk from four to TWO.

**How did this happen?** Over the past couple of months there have been several Republican members of Congress who resigned or retired. Having such a slim majority puts us in a very precarious position going into an election year –and to be honest, we’re in real trouble right now, which is why I’m reaching out today.

[**Join The 2024 House Majority Tasforce
Add Your Name->
**](http://links.teamjimjordan.com/u/click?_t=1b0bebbf1097419382210464ab5da85c&_m=ae5f79c842c34e5c88385ece74cbea00&_e=pr_Zx2qTBHmSOhUCqPL53eohvDFGwbzAzHhdAk4LQRL10jpacN0f7IU3mS4sMb6Jn5ug03GAlD0jBrvj2GAH5LdHZ5-b-XGQ9vTEkGDNRkYk6Q5Uf5kOFmFYbwijVk8q-gmJNVZMWvtsF00HOei2IgXfcMgKQQMcyM2KbneruHr6sXdJ053ZZ4yKisdo0oAP6WYwOUj74JmTdKiwp_giFUOeGEHSvlb2oVU31vzWgT5wMZXp0BWSw9eN6npZtTyN8bIkW74ljHKcI3SWV3ZC_5A-0_lJSDFOFDRbRIzHiaAsiN5lXFiwX1RsLF3MfdRfDoE5PuPlyW4NsdU-lSSCvO7Bqom42SGSqyPsCFF5vVnD27TL0OPNGVbkvylH9iPpIANmvLdUBHRHBUXuqtuytQYDlsc9cM7UWPvUTl3etKBMMgwMGy79c0r-VwEHq3UsA0Kj6ooscQDAHOzQwpVm1iQgGw8ABHifBdXZ8DHJHif9MXKiF7cWlv17rkVICaU2Y6Rmun2lwpXkh-UVHdrh-Kzi3WxGi51fJ64ueaAusGc%3D)

It’s anyone’s guess right now as to how things will play out, but if I can tell you one thing it’s this: **if we lose control of the House and fail to retake the Senate, Republicans won’t be able to block Democrats from crushing our economy, diverting taxpayer money to their pet projects or stop them from prosecuting political opponents who dare to speak the truth!**

I’m certain Democrats will have all the money they’ll need in the fight to flip the House. But will Republicans? Democrats will turn in big numbers. That’s why we’re beginning the long, arduous process of identifying conservatives to help us hold onto our slim majority now.

Time is of the essence, and **[we need to know whether you’re on our team.](http://links.teamjimjordan.com/u/click?_t=1b0bebbf1097419382210464ab5da85c&_m=ae5f79c842c34e5c88385ece74cbea00&_e=pr_Zx2qTBHmSOhUCqPL53eohvDFGwbzAzHhdAk4LQRL10jpacN0f7IU3mS4sMb6Jn5ug03GAlD0jBrvj2GAH5LdHZ5-b-XGQ9vTEkGDNRkYk6Q5Uf5kOFmFYbwijVk8q-gmJNVZMWvtsF00HOei2IgXfcMgKQQMcyM2KbneruHr6sXdJ053ZZ4yKisdo0oAP6WYwOUj74JmTdKiwp_giFUOeGEHSvlb2oVU31vzWgT5wMZXp0BWSw9eN6npZtTyN8bIkW74ljHKcI3SWV3ZC_5A-0_lJSDFOFDRbRIzHiaAsiN5lXFiwX1RsLF3MfdRfDoE5PuPlyW4NsdU-lSSCvO7Bqom42SGSqyPsCFF5vVnD27TL0OPNGVbkvylH9iPp3WvgnTSm7A0cWbt11Ed6k_VfyPvWBF4zkoe6aHmBjqMHzbWbEn_wDMi0XpK1PBbPmlWprRbRPB9RyHc9cTPk2efc9-OVeBFX1Hr4GRCJtiB-RVoBCTEg3kEl2IkvMzIEemedhr57Koyn99dzIwATvekU94dbybREaG2IlIZqMtE%3D)**

We hope you will be among the first to **[sign up and signal your commitment](http://links.teamjimjordan.com/u/click?_t=1b0bebbf1097419382210464ab5da85c&_m=ae5f79c842c34e5c88385ece74cbea00&_e=pr_Zx2qTBHmSOhUCqPL53eohvDFGwbzAzHhdAk4LQRL10jpacN0f7IU3mS4sMb6Jn5ug03GAlD0jBrvj2GAH5LdHZ5-b-XGQ9vTEkGDNRkYk6Q5Uf5kOFmFYbwijVk8q-gmJNVZMWvtsF00HOei2IgXfcMgKQQMcyM2KbneruHr6sXdJ053ZZ4yKisdo0oAP6WYwOUj74JmTdKiwp_giFUOeGEHSvlb2oVU31vzWgT5wMZXp0BWSw9eN6npZtTyN8bIkW74ljHKcI3SWV3ZC_5A-0_lJSDFOFDRbRIzHiaAsiN5lXFiwX1RsLF3MfdRfDoE5PuPlyW4NsdU-lSSCvO7Bqom42SGSqyPsCFF5vVnD27TL0OPNGVbkvylH9iPp54A99Lg1btKNJMyX22GuOvNbf0GDLOQG1wE-UHKt7-MU81jgKX2_w2SfzAMUhddmJTdYzAhCohCtbIvLNeNvVq1RzmVdx489X-QjVAKrh65KTs2BMsQv1XcHjTtO0WmpT_HTyOslzrL6tUTRvHh_WCblDtkJ7rb8dyu20SQJh_M%3D)** to holding onto our Republican majority in the House.

For Liberty,
[](http://links.teamjimjordan.com/u/click?_t=1b0bebbf1097419382210464ab5da85c&_m=ae5f79c842c34e5c88385ece74cbea00&_e=pr_Zx2qTBHmSOhUCqPL53eohvDFGwbzAzHhdAk4LQRL10jpacN0f7IU3mS4sMb6Jn5ug03GAlD0jBrvj2GAH5LdHZ5-b-XGQ9vTEkGDNRkYk6Q5Uf5kOFmFYbwijVk8q-gmJNVZMWvtsF00HOei2IgXfcMgKQQMcyM2KbneruHr6sXdJ053ZZ4yKisdo0oAP6WYwOUj74JmTdKiwp_giFUOeGEHSvlb2oVU31vzWgT5wMZXp0BWSw9eN6npZtTyN8bIkW74ljHKcI3SWV3ZC_5A-0_lJSDFOFDRbRIzHiaAsiN5lXFiwX1RsLF3MfdRfDoE5PuPlyW4NsdU-lSSCvO7Bqom42SGSqyPsCFF5vVnD27TL0OPNGVbkvylH9iPpyj5H-WpeSC95bXJ1aCkXWd38hfM0Gek_Pi10YAP5--I0kSpgfUR-msNjZNvL38oEBndnfKN_y8LLdVGarGXjMAOT9Y5e-NnM4Q-yL1CpCeJqwaAiayQ_rh4g1PUis7RlwA6Y-5MIdgAD2HMlM2WlhGZihbFsrYDd_a5LqBWtgNM%3D)

We were formed over 50 years ago to support the political agenda of our Party through grassroots organizing and helping elect Democrats using the County Party structure. 2. Resources include mentorship, activist training, and volunteer development for our County Parties. Peter, we’ve hit the ground running in 2024.
I’m in this race to fight for Southern Arizona and our working families — but I know it will take a lot of hard work to unseat my Republican opponent. We spent this weekend on the campaign trail, and I wanted to give you a look into what it’s like.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_011824_busy_actrs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_011824_busy_actrs]
First, I stopped by to see my friends and supporters in Tanque Verde.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_011824_busy_actrs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_011824_busy_actrs]
Afterward, we attended an impressive meeting of citizen groups across LD-17. I spoke about my campaign to give voice to all parts of CD-6.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_011824_busy_actrs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_011824_busy_actrs]
I was proud to sit in on an incredibly productive conversation regarding racial healing hosted by the League of Women Voters at the YWCA.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_011824_busy_actrs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_011824_busy_actrs]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_011824_busy_actrs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_011824_busy_actrs]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_011824_busy_actrs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_011824_busy_actrs]
We celebrated the life and legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. by marching with friends and supporters in Tucson. His tireless pursuit of justice, equality, and civil rights inspires us to fight for a more compassionate, inclusive society.
I’m running so I can work on the issues that matter most to Arizonans. Every voter we reach makes a difference — and every dollar we raise helps us get our message out.
Peter, your grassroots support is the lifeblood of this campaign. Will you help us keep up our fight so we can win in November by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_011824_busy_actrs]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_011824_busy_actrs]
Thank you so much.
Kirsten

She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.

name: Rick Larsen
subject: The human consequences of their choices
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
They simply cannot be trusted
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77315071/450052121/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDIzNDRhMS00N2I2LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IpMqSreqql1cUpoki2lWCQly8PSAFcAIiENcu_MIGpg=&emci=a8b901e2-43b6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=442344a1-47b6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=9494239)
---

| | **As the House faces another continuing resolution to keep our federal government running, this is a good chance to remind ourselves that, if things were to shut down, there would be very real human consequences.** Food assistance to low-income families could be interrupted. Vital transportation projects for Northwest Washington could be paused. Head Start programs might be temporarily shut down. **Those are just a few examples. The big picture is that, if and when a government shuts down, it deals a significant blow not just to our economy, but to the lives of every family trying to just get by right now.** Like I said: _human consequences_. The chaos culture being endlessly pushed by Republicans in Washington D.C. is unsustainable and directly to blame for this loop, of having our government nearly shut down over and over. [**The 2024 election this November is our chance to say loudly and clearly that there is a better way. Please chip in right now to fund our organizing efforts to take back the House later this year.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77315072/450052122/1596212816?refcode=2024-01-18-cr&recurring=&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=442344a1-47b6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDIzNDRhMS00N2I2LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IpMqSreqql1cUpoki2lWCQly8PSAFcAIiENcu_MIGpg=) The fact that this keeps happening reminds me of an old saying: fool me once, shame on you. Fool me twice...well, you know how it goes. **The simple fact is that Republicans in Washington, D.C. right now cannot be trusted to run the government, because they have been looking for every opportunity to run it off the rails.** Our opportunity to do something about it comes in just 11 short months, in this November's general election. [**End the chaos. End the carelessness. Please pitch in just $6 right now to help build grassroots momentum for a big Democratic win this November.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77315073/450052123/1596212816?refcode=2024-01-18-cr&recurring=&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=442344a1-47b6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDIzNDRhMS00N2I2LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IpMqSreqql1cUpoki2lWCQly8PSAFcAIiENcu_MIGpg=) More soon. _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: They simply cannot be trusted | | | | As the House faces another continuing resolution to keep our federal government running, this is a good chance to remind ourselves that, if things were to shut down, there would be very real human consequences. Food assistance to low-income families could be interrupted. Vital transportation projects for Northwest Washington could be paused. Head Start programs might be temporarily shut down. Those are just a few examples. The big picture is that, if and when a government shuts down, it deals a significant blow not just to our economy, but to the lives of every family trying to just get by right now. Like I said: human consequences. The chaos culture being endlessly pushed by Republicans in Washington D.C. is unsustainable and directly to blame for this loop, of having our government nearly shut down over and over. = The fact that this keeps happening reminds me of an old saying: fool me once, shame on you. Fool me twice...well, you know how it goes. The simple fact is that Republicans in Washington, D.C. right now cannot be trusted to run the government, because they have been looking for every opportunity to run it off the rails. Our opportunity to do something about it comes in just 11 short months, in this November's general election. = More soon. name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Binkley?=
subject: URGENT: We need a video from you, Binkley Brigade
body:
| |
---
| | |
# Ryan Binkley: Video From You To America
---
| [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=e8292d200e&e=c1403f41d3)
---
# Binkley Brigade, We Want Your Help
Ryan's strong finish in Iowa caught many people and political pundits off-guard. We can see many people asking 'Who is Ryan Binkley?' Stephen Colbert asked this question last night on The Late Show. 'Election Twitter' is asking the question too. We want you to help give America an answer.

Here's how you can help:

We want you to make a 30 to 40-second video that starts with you saying **"America is asking 'Who is Ryan Binkley? My name is [Name], and I want to answer."**

The video should have three points:
* **"Ryan Binkley is... [how do you know him?]"** Consider the following:
\- My neighbor
\- My friend
\- My pastor
\- My favorite candidate

* **"I am enthusiastic for Ryan's leadership on [political issue important to you]." **Consider the following:
\- Economic growth
\- Inflation
\- Healthcare
\- Border control

* **"That's why I am supporting Ryan Binkley as the Republican nominee for President of the United States."**

Be ready to share your video on your social media**this Saturday, January 20 at 1 PM CT.** Let's flood the Internet with the answer to America's question 'Who is Ryan Binkley?'

### Best Practices:
* Hold your phone camera at the height of your eyes and look at the camera, not the screen.

* Consider what's in the background while you are filming.

* Make sure you are reasonably well-lit (This does not have to be professional; it's great to feel like something real people are doing as a real response)

* Make sure the ratio of your camera matches the social media site you want to post this one. A good rule of thumb is to hold the camera vertically and center your head in the shot. That works for everything.

* If you are a dedicated Facebook user, you may choose to hold your phone horizontally. Either way, don't stress about it, just be authentic.

* Additionally, if for some reason 1 PM on Saturday is not a convenient time for you to make a post, do it at the next convenient time afterward.

Be sure to use the following hashtags:
#whoisryanbinkley
#Binkley2024
#Believe2024

One more thing. We would love for you to email your videos at reachus@binkley2024.com. Please include your first and last name, home city, state, and a sentence that says we have permission to reuse your videos to support Ryan as a candidate. **[You may reuse my video in whole or in part to support Ryan as a candidate].** Use the following subject line for your email: **Video: Who is Ryan Binkley**

This is optional, if you want to make a video but don't feel comfortable with us using it, then you do not have to email it to us.

Let's tell America who Ryan is!

God bless,

Binkley 2024
|
---
|
---
|
---

Why I’m endorsing Nick Melvoin for Congress today.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77315114/450052277/2045957508?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzIyYzcxMDQtNDhiNi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=phhpn9QCrTmH49RVhD-aGY4Q-sDG5tm2Ko0zzMqYgtU=&emci=f59aec75-40b6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=722c7104-48b6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=10481059)

| | Peter, I'm former Congressman Henry Waxman, and **today I'm proud to announce that I'm endorsing Nick Melvoin for Congress.** I've long believed that politics and governance are meant to be forces for good. During my time in Congress, we worked hard to tackle the biggest problems facing everyday Americans. That's why it's so critical that the next generation of policymakers must carry this torch and deliver impactful solutions for the people they represent. **And Nick Melvoin has a history of doing just that.** Nick's record is one of working across lines of difference to increase opportunity for our families and the most vulnerable. **That is why I am proud to endorse him and look forward to him getting things done in Congress for the communities in California's 30th Congressional District.** [**Election Day is only weeks away, and your support can make all the difference in getting Nick to Congress so he can work for us. Join me and stand with Nick Melvoin today with a gift of $3.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77315115/450052278/1183499175?refcode=2024-01-18-waxman&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=722c7104-48b6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzIyYzcxMDQtNDhiNi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=phhpn9QCrTmH49RVhD-aGY4Q-sDG5tm2Ko0zzMqYgtU=) Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: Why I’m endorsing Nick Melvoin for Congress today. | | | | Peter, I'm former Congressman Henry Waxman, and today I'm proud to announce that I'm endorsing Nick Melvoin for Congress. I've long believed that politics and governance are meant to be forces for good. During my time in Congress, we worked hard to tackle the biggest problems facing everyday Americans. That's why it's so critical that the next generation of policymakers must carry this torch and deliver impactful solutions for the people they represent. And Nick Melvoin has a history of doing just that. Nick's record is one of working across lines of difference to increase opportunity for our families and the most vulnerable. That is why I am proud to endorse him and look forward to him getting things done in Congress for the communities in California's 30th Congressional District. = Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = ---|--- = | = = Thank you, Henry Waxman Former U.S. Representative = | | | Paid for by Nick Melvoin for Congress - FEC ID #C00831289 |

body:
Mackenzie For Congress | | | | | [](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=8c83733947&e=5ccada9200)
---
Friends,
As some of you may have seen today, I was on the front page of the Morning Call being condemned by the globalist and open border crowd.
WHY?
**Because I am standing up for you - the American People!**
Yesterday, Rep. Danilo Burgos and the other radical extremists from Philadelphia brought their hate-filled, divisive rhetoric with them to the Lehigh Valley and held a rally against me because I introduced six bills that would crack down on **ILLEGAL IMMIGRATION.**
One group that was attacking me says, “we support the growing movements to abolish immigration enforcement and open the borders.” They do not even try to hide their radical extremist agenda to defund law enforcement and allow for an unfettered flow of drugs, crime, and terrorists through an open southern border.
I won’t back down when it comes to securing our border. That’s why I introduced commonsense legislation to act while Biden, Harris, and Susan Wild sit back and do nothing.
**HERE ARE THE SIX BILLS I INTRODUCED:**

1. **Prohibiting Non-citizens from Voting in Pennsylvania Elections –**[**House Bill 1890**](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=2867270139&e=5ccada9200)

2. **Ending Sanctuary Cities –**[**House Bill 1840**](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=96688927e1&e=5ccada9200)****

3. **Improving Accuracy of Voter Registration Records to Remove Non-citizens –**[**House Bill 1883**](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=b8c3c34d45&e=5ccada9200)****

4. **Requiring E-Verify for All Public Contracts –**[**House Bill 274**](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=a1b7749ac3&e=5ccada9200)****

5. **Reporting Illegal Immigrants to ICE and the Attorney General for Trying to Purchase Firearms Illegally –**[**House Bill 1066**](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=3f8b2b9995&e=5ccada9200)****

6. **Protecting Vulnerable Children from Labor Exploitation –**[**House Bill 1714**](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=f08acac264&e=5ccada9200)****

They held this protest against me because I am running for Congress and I am the ONLY candidate that stands for AMERICA FIRST POLICIES! They know if I win, they lose. They know I pose a threat to Susan Wild’s radical agenda of open borders and sanctuary cities.
These groups called me “xenophobic” and “racist” for wanting to secure our borders, which is typical for them when they know they are losing.
But I know the truth: the words and actions expressed by Rep. Burgos and his radical allies are putting people in jeopardy by allowing for increased drug smuggling, increased human trafficking that exploits people through sex trafficking and forced child labor, increased crime in our communities, and increased targeting of law enforcement.
**READ THE ARTICLE HERE:** [https://www.mcall.com/2024/01/17/a-lehigh-valley-lawmaker-says-his-bills-would-curb-illegal-immigration-activists-say-theyre-anti-immigrant/](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=f698042dd7&e=5ccada9200)
**I am standing on the front lines putting AMERICA FIRST. I need you to join me today and show your support for my campaign so we can defeat Susan Wild and show these radical globalists that we will secure our borders once-and-for-all!**
|

While Nancy’s focus is on becoming Trump’s VP pick, the Lowcountry is getting left in the dust. It feels unreal. Now, Republicans are panicking that Nancy will lose this race because of how blatantly she's exposed the GOP's agenda: putting political aspirations before PEOPLE. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = With you, \- Michael = | | Paid for by Michael B. name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Ronchetti?=
subject: 🚨 Gun Grab Round 2
body:
MLG is at it again | New for dpwillis67@gmail.com | No Doubt About It Podcast | | | | | |
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=2181b31eb1&e=567664f14c)
In this episode, **the spotlight is on New Mexico** as we delve into the misguided attempts by the Governor to end most all gun sales in the state. Join us as we explore the **blatant unconstitutionality of this effort** and discuss whether it will succeed in disarming law abiding New Mexicans.
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=87e0df1bc5&e=567664f14c)
Shifting gears, we touch on recent remarks by Argentinian President Millie, who suggests that collectivism is harming the West. We echo the sentiment, advocating for individual liberty as a cornerstone that makes Western democracies great. The episode addresses the potential pitfalls of falling into socialism and collectivism, emphasizing the risk of economic decline.
| [STREAM NEW EPISODE NOW](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=fc8983e6da&e=567664f14c)
---
To wrap up the conversation, we're joined by Marie Rogerson, one of the founders of Moms for Liberty. Marie is coming to Albuquerque with a mission to encourage more parents to actively participate in their children's school lives. It's a segment that underscores the importance of parental involvement in education.
| [STREAM NEW EPISODE NOW](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=1d58a49e30&e=567664f14c)
---
If you find this episode as thought-provoking as we do, please consider supporting us by liking, subscribing, and leaving a review on your preferred podcast platform.

Don't forget to [subscribe to our YouTube channel](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=bbf572a673&e=567664f14c) for more engaging content.
For those looking to contribute further or snag some exclusive podcast gear, visit [nodoubtaboutitpodcast.com](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=3416a223c1&e=567664f14c).
Thank you for being a part of our community, and we look forward to having you tune in and share your thoughts on these crucial topics!
Best regards,Mark and Krysty Ronchetti
| | | | | | | | | [](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=f38bb0b54e&e=567664f14c)

name: Evergreen Events
subject: Oops... we got our wires crossed
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Time zone correction to our event with Gov. Gretchen Whitmer
| | | | | _Hey Friend,_ _If the email below looks super familiar, that's because we sent it earlier today — with the wrong event time!_ 🤦 _We've corrected it below, but please note that our January 26th event with Governor Gretchen Whitmer starts at 9 a.m.**PT** / 12 p.m. **ET**. Our team works across lots of time zones and overlooked this crucial detail, so apologies for any confusion this created!_ **_[_RSVP for the event here_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5114?t=2&akid=14001%2E53494%2EKeVwax) _, and read more below._ _👇**
---
|
---
[](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/339?t=3&akid=14001%2E53494%2EKeVwax)
---
| | Friend— How did Michigan, a swing state in America's industrial heartland, pass historic climate legislation and set a new standard for clean energy labor protections?

What does it mean for Michigan’s economy and the global fight for climate action?

How did the labor and climate movements work together to make it possible, and what's needed next to protect frontline communities in Michigan?

**If you find these questions intriguing, you'll love our next virtual event on January 26 at 9 a.m. PT/ 12 p.m. ET.**
---
[**RSVP NOW**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5114?t=5&akid=14001%2E53494%2EKeVwax)
---
[](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5114?t=6&akid=14001%2E53494%2EKeVwax)
---
**Next week** , we're sitting down with Michigan Governor Gretchen Whitmer and a panel of movement leaders and policy experts to talk about what this legislation means and how it came to happen that Michigan now has a 100 percent clean energy standard, programs that help low-income communities save energy and pay lower energy bills, a just transition office for workers, and more. **[Join Governor Gretchen Whitmer next week to discuss the new package and learn about what’s needed next in Michigan.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5114?t=7&akid=14001%2E53494%2EKeVwax)**
---
[RSVP](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5114?t=9&akid=14001%2E53494%2EKeVwax)
---
Hope to see you there,

Courtney Bourgoin
Senior Policy and Advocacy Manager, Midwest
Evergreen Action
---
|
---
**P.S.** Can't make it for the live event? **[RSVP anyway](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5114?t=10&akid=14001%2E53494%2EKeVwax)** , and we'll send you a recording.
---
| | | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/337?t=11&akid=14001%2E53494%2EKeVwax)| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/338?t=12&akid=14001%2E53494%2EKeVwax)| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/336?t=13&akid=14001%2E53494%2EKeVwax)| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4575?t=14&akid=14001%2E53494%2EKeVwax)

name: Team Gallego
subject: The Most Dangerous Politician in the World
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
That is a direct quote from Kari Lake herself.
#

_“I’m not just the most dangerous politician in America — I’m the most dangerous politician in the world...”
\- Kari Lake_
We’re not making these up, Peter. That is a direct quote from Kari Lake herself.
And right now, she’s traveling around the country trying to elect Donald Trump. She’s spinning her own story of how she’s going to “save America.” So while she spins, remember:
Kari Lake defends January 6th insurrectionists and called for rigging elections and imprisoning election officials. She spreads the Big Lie, and refuses to concede her last election. She calls for political violence. She makes open, ominous threats.
She's trying to woo the press and appeal to moderates in Arizona, the people she lost in her last campaign. She’s polished, and it might work.
We have to make sure she fails. We’ll make sure Arizona never forgets how dangerous Kari Lake is — in TV ads, radio ads, digital ads, in the media, at town halls, and at the doors.
But we can’t do it without you. We can’t do it if we don’t raise the resources we need to win — to beat Kari Lake.
And that is why we’re humbly asking:
[**Make a donation to Ruben's campaign today. With a donation of $10 or $15 you can power this campaign. And if everyone reading this chipped in, we’d have everything we need to win. But not everyone will donate. That is why we need you.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan24.RCwesN&refcode=em240118-2-90-t2&t=1&akid=1755%2E734936%2Eb4bGZ_)

That is a direct quote from Kari Lake herself. And right now, she’s traveling around the country trying to elect Donald Trump. She’s spinning her own story of how she’s going to “save America.” So while she spins, remember: Kari Lake defends January 6th insurrectionists and called for rigging elections and imprisoning election officials. She spreads the Big Lie, and refuses to concede her last election. She calls for political violence. She makes open, ominous threats. She's trying to woo the press and appeal to moderates in Arizona, the people she lost in her last campaign. She’s polished, and it might work. We have to make sure she fails. We’ll make sure Arizona never forgets how dangerous Kari Lake is — in TV ads, radio ads, digital ads, in the media, at town halls, and at the doors. But we can’t do it without you. name: Team Slotkin
subject: ANOTHER Republican enters the MI Senate race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1041%2E135344%2EBV1IV4)

Team,
Breaking news in the race for Michigan Senate: Justin Amash, a former Congressman who represented the Grand Rapids-area for a decade, has announced that he’s forming an exploratory committee to consider joining the Republican primary for Senate in Michigan.
In announcing his exploratory committee, Amash dunked on the existing field of Republicans in the race – Mike Rogers, James Craig, Sandy Pensler, and Peter Meijer – calling them “uninspired, unserious, and unprepared.” But, like the rest of them, he appears to be reversing some key positions in order to make himself more attractive as a candidate.
Amash famously voted to impeach Donald Trump on abuse of power and obstruction of justice in December 2019, going so far as to write an op-ed in the Washington Post ceremoniously announcing that he was leaving the Republican Party to become an Independent. He left Congress after taking that vote. But now that there is the chance to run for the Senate, Amash has apparently made his peace with the Michigan Republican Party and said today that he plans to re-join the party and run for its nomination.
But while some may remember Amash as a bit of a libertarian, the reality is that his record in Congress was full of extreme and party-line positions well outside of the mainstream in Michigan. Here are a few things you should know about where Amash stands on the issues:
* Amash made a name for himself pushing to limit “government excess and overreach – except when it comes to the issue of abortion. He is passionately anti-choice, including in circumstances of rape and incest. He earned an A+ rating from Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, a leading anti-abortion extremist organization.

* He also has deep ties to the deep-pocketed DeVos family, who have spent millions on Republican politicians to advance their agenda here in Michigan and across the country. They donated over $300,000 to him during his time in Congress.

* In his time in Congress, he worked hard to repeal the Affordable Care Act – which would mean 887,000 people here in Michigan lose their healthcare coverage.

* He also championed a bill that would have forced deep cuts to Social Security and Medicare, apparently putting both in the ‘government overreach’ bucket.

Bottom line: We know that if Justin Amash wins the Republican nomination, he will advocate for the same far-right agenda that hurts Michiganders, which doesn’t make him all that different from every other Republican in this race.
**Meanwhile, Washington Republicans see this seat as a top target, and millions of dollars will flood into our state to try to flip it.** We’re already seeing candidates go up on TV and outside super PACs launch ad campaigns, so if we want to keep Michigan blue for Democrats we need to have the resources to fight back against whoever our opponent is.
[**That’s why we’re asking: Will you chip in $3 or whatever you can to ensure we have the resources to send Elissa to the Senate?](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-jan24.--Kpen&refcode=em240118-2-15&t=2&akid=1041%2E135344%2EBV1IV4)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-jan24.OTW_eo&amount=3&refcode=em240118-2-15&t=21&akid=1041%2E135344%2EBV1IV4)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-jan24.78xAF-&refcode=em240118-2-15&t=22&akid=1041%2E135344%2EBV1IV4)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/122?c0=ebs-em-jan24.hMhQIv&refcode=em240118-2-15&t=23&akid=1041%2E135344%2EBV1IV4)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-jan24.mji4rh&refcode=em240118-2-15&t=24&akid=1041%2E135344%2EBV1IV4)**

Thank you.

name: Karen Dabney
subject: My son's case is moving to trial
body:
I’ve never done something like this before.

Friend,

I've never done something like this before.

But right now my family is up against more than we can handle on our own. And there's nothing I won't do to protect my family - even ask a perfect stranger for help.

Next month, my beloved son - former Deputy James Johnson of the Williamson County, TX Sheriff's Department - will go on trial for manslaughter.

He faces decades in prison for doing his job by the book.

This is a photo of James with his son.
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a6e7004cd3d04581a1eb42d1c1c577a1&_e=bQkJr2VAHghHAcSw7cRAagnYw3uCOcK5KF-CtexI2PfXra3F0916YQFgRiHRD61yg4l312IEko16eyJg1gH7i4yXpmfArSiELrPsACC3jDh3VTPpSaR23yfvQrgS3xzSuWcrroyeSTG8bD9VtXubC2xcmwQWasqI5Gb8TLXW6quDs8iHgUlMXb__iyE8r2vTQuzE_lH0kzdKt460-VBVR4XFF_P1TZvcHI-H1UGobVV-kcnnxi9Qu8dsjuUl87cs2lgTidrG0yZiBnvEG04Qq9T4MtIOFBi7lGj5YRa4OZPgTezDrl9f5rWLhI8aMsvvXEB7o5GEJg5NGkoKk60r7g3w7e4gRJzPTPeBUfjhW5dZqkizV9JbIVMpYnCM0QRK)
James dreamed of being a police officer ever since he took his first "ride-along" in a cop car at the age of 18.

How could we know back then that one day he would find himself the target of a nationwide political movement directed and financed by radical anti-cop billionaire George Soros?

**[If you're sick of our men and women in blue being targeted by anti-cop prosecutors, then I pray you'll find it in your heart to help my son today.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a6e7004cd3d04581a1eb42d1c1c577a1&_e=bQkJr2VAHghHAcSw7cRAagnYw3uCOcK5KF-CtexI2PfXra3F0916YQFgRiHRD61yg4l312IEko16eyJg1gH7i4yXpmfArSiELrPsACC3jDh3VTPpSaR23yfvQrgS3xzSuWcrroyeSTG8bD9VtXubC2xcmwQWasqI5Gb8TLXW6quDs8iHgUlMXb__iyE8r2vTQuzE_lH0kzdKt460-VBVRxPcY1YOJrXYk3zujo73l_GJbCHf2vAcSrYNb8Vj_cacFTfVqr8QJT1BuWup5uhVLcfr706ZetnuOsGBuaK2Ola497tfc0jcB2kFPobgsDsRp8AgiL1hAMi_6ZXO4MkcD6zm19VQYPg2-rKDtmyuQr0LzZEESUhGqV4a_1kZUKev)**

Please let me explain...

On the night of March 28, 2019, my son conducted a routine traffic stop.

But instead of pulling over, the driver - a convicted drug dealer named Javier Ambler - floored the gas and tried to flee.

The suspect's speed quickly exceeded 100 miles per hour. Along the way, he collided with signs, trees, fences, and other roadside objects.

The chase lasted for 22 minutes and spanned two counties. At any moment, another driver or a pedestrian could have been struck and killed by the drug dealer's reckless driving. It was a deadly serious situation.

Eventually, the chase ended when the suspect crashed head-first into a tree.

My son ordered him to get on the ground at gunpoint. He refused. James ordered again, and still the driver did not comply.

That's when another Deputy and an Austin Police Officer arrived on scene. Together, they tried to handcuff the giant man - but he kept resisting and fighting to get back on his feet.

Now, my son is strong. . . but this man was twice his size. . . **nearly 400 pounds.** And even together, the three officers could not subdue him.

So, to put a stop to his fighting and get him handcuffed, they deployed a taser again.

Still nothing - he kept resisting.

They tased him once more and they were finally able to get him into handcuffs.

That's when they noticed that the suspect had lost consciousness. Without missing a beat, they immediately began life-saving tactics and radioed for an ambulance to respond with high priority.

The suspect was rushed to the hospital - but despite the prompt medical attention, he was declared dead on arrival.

According to the medical examiner, Javier Ambler's "morbid obesity" had given him "congestive heart failure" and "hyper intensive cardiovascular disease," - which, in the heat of the struggle, caused his death.

Soon after, an internal affairs investigation by my son's department found that the deputies did nothing wrong. A second independent investigation by the Austin Police Department concluded my son and the other officers committed no such crimes and did not cause Ambler's death.

**But two years after being cleared, James was charged with manslaughter!**

So what changed?

Well, Travis County - where the suspect crashed and the chase concluded - elected a new District Attorney.

A George Soros-funded District Attorney . . . a Bernie Sanders and Elizabeth Warren-endorsed District Attorney . . . a socialist District Attorney, who campaigned not on fighting crime - but on cracking down on police.

His name is Jose Garza, and in just over three years in office, he's charged dozens of cops with crimes while letting countless violent criminals go free!

Somehow, my son James got caught up in something much bigger than himself, and now he's lost his job and his life savings trying to defend his good name in court.

Worst of all, if convicted James's children will lose their dad to decades in prison.

**[Now I hope you can see why I'm swallowing my pride and asking you to help me fight for my son - and my grandchildren - by supporting James' legal defense.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a6e7004cd3d04581a1eb42d1c1c577a1&_e=bQkJr2VAHghHAcSw7cRAagnYw3uCOcK5KF-CtexI2PfXra3F0916YQFgRiHRD61yg4l312IEko16eyJg1gH7i4yXpmfArSiELrPsACC3jDh3VTPpSaR23yfvQrgS3xzSuWcrroyeSTG8bD9VtXubC2xcmwQWasqI5Gb8TLXW6quDs8iHgUlMXb__iyE8r2vTQuzE_lH0kzdKt460-VBVR8mei4h8NBhn28MuxM93ns9RP-KXXkdXGGuqleR8muoXunnPuhrzBa_l7_oR96MoGf6ifLiuNlZdbDgcSP31uOE5jePRo36EBg3ZWfsFHI4HUq3G6vpaMIRLALQ9D8V4bw3-1tPjhbJtgmfsGFpWk04P75i5kckx91gKY3wq-FN6)**

You see, right when we thought all hope was lost - we got a call from Jason Johnson at the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF).

This incredible organization helps innocent cops who are unfairly prosecuted for split-second, life-or-death decisions they make in the line of duty.

They provide legal counsel, expert witnesses. . . whatever is needed to make sure wrongly accused police officers get a fair shake in court.

And they do it all free of charge!

They're funded entirely by the generous support of big-hearted donors like you, who can recognize a miscarriage of justice. . . and want to help fix it.

My son has told me he feels abandoned by the people he dedicated his life to helping. I told him there are people out there who still support the police...

...and I pray you are one of these people and that you will step up and help to fund the $150,000+ in legal fees he's facing.

**[Will you please help my son clear his name by making a generous tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100 or more to LELDF today?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a6e7004cd3d04581a1eb42d1c1c577a1&_e=bQkJr2VAHghHAcSw7cRAagnYw3uCOcK5KF-CtexI2PfXra3F0916YQFgRiHRD61yg4l312IEko16eyJg1gH7i4yXpmfArSiELrPsACC3jDh3VTPpSaR23yfvQrgS3xzSuWcrroyeSTG8bD9VtXubC2xcmwQWasqI5Gb8TLXW6quDs8iHgUlMXb__iyE8r2vTQuzE_lH0kzdKt460-VBVR7aC6SxeUHa97jxZXibWn9hJqzKVnabwgCgVSJr40tFyRq907B-NMQSLWrAL9S5QKdAITR8HzA8OOimKmExvpMcb5yCFjssGyfMVbpXtfqjMGdNdvU0G76tvMD40PecIym9bsnTYM3i9kzahbtXLCSVrTiROESjvdg3hwa4Cfh8J)**

No matter how much you can give to help LELDF fund James' defense, I hope you'll know how grateful I - and my entire family - will be for your help.

With deep appreciation,

**Karen Dabney**

P.S. My son has four children of his own. If James is convicted and receives the maximum sentence of 20 years, they'll be grown adults by the time he's finally set free. He will miss out on everything. And his children will grow up without a dad.

**[So, please- PLEASE - won't you send the best donation you can today to help keep my brave son out of prison and with his children, where he belongs?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a6e7004cd3d04581a1eb42d1c1c577a1&_e=bQkJr2VAHghHAcSw7cRAagnYw3uCOcK5KF-CtexI2PfXra3F0916YQFgRiHRD61yg4l312IEko16eyJg1gH7i4yXpmfArSiELrPsACC3jDh3VTPpSaR23yfvQrgS3xzSuWcrroyeSTG8bD9VtXubC2xcmwQWasqI5Gb8TLXW6quDs8iHgUlMXb__iyE8r2vTQuzE_lH0kzdKt460-VBVR-uMdUw2KvP_LBIQyg3wE9GJin8J7ORcUEk82A8AMmn_C1TDUuCENzTbcRI2M3sTyz-dAi3Kjoc6xz92U7mnQ-rOnl5u6yiNRbrK3iBbmSNm7f7frHE2nnedNYZYfJYTjpBkU7VJnKnxIvPZH3hjT5IsJYxWkbfBJ5_TGnQHyxNI)** Thank you, from the bottom of my heart, THANK YOU!
\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_

clean_body: I’ve never done something like this before. Friend, I've never done something like this before. But right now my family is up against more than we can handle on our own. And there's nothing I won't do to protect my family - even ask a perfect stranger for help. Next month, my beloved son - former Deputy James Johnson of the Williamson County, TX Sheriff's Department - will go on trial for manslaughter. He faces decades in prison for doing his job by the book. This is a photo of James with his son. James dreamed of being a police officer ever since he took his first "ride-along" in a cop car at the age of 18. How could we know back then that one day he would find himself the target of a nationwide political movement directed and financed by radical anti-cop billionaire George Soros? Please let me explain... On the night of March 28, 2019, my son conducted a routine traffic stop. But instead of pulling over, the driver - a convicted drug dealer named Javier Ambler - floored the gas and tried to flee. The suspect's speed quickly exceeded 100 miles per hour. Along the way, he collided with signs, trees, fences, and other roadside objects. The chase lasted for 22 minutes and spanned two counties. At any moment, another driver or a pedestrian could have been struck and killed by the drug dealer's reckless driving. It was a deadly serious situation. Eventually, the chase ended when the suspect crashed head-first into a tree. My son ordered him to get on the ground at gunpoint. He refused. James ordered again, and still the driver did not comply. That's when another Deputy and an Austin Police Officer arrived on scene. Together, they tried to handcuff the giant man - but he kept resisting and fighting to get back on his feet. Now, my son is strong. . . but this man was twice his size. . . nearly 400 pounds. And even together, the three officers could not subdue him. So, to put a stop to his fighting and get him handcuffed, they deployed a taser again. Still nothing - he kept resisting. They tased him once more and they were finally able to get him into handcuffs. That's when they noticed that the suspect had lost consciousness. Without missing a beat, they immediately began life-saving tactics and radioed for an ambulance to respond with high priority. The suspect was rushed to the hospital - but despite the prompt medical attention, he was declared dead on arrival. According to the medical examiner, Javier Ambler's "morbid obesity" had given him "congestive heart failure" and "hyper intensive cardiovascular disease," - which, in the heat of the struggle, caused his death. Soon after, an internal affairs investigation by my son's department found that the deputies did nothing wrong. A second independent investigation by the Austin Police Department concluded my son and the other officers committed no such crimes and did not cause Ambler's death. But two years after being cleared, James was charged with manslaughter! So what changed? Well, Travis County - where the suspect crashed and the chase concluded - elected a new District Attorney. A George Soros-funded District Attorney . . . a Bernie Sanders and Elizabeth Warren-endorsed District Attorney . . . a socialist District Attorney, who campaigned not on fighting crime - but on cracking down on police. His name is Jose Garza, and in just over three years in office, he's charged dozens of cops with crimes while letting countless violent criminals go free! Somehow, my son James got caught up in something much bigger than himself, and now he's lost his job and his life savings trying to defend his good name in court. Worst of all, if convicted James's children will lose their dad to decades in prison. You see, right when we thought all hope was lost - we got a call from Jason Johnson at the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). This incredible organization helps innocent cops who are unfairly prosecuted for split-second, life-or-death decisions they make in the line of duty. They provide legal counsel, expert witnesses. . . whatever is needed to make sure wrongly accused police officers get a fair shake in court. And they do it all free of charge! They're funded entirely by the generous support of big-hearted donors like you, who can recognize a miscarriage of justice. . . and want to help fix it. My son has told me he feels abandoned by the people he dedicated his life to helping. I told him there are people out there who still support the police... ...and I pray you are one of these people and that you will step up and help to fund the $150,000+ in legal fees he's facing. No matter how much you can give to help LELDF fund James' defense, I hope you'll know how grateful I - and my entire family - will be for your help. With deep appreciation, Karen Dabney P.S. My son has four children of his own. If James is convicted and receives the maximum sentence of 20 years, they'll be grown adults by the time he's finally set free. He will miss out on everything. And his children will grow up without a dad. Thank you, from the bottom of my heart, THANK YOU! \---------------- More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit www.PoliceDefense.org. And remember - Blue Lives Matter! (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

clean_body: | | | | You have ONE HOUR LEFT! | Peter, DEADLINE EXTENSION: We are still $3,526 short on our goal! We haven’t seen your contribution come in. But don’t worry - we still have ONE MORE HOUR to hit our January mid-month goal before we have to close the books. Remember, we are in the final stretch before election day. We’re counting on your support. | | | | | | Thank you, Team Lawler | | | | | | Mike Lawler is a Republican running for reelection in New York’s 17th Congressional District. He is passionate about standing with law enforcement and making our communities more safe, protecting Social Security and Medicare, fixing our crumbling roads and bridges, and restoring the SALT deduction to lower taxes and make New York more affordable. | | USE THE ADDRESS BELOW TO CONTRIBUTE BY CHECK LAWLER FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 87 SOUTH SALEM, NY 10590 GET YOUR MIKE LAWLER, NO CUOMO MERCH No New Yorker wants to call our Tappan Zee Bridge the “Governor Mario M. Cuomo Bridge”. Proudly send the message that you want the bridge restored as the Tappan Zee. | Are you interested in staying up-to-date on Mike Lawler's reelection battle? Don't miss out on the latest news and updates from his campaign! By texting "Lawler" to 85007, you can receive regular updates on Mike's campaign, upcoming events, and important news about the race. Text "Lawler" to 85007 today and join the fight for a brighter future for New York! Do you know someone who would be interested in supporting Mike Lawler’s reelection campaign for Congress? Don't keep it to yourself! Spread the word and remind your friends and family to join the fight for America’s future. Simply forward this message to five of your friends or family members who you think would be interested in staying up-to-date with Mike's campaign. FORWARD THIS EMAIL As we get closer to the 2024 election, Mike Lawler is more motivated than ever to continue our journey toward a better future for all New Yorkers. To stay up-to-date with our latest news and events, we encourage you to text "Lawler" to 85007 and follow us on social media, where we share updates, thoughts, and news about our progress. You can also opt others in by providing their email address and we will send them regular updates and important news about the campaign. | go.txting.io/7jAGfc Let's work together to ensure that Mike Lawler has the support he needs to make a real difference for New York! | | | | | \- =

Team Dean is committed to getting Mad’s name on the ballot and securing crucial votes in the Philly suburbs in the upcoming 2024 election. This matters for two reasons:
**FIRST:** Ensuring that Mad is on the ballot means we’re one step closer to ensuring hardworking Pennsylvanians have transparent, ethical representation in DC. Mad is dedicated to putting her constituents first and fighting for legislation that will benefit everyone.

**SECOND:** Getting on the ballot will help turn out strong voters – not only for Mad, but for the 2024 Presidential election and candidates up and down the ballot. Mad is committed to helping create a blue wave in Pennsylvania, and our team is working to increase turnout to make sure it happens.
---

* * *
_Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. | **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

name: Tammy Baldwin (via Mazie Hirono)
subject: Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate will run against me
body:
|
#
_Hi Peter, this is Mazie. Now that the 2024 election has truly begun, it’s critical that we support Senate Democrats in battleground states across the country. My friend and colleague Tammy Baldwin is running for re-election in Wisconsin, and a self-funding Republican recently jumped in the race to try and flip her seat. Please read her urgent message below and split a donation between our campaigns to help her win. Thank you._
* * *
Breaking news, Peter: **National Republicans just confirmed that Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate, Eric Hovde, will run against me in Wisconsin’s Senate race — and he’ll have their full support.** The GOP has spent months recruiting Eric Hovde, who’ll bring a virtually unlimited campaign war chest into this race. He has pledged to spend at least $20 million of his own personal fortune to attack me, buy this seat, and help Republicans pass their extreme agenda, including a national abortion ban. [**Now, the secret’s out — Hovde will run, and I need your support more than ever to compete with his major cash advantage. Will you split an emergency donation to help me defeat the GOP’s #1 pick in this race and defend our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77316779/450058180/-17087835?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240118_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzFlMjY1Mi00ZWI2LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z-MKxsQna5B9J1GueJxB4naUlCP-4ENP80ZhkZBD5JA=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Mazie Hirono and Tammy Baldwin immediately:_ | | | ****[SPLIT $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77316780/450058182/-17087835?express_lane=true&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240118_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzFlMjY1Mi00ZWI2LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z-MKxsQna5B9J1GueJxB4naUlCP-4ENP80ZhkZBD5JA=)****

Please read her urgent message below and split a donation between our campaigns to help her win. Thank you. Breaking news, Peter: National Republicans just confirmed that Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate, Eric Hovde, will run against me in Wisconsin’s Senate race — and he’ll have their full support. The GOP has spent months recruiting Eric Hovde, who’ll bring a virtually unlimited campaign war chest into this race. He has pledged to spend at least $20 million of his own personal fortune to attack me, buy this seat, and help Republicans pass their extreme agenda, including a national abortion ban. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Mazie Hirono and Tammy Baldwin immediately: | | | = ** | **= ** | | **= ** | **= ** | | **= ** | **= ** Our race will determine Senate control in 2024. With West Virginia all but guaranteed to flip red after Sen. Joe Manchin’s retirement, Republicans only need one more seat to retake the majority, and it could all come down to what happens here in Wisconsin. That’s why McConnell made me a top target and Senate Republicans handpicked GOP megamillionaire Eric Hovde to run against me. This is the most pivotal moment of our campaign so far so I’m coming to you for support today: = Thanks for all your support. — Tammy Friends of Mazie Hirono Friends of Mazie Hirono 335 Merchant Street #677 Honolulu, HI 96809 United States

name: Joanna Weiss
subject: Why I love Orange County
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOANNA WEISS FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77316981/450058788/1033648996?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWE2ZDYzMmItNGZiNi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=30rCLz13N90tdBYnGQuHnzBNOrSZTPK2mU30JCS-FsE=)
Peter, I want to share one of my favorite hobbies with you and explain why I love Orange County.

One of my treasured pastimes – that I enjoy solo or with my family and friends – is surfing. We have miles and miles of beautiful coastline in Orange County that are enjoyed by our CA-47 community.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77316984/450058791/1033648996?refcode=em-1.18.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWE2ZDYzMmItNGZiNi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=30rCLz13N90tdBYnGQuHnzBNOrSZTPK2mU30JCS-FsE=)
_At the end of another fun surf session with my daughter and husband!_
I am grateful to have grown up in Orange County and to have built my career here as a _pro bono_ lawyer and community leader. When my husband and I decided to raise our family, we knew that we wanted our children to grow up here too. And now, I have the honor of running for Congress to represent this community that has given me so much.

This is a special place to me and thousands of others who make CA-47 their home. I am dedicated to doing right by them every step of the way during this grassroots campaign, and eventually, in Congress representing them.

There is a lot at stake here in OC and across the country. Our democracy is under attack by far-right extremists – including our likely GOP opponent Scott Baugh – who are doing everything in their power to strip us of reproductive rights, roll back environmental protections for our coastlines, and much more.

All of this is to say Peter, this fight is personal. With less than 50 days until our must-win primary election and only weeks until ballots are sent, I hope you will stick by my side. **[If you are with me, will you chip in $3 or any amount toward our campaign to keep CA-47 blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77316986/450058793/1033648996?refcode=em-1.18.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWE2ZDYzMmItNGZiNi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=30rCLz13N90tdBYnGQuHnzBNOrSZTPK2mU30JCS-FsE=)**

name: Nancy
subject: This phrase changed my life.
body:
| | | [Click here to unsubscribe.](https://links.iterable.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=a8e41c2a970b44d0a291e2cbf8512a7f&_s=887d75527480423c98381bc9f8d7d64e&_t=MCA_JYpZoE2vI3e6niy-ZM7g86FG__GHhdiaX5JCzxYqdCwkZjLdmhQ4rQu68MRIm35WY539y2HRRTjguOUXl2sfGeFhl7GataPfsfZNk_8%3D)
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=a8e41c2a970b44d0a291e2cbf8512a7f&_m=887d75527480423c98381bc9f8d7d64e&_e=BT1dDS3NQYj0hWhMoEGzvujBNLjttldW8b8lu2JJwtjzGxRT0I-mWgcv3gWH9QJTxwEbHbEPgkuNF08CWVtC7dz3wb8gx6CZeTPKharJO202Ur665u9mXwe27EgeuxpgR8D8YfmxP4jEVYvRWc9jNGjQSirHdj2KrLlZCwGbQQ5XcGoQvVNIxEm8S_QY9IR-tNqkjK-JCxPWnu5IzVy8Dgfmqn3zlGtPKYKSLIKeHtJnPfVoeKR959WBCMsVVvJeOk_CKSuPzC2A8tOupzlMOw%3D%3D)
---
| | Alaska is the land of opportunity. That's why I chose it to be my home at the age of 18. I wanted the adventure. I wanted a place to grow and build a family. Every possibility was open to me in this beautiful place and now I want to preserve the same option for more Americans. _**Thats why I'm running for Congress.**_
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=a8e41c2a970b44d0a291e2cbf8512a7f&_m=887d75527480423c98381bc9f8d7d64e&_e=BT1dDS3NQYj0hWhMoEGzvujBNLjttldW8b8lu2JJwtjzGxRT0I-mWgcv3gWH9QJTxwEbHbEPgkuNF08CWVtC7dz3wb8gx6CZeTPKharJO209N52ecly-JPVOBv-TcCCjcxyVU3mzkQCLFhXxQqKpJbycMR-HUHFgaEtYZvgnf9WQp715INXEBcqZsgAO_H6w0F0olp-VkMUMrxfYQmtXht-Ylw1c5XGp4e4XRo8qnRbHknMPEUcezK6qw5MZb4_7g0fnS7bJdy7OwSF9uYqxyw%3D%3D)
---
How many times have you heard the phrase, _"If you want something changed, run for office." _ I finally did because I was concerned for my future, my family's, future, and my community. Now I want to take this same concern to Washington, D.C. because the Biden/Peltola agenda is hurting us. _**We need adults in the room to get this country back on the right track.**_ I'll show up to work with my sleeves rolled up to fight for you and for continued opportunity. **[Please join my team today with a contribution of at least $5 to help me fund the resources necessary to win.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=a8e41c2a970b44d0a291e2cbf8512a7f&_m=887d75527480423c98381bc9f8d7d64e&_e=BT1dDS3NQYj0hWhMoEGzvujBNLjttldW8b8lu2JJwtjzGxRT0I-mWgcv3gWH9QJTxwEbHbEPgkuNF08CWVtC7dz3wb8gx6CZeTPKharJO22Zis0DqBk8IJ_NJWp5K_OA3MLkXKhTr8d7jenkopYKU-3ce42V9tMqqKPvAh-57eYpoKwVF4RKL6sqbMOm7cNaOXrIZ3OT6FAjFKy1TZvvn7gdWfMlmcpNe8PB8uoBjK34nk1K6X6PzxXpAOsfvMKmzGVHk0jTww4BoJXNKHz3aA%3D%3D)** _Let's do this together_ ,**Nancy Dahlstrom** _Candidate for Congress, Alaska At-Large_

clean_body: | | | | | Alaska is the land of opportunity. That's why I chose it to be my home at the age of 18. I wanted the adventure. I wanted a place to grow and build a family. Every possibility was open to me in this beautiful place and now I want to preserve the same option for more Americans. Thats why I'm running for Congress. How many times have you heard the phrase, "If you want something changed, run for office." I finally did because I was concerned for my future, my family's, future, and my community. Now I want to take this same concern to Washington, D.C. because the Biden/Peltola agenda is hurting us. We need adults in the room to get this country back on the right track. I'll show up to work with my sleeves rolled up to fight for you and for continued opportunity. Let's do this together ,Nancy Dahlstrom Candidate for Congress, Alaska At-Large | | | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | |

Team, you might've seen a lot about House Republicans' sham inquiry into President Biden. But in case you missed it, here's everything they've found so far: | ** **
---
_Nothing._
That's because it's an obvious political stunt, and it's a damn shame that the American people's tax dollars are helping fund it. **We deserve better out of our leaders.**
**I have a proven track record of fighting for Floridians on some of the most pressing issues: combating antisemitism, fighting for reproductive freedom, and curbing gun violence.**
[**My effectiveness is exactly why MAGA Republicans want to defeat me in November. With your help, we can keep this seat blue and continue to deliver for folks in Congress. Will you chip in $25 or more to support our campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77317271/450059629/571933754?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.01.18_B1_Evidence_Actives&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDhkMTk2Ni01MGI2LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tBHzIlIZ1LkzqRQIsd9QjY0xwJ9xOto6hAn0m6smyY8=)

Peter,
_As deadly drugs, illegal immigrants, and violent criminals pour over our border ..._

_As hostile enemies around the world take up arms to weaken America ..._

_And as common sense is NOWHERE to be found in the White House ..._

**We need a strong leader who puts America FIRST in the Oval Office again. **

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_011824_imaginethis [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_011824_imaginethis]
It may feel far away, but our freedoms, our rights, and our very democracy are on the ballot in November – we can’t be asleep at the wheel.
Imagine this: You wake up the day after the 2024 Election and find out that Donald Trump beat Joe Biden and is headed back to the White House, and Kari Lake will be our new Arizona Senator.
How did they win? Because Democrats in Arizona didn’t turn out enough voters to protect our democracy.
We’ve got to come together and turn out in bigger numbers than we ever have before; bigger than 2018, 2020, and 2022. It will be a challenge, but you know who’s up for it? Raquel Terán. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_011824_imaginethis]
She knows how to bring together big and diverse coalitions to win tough elections. It’s what she did to help oust Trump in 2020 and defeat Kari Lake in 2022.
Defending democracy will run straight through AZ-03, and Raquel is the right person to lead us and turn out the communities we’ll need to win. If you’re with us, donate a few bucks today >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_011824_imaginethis]
I'M WITH RAQUEL [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_011824_imaginethis]
Sí se puede,
Team Terán

For nearly 20 years, she's been fighting for higher wages for workers, healthcare for all, and better schools for our children.
She's helped build broad and diverse coalitions that have beaten Republicans like Donald Trump, Joe Arpaio, and Kari Lake.
Now she's ready to take the fight to Congress, but we'll need your support to win. Chip in today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_011824_imaginethis]

Hello!

Mayor Trent Staggs, US Senate Candidate, fighting to replace Mitt Romney, received the endorsement of Senator Tommy Tuberville
(Alabama) this past week.

> “I'm proud to endorse Trent Staggs for United States Senate. We don't just need Republicans in Washington, we need conservatives
> who aren't afraid of a fight. I look forward to having Mayor Staggs join myself and Senator Mike Lee in taking on corruption,
> defending the unborn and fighting for the America First agenda."

- Sen. Tommy Tuberville

Read more about it HERE
[https://email.mg.trentstaggs.com/c/eJxs0LuO1DAUxvGniTtHvuWyhQsKpgCJFWgRdKMz9pnEgx0H-4SQt19t6qk_6a9PP3cN3srXx_Rtefv1xUT8rR768fb5B_NW9ma8IUMrB9H1chhGwTBBiFc6VrSZZixstkY7p7WGXjjs70Z3A4gXuHkJKI3rNAtWCWWElKNSRgvR9soJPxoEcQfoVdcYkaaWCi5UCaapti4nFu1MtNZGf2rUpVGXfd_be_6_4H7ujbqsOQYKrjbqshHMPMGRC6_otoKV30OpxCsuQMhx8blUTLgQvwXPS04LHpVXBGohrSzmk0J0x98Sv8_7Nj9gfPl6jD9fWUKas7ewBlasX_cQY6j90BgxfXCcb2veikN7-vBQ__E9lz9YGNmP8tMsWZfT9Sk-WaTrCfweAAD__--kjMA]

In addition to Senator Tuberville, Mayor Staggs has also received several other national conservative endorsements including Mark
Levin, Charlie Kirk (Turning Point Action), Kari Lake, Deputy Director Kash Patel, Ambassador Ric Grenell, and around 100 elected
officials across the state of Utah.

Trent has also received official endorsements from many organizations including: Veterans for Trump, Utah Fraternal Order of
Police, Utah Republic Veterans Caucus, Moms for America, and Oil & Gas Workers Association to name a few.

Join Trent in this fight to send an America First, bold conservative to DC [https://email.mg.trentstaggs.com/c/eJxskLFO8zAURp_G3lpd3ziJ_8HDP5ABJCpQEWyRiS-Jg1MH57ZV3h41I-r8SefTOV0bvFWHsX8-Hd8fdaQPHIvx-PAqvVWVNp8kyaoaykrVtQFJkwux5XUmm3igLAcLQAhFTVB7r8EDaI-qAjRFiUAlyGARUINSBlEXAPsKO_BGk4Mv5yoshYap33OmEy_s-n7Zd2mS0Q7M8yKK_wIbgc2fXWBzSfF8YqIssJExbS5Qrj85vgzX8zA68-9pNW8HOREPyVs3B5mtn68hxrBUtdDQ33y2uyWdc0d2E9yF5bK7pvxNWbK9ke9i2XZpau_WY0vcboV-AwAA___yvXNJ]

We look forward to working with you soon in this effort to have smaller government, a stronger economy, and safer families.

Thank you,

Trent Staggs

Friend, Across the country, local and state lawmakers are facing pressure to stay silent as the U.S. government supports the genocide of Palestinians. Friend, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It's a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden's desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. **It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years.** For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden's to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it's not just the FBI, it's the Department of Justice as well. I heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney's offices in Brookly, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. **As I 've been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE!** While words don't have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. **CONSPIRACY NOUN** con*spir*a*cy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in "conspiracy theories" like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... _but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family._

name: Gaby, BC4S
subject: It’s looking like this could be one of the most expensive Senate races ever
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1740%2E552475%2Es_Azjn)
Hey Peter, it’s Gaby, Bob Casey’s Digital Director.
I’ll be honest — I didn’t ~love~ hearing we were outraised by our opponent David McCormick. He even cut a million-dollar check to his campaign. 😨
That’s why we set an immediate rapid response goal of $75,000 to stay competitive with the millions upon millions of dollars our opponent, Mitch McConnell, and Republican super PACs are about to pour into this race. And this is just the beginning, so we need to be ready.
**I know this team has what it takes to reach this goal!! But we need to work together to do it. 💪**
[**So now I’m calling on our strongest online supporters (that’s you!) to chip in $10 or more to help us reach our goal and keep PA — and the Senate — blue this year.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240118-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240118-2&refcode2=1740_552475_s_Azjn&akid=1740%2E552475%2Es_Azjn)
When looking over our digital fundraising numbers, one number stuck out to me — _92% of our contributions from last quarter were under $100_. That means that folks chipping in $10 here or $15 there to our emails, texts, and online ads truly power our work to re-elect Bob.
**But it’ll take a lot of folks chipping in to reach our $75,000 goal, and the stakes couldn’t be higher, especially now that we’ve been outraised. I’m relying on this team to turn things around.**
[**If you’re with us and ready to keep Bob in the Senate fighting for Pennsylvania families, make a contribution to help us reach our goal today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240118-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240118-2&refcode2=1740_552475_s_Azjn&akid=1740%2E552475%2Es_Azjn)
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240118-2?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20240118-2-el&refcode2=1740_552475_s_Azjn&akid=1740%2E552475%2Es_Azjn) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240118-2?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20240118-2-el&refcode2=1740_552475_s_Azjn&akid=1740%2E552475%2Es_Azjn) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240118-2?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20240118-2-el&refcode2=1740_552475_s_Azjn&akid=1740%2E552475%2Es_Azjn) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240118-2?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20240118-2-el&refcode2=1740_552475_s_Azjn&akid=1740%2E552475%2Es_Azjn) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240118-2?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20240118-2-el&refcode2=1740_552475_s_Azjn&akid=1740%2E552475%2Es_Azjn) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240118-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240118-2&refcode2=1740_552475_s_Azjn&akid=1740%2E552475%2Es_Azjn)

subject: An unavoidable challenge in 2024

body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13456?t=1011?refcode=email-20240118&akid=5210%2E5885482%2ERb1RjX ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Right-wing media has been smearing progressives and progressive policies
for years. We saw it ramp up on Fox News after Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
won in 2018.

Since then, Fox, Ted Cruz, Tucker Carlson and the rest of the GOP
extremism media machine have created loads of propaganda about American
cities in particular, especially as progressives filled city councils and
mayors offices. Right-wing rhetoric is anti-immigrant, racist, and
fear-mongering, using buzzwords like “sanctuary cities” to scare its
viewers.

Republicans have been wielding local power with the support of big money
special interests for decades, but Our Revolution is organizing to take
back local power and deliver real change at the level of government
closest to people’s lives. Last year, we helped elect a progressive
supermajority in St. Louis and Mayor Brandon Johnson in Chicago — and now
we’re rolling out powerful progressive slates for 2024 in cities like
Sacramento and San Francisco.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13456?t=1048?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240118&akid=5210%2E5885482%2ERb1RjX ]Our Revolution is leading the work of building progressive cities, but we
can only be successful with your support. Can you chip in today to fund
our grassroots organizing to defeat right-wing narratives and elect local
progressives?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13456?t=1035?express_lane=true&amount=12&refcode=email-20240118&akid=5210%2E5885482%2ERb1RjX ]CHIP IN $12 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13456?t=1036?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240118&akid=5210%2E5885482%2ERb1RjX ]CHIP IN $27

In St. Louis, our progressive champions immediately got to work — rolling
out a universal basic income pilot program and taking up the fight for
tenants, countering big money and real estate developers who look to
profit from a housing crisis.

In Chicago, Mayor Johnson worked directly with Our Revolution and our
movement to end the sub-minimum wage for tipped workers.

This is what we can accomplish when we mobilize, organize, and break
through the propaganda and deep pockets of the right-wing. And we’re ready
to do it again this year with progressive slates in San Francisco,
Sacramento, Alameda County, and plenty more to come across the country.

But we’re up against the extreme GOP, big money corporate special
interests, Fox News, and a Democratic Party that needs to be completely
transformed. We can only continue our work, and make 2024 a successful
election year, with your help.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13456?t=1046?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240118&akid=5210%2E5885482%2ERb1RjX ]We make every dollar count and your contribution today will go a long way
to fuel Our Revolution’s work in 2024 to elect and re-elect progressives.
Where our political system and media fail, we must organize our way to a
better future. Our average contribution is just $16.46 because we’re
completely grassroots-funded, so anything you can give will make a huge
difference!

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

As we gear up for this critical election year, Mondaire wants to know what your priorities are.
Friend,

Mondaire has always said his campaign for Congress isn’t about himself. He’s running to represent your interests and fight for what’s right.

Election year is officially upon us, and Mondaire is ready to flip NY-17 so he can return to Congress and fight to defend reproductive rights, expand access to health care, create good-paying jobs, and so much more. But as he begins to shape his plans for this year and beyond—Mondaire wants to hear from this grassroots team.

GIANFORTE ANNOUNCES RUN FOR SECOND TERM SOURCE: MONTANA FREE PRESS This week, Greg Gianforte officially threw his hat into the ring for 2024. While this isn’t a surprise, his official announcement gives GOP megadonors the OK to dump massive amounts of cash into his campaign — on top of the millions of dollars of his own money he’ll use to buy this seat for a second time. Peter, a windfall of cash is headed for Greg Gianforte’s already-deep pockets, and we need to show him that this Montana Movement isn’t going anywhere. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Greg Gianforte isn't just out of touch; he's dangerous. Law enforcement response to Uvalde school shooting was a 'failure,' DOJ says
Peter, it’s Roland Gutierrez.
A new report from the U.S. Justice Department confirms what we already knew to be true: Children’ lives may have been saved if officers had responded differently to the gunman who opened fire at Robb Elementary School in 2022.
The events of that day scarred our nation, the state of Texas, and the entire Uvalde community.
The report from DOJ proves that these failures don’t happen in a vacuum. They happen because police are failed to act when millions of guns circulate in our communities.
I represent Uvalde. I feel the pain. I see the devastation. And I’m not going to stop fighting until we eradicate gun violence once and for all. Enough is enough.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/106842/images/roland%20uvalde.jpg]
Loose Republican gun laws are killing our children. And Ted Cruz is directly responsible.
