It may feel like November is ages away; it feels that way for me too. Unfortunately, modern campaign fundraising in a swing state like Michigan means that 10 months is hardly any time at all. Republicans and my opponents have already begun spending big in their efforts to unseat me.

My team and I are ready to do what it takes to hold this seat in November. We know how important it is to be prepared early and how important West Michigan will be this year. name: Team Kennedy
subject: New Poll: Undeniable Front-Runner
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
RFK Jr.'s enduring favorability stems from his policy stances that resonate with all Americans.

|
---
| | | **RFK Jr.'s enduring favorability stems from his policy stances that resonate with all Americans.
**
---

[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=favor_1_18_24_email_1_1_nd&n=1)

Dear Peter,
**In a recent Gallup poll, Robert F. Kennedy Jr. emerged as the undeniable front-runner with a favorability rating of 52%.**
This advantage from the esteemed Gallup polling organization places RFK Jr. decisively ahead of other candidates, with Trump at 42% and Biden at 41%, __emphasizing the undeniable viability of our campaign.__
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=favor_1_18_24_email_1_1_nd&n=2)
RFK Jr.'s enduring favorability stems from his policy stances that resonate with all Americans. He stands proudly as an advocate for an anti-war agenda, rejecting the cycle of perpetual conflict that has drained our nation's resources and spirit.
His vocal opposition to corruption, corporate greed, and the political establishment has struck a chord with voters across party lines. RFK Jr. embodies the change we so desperately need, promising a government that works for the people, not special interests.
But, this is no time to rest on our laurels. To turn this favorability into a resounding success, we urgently need your support. First and foremost, we must ensure RFK Jr.'s name is on the ballot in all 50 states.
While the candidates from the two major parties are automatically on the ballot, we face a different challenge. To secure our spot, we need to mobilize a 50-state ground game, _and this effort comes with a price tag of $18 million._
**Additionally, we find ourselves behind on our January monthly goal of $3.5M.** This setback threatens the momentum we've gained and hampers our ability to launch impactful ballot access campaigns nationwide.
**Your financial support is the lifeblood of our campaign.** [**Every dollar brings us closer to securing ballot access and reaching our monthly goal.**](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=favor_1_18_24_email_1_1_nd&n=3)

[CONTRIBUTE $1000 >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=1000&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=favor_1_18_24_email_1_1_nd&n=8)
[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=favor_1_18_24_email_1_1_nd&n=9)
We cannot afford to miss this opportunity. With RFK Jr. at the forefront, we have the chance to reshape the political landscape, but we need your immediate support to make it happen.
[**Please make your donation now.**](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=favor_1_18_24_email_1_1_nd&n=10) **Every dollar brings us closer to achieving our $3.5 million January goal and securing our spot on the ballot.**

name: Kim Nguyen-Penaloza
subject: I won’t stand by and let her flip-flop again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kim Nguyen for Congress
body:
| | Hi, I’m reaching out because this week, Michelle changed her mind about her public abortion stance. Again.

She can’t flip-flop her way out of this one just because the GOP is panicking over abortion. She has been and always will be against abortion with NO exceptions. She is lying to our faces.

[What do you say, are you with me? Let me know and keep scrolling to read the team’s original message →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77318953/450064990/1104749995?refcode=KBN_EM_SV_90DO_240118_1_2&refcode2=ff917e94-55b6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&contactdata=p5c6fP+iI/nMMs3sJQx0JJGZOPjnRAReUEgrZqXaYIc2wL/BPx/koJNMAcjvjHKZ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmY5MTdlOTQtNTViNi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GBxnmkmjtUfEKKpSgXtLUMZ6KBMMSt3USta_IGGFdUY=&emci=c16b8a53-52b6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=ff917e94-55b6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=9674971)

– Kim

_Begin forwarded message:_

Michelle Steel has had a busy week flip-flopping on a national abortion ban. Again.

On Friday, right after talking to the _New York Times_ about how she supports exceptions to abortion restrictions, **Michelle signed onto a national abortion ban with no exceptions.**

**We know the truth: Michelle will do and say anything to stay in Congress, and we deserve better.**

[What do you think: Do Orange County families deserve a lifelong pro-choice representative who won’t change her mind just to win political points?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77318954/450064991/1104749995?refcode=KBN_EM_SV_90DO_240118_1_2&refcode2=ff917e94-55b6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&contactdata=p5c6fP+iI/nMMs3sJQx0JJGZOPjnRAReUEgrZqXaYIc2wL/BPx/koJNMAcjvjHKZ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmY5MTdlOTQtNTViNi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GBxnmkmjtUfEKKpSgXtLUMZ6KBMMSt3USta_IGGFdUY=&emci=c16b8a53-52b6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=ff917e94-55b6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=9674971)
| | ****[YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77318955/450064992/1104749995?refcode=KBN_EM_SV_90DO_240118_1_2&refcode2=ff917e94-55b6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&contactdata=p5c6fP+iI/nMMs3sJQx0JJGZOPjnRAReUEgrZqXaYIc2wL/BPx/koJNMAcjvjHKZ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmY5MTdlOTQtNTViNi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GBxnmkmjtUfEKKpSgXtLUMZ6KBMMSt3USta_IGGFdUY=&emci=c16b8a53-52b6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=ff917e94-55b6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=9674971)****
---
| ****[NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77318956/450064998/1104749995?refcode=KBN_EM_SV_90DO_240118_1_2&refcode2=ff917e94-55b6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&contactdata=p5c6fP+iI/nMMs3sJQx0JJGZOPjnRAReUEgrZqXaYIc2wL/BPx/koJNMAcjvjHKZ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmY5MTdlOTQtNTViNi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GBxnmkmjtUfEKKpSgXtLUMZ6KBMMSt3USta_IGGFdUY=&emci=c16b8a53-52b6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=ff917e94-55b6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=9674971)****
---

Steel has publicly changed her stance on reproductive rights repeatedly, and honestly, we’re getting whiplash. It’s time for her to be honest and just admit that she supports a full federal ban on abortion.

But she can’t do that because she _knows_ it’s a losing position with voters.

We need a representative who truly identifies with what we want, and who wants to protect our right to make decisions about our bodies (we’re talking about Kim):
**In the race for Rep. Michelle Steel’s seat, how abortion is shaping up to be a key issue**

“I’m infinity percent pro-choice. I am someone who is a survivor of rape and had a miscarriage last year ... and is 14 days postpartum,” said Garden Grove Councilmember Kim Nguyen-Penaloza.

_The Orange County Register_

name: Adam Schiff
subject: The Senate filibuster
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=5101%2E5257348%2EZHFx5V ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek —

This is a long email about the Senate filibuster. I hope that by the time
you’re done reading it:

1. You’ll be as convinced as I am that we should do away with this
archaic Senate rule that appears nowhere within the Constitution, and
2. [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=jan2024_abs_em.jV4jRE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240118_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=5101%2E5257348%2EZHFx5V ]You’ll chip in a few dollars to my Senate campaign to help me get
rid of it once and for all.

The difference between the progress we made and the progress we should
have made when Democrats controlled both chambers of Congress in Joe
Biden’s first two years was the filibuster.

Overturning Citizens United. Ending partisan gerrymandering. Guaranteeing
voting rights. Curbing gun violence.

Why? Because of the ridiculous Jim Crow relic that says when a vote is
59-41, the side with 41 wins. It is a relic of the ugliest part of our
history, used to deny civil and voting rights – the filibuster.

The filibuster is not written in the Constitution and has historically
been rarely used. Throughout the filibuster’s history, Southern senators
have used it to block civil rights bills and anti-lynching legislation.
That’s the real filibuster in action.

Nowadays, the filibuster is used to stop anything that can’t get 60 votes
or pass through the budget bill.

Like the John Lewis For the People Act. Or the Freedom to Vote Act.

The GOP is abusing the Senate filibuster to ever more startling degrees.
It is blocking what overwhelming majorities of Americans want from their
government.

It’s damn wrong. And I intend to do something about it.

As a United States Senator, I will fight from within the chamber to do
away with this archaic tool on day one.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240118_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1005&akid=5101%2E5257348%2EZHFx5V ]I hope you’re convinced that the Senate filibuster has to be abolished
for the sake of our democracy and the good of our country. Please, chip in
$10 or
anything you can spare to help me make it happen.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: [ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Derek — This is a long email about the Senate filibuster. I hope that by the time you’re done reading it: 1. You’ll be as convinced as I am that we should do away with this archaic Senate rule that appears nowhere within the Constitution, and 2. [ ]You’ll chip in a few dollars to my Senate campaign to help me get rid of it once and for all. The difference between the progress we made and the progress we should have made when Democrats controlled both chambers of Congress in Joe Biden’s first two years was the filibuster. Overturning Citizens United. Ending partisan gerrymandering. Guaranteeing voting rights. Curbing gun violence. Why? Because of the ridiculous Jim Crow relic that says when a vote is 59-41, the side with 41 wins. It is a relic of the ugliest part of our history, used to deny civil and voting rights – the filibuster. The filibuster is not written in the Constitution and has historically been rarely used. Throughout the filibuster’s history, Southern senators have used it to block civil rights bills and anti-lynching legislation. That’s the real filibuster in action. Nowadays, the filibuster is used to stop anything that can’t get 60 votes or pass through the budget bill. Like the John Lewis For the People Act. Or the Freedom to Vote Act. The GOP is abusing the Senate filibuster to ever more startling degrees. It is blocking what overwhelming majorities of Americans want from their government. It’s damn wrong. And I intend to do something about it. As a United States Senator, I will fight from within the chamber to do away with this archaic tool on day one. [ ]I hope you’re convinced that the Senate filibuster has to be abolished for the sake of our democracy and the good of our country. Please, chip in $10 or anything you can spare to help me make it happen. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $10 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $25 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $50 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $100 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $250 [ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT The simple truth is that as long as the filibuster remains, we will not make progress quickly enough on the many compounding crises our country faces — from gun violence to reproductive freedom to the climate crisis to our very democracy. We need to act. Thanks for joining me. — Adam [ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner [ ]DONATE WEEKLY 135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502 [ ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ ]Privacy Policy PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

name: Tim Kaine
subject: We need to talk about democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77319106/450065578/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmFhMDAwMS01NmI2LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_dbHjB-KkO1NNAsSlpkRkcVle7qzao3f85Sm2-pnR_Q=&emci=c68577bc-2bb6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=2baa0001-56b6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter, we need to talk about democracy.

Nearly 250 years ago, our country was founded on a set of democratic ideals, with the North Star of true equality to work towards. Over time, those democratic ideals have been tested — and time and time again, they have held strong as we’ve fought to achieve a more perfect Union.

But in the past several years, our democracy has seen _unprecedented_ stress tests — driven by a combination of power-hungry right-wing politicians and a disease of bystanderism that has allowed bad faith actions to prevail.

**From the violent insurrection at the Capitol three years ago to the continuous assaults on voting rights in GOP legislatures across the country, it has become clear that we are in an existential fight for democracy.**

If you know me, you know I am an optimist. I truly believe that the vast majority of Americans believe in our founding ideals, trust in the democratic system, and want to preserve free and fair elections.

_But we’re facing extraordinary circumstances that require each and every one of us to commit to this fight — not stand by idly and hope it all turns out well._

What we do in 2024 will have a lasting impact on our nation. We can either band together and speak up against the forces that seek to tear down democracy, or we can stand by and let them win.

**Will you speak up with me?**

[**_Today, I’m asking you to take action to protect our democracy by making a split donation between the GA Dems and me. Your support will go directly towards sending me back to the Senate and holding our Democratic majority — something we absolutely must do if we have any hope of securing democracy for generations to come.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77319107/450065579/417785495?refcode=20240118.2_TK_1AA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmFhMDAwMS01NmI2LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_dbHjB-KkO1NNAsSlpkRkcVle7qzao3f85Sm2-pnR_Q=)**_

I’m incredibly grateful to have you on this team, and whether you’re able to donate or not, I hope you will keep reading these emails and staying in touch as we get closer to November.

The chapter of 2024 is not yet written, but what we choose to do this year will determine the future of our nation — so thank you for standing with me on this critical issue.

Tim Kaine
---
|

I know you're smart as a whip, Friend. Can you do me a favor then? My FIRST deadline of 2024 (this is a big deal!) is just around the corner, and I'm short a few supporters. Can you chip in just a few extra bucks? | Wow, thank you for jumping on this. I really appreciate your support. We can start out 2024 stronger than ever. God Bless, Senator John Kennedy Folks, our country was founded by geniuses but it's being run by idiots. And if you trust the government, well then you obviously failed history class. Paid for by John Kennedy for Us John Kennedy for Us P.O. Box 80418 Baton Rouge, LA 70808 If you would like to send donation by mail, Don't want to receive our emails anymore?**

name: Team Jayapal
subject: No wonder AIPAC wants to silence Pramila
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
The filibuster has stood in the way of countless paths to reform for far too long. It’s time for this draconian tool of voter suppression to end.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240118-3406-footer&t=1&akid=3406%2E420207%2EuiPvYg)
Peter,
Earlier this month, we asked you and other dedicated supporters to voice what issues matter most to you in our **2024 Congressional Priorities Survey** _— and the results are in._
An overwhelming majority of you all voiced the urgent need for us to pass bold legislation like comprehensive immigration reform, universal health care, codifying Roe v. Wade, and more.
**But we all know the key to passing all of this and more lies in abolishing the filibuster****, Peter. **[**Add your name to our petition to demand Congress abolish the filibuster so that we can pass bold legislation for working people.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/abolish_filibuster_now/?source=em20240118-3406&t=2&akid=3406%2E420207%2EuiPvYg)
**[Abolish the filibuster ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/abolish_filibuster_now/?source=em20240118-3406&t=3&akid=3406%2E420207%2EuiPvYg)**
The filibuster has stood in the way of countless paths to reform for _far too long._ By ending this draconian tool, we can eliminate dark money from our elections and rid our government of arbitrary voter suppression laws.
And we won’t just stop there, Peter. **Once we end the filibuster, we will finally be able to pass people-first legislation that meets the urgency of the issues we face today.**
_No wonder_ Republican donors at AIPAC want to unseat progressives like Pramila. They see her unapologetic fight to build a democracy rooted in love, compassion, and true representation. **[So if you stand with our movement, please add your name and amplify our call to abolish the filibuster and finally pass people-first legislation.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/abolish_filibuster_now/?source=em20240118-3406&t=4&akid=3406%2E420207%2EuiPvYg)**
**[Add your name ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/abolish_filibuster_now/?source=em20240118-3406&t=5&akid=3406%2E420207%2EuiPvYg)**
Together,
Team Jayapal

name: Cameron F
subject: Interested in digital organizing? Join our training!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP35/1/80994/images/CADEM%20Logo%20%281%29.png]
Hey fellow Democrats!
It's Cameron, the Digital Organizing Manager with CADEM's Forever Organizing team. I'm excited to invite you to our first-ever Digital Organizing Training!
https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/599997/ [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/599997/]
In just a few days, I'll be sharing why Digital Organizing is a tool powerful enough to win battleground Congressional districts across California, taking back our House majority, and saving Democracy. Use this link to secure your place for the training! [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/599997/]
Digital Organizing encompases all things voter-outreach through the internet, social media, and personal devices. Since 2008, digital organizing has been the deciding factor in every major election. In 2024, digital outreach will matter more than ever before. We can't afford to hold back.
With an increasing number of households and voters relying on social media, texting, and personal devices to stay up-to-date on the election, digital organizing will be critical to winning elections in every corner of California.
That's why CADEM is investing in reaching voters digitally where it counts the most -- in every winnable red-to-blue California Congressional district, and that includes you!
This training will provide:
*
Background
on
Digital
Organizing
and
its
value
*
Information,
resources,
and
know-how
to
mobilize
voters
online
*
Social
media
platform
overview
*
Introduction
to
our
own
organizing
app,
CADEM
Connect!
Whether you're a super-star volunteer, neighborhood activist, or just looking for a way to get involved for the first time, this is the best way to start your digital organizing journey.
So join us! Next Thursday, January 25th, remotely via Zoom. Any questions, comments, concerns, or ideas? Feel free to respond to this email, and I'll get back to you as soon as possible! [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/599997/]
RSVP LINK → [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/599997/]
Thanks Friend, and I'm looking forward to seeing you very soon!
- Cameron
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://twitter.com/ [https://twitter.com/] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]
Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www.cadem.org Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee.
California Democratic Party
1830 9th St
Sacramento, CA 95811
United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Min=20for=20Congress?=
subject: LA Times Endorses Dave Min
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1c003949c57c/la-times-endorses-dave-min-15668772?e=7017cc100e)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | _The 47th Congressional District in Orange County belongs to Democrats right now. But with Rep. Katie Porter (D-Irvine) running for the U.S. Senate rather than reelection, the race is more of a toss-up._ _That’s a troubling notion. Aside from legitimate fears of what could happen to civil rights, basic social services and democracy if the GOP gains more seats in the House of Representatives, the leading Republican running for the seat, Scott Baugh, is out of touch with the district. The area was once solidly Republican but has been shifting leftward in recent years and is now a swing district with a mix of views, encompassing the coast from Laguna Beach to Seal Beach, as well as Costa Mesa and Irvine._ _Baugh is a former state assemblyman who ran unsuccessfully for Congress twice. That included 2022, when he lost to Porter. His belief that there should be a federal law restricting abortion rights is out of keeping with voters’ values — and with the rights of women to have autonomy over their own bodies. He opposed the federal Respect for Marriage Act, which was signed into law in 2022 and codified the right for same-sex and interracial couples to marry, and he opposes banning assault weapons._ _He recently said that “wokism” was more of a threat to religious freedom than both world wars; perhaps if he had lived through the Holocaust, he would know better. In the 1990s, he faced federal felony charges over campaign finance violations; those were later reduced to civil violations for which he paid close to $50,000._ _Nine other people are seeking the seat in the March primary, including two locally prominent Democrats: state Sen. Dave Min (D-Irvine) and Joanna Weiss, an attorney and founder of a social- and political-action nonprofit, Women for American Values and Ethics._ _The platforms of Min and Weiss are similar — both intend to protect a woman’s right to abortion at the federal level and say they are ready to battle climate change, work toward immigration reform and push sensible gun regulation. The difference is in their leadership skills, legislative experience and ability to achieve results and communicate a sense of cooperation._ _Min, an affable lawmaker who has authored successful bills on the environment and guns, has the clear advantage here. Before his political career, Min was, like Porter (who has endorsed his candidacy), a professor at UC Irvine law school. And like Porter, he should be elected to represent the 47th District._ _Min has not introduced as many bills as some of his colleagues during his three years in Sacramento, but he has authored bills on important issues. One bill, now under consideration, would set up a system for phasing out offshore oil and gas drilling in state waters. Another, signed into law in 2022, bans gun and ammunition sales on state-owned land._ _There is one trouble spot in Min’s history, which Weiss is already using in her campaign: He was arrested last May on suspicion of drunk driving in Sacramento and later pleaded guilty to a misdemeanor. Min was pulled over after he stopped at a red light to check cross-traffic, but then proceeded through the intersection while the light was still red and with his headlights off._ _It wasn’t a trivial incident, but to his credit, Min never treated it that way. He immediately made a straightforward public statement about his arrest and apologized. He didn’t try to make excuses or pretend that the arrest was unfair, overblown or an attack on liberalism. He has completed court-ordered community service and says that although he never had a problem with alcohol, he immediately stopped drinking. Too many political events — that’s where he was drinking before the arrest — are alcohol-infused, he said. He also, of his own accord, entered into therapy. More politicians who err badly should follow his example._ _Min inspires confidence that he won’t repeat the mistake — and that he would be an excellent member of Congress._
---
| | **Our mailing address is:**
PO Box 5959, Irvine, CA 92616

clean_body: | | | | | | | | The 47th Congressional District in Orange County belongs to Democrats right now. But with Rep. Katie Porter (D-Irvine) running for the U.S. Senate rather than reelection, the race is more of a toss-up. That’s a troubling notion. Aside from legitimate fears of what could happen to civil rights, basic social services and democracy if the GOP gains more seats in the House of Representatives, the leading Republican running for the seat, Scott Baugh, is out of touch with the district. The area was once solidly Republican but has been shifting leftward in recent years and is now a swing district with a mix of views, encompassing the coast from Laguna Beach to Seal Beach, as well as Costa Mesa and Irvine. Baugh is a former state assemblyman who ran unsuccessfully for Congress twice. That included 2022, when he lost to Porter. His belief that there should be a federal law restricting abortion rights is out of keeping with voters’ values — and with the rights of women to have autonomy over their own bodies. He opposed the federal Respect for Marriage Act, which was signed into law in 2022 and codified the right for same-sex and interracial couples to marry, and he opposes banning assault weapons. He recently said that “wokism” was more of a threat to religious freedom than both world wars; perhaps if he had lived through the Holocaust, he would know better. In the 1990s, he faced federal felony charges over campaign finance violations; those were later reduced to civil violations for which he paid close to $50,000. Nine other people are seeking the seat in the March primary, including two locally prominent Democrats: state Sen. Dave Min (D-Irvine) and Joanna Weiss, an attorney and founder of a social- and political-action nonprofit, Women for American Values and Ethics. The platforms of Min and Weiss are similar — both intend to protect a woman’s right to abortion at the federal level and say they are ready to battle climate change, work toward immigration reform and push sensible gun regulation. The difference is in their leadership skills, legislative experience and ability to achieve results and communicate a sense of cooperation. Min, an affable lawmaker who has authored successful bills on the environment and guns, has the clear advantage here. Before his political career, Min was, like Porter (who has endorsed his candidacy), a professor at UC Irvine law school. And like Porter, he should be elected to represent the 47th District. Min has not introduced as many bills as some of his colleagues during his three years in Sacramento, but he has authored bills on important issues. One bill, now under consideration, would set up a system for phasing out offshore oil and gas drilling in state waters. Another, signed into law in 2022, bans gun and ammunition sales on state-owned land. There is one trouble spot in Min’s history, which Weiss is already using in her campaign: He was arrested last May on suspicion of drunk driving in Sacramento and later pleaded guilty to a misdemeanor. Min was pulled over after he stopped at a red light to check cross-traffic, but then proceeded through the intersection while the light was still red and with his headlights off. It wasn’t a trivial incident, but to his credit, Min never treated it that way. He immediately made a straightforward public statement about his arrest and apologized. He didn’t try to make excuses or pretend that the arrest was unfair, overblown or an attack on liberalism. He has completed court-ordered community service and says that although he never had a problem with alcohol, he immediately stopped drinking. Too many political events — that’s where he was drinking before the arrest — are alcohol-infused, he said. He also, of his own accord, entered into therapy. More politicians who err badly should follow his example. Min inspires confidence that he won’t repeat the mistake — and that he would be an excellent member of Congress. | | Our mailing address is: PO Box 5959, Irvine, CA 92616 | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Dave Min For Senate PO Box 5959 Irvine, CA 92616-5959 * USA

clean_body: Now that it’s officially election year, Matt wants to make sure your voice is at the forefront of our campaign for the future of northeastern Pennsylvania. | Peter, Now that it’s officially election year, Matt wants to make sure your voice is at the forefront of our campaign for the future of northeastern Pennsylvania. Matt’s committed to championing the causes that matter most to you, Peter. Whether it’s securing access to quality, affordable healthcare, supporting our veterans, safeguarding our environment, or enhancing job opportunities, Matt wants to understand what matters to you most. Your input is incredibly valuable as we shape our strategy to serve our community and tackle the critical issues facing PA-08 for 2024 and beyond: | Thank you, Team Cartwright Last year, Matt Cartwright was one of only 5 Democrats to win a House race in a district that Donald Trump carried in 2020. He's gearing up for another tough re-election, and he needs your support to keep PA-08 blue. body:
Our petition closes at midnight!
| | | **BREAKING via CNN: "Top Republican House leaders all endorse Trump for president"**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/17155?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240118-BREAKING-TrumpEndorsementDefWontSupportRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240118-BREAKING-TrumpEndorsementDefWontSupportRF-Pros-sl1&akid=13250%2E9716520%2E6SlXUy)
**We need to respond _immediately_! [Sign our petition NOW to confirm that you _definitely_ will NOT vote for Donald Trump >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/17155?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240118-BREAKING-TrumpEndorsementDefWontSupportRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240118-BREAKING-TrumpEndorsementDefWontSupportRF-Pros-sl1&akid=13250%2E9716520%2E6SlXUy)**

Team -- It's only January, but Donald Trump is _already_ running away with the GOP nomination. He's building a commanding lead over his Republican challengers, **and now even his top Republican skeptics are lining up to endorse him!**

Now more than ever, it's clear that the GOP will _never_ stand up to Trump and his authoritarian agenda... **which means ONLY Democrats like us can stop him!**

We need to know that you're ready to do whatever it takes to stop Trump from returning to the White House. **So please, before our petition closes at midnight:**

**[Sign on to confirm that you _definitely_ will NOT vote for Donald Trump >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/17155?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240118-BREAKING-TrumpEndorsementDefWontSupportRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240118-BREAKING-TrumpEndorsementDefWontSupportRF-Pros-sl1&akid=13250%2E9716520%2E6SlXUy)**

Team DSCC

body:
We're reaching out one last time to ensure we don't miss your valuable input.

|
---

**THE ONLY OFFICIAL EMAILS FROM TED BUDD**

Patriot,

We've recently launched our 2024 Q1 Priority Survey, and your timely response is crucial in shaping our strategy for the upcoming elections.

Quick Recap:

Just three days ago, we reached out about your participation in our survey. If you've already responded, we sincerely thank you for your dedication. If not, we're reaching out one last time to ensure we don't miss your valuable input.

Here's Your Final Opportunity:

If you are committed to Conservative Wins in 2024 and want to help our party be better prepared for victory in November, CLICK HERE to complete the survey.

Your insights on issues like job creation, securing the border, supporting law enforcement, and more are vital.

ACT NOW - Survey Closes at Midnight:

This is your LAST CHANCE to make a significant impact. The survey door closes at midnight, so please take a moment to respond now.

| [ **RESPOND NOW** ](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c0503c344da6412ba0cfb2ae35afd034&_e=5LCyqySWNg49NTD3_OSB6jYY5TMYjrYm7cIOyRccBSK_Dm27GTKp0Z5_ExYHWGNGl0Op77uS7QYN18y6WCg0B0HtOCL8hm7bbo27P95XZuNlNGvCYs70kKCbS71Fu6mBZyPCqZv2U9RBOE_AB4qiNdzWrfUAvcDd7j1DtGRQ-v3FbMtgp7D6MdU69Acd_SKGB98F47Nw5impmranMwp2gTGXh5IuVVXMUCioOPx4kj9IzoIrCB3LvIJ0mZjNDU-9h5shGLDAmLJPfDCVrJHzrUh73mfeaGrBxDFQhQa7J2R84NjfIP3u0DWIovLtJPavsdYKr9ifgcnv1oRGXB1MdNHHp8XbTOFZGNxd2Eom3l4HeXiE7Mb3ziENFaBGyT-3oOYAaeUge-c_WXUW6eCz6A%3D%3D)

clean_body: We're reaching out one last time to ensure we don't miss your valuable input. | THE ONLY OFFICIAL EMAILS FROM TED BUDD Patriot, We've recently launched our 2024 Q1 Priority Survey, and your timely response is crucial in shaping our strategy for the upcoming elections. Quick Recap: Just three days ago, we reached out about your participation in our survey. If you've already responded, we sincerely thank you for your dedication. If not, we're reaching out one last time to ensure we don't miss your valuable input. Here's Your Final Opportunity: If you are committed to Conservative Wins in 2024 and want to help our party be better prepared for victory in November, CLICK HERE to complete the survey. Your insights on issues like job creation, securing the border, supporting law enforcement, and more are vital. ACT NOW - Survey Closes at Midnight: This is your LAST CHANCE to make a significant impact. The survey door closes at midnight, so please take a moment to respond now. | With your help, we will be ready for the most crucial election yet. Thank you for your unwavering support and dedication to our movement! Team Budd | Ted Budd is a father, small business owner, and conservative leader from North Carolina. | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

This comes after Inside Elections upgraded Texas from a "solid Republican" seat to a "Battleground," _and_ CNN called Ted Cruz the most vulnerable Republican in the country! **It couldn't be more clear, friend – we can win this race.**
**But now, Republican extremists are ready to spend _millions_ to prop up Ted Cruz.** They know just how vulnerable Cruz is, and they'll spare no expense to keep him in the Senate.
That's why we set a critical goal to raise $100,000 tonight: [**Please, will you rush $5, $10 or whatever you can spare to help me and The Long Run defeat Ted Cruz?→**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-allred-split.fIsyEE&refcode=em240118-1-t2&t=2&akid=5158%2E196590%2E6Zbta3)

name: Val Hoyle
subject: Workers’ rights are being threatened
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Hoyle For Congress**
body:
As a member of the Congressional Labor Caucus with 25 years of private sector experience, I believe workers should have a say at the bargaining table.
|

Peter — Earlier this month, I addressed Republican misinformation on the House floor about the National Labor Relations Board Joint Employment Standard (H.J. Resolution 98), issued by President Biden to protect workers' rights. The robust standard overturns the Trump administration's rule, opposing outsourcing and misuse of independent contractors. It ensures fair wages, hours, and safe working conditions. House Republicans want to overturn this stronger standard, enabling bad employers and undermining workers nationwide. [That’s why I need to ask: Will you join me in the fight for workers' rights by contributing to my reelection campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77320294/450069414/610551456?refcode=AU_VAH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240118_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTE0YTUxZC01YWI2LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kCl5gNw0RzkcPME6PZsy-NMKcC6yb8iZ89UmRuLNzLI=) | [CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77320295/450069415/610551456?refcode=AU_VAH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240118_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTE0YTUxZC01YWI2LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kCl5gNw0RzkcPME6PZsy-NMKcC6yb8iZ89UmRuLNzLI=)
---
As a member of the Congressional Labor Caucus with 25 years of private sector experience, I believe workers should have a say at the bargaining table. The joint employer rule by the Biden administration lifts up workers’ voices without impacting the proper use of independent contractors.
[Peter, your support is crucial in our ongoing battle for hard-working families. Please consider making a contribution today to support my reelection campaign. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77320296/450069416/610551456?refcode=AU_VAH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240118_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTE0YTUxZC01YWI2LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kCl5gNw0RzkcPME6PZsy-NMKcC6yb8iZ89UmRuLNzLI=)

name: George Whitesides
subject: BREAKING: The IAFF endorses our campaign!
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77320464/450069863/-46109959?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODE3ZGEzMi01YmI2LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zRVjsEW1aLQRGCIYmg_WbpH5rx1u1z42i2j06X_T7Fs=)
Peter, I’m coming to you with great news:

**The International Association of Fire Fighters (IAFF), the country’s main union for firefighters, has endorsed our campaign to flip CA-27 from red to blue.**

I’m so proud to have their support as we enter the final critical weeks before our primary Election Day. Fires are a threat to communities across the district and beyond, and we have to support the professionals who put their lives on the line to keep us safe.

**[I can’t wait to deliver on important firefighter legislation in Congress. But before that can happen, we need to finish strong before our primary – will you join the IAFF in supporting my campaign with a $3 donation?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77320465/450069864/-46109959?refcode=em-1.18.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODE3ZGEzMi01YmI2LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zRVjsEW1aLQRGCIYmg_WbpH5rx1u1z42i2j06X_T7Fs=)**
| ****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77320466/450069865/-46109959?refcode=em-1.18.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODE3ZGEzMi01YmI2LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zRVjsEW1aLQRGCIYmg_WbpH5rx1u1z42i2j06X_T7Fs=)****
---

This endorsement – like so many others from local and national organizations, leaders, and supporters like you – is an honor and a responsibility.

We have a golden opportunity to unseat a far-right extremist in Mike Garcia and replace him with a proven community leader and problem-solver. Unlike Garcia, I will make CA-27 my priority in Congress.

I’m energized to continue campaigning hard for our first responders, working families, and everyone in our district, to bring about positive change, and ultimately, unseat Mike Garcia in November.

**[But a challenge like this will take all of us. With less than 50 days until our primary Election Day, can I count on your support with a $3 donation today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77320467/450069866/-46109959?refcode=em-1.18.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODE3ZGEzMi01YmI2LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zRVjsEW1aLQRGCIYmg_WbpH5rx1u1z42i2j06X_T7Fs=)**

clean_body: | = Peter, I’m coming to you with great news: The International Association of Fire Fighters (IAFF), the country’s main union for firefighters, has endorsed our campaign to flip CA-27 from red to blue. I’m so proud to have their support as we enter the final critical weeks before our primary Election Day. Fires are a threat to communities across the district and beyond, and we have to support the professionals who put their lives on the line to keep us safe. = | **= This endorsement – like so many others from local and national organizations, leaders, and supporters like you – is an honor and a responsibility. We have a golden opportunity to unseat a far-right extremist in Mike Garcia and replace him with a proven community leader and problem-solver. Unlike Garcia, I will make CA-27 my priority in Congress. I’m energized to continue campaigning hard for our first responders, working families, and everyone in our district, to bring about positive change, and ultimately, unseat Mike Garcia in November. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, George | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. = To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to .
